lines.text: Oh please, I'm starving!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What are you going to do with all your leftover turkey?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm going to eat it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You could do that ... OR you could put it on the corner with a sign that says "FREE TURKEY."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Would you like my leftover turkey, Mortimer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, please.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yay! I can't wait for Thanksgiving!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, Thanksgiving was two days ago.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know! That means there's only 363 days left until the next Thanksgiving! It's so weird how fast it sneaks up on you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here you go, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: A gift? Thank you, Mortimer. What is the occasion?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why, it's Pre-Christmas, of course. *Gasp* Did you forget to buy me something?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I've never heard of that, and... hey, this box is empty!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm protesting the consumerism of Pre-Christmas by giving empty boxes this year. But it hurts me that you forgot.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: DECK THE HALLS WITH COWS NAMED DOLLY

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think it's "boughs of holly."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uh-oh. Farmer McGunderson's gonna be sooo mad.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can you proofread this for me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure, wha - hey, this is your résumé‎!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I'm applying for the position of a delivery drone.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, want to to come to my wine and cheese party? You bring the wine, I'll bring the cheese!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not falling for this again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, c'mon! It'll be fun! I'll even peel the plastic off this time!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know what's ironic: that the only way to get a bat out of your house is by using a bat.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean, a baseball bat? That doesn't seem like an effective way of getting a bat out of your house at all.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But let's pretend it is. Did I at least use "ironic" right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: After today, I'm taking a vow of silence.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Finally ... I mean, oh really? Why is that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because people just expect us to have these witty little exchanges every day. I'll talk when I want to talk. I'm not some trained monkey here to amuse everyone.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's right! You dropped out of college, didn't you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Actually, it was technical school and ... SHUT UP MONTE!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Doe, a deer, a female deer. Ray, a drop of golden suuuun.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm guessing you watched that Sound of Music Live show, huh?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah! And what a let down.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I heard it wasn't very good.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It wasn't. There weren't nearly as many vampires as I thought there were gonna be. Zero, in fact.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happpppy Sunnnnday, Morty. Howrrr youu?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you OK, Monte? You seem a little woozy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'mma be honestt with youu, Morty, I'm on my fourf marg. Where's the baffroom?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You drank four margaritas already?? Monte, it's only 11am!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No no nos, I ate three margherita pizzzzzas and now I sick.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Boy, that [FOOTBALL GAME] sure was crazy!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, it was a big deal.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That [PLAY] was really [NOTEWORTHY]!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you speaking in brackets?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You can hear them?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ... an astronaut suit, a box of cookies, seven penguins, mittens, new socks, an Optoma Projector, a drum set ...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Still working on your gift wishlist?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nope!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What the heck does 'tis mean? People are always telling me to do it to the season around this time of year...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Seriously? It means "it's"! I can't believe you didn't know that!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know your tone is really 'tis-ing me off, Monte.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay, Monte, so imagine a psychic goes into a fast food place and all he wants is a drink. Not a really big drink nor a really small one. What would you call that?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I would call that a weird and complicated setup to a really dumb joke.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, you'd call it a medium's medium! Wait, what was your answer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BEES, am I right?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ugh, I know!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I mean, they're all like, "bzzzz bzzz bzzzzzz bzzz bzzzzz."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Seriously, the WORST.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just last week, I was all, "Hey Bee!" and he was all, "Bzzzz bzzzz bzzz."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Psssh. Typical.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Aren't you the tiniest bit sorry we didn't get a Christmas tree? I mean, even though they're dirty and messy and corny and cliche."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: "I don't knoooooow, Margo!"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, no! You're supposed to say, "Well, where are you going to find a tree at this hour on Christmas eve?" and then a tree comes crashing through the window.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: "I should say it?"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You should say it! But not until ... oh I see what you did there.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, is there anything you want for --

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: SEXY MERMAN CHRISTMAS ORNAMENTS

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Umm...really?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Beauty is a universal good, Monte. It doesn't matter who you are. That's the true lesson of the yuletide season.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That is not correct.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why is it called "soccer?"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, actually, in other countries it's called "football."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Huh. Why is it called "football?"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I refuse to answer that.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm living the dream, pal!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're swimming in a river of gravy? You're being chased by the minotaurs? YOU'VE GOT ROBOT ARMS?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The vending machine gave me two candy bars.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, yeah. That could be a dream, too, I guess.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, did you hear? They put me in charge of the Woot Facebook page!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a lot of responsibility, Mortimer. We have a lot of likes on there.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, how many of them are from doctors? Because I'd really love to get some opinions on this rash I've got right...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Walking away now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, my first day in charge of the Woot Facebook page went great. I got a Woot-Off out of it!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, that was a lot of really hard work for the rest of us, Mortimer. Thanks. I hope you're happy with yourself.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I really am! Did you not get that from the first thing I said?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, being in charge is way harder than I thought it'd be.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, it's a lot of responsib ...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: MAKE ME A SANDWICH.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Huh. I guess it's not really all THAT hard.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So I got those things you asked for.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WELL IT TOOK YOU LONG ENOUGH. Just put them over there with the rest of it, I guess.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Next to the kazoos or the cocktail wieners?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If I have to tell you ... I MIGHT AS WELL JUST DO IT MYSELF. :::sigh::: It's so hard to find good help these days.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So wow. Much monkey. Very Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I see you've discovered the "doge" meme, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Such throb. What pain.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you all right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hit head. Such concussion.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We'd like to apologize that there was no Monkey Chat yesterday. It's just that, our new boss is really putting us through our paces, and we just don't have time to ... oh crap! Here he comes now! Forget I said anything.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey! Monte! You got time to lean, you got time to clean.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sorry, boss!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why don't people put candles in their Christmas trees anymore?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Because it's a huge fire hazard.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: See, I think it's beautiful! Just look at my tree! I lit two little candles and now the whole tree looks like one huge candle!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'll go grab the fire extinguisher.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thanks, Monte! Merry Christmas!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh! I barely got any money for Christmas this year! Like, look at this scarf my aunt gave me? How am I supposed to use that to buy stuff?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer! A handmade gift is a beautiful thing. Think of how much time and effort went into that scarf!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're right. I should see what her hourly rate is so I know how much to sell it for...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uuuuunnnnnggggg ...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Too much fruitcake again?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How'd you know?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Because I was using two of them as door stops, and now they're gone.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I want to see how long it takes this gum to run out of flavor. Will you time it for me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure. Ready? Go on 3 ... 2 ...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Never mind. It's gone already.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You swallowed it again, didn't you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Don't you find the term "human resources" kind of off-putting and Orwellian, Mortimer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How do you mean?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It just sounds like "humanity" is being lumped in with the other resources of a company -- the building, the assets, etc.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, um, totally. *Mortimer to HR, do you read? We have a free-thought renegade on floor five*

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Last Monday of the year!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yup.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Soon there will be another Monday!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yup.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nothing's going to change, is it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nope.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Big plans tonight?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I'm gonna par-tay!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And then what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Reflect on my bad decisions.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm so tired of making New Years Resolutions. This year, my resolution is not to make a resolution.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But isn't that a resolution of its own?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh my! WHAT HAVE I DONE?!?!?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, real quick question. Hypothetically, how many eggs is a dangerous amount of eggs to eat?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Depends on if their cooked or not.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay, let's say they were uncooked, hypothetically.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Let's hop in my car and finish this little talk on the way to the hospital, shall we?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I like cheese.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Cool.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No. I mean, I REALLY like cheese.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Like, you LIKE it like it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ... would you judge me if I said yes?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Could I get a glass of water?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure. Is filtered OK?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'd prefer tap, actually.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm sorry. We're all out.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I CAN'T LIVE LIKE THIS.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you think there was life on Mars, Mortimer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Jeez, I donno Monte. I don't seem like the most qualified person to ask.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, but I'm just asking you for your opinion.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well it just seems that by expressing my uniformed opinion I would be making a mockery of the entire scientific enterprise. Y'know.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I often wonder how you get through life.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Great news! We're getting the band back together!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You were never in a band.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: AW MAN, I BOUGHT THAT DENIM JACKET FOR NOTHING.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I just found out elephants have elbows!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah! They also have perfect pitch.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is that true?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't even know anymore.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mortimer, I'm going out for some brick oven pizza. You want any?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Um, no. Gross.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's wrong with brick oven pizza?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pizzas are supposed to have meat and vegetables on top, Monte. Not blocks and appliances.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ah, nothing I love more than a cup of strong coffee in the morning!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, everyone can tell that's hot chocolate. Nobody would put marshmallows in their coffee.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh! No marshmallows?! I tell ya, this whole drinking coffee thing makes less sense to me every day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you ever had Five Guys Burgers and Fries?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, it's pretty good.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I thought so too, but I only got through three guys burgers and two guys fries before they kicked me out.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know what I don't get?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No satisfaction?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nicely done.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, I've got a super busy week. I've got people to interview, deals to close, and wheels to spin.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What will you do when it's over?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Feast on the souls of my enemies.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You ever wonder what you'd do if the elevator became sentient and decided to hold you captive?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I have never wondered that in my life.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you wondering now?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Absolutely not.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm thinking about cooking lobster tonight. You want to come over for some?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh wow! That sounds awesome! Yes! Do you need me to bring anything?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nope! I figured we'd just split up the cooking process.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, what do you mean?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I mean I do the cooking part. You do the finding the loose lobster in my apartment and fighting it into submission part.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh! These daily doughnut walks get me so behind on my work!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Doughnut walks?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, when I walk through the whole office, past every desk, looking to see if anyone brought doughnuts.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know, people usually email around if they bring in treats.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can't get into my email. They suspended my account because I was sending too many all-company emails asking if anyone brought doughnuts.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can you even BELIEVE Tom Hanks got snubbed?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I know, right? He's truly an American institution. I don't know what the Academy was thinking.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: They were probably thinking "OUCH!" just like I was when I heard it. Snubbing a toe is the WORST.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I like making up words. Wanna try? I'll start. Blamtastic.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Geronimous.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Bunghole.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh ... bunghole is a real word. It's the hole in a barrel.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I'm pretty sure that's called a "barrel hole."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What did you think of that /www.youtube.com/watch?v=CSNAdo9Czns"">Cheerios commercial, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh I thought it was a little cheesy but sweet. What about you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not me, I hate it when ad agencies play with my feelings like that.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean how they played with your feelings of empathy and loss?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No! How they played with my feelings of hunger. All I could think about was how I wanted to steal that dumb little kid's Cheerios!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hominy looks like teeth.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Pliny the Elder called petrified shark teeth "tongue stones."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, homeboy was insane.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Woo! Work retreat starts tomorrow!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah! I'm excited for the breakout group!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really? You like all those smaller discussions?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh. Uh, I thought it was the group responsible for busting out of the seminar room and raiding the fridge.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I've got a problem. I wanna root for Seattle on February 2nd because we live here, but my doctor told me I'm a Denver fan.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Your doctor told you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah! He said I've come down with Bronco-itis, or something. Hey, by the way, I accidentally took a sip of your soda in the fridge because I thought it was mine.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know what, Mortimer, why don't you finish it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, I'm going to be working from the dentist's office tomorrow.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you really going to be working? Or do you just have a dentist appointment and not want to take a sick day?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How many times do I have to tell you, Monte: I work BEST when I'm under anesthesia!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I tell you, if I had a dollar for every time someone mistook me for Brad Pitt!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Let me guess, you'd ha ...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: TWO DOLLARS. I'd have two dollars.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK fine. No dollars.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just read a study that says that people who work until after 9 pm have trouble sleeping and are less productive the next day.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's interesting. So what do you think? Has that been your experience?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, I see what you're doing here.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you know Yo-Yo Ma was performing at the age of 5?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Psh. I was performing at the age of 5, too.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Putting underpants over your head and bumping into stuff isn't quite the same.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Art is art, dude.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you watch the Grammy Awards?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nope! It's tripe!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: True.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So, there are hockey teams that play games in baseball stadiums but there are no baseball teams that play games in hockey arenas. Is this not undeniable truth that hockey is better than baseball?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, it is not.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, there goes a lot of thinking down the drain. Thanks for nothing, Monte.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, I'm listening to The Who!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, cool! Great band, although I'm partial to The Kinks myself.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, you're supposed to say, "Who?" And then I'm supposed to say, "Exactly!" and then it'll be really funny.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But I understood that you were talking about the band.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh! Your intelligence is detrimental to our comic charm!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Gosh, you look really tired today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I am. I didn't sleep at all last night.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm sorry. Too much caffeine?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't know what it was. I just kept tossing and turning.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you try counting sheep?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I did. But you know how it is. By the time you get up, drive all the way to the farm and then drive back, you're wide awake again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey! You think you could loan me a couple bucks? I want to enter the office pool.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure. Here you go.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Cool, thanks.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So who you think's going to win?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Duh. Me. I'm gonna swim circles around that kid in the arm floaties.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you excited for the game, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I am! It's the only time of year that commercials appropriately represent the burgeoning simian-American population.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You mean there are a lot of ads with monkeys?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: In so many words, yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What do you call a cow with no legs?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This is going to be terrible, isn't it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: GROUND BEEF!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yep.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh man, did you see all those ads during the "Big Game?"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah! They were really bad!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Correct!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Umm, you missed our conversation yesterday, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry, I was busy scoping out a place to watch the Seahawks' parade. But I still didn't get as close as I wanted.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really? Even when you got there a day before?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, it was ridiculous. Supposedly the seats in the parade are "reserved for players and coaches only." Can you believe that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So, did you manage to snag one of those Party Time watches from Woot the other day?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, but I do always seem to miss out on the parties. Maybe it's because I don't have one of those watches!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh. Yeah. I'm sure that's totally it and that it's not at all because we haven't been inviting you. Heh heh. Hehhehheh. Ahem ...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Words that you hate. Go.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Slacks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Vestigial.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Shunt.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nubile.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ooh. Good one.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What time is it, Mortimer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Party Time!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Very funny, but what does your watch actually say?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It says "Party Time," because it's a Party Time Watch.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Quit joking around! I need to take my heart medicine every hour and I lost track of time.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sounds like a real PARTY FOUL, amiright Monte?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...and the sandwich didn't even have any cheese.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ha! That's just like a story Jarmby told at Troby's party.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Troby had a party?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's your favorite nut?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Doughnut.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Fair enough.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I have a great idea for a new type of pizza. Check it out: it's just like normal pizza, but instead of dough, you have more cheese!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, how would it stay together?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It wouldn't. You'd eat it out of a bowl.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, I don't think so, Mortimer...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just because of the bowl? So I guess you don't like soup then, huh? Or are you just A HUGE HYPOCRITE?!?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm thinking of applying to music schools. It's about time I start taking my kazoo-ing seriously.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I wasn't even aware there was a way to take kazoo-ing seriously.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Go on, Monte. Keep hating. It'll only fuel my desire to write the first ever kazoo-only symphony.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Happy Valentine's Day, Mortimer!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Meh.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh don't be that way. Love is in the air!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is THAT what that smell is? Ugh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Unggggggg

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Too many conversation hearts?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ungggggg

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's what I thought.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, do you want to join my fantasize baseball team?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure! I love fantasy baseball. Is it a roto or head-to-head -- wait, what did you say?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Fantasize baseball. We sit around and think about what the top players would look like with long, windswept hair.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How do you determine the winner?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Everybody wins in fantasize baseball.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Woo! I love this new boomerang.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It looks pretty cool.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Only one problem: It doesn't come back after I throw it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, there's a technical term for that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What is it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: A "stick."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've been practicing my language skills for my upcoming foreign vacation.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh yeah? Wanna try a phrase on me? Ask me for directions to the post office.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I NEED DIRECTIONS TO THE POST OFFICE. POST ... OFFICE ... NEEDY ... DIRECTIONY.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're so ready.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh man, it's Taco Wednesday!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Most people do Taco Tuesday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's called individuality through procrastination! Try it some time!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you wearing sunglasses, Mortimer? Wait, are you crying?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, it's just that I chopped an onion last night.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And it's still affecting you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: IT WAS SO YOUNG!!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So, I think we should get rid of cable.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We could just subscribe to a service like Netflix or Hulu or Amazon Prime and ...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: NOOO!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But think of all the money we could ...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: NOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What would you do if you found a bunch of money in an envelope on the street?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'd take it immediately to the police station and turn it in.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK. Same question, but with used chewing gum instead of money.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Between the "doge" and "Lolcats" memes, I think I've figured out the key to internet success.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh yeah?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, you just post a picture of an animal speaking in some kind of broken, internally consistent English.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Eye donno Mont-ee. Doezn't zound funnee.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ACHOO! Stay back, dude. I'm sick.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, I'll be fine. I've got diplomatic immunity.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not what - actually, never mind. You'll learn the hard way.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Your breath smells like diesel. Just sayin'.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ugh, can we be done with "just sayin'" now? Can we step away from these two-word phrases that add no value to our lexicon and make us look like infantile Internet geeks at best and, at worst, complete morons?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay, good point. From now on, "just sayin'" is SO OVER.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I'd like to do a science experiment. I want to see if there is a maximum level of minty freshness the mouth can reach.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're just trying to get all of my breath mints, aren't you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What?? How could you accuse me of such a thing? Why, I ought to fine you thirty breath mints for that!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm going on a kale diet. All kale, every meal.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That sounds like a lot of greens, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wait, greens? I thought kale was a breed of crab.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, can I borrow your car?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh good. Because I already did and also I crashed it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait. I don't have a car.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: NOW YOU TELL ME.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh. I really hate this time of year.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What time of year ... awards season?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: People are constantly confusing me with George Clooney.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You don't say.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It just gets really old, ya know?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I bet.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, guess what? I got a nose job!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really? You look the same to me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, it hasn't started yet.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What, what hasn't started yet?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My new job ... as a Yankee Candle quality assurance specialist!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ... And you're always cheating at ping-pong, and you never rinse the dishes, and I am tired of having to explain your behavior at dinner parties!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, what's that by your ear?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Eh? Where?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Right here! Looks like you've got a big ol' CHIP ON YOUR SHOULDER!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you doing? WHY ARE YOU DRINKING SUPER GLUE?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: To mend my broken heart.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know what I could go for? A gyro.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, it's actually pronounced 'gyro.'

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: 'Gyro?'

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: 'Gyro.'

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh! 'Gyro.'

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Exactly. 'Gyro.'

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm trying to be healthier. From now on, I'm not eating sandwiches with any meat in them. Just bread.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um, the bread is actually less healthy than the meat, as long as you don't overdo it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're right. From now on, I'll eat only the meat. No bread. But I'll eat four times the meat I usually eat to make up for the bread.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: See, that's overdoing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're right. I will quadruple my sandwich intake. For health.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why do I even try to talk to you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think you need a nickname.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No I don't.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How about "Sugar." You don't mind if I call you "Sugar" do you?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I do actually.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's settled then. Hi, Sugar! How are you today?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you think those little foosball players look like they've lined up for a kick routine, or am I the only one?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You are most assuredly the only one.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, then the guys in the break room are gonna be really confused when they see all the miniature hot pants.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I've seen so much funny and shocking stuff on the internet, I'm not sure if anything can amuse or surprise me anymore.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you seen this yet?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What -- wait -- HAHAHAHAHAHA.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You were saying...?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey buddy! Another week! Ready for some hilarious hijinks?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why won't it ever just end?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you doing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uh, DUH. Same thing I do every day. Putting turnips in the doorway to ward off dragons. Grandma always said, "Turnips in your doorway keeps the dragons at bay."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's definitely insane.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh really? When's the last time we were eaten by dragons? Never. BOOM. Proof. You're welcome.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, it's 3/12! National Chicago Day, get it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, because of 312? I like that. Let's celebrate by doing some Chicago stuff.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Good idea. I'll ruin pizza. You complain about winter weather on Facebook.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sounds great!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's 3/13! National Palindrome Day!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You realize there's AT LEAST one "palindrome date" every month, right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You just blew my mind...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What is up with beets anyway?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How do you mean?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I mean they taste like dirt. Why would anyone eat them voluntarily?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What would you suggest instead?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Cotton candy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm just saying, I've never met a cheese sauce I didn't like.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, we were talking about the debt ceiling.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Exactly.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whatcha workin' on, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: My new software company. It helps people who are frustrated by programs like Office, Outlook, and Word.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh so it replaces those programs?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, it actually provides mods for those programs to make them suck less.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Good idea! What's your company called?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Metasoft.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm trying to find the words to describe my favorite dinosaur.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh yeah? Which one is that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thesaurus.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are we friends?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you seen the latest hilarious Internet video?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, not yet.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh man! Have you been following the many great dramas on television these days?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, no, but -

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you heard the latest top 40 songs? What about all those award-winning films you said you wanted to see? Did you download that app I told you about? HAVE YOU BEEN READING AWESOME POPULAR EMAILS ON THE INTERNET?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I need a nap.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, what's that you got for lunch? Looks good!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's a frozen burrito. I bag-cooked it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: bag-cooked it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, you know, the style of cooking where you put a frozen meal in your bag, forget about it for a week, then find it again and just eat it because it's fully thawed.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Remember when I said it looks good a second ago? I rescind that comment.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, did you hear about March Gladness? Woot's two week tournament of happiness?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh! Does the internet really need anymore happiness?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Actually, yes. It's a terrible, negative place...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What??? But I love it!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's because you're part of the problem.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So who do you think is going to be #1 on Yahoo Movies' list of Greatest Actors? DeNiro? Streep? Day-Lewis?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If I had my vote, it'd be the guy who played the piano in Big.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Tom Hanks? Robert Loggia?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, the guy who actually played the ROLE of the piano. He was so convincing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So, whatcha doing this butts?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm sorry, what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: This butts. Got any plans? I was thinking of going to this music festival, but it's only this butts. Wanna come?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think someone hacked your iPhone and replaced "weekend" with "butts." Either way, no thanks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nah, I've always just called "butts" butts. Sounds way more butts. Anyway, suit yourself. See ya next butts!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: *GASP* *GASP* *GASP* How did --- *GASP* How did you beat me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm sorry?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Our race around the world. *GASP* You beat me back here and I thought I had set a record time for global circumnavigation!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What race around the world?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte! I had a terrible dream! I dreamed we were trapped in some kind of cyberworld, subjected to a lifetime of forced banter peppered with marketing messages and -

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um ...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: NOOOOOOOOO!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Bleh! This salad is pretty terrible.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: They all are!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't believe they called the basketball tournament got cancelled after the first round.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It wasn't. There are just a few days off between the third and fourth rounds.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Time off? What a bunch a slackers. Now, if you'll excuse me, this has been a long talk, and I could use a nap.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ah, here's the fool. Methinks a prank upon him I shall play!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, how many times do I have to tell you: soliloquies don't work in real life.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't know what you're talking about, Monte! But here, you should pull my finger.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Forsooth, someone has alit him unto my devious plan! But who???

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm so glad I've started to floss regularly. It's really made a big difference.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good for you. I bet your dentist is pleased.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't see how it's any concern of hers. Wait ... what are you talking about?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are YOU talking about?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: .skaeP niwT gnihctaw detrats tsuj I

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: .maerd s'repooC htiw eno eht nees tsuj ev'uoy emussa I oS

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: !em rof ti niur t'noD !ON ?tahW

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Which comic strip character is your favorite, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a tough one, but I think solely for breadth of investigation into the human condition it has to be Funky Winkerbean.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I know what you mean. I liked his glasses.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What about you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's a tough call but I'm going to have to go with myself.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So, um, "larceny" is a bad thing, correct?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I am terminating this conversation right now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What is tis nonesens aobut Woot herring a edditor?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Serioiusley ! Whats worng wiht or spellg and gammar?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Huh?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh man, this crazy power outage is killing me! I mean, I haven't had electricity at home in nearly four days. And there hasn't even been a storm!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Jeez, Mortimer. You should call the power company.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Huh? What's a power company?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, I think I see the problem here.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh. This is frustrating me. What's that song where they're talking about the train?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um, do you have any other details about it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No. I do not. Now please stop stalling and answer my question.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know what I love most about you?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Your smile.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But, I don't really ever smile.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know what they say. Absence makes the heart grow fonder.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Tell me something I don't know.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Every time you go to the bathroom in the middle of the night, you pee a little on the floor, and then I step in it in the morning.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I said tell me something I don't know.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, you should follow me on Facebook for exclusive opportunities and insider info!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you asking me to be your Facebook friend? You don't need to promote it like that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Refer your friends to my page!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why would I do that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It doesn't matter. Just like me! Like me! Oh, please, won't somebody like me?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey dude, I got tickets for tomorrow's Seattle Seahawks home opener! Wanna go?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, football season doesn't start for a while. It sounds like someone sold you tickets to a fake game.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But if it's a fake game, how come he made me pay with real money?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Say, Monte, why do bagels have holes in the middle?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Because nobody likes you, that's why.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, when you cook brisket, how do you mix it up?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mix it up? I don't follow.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know, like, do you do half basket, half brick? Or do you put a little more brick in than basket?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I want to say something witty and insulting right now, but I'm at a loss for words.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You wouldn't happen to know anything about this new twitter account, @dumbwootmonte, would you, Mortimer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uh... what? No... but it sounds... pretty funny.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I want you to take it down. Right now!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's not me! I swear!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: @dumbwootmonte just tweeted, "Derr-ba-derrr, I constantly accuse my friends of dumb stuff. Derr-ba-derr."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That does sound like something you would say! Man, whoever is behind this is a comic genius!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What the CRAPP is this about?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, duh? Woot's got a shiny new iPhone app available in the App Store.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know! Didn't you hear the extra "p" when I said "crapp?!" That was the joke! For crying out loud, I can't carry this double-act alone, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ah, so THAT'S the basis of this relationship.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You mean RELATIONSHAPP?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I do not.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: When was the last time you were kissed? Like, really good and kissed?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I know what you're getting at and I'd really just prefer that you ... AAAAACK!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: There. Now you can say "today!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Great. Thanks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're welcome!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I'd like to collaborate with you on a movie. It'd be a parody of John Steinbeck's the Grapes of Wrath and it'd be called... wait for it... the APES OF WRATH! Eh?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you even read the Grapes of Wrath?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, no. And hat's where you come in!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay, what if we did a funny version of Don Quixote and called it Don Quixot-ape?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You haven't read that one either, have you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sure I have. It's an action-adventure story about a good man who fights a renegade windmill.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, what's that on your wrist?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's a magic bracelet that tracks all my movements.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's so great to see you take an interest in your health!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If I really work at it, I can keep my steps per day under 100. Lowest score wins, right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm so sick of this thing, "Said nobody ever."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, that's ridiculous. Of course somebody has said "I'm so sick of this thing" before.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, no, no, I'm sick of the trend in which people end sentences with, "Said nobody ever."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Said nobody ever.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Right.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I'm saying that nobody has ever said that they're sick of the "Said nobody ever" trend, because it's so great.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: *Sigh*

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why do people play chess when they can play checkers? Checkers is such an easier game.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Applying that logic, why would anyone do anything challenging?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That was going to be my next question!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, did you know that if you dye an egg, the chick inside will turn out to be the same color!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's... that's not true.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh. Uh, really? I think I might have a problem with my chicken.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Probably.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, you have a chicken? And you're dying its eggs before they hatch???

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Monday!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Incorrect.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't like vinyl records. I don't like them for the same reason I don't like books.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh yeah? What's that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't eat them.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're just the worst.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If I asked you who you'd rather go to the movies with - Rhett or Rick - that would be a Rhett-or-Rick-al question, right? Eh??

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you ever thought about how much you could do if you put your mind to something other than dumb jokes?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No. It would take too much mind power away from the dumb jokes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So this is Unreal Words Scrabble. I'll go first. I play QTUTMHI. I win.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This game isn't fun at all.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sore loser much?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here comes the sun, na na na na. Here comes the sun, na na na na. It's all right.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I love that song.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What song? I was just warning you that the sun was about to cast its death rays upon us, but it's fine now because I closed the curtains.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, just a heads up. I was sleepwalking last night, and I'm pretty sure I buttered the dog. Just slathered that stuff all over him.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We don't have a dog.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, we don't have any butter now, either.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, I heard you signed up for a 5K!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah! I've been training and trying to get more active, having an end goal was really great for me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I was going to ask you for more information but I thought you signed up for $5,000 ... not something "active".

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, do you want to look at pictures of my vacation?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nope!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've got World Cup fever! I've been practicing all my favorite moves.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's great, but it's really time to buckle down and get some work done.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh! Ow! Ow! I'm down! He got me! I'm out! Where's the penalty card?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you call them pancakes or cakepans?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Pancakes. No one calls them cakepans.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh! You sound like every waiter or waitress I've ever met.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Please vote with either yay or nay. How shall we celebrate it being May: By taking a long lunch? Or going to see a movie? Or having a nice cocktail?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nay, nay, and nay.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, then it's settled. We shall make sandwiches.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why is it settled?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because what else are we going to do with all these may-nays?! Hey-yo!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I hate you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I had the worst dream last night. I was on a plane, but every single passenger was a screaming baby. Even the flight attendants and pilots were screaming babies.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, sorry about that.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How is this your fault?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was trying out the "screaming baby" feature on my new white noise machine, and it must have crept into your subconscious.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm so tired I could eat a horse.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think you mean you're so HUNGRY you could eat a horse.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I mean I'm so tired that if I'm not careful, I might do something unspeakable like eat a horse by accident.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mortimer! Have you ever had a fresh fig? I got some this weekend at the farmer's market!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh no, thanks Mortimer, I don't eat wasps.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wh... what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, Mortimer, didn't you know that fig wasps co-evolved with the tree? They're the only thing that pollenates it, many end up dying in the figs.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This seems so so untrue.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I ASSURE YOU IT IS NOT, it was the last FigFact I read on my Fig-A-Day calendar before I decided I will never eat a fig again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's with the electrodes all over your head?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's called Mindball. You try to move this metal ball across the table with your relaxed mind. The more vacant your brain, the easier it is to move the ball.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, yes, I tried that once.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How'd it go?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I broke the neighbors' window.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you doing with that globe?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Trying to find Billy Ocean.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've decided to get into the business of writing book blurbs. Check this out: "A tour de force of tenderness and language playgroundary!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Playgroundary is not a word.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You feedback is: "Magnificent and unforgettable! Five thumbs way up!"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, clear something up for me: A chameleon is different from a chamelein, because it blends in with the surface it's ON, not the room it's IN, right?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, only one of those things exists. There is no such thing as a chamelein.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh. Then I've got a bone to pick with a lizard salesman.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, when I go like :::this::: does it make me look like I have cleavage?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No. It just looks like you stuffed a big knife down your shirt.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Cool! That's exactly what I was going for.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ... so the morel of the story is, don't eat mushrooms that grow in a dumpster!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh I see what you did there. Nice.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, Monte, yo momma's so dumb that...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh... have you forgotten what day it is?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: SO DUMB THAT SHE THOUGHT YOU FORGOT MOTHER'S DAY BUT REALLY YOU WERE SETTING UP A SURPRISE PARTY BECAUSE YOU LOVE HER SO MUCH

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good save.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Looking forward to having everybody over for my big party on Friday!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yup! It's gonna be great. Oh, but don't forget that Torby is vegan.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Right.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And Cormie has that gluten thing. And I'm not doing carbs. And Smapdi won't eat anything with stems. Oh, oh, and Jarson's on the Yeti diet. And -

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay. Party's cancelled. Stay away from my house.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't forget about the tournament tomorrow morning! Be sure to bring your racket and balls. And your new shoes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay. What time are you going to get there?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Tennish.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Will you sign my petition to get two separate words for the two separate feedbacks: the opinion kind and the guitar kind?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No. Because confusing the two has never been a problem for me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, congratulations to you! What a privileged life you lead to never get harsh guitar feedback when all you want is constructive criticism.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you seen any of the new original programming from Archive.org? It's like, "Hello! Have you heard of color film??"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think you're watching really old movies. Like from the 20s or 30s.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Really?? I had no idea Archive.org had been around for that long!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you think I can pull off this hat?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, uh ... I didn't realize you were wearing a hat.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Success!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Who do you think is the most underrated actor of our time?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, I dunno. Sam Rockwell? Maybe Mark Ruffalo?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was thinking the guy who played the guy waiting at the bus stop in that movie, The Guilt Trip.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I have no idea what you're talking about.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Exactly.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So, on Friday, I took my two kittens to get spayed/neutered - one's a boy and the other's a girl, you see.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Aw, I didn't know you got kittens!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, so, as I was waiting for them, I heard one of them really yowling. I asked the nurse which one she thought was screaming and without pause she said "the boy". I asked how she knew and she said, "Because in spays, no one can hear you scream!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You don't have any kittens do you?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...And then we went to the bar, where we had some really tasty poutine.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How can you order that in good conscience?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh. What do you mean?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Think of the Russian citizens, Monte. Not cool.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...So that's when I realized there MUST have been asparagus in that salad after all!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Never tell me that story again. Never talk to me again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't you ever wonder if airplane pilots and helicopter pilots meet up in the air and have propeller fights?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nope. I have never wondered that and never will.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well then, I will take you off the list of people I want to read my screenplay!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I got a product idea: Wall-Nuts! They're walnuts ON A WALL!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So each nut comes with a wall of its own? That'd be impossible to ship, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, this is the brainstorming phase here, man! No such thing as a bad idea! Anyway, I was thinking Wall-Nuts could also glow in the dark and work as a cell phone.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm opening a tubed meat restaurant. Got any name ideas?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I Never Sausage a Place

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Dressed to Kielbasa

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: For Batter or for Wurst

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Winner!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Which mythical creatures do you think are real?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: None of them. That's why they're "mythical."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I hear what you're saying, but I think I'm gonna have to go with the narwhal.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Narwhals ARE actually real.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You see! All you have to do is believe!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte! Check out my tail!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Whoa, what? Why is it full of sparkles and red paint?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's the new fad! It's called TailBerry, and I'm having a party this weekend so that we can talk tails and try some on. Here's the catalog if you want a sneak peek!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: YOU PAY $50 FOR ONE? Did you just start selling so you could buy more of these?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: They're going to break my tail if I don't meet this month's sales goal, and then how will I apply the TailBerries, Monte, HOW!?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I can't believe I didn't know about that shortcut to work.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know, Kant believed in a sort of "synthetic a priori knowledge" borne of a filtering mechanism universally present in every mind.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I had no idea you were familiar with Kant.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It was written in a toilet stall.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ugh. Tomorrow's gonna be terrible. I've gotta have a colonoscopy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Tomorrow will be worse for me, dude.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How could it possibly be worse?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have to go to Florida.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a good point that bears reiteration just in case there's any confusion: Florida is worse than a colonoscopy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm on this new diet. It's called the Parsley Diet. It's just parsley all the time. Every meal: parsley. No sugar, no meat, no dairy, no anything that isn't parsley.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Looks like you've got a little cilantro mixed in with your parsley salad there, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OH NO! I'M GONNA GET SO FAT!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here's my theory: they made "farce" and "farts" sound so similar because they're both words that describe funny things.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not where "farce" comes from.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OMG, DID YOU JUST SAY "FARTS"??? HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Take me out to the ball game.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Take me out with the crowd.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Buy me some peanuts and crack, or jack.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't care if I never ... wait, what did you say?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's that smell?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That, my friend, is the sweet coupling of INTIMIDATION and FEAR.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Kinda smells like pizza.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, that? Yeah. That is pizza. Hungry?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh... Mortimer, are you OK? You look... rough, and your eyes are bloodshot.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: DON'T MIND ME MONTE, I'VE JUST BEEN PLAYING MARIO KART 8 FOR 48 HOURS STRAIGHT.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WAIT, DID YOU CHANGE SOMETHING, YOU LOOK LIKE A RAINBOW.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OH GOD IT'S HAPPENING AGAIN, I'M FALLING FALLLLLLING

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Welp, the old computer finally bit the bucket. Any idea where I could buy a new one?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, it's "kicked the bucket." And WE actually have a website that exclusively sells computers now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You mean Woot? Or Sellout? Or Tech, which is now called Electronics?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: None of those words are "computers." Computers.Woot will sell computers. Go to Computers.Woot for computers.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do they sell T-shirts?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I hate you more and more every day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh man, you know what I really like?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's not silence. I know that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you seen this video, What Does The Wolf Say?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean What Does The FOX Say?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Same thing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: There is so much wrong with this conversation that I think I'll just stop participating in it...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's the big deal about the pyramids? It's, like, not a very difficult shape to make!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, they are, you know, really big.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, so the Egyptians make a big pyramid and it's "one of the wonders of the world," but I make a 20-egg omelet, and it's a "bad life choice." You're such a hypocrite, Monte.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If Candy Land had a prison, who would be the warden?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Dr. Silas Peppermint, III.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sweet.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Tee hee. Hehehehehe.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you laughing about?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm imagining someone singing that song, "I've Got a Lovely Bunch of Coconuts" in a Christopher Walken voice.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Of course you are.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm really enjoying this new Human Simulator game. Have you played it, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ew, no, that sounds disgusting.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's definitely disgusting. They barely have any hair on them, and they just kinda wiggle around on two feet, and they can hardly even jump!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: UGH, GROSS, STOP

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Another awesome week ahead, eh buddy?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: My life has no meaning.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you want to see the new historical documentary about the pudding wars?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's it called?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Custard's Last Stand.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, Monte. Did you hear what the robber said when he stole all the Tic Tacs from the store?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: "This is a Tic up"?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No! He said, "Put all the friggin' Tic Tacs in a bag and no one gets hurt." I'm talking about the news, Monte. This isn't a joke.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I've got the BEST IDEA! You know the World Cup? Well, we should make a mug that's shaped like a globe! Get it? It'd be a World Cup! Eh?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I bet if you spent some time looking around the internet, you could find out that something exactly like that already exists.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh! If only the internet was easy to navigate. Wait, Monte: I have another idea! It'd be a thing where you type in something and it brings up all the websites about that thing! We could call it, "Search."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You certainly have a lot of fresh ideas today, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh! I tried to make banana pudding last night, but no matter how hard I tried I could just NOT crush the banana down to a pudding consistency!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um, that's how you make banana pudding.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wha???

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, it's a sweet custard with banana flavors or chopped bananas in it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh man, really??? Because that would totally explain what went wrong with the blood pudding I tried to make too!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Knock knock.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm busy, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: KNOCK. KNOCK.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: *sigh* Who's--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just ate your toast.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, knock knock!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Who's there?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Figs!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Figs, who?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Figs the doorbell, it's broken!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OH! You just reminded me, I need to call my dad today!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you want to go see the new indie film about the paranormal shepherds?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's it called?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Goat Busters.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: [HILARIOUS MISUNDERSTANDING ABOUT WAFFLE IRON]

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: [SCATHING COMMENT ABOUT COMPETENCE]

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Excuse me, sir. But your gym membership was actually up a month ago. I can't allow you access today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you talking about? I don't have a gym membership, and this is the bathroom.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Regardless, we're still going to charge you for the next three months.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Makes sense.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think I have that thing where I hear colors...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't believe you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay, so what color would you say your scarf is?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Orange.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: See, I heard that!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you know monkeys are 100% water?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not true.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes it is.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is that a crossbow?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: GOOOOOOOOOOOOO

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait ... what? Why are you yelling!?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OOOOOOOOOOOOOOO

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ugh, I guess you finally figured out what the World Cup was?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OOOOOOOOOOOOATS

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ah, yes. There we go.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ... and what's the deal with airline food, am I right?!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm living an inescapable nightmare.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know what's weird about cheesesteak sandwiches? They don't have cheese OR steak on them.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: They have both of those items.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, right, right. I was thinking of peanuts.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't you think it's weird that there are spices that aren't spicy?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Not really.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well then you're part of the problem, not the solution, Monte.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, I can finally say all the negative stuff about Lebron James I've been meaning to say.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: He opted out! He no longer gets his emails!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um, he opted out of his contract, with the Miami Heat... not our email list. I doubt he ever subscribed to our emails.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Really? Because the first bad thing I was gonna say was that he was always ignoring us!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Crickets. Why do I keep hearing crickets? Can you hear the crickets?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: There they are again!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Listen. I know I don't say it enough, so I'm going to say it now. You really mean a lot to me, Monte. You're so smart, and you're a really good friend. I don't know what I'd do without you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Awww, thanks buddy. That makes me feel really ...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ... Monte, can you keep it down? I'm talking to my best friend Monte on the phone.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, do you think that if someone loses a leg while doing something "evil" but later reforms and dies a "good" person, would their leg go to hell while they go to heaven?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Alright, you got me, I almost wanted to give you a real answer to that!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Gah, that drive to work was - wait hold on, I'm a monkey.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, it's weird. I don't even know how we landed these jobs, to be honest.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, those little seashell candies were terrible.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Those were decorative soaps.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ack! I'd better wash it down with this purple viscous liquid.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a candle.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, Monte. Know anyone who cleans ovens for a living? Because I've got a little job for them...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What happened? Did you just dump a bunch of pizza toppings and cheese into your oven again?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I actually prefer to say that I made pizza with an infinitely thin crust.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Cinco de Mayo!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um, it's actually the Fourth of July.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know. I'm behind on my holiday celebrations. I'll say Happy Independence Day on Labor Day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man. I wish it was the Fourth of July every day.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So you could relive the splendor of yesterday's festivities over and over again?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No. So Bill Murray has a reason to do a sequel to Groundhog Day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, long weekends are the greatest. They need to put the Fourth of July on a Friday every year!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: See, at least that would be a topical White House petition.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I STILL BELIEVE IN THE FUNDAMENTAL RIGHT OF ACCESS TO NACHO CHEESE AT ALL TIMES, MONTE

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whew! Back from the big holiday weekend! Time to catch up on some serious spreadsheets, eh, buddy?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I wish I had a hernia.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Come on, it's gonna be great!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I wish you had a hernia.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you know about this crazy clan thing that's happening on Woot right now?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah! There's a blog post about it and everything! I'm in the Squarrels clan.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What? But I'm in the Betta Koi!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Gosh, looks like we won't be able to talk to each other for a while.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wait, why wouldn't we-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Clan business! Gotta run!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh man, can't wait to use my new juicer for the first time tonight!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You got a new juicer? What are doing with your old juicer? Because I would take it...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry Monte, no can do. The old juicer is the first thing I'll be juicing with my new juicer.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Huh?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know, ashes to ashes, juice to juice.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What the crap is going on today? Everybody's wearing party hats and there's a wizard in the break room.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, we're celebrating our 10th birthday, you chimp. We've got tons of amazing deals lined up, a massive game for our community to play, and a livestream packed with awesome videos.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hard to believe it's been 10 years.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's because every second with you is an agonizing eternity. Happy birthday, buddy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte ... you awake?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: zzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzz ...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte? Psssssssst. Are you awake?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: zzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzz ...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey. Hey Monte. Are you ...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I SAID ZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZ!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So, what are you going to be for Halloween?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, it's only July.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: MONTE, pun costumes take months, MONTHS to appropriately plan out!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So, what are you going to be?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Eggs Benedict Cumberbatch!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte! Over the weekend I downloaded a fun new app for my tablet!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You don't own a tablet.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh really?! What do you call this, then?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a toilet seat.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BEEP BOOP. Aw, man! Low batteries again!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, what are you doing here? I thought you got fired.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh no! I just couldn't find my backpack, so I decided to take stuff home in a box.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But your eyes were tearing up.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Turns out, I'm allergic to boxes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte! Guess which sandwich grosses me out!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Please?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Fine. Which sandwich grosses you out?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Bilirubin sandwiches!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're just the worst.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Say, Monte, I'm having a number contest. What's your favorite number?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hm. I don't know if I've ever considered that question before.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It doesn't matter! Because whichever number you pick, it's automatically one!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, right, because of-
