lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because it's won!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, I was keeping up with the-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And one and won sound the same!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Right, I understood that-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The number contest is over now, Monte. You're dismissed.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But you came into my office!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: DISMISSED!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you taping everything to the ceiling?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I need to clean the floors.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why don't you j--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: CLEANING THE FLOORS, MONTE.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you taping everything to the ceiling?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I need to clean the floors.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why don't you j--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: CLEANING THE FLOORS, MONTE.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Want to go zip lining today?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I can't. I have to reorganize my shirts.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I already did that for you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You did?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I composted them. C'mon ZIP LINE ZIP LINE.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte I'm going to need you to be real quiet I have a pretty bad headache.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm sorry, Mortimer, I hope you feel better.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Shhh.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, why are turning the lights off?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Shhhhhhh.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, this is MY office.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I SAID SHHHHHH

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I got a new computer!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's a shoebox with the word 'COMPUTER' handwritten on the side, crossed out, and replaced with the word 'COMPUTER' again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, it's got tons of ram!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is that what that doodle is supposed to be? A ram?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And it has a great touchscreen!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean the cling wrap? How much did you pay for this?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, that's what you needed $100 for? You said it was a life and death situation.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I can't wait to play Life & Death 4 on it!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It also has a shoe holder!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I need a wrench.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I already gave you one.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I need another one. Quick.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Fine, here.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Maybe a huge rubber band too?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why do--WHERE'S THE TOILET?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Listen, are you gonna help me finish this catapult or not?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pardon me, sir, do you have any peanut butter?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, I know it's you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I am a butter connoisseur and would like to assess the quality of this 'peanut' variety.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Your mustache is falling off.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No it isn't.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's on the floor.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I like it there. Peanut butter please.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just invented the sandwich.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The sandwich has been around since the 18th century.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh really. Then tell me you've seen THIS before.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: AAAAAH WHAT'S THAT?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The world's first sandwich.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: IT'S A GIANT GLOWING TARANTULA!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes. I've named him Sandwich.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I borrow your scissors?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: For what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't tell you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well then--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK, it's NOT to cut key paragraphs out of the book you're reading and replace them with brioche recipes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Here are my scissors.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yo Monte, have you seen my truck?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's still out back in the swimming pool.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Right. Check ya later then.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, unrelated: Do you have a crane? That I can use? Right now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, just FYI I'm going to take tomorrow off because of a spider infestation.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Gross, what happened?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh no no, it's a thing that's going to happen. Mark knows what he did.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here, fly this kite with me

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This is a pizza

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then eat this kite with me

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's a pizza

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YOU'RE A PIZZA

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you have 'War and Peace'?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes! O, to see how the Napoleonic era affects Tsarist society through the eyes of the five Russian aristocratic families is truly breathtaking in scope!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I cried when Pierre and Natasha got married.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So it's a book?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I found a penny!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: In your penny collection!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Stop doing that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No thanks!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I AM INVINCIBLE

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Please get off the table

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I SHAN'T

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: One of the legs is broken

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok I'm down

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ... and, hey, have you ever noticed how airline food ... dance like ... and women, am I right?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're going to have to be able to pull off this standup routine without the notecards, I think.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Take my wife ... pizza!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm reading a book about a neurologist who was studying brain scans of psychopaths & discovered that his own brain matched the same profile of a psychopath.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I had something like that happen once.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Turns out I was using someone else's toothbrush.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh COME ON.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Harold!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, hey Diane! DIANE!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: DAVID, HEY DAVID!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you talking to me?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YEAH you have all these name tags all over your cape!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I have no idea who would have done that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The "Buttface" one at the bottom is my favorite.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you know that if you take all the hotdogs in the world and line them up end-to-end, they would reach all the way to the moon?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow. The moon? Really?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did I say "moon"? Sorry. I meant "my mouth."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's the funniest thing you've ever said?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh. Uh ... I dunno ...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: AHHHH HAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA! Good one, Monte!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know the phrase "You can lead a horse to water-"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: "...but you can't make it drink," yes. Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just disproved it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no, what did you do?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Relax, it was a bear in a horse suit and it's only a little buzzed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm making broccoli for dinner.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Just broccoli?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yup.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How are you preparing it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well first I need to plant these broccoli seeds and then we need to wait 100 days.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Never mind, I'm ordering a pizza.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What would you do if you found $1000 on the street?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'd turn it into the police station.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: New question. What would you do if you found $1000 worth of jelly beans?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here. I bought you flowers because I love you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: These aren't flowers. They're tacos.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: :::mouth full of food::: Fine. I'll take them back.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte! What do you get when you take food from a monkey?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, I don't know?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YOU GET MY UNENDING RAGE, NOW GIVE MY LUNCH BACK I KNOW IT'S IN HERE

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I found Nessie! I found Nessie!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a cashew.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Check out this sword.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Whoa, where'd you get that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: From sword.com.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: *checks out the site*

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: There's a lot of swearing on this website.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I bought a new hat!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So did I! Let's see yours.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Here. (hands Mortimer the hat) Can I see yours?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're looking at it!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean my hat?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yup! I mean, thanks!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do we have a copy machine?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, but it's not doing too well.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why don't we just copy a new one?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not how it works.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YOU'RE NOT HOW IT WORKS.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer what's going on? You look flustered.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't tell you why, and there's no time for questions. We need to leave NOW.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But ...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I TOLD YOU NO QUESTIONS. Also, we're going to need aliases. I was thinking "Mortimer" for you and "Monte" for me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: For the last time, Mortimer, I'm not going to dress like Charlemagne's ghost and break into the French embassy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh. Where's your sense of adventure?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: MONTE I NEED YOU TO TAKE ME TO THE EMERGENCY ROOM RIGHT NOW

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh my goodness, what's wrong Mortimer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'VE COUGHED TWICE AND THERE IS A HIGH PROBABILITY THAT MY NOSE IS BEGINNING TO PRODUCE EXCESS MUCOUS

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, I think you're just developing a cold.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ARGHHH I CAN FEEL MY THROAT HURTING ALREADY, THERE'S NO TIME FOR ARGUING

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, somebody's coming over to do a colonic irrigation.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sorry, what now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know, the broken sprinkler outside.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This will be interesting.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...and this one's dedicated to Monte from a very special someone!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uh, hello?! It's Talk Like a Dental Office Lobby Radio DJ Day! How could you forget?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Every day is a nightmare.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Good times, great oldies!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Want to see a magic trick?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pick a card.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's the ace of clubs.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: There's only one card.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm a bat.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, you're wearing a shirt that says "bat".

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm also wearing bat cologne.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ugh, it smells awful.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Fine. I'll go take a bat-h.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, good help is so hard to find these days!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What do you need? Maybe I can help.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I would need you to smoosh all of the spiders. In the world. For free.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, I don't think I'm qualified.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: See!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I challenge you to the Ice Cream Bucket Challenge.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But it's for a good ...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But ... ICE CREAM.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WHOA MONTE WHY DID YOU THROW A FROG ON MY DESK

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know that report I need, WELL HOP TO IT! Ahahhaha.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You didn't need to throw a poor frog to get the pun ac... HOLY CRAP AHHH WHAT IS THIS

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OWL BE BACK... with some more animal puns!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No... NO please don't. Please.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oooo. A bowl of hominy. I love hominy.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: nomnomnom

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: nomnomnom

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: All gone.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte! Have you seen my bowl of old teeth?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, do you ever wonder what kind of soup we crawled out of?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I bet it was lobster bisque.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I sure am tired.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's because you haven't slept since Tuesday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why is that?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you kidding? You've been working on an invention in the basement this whole time!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh yes, the amnesia ray! Must've been successful.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ahoy!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I assume you're going to tell me why there's a full size anchor in our kitchen?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nope!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because I want to see your face when you go to the backyard and see what the anchor's attached to!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, I am so tired. Would you judge me if I pulled a George Costanza right here under my desk?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm going to need you to be more specific before I can answer. A lot of weird things happened in that show.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Today is my brother's birthday!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's nice. You going to call him or ...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nah. He probably already knows.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you hear the news that Hello Kitty is NOT a cat?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, it was nice to have it confirmed that she's actually just a marketing strategy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What... what do you think we are, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Two questions: Where is my ficus and what is that smell?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm making egg, plant, Parmesan!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yep.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hoo boy, remind me never to go on vacation again. The whole company falls apart without me!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You realize that attitude is basically megalomania.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That was my favorite Nintendo game!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I haven't slept in 28 days.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's impossible.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let me finish...I haven't slept in "28 Days" the movie.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let me finish...I haven't slept in "28 Days" the movie. Until this afternoon.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you know you can you bottle the sun?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then what do you call this?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Melted lemon meringue in a ziplock bag.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And once I stuff it into this bottle, I will have won the bet.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What bet--hey that's my ship in a bottle--WHERE'S THE SHIP?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you know that ketchup was originally sold as medicine?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh yeah? Medicine for what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Dry fries.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you know that butterflies taste with their feet?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mmm. Toe jam.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Cinco de Septiembre, Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's definitely not a thing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It totally is! Now have UNA CERVEZA with me!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What, no! And it's not even the fifth today, today is the seventh!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If you just accept the love and alcohol that comes with it, every day can be Cinco de Septiembre in your heart, Monte.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Look! I can see Saturn through this telescope!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a tube of Pringles.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: MY EYES ARE ALL CRUNCHY.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ... so then we ended up getting there early and it worked out fine.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, you know what they say!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I don't.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uh

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I gotta go.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Haha! Nothing can stop me now!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I made a shield.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You stapled 25 pizzas together.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...Mort?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nothing can stop me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you going to do with all those wax pineapples?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: THEY'RE WAX?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've heard that a dog's mouth is actually dirtier than a toilet.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where are you going with this?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm just saying, maybe we should be more grossed out for the toilet than for the dog when they drink out of there.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you know that 72% of rat babies are born with an extra tail?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really? That's interesting.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah. Something like 72% ... or was it 0%? I'm not very good at remembering my dreams.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Want to see a movie?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure! How about--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BLOOD MONSTERS OF THE EXPLOSION REALM.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not a movie.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sure it is! I'll describe it to you: So it starts with music BOM BOM BOOOOOOOOM and then a spaceship VVVVSSSSHHHHHH flies through and--sit down, Monte--and then the Laser Warrior rides a motorcycle on the rings of Saturn and blows up the...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ... and I said, "That's not au jus!" Hahahaha!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I hate Mondays.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I saw the aurora borealis!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ugh, I keep telling you: That's not what you saw. The window had a greasy film because SOMEBODY kept putting their tater tot fingers all over the glass.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You say tater tots, I say nature's majesty.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Check out my fort!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: My new couch!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is my new fort!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm bored.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why don't you read a book?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm not supposed to read. Doctor's orders.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What doctor?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: [puts on stethoscope] Hello.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Socks and sandals, Monte. It's happening.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No it isn't.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes it is!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WHAT? Noooooooooooo!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can you believe this guy? What's he thinking calling me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What do you mean? What did he do to you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: He's trying to make me use my phone as some sort of talking device.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...and so I said," Oh, yeah? Well, if humans evolved from monkeys, how come I still have this job?"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I ask myself that last part each and every day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How come we don't have our own video game?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What do you think it would be like?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was thinking a first-person sandbox.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean like GTA and games like that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I mean a game where everybody plays in a box full of sand.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh huh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: CGI sand, of course. And maybe the occasional cat poop, just to keep it dark and edgy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Will you be my test subject?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Great, so stand right where you're standing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Great, the I-Made-You-Say-No device works.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've heard that if you eat local flowers, you're less likely to have allergies.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think you mean, if you eat honey produced by local bees, you're less likely to have allergies.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What I'm trying to say is that I bought you flowers, but then ate them. Sorry.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How's my hair?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I can't tell. You're always wearing that hat.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Typical guy response.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, have you been to the state fair yet?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I'm not a huge fan of how they treat the animals.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What, you mean the guys that sell you a ticket to send a pig down the oiled-up chute that spits out in an arc across the ferris wheel? They're putting GOGGLES on the pigs now, Monte! Don't be such a downer!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, could I get that 20 bucks you owe me?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, sure. Here you go.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This is a ticket stub for the movie "Ghostbusters."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You can give me my change whenever. No rush.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're late again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, yeah, sorry about that. My watch is still on Lunar Standard Time.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just moved into the corner office.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, you must be doing well.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry, I didn't enunciate. I just moved into the coroner's office.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whoooooole lotta dead people, yup.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Knight takes queen! Monte, I am crushing you at this game!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you dressed in a suit of armor--WHAT DID YOU DO TO MY QUEEN BED?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I see you have some bubble tea, there.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Indeed.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you get boba in it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: NO! Gross. Why would I want chunks of some fat guy floating in my drink?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I ... I think maybe you think I said "Jabba."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh. Yeah. And I guess I sorta missed the obvious reference, too.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not sure what you mean.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My face hurts.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It hurts me, too ZING!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You see, this is why I am who I am and you are who you are.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I guess it's about time to let my fur grow back out, it's getting pretty cold out!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I didn't even noticed you shaved for the summer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh yeah, you probably...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, nope. Just thought it through, don't need to hear anything else.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you ever wonder if shrimp dream?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nope.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, I need you to do the dishes -

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: SORRY, I CAN'T HEAR YOU. I'VE GOT MY HEADPHONES ON.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, you're just wearing hamburger buns over your ears.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OH MAN, THAT SICK BEAT IS ABOUT TO DROP.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have climbed Everest.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Please get down off the roof.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have reached the vault of the heavens.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I made grilled cheese sandwiches.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Comin' down!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Would you like an apple?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a baseball.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Want to play appleball?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a baseball bat covered in apples.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nah, it's a fake leg covered in apples.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If you love someone, let them go. If they come back to you, they were always yours.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: True words of wisd ...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think you should move out.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh. Doesn't this feel like the longest day in history?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It does now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh man, did you see that new report out where the divorce rate in Maine correlates with the per capita consumption of margarine?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Haha, yeah, it was a good article highlighting how correlation doesn't equal causation.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uh, Monte, you totally have that backwards. Anyway, I'm going out to get some margarine for lunch to really stick it to those "happy" Mainenites.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ALL I NEEDED WAS FOR YOU TO PICK ME UP FROM THE HOSPITAL.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YOU KNOW I'M SCARED OF BALLOONS.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey! I'm back early from my vacation!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, uh.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What does that mean? What did you do?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let me answer that question with a question: How do you feel about pigeons?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you seen my wig powder?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No. Please, no more playing House of Lords--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: THE MOST REVEREND PRIMATE SHALL ABSTAIN FROM FURTHER SPEECH.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pass the butter please.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Not now, Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BUTTER NOW.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What butter?! Ugh. I will never take you to another opera.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh man. I was out all night and now I feel like plarm.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, stop trying to make plarm happen. It's never going to happen.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's not what your mom said.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Morothy Dantooth is a SAINT!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You think we're going to get in trouble for this one?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Probably.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just got fined for operating a lemonade stand.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Didn't have a permit?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think it's probably because I wasn't actually selling lemonade.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, MONTE, I JUST GOT AN EMAIL FROM THE PRESIDENT!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm doubting the validity of that claim, but please, go on.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: He says he needs my help. Finally, this is it! This is my call!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What kind of help?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: He just needs $5! I will absolutely help you, Mr. President, it will be my honor.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you eat my sandwich?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I liberated it. In my tummy.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you doing right now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pizza.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Knock knock.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Who's there?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I lost your wallet.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What does that cloud look like to you?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I see a duck. Or maybe a dog with wings. Yeah, see, there's the snout, and there's the wing. What do you see?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Huh? Sorry, I wasn't listening. Been jammin' on my new fave song, 'What Does That Cloud Look Like To You'.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So, are you dressing up for Halloween?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Heck yeah! I'm going as YOU.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh. So are you just, like, taking off your hat or something?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep! And shaving my head.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But ... my head isn't shaved.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Will you look at the time! You should get some shut-eye. No seriously. Shut your eyes. :::BUZZZZZZ:::

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, could I get a ride to the party tonight?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, I don't have a car.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But you do have a perfectly good back.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Fair enough. Hop on.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, what do you want on your pizza?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just want pizza.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, we're ordering now- what toppings do you want?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pizza.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, what do you want on it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're making this way too complicated.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Knock knock

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Not today, buckaroo.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've decided to quit my job and become a cattle rancher.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you even know anything about cows?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wait. Cows?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: DRUMS.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Please stop hitting my casserole dishes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you want a pepperoni pizza?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That would be lovely!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Great, I'll add it to my "Monte's List of Wants".

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know I said before that I was going as you for Halloween, but I changed my mind.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh yeah? So what are you going to be then?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: SEXY you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can you believe today is already the first of November?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, and I therefore refuse to acknowledge it. Today is not the first day of November. It is the day after the last day of October.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Accurate.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Phew! Now that I'm finished with all that Halloween candy, I can move on to my month of Thanksgiving dinners!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, so not just the one dinner later this month?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: One year I realized you could have pumpkin pies whenever you want! That was a rough year. Ever since, I've found the happy medium to be just one solid month of Thanksgiving.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ah, autumn is truly upon us. Look! Russet and umber leaves blanket the earth. Everyone's bundled up in their cozy sweaters. There's a bracing, brisk breeze that chills the bones just enough to remind us we're alive.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My boogers are frozen.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Remember, remember the Fourth of November.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not right.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh yeah. Sorry.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: In 1492 Columbus sailed the Fourth of November.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hold this.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My deadly hawk.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's a smashed kite covered in feathers.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, it's pretty dead.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Behold! My pilot license!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? You can't fly anything. And why are we standing in front of the furnace?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Like I said: My pilot light's on!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm going upstairs.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here, eat this.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: EAT IT.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: FINE. Here, sniff this.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I really like tie food.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean Thai food?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No. I mean like those little bow tie pastas.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, it's time. Here's my cup.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I am done mixing your hot chocolate for you, Mortimer, do it yourself.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BUT YOU KNOW I'M NOT GOOD AT KNOWING THE RIGHT RATIO OF POWDER TO LIQUID

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Woo! Happy Monday!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Never.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's 11/11! MAKE A WISH!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I wish I had another friend.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My leg hurts.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Because you kicked the inside of a baby crib for a half hour yesterday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I heard it's cool to kick it in a crib.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...Ok, I don't think--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I WANT TO BE COOL.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Play this card game with me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, where did you get all these credit cards?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: In a crowded elevator. The lights went out.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, how do you feel about two spaces after a period?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do not. Do. Not. Put two spaces after a period.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But what if ...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: DOOO NOOOT. If you separated sentences with two spaces, it would destroy my brain.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Really? It would?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: [begins foaming at the mouth]

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What does this button do?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's my elbow.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you as addicted to the new Cereal podcast like I am?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: YES ABSOLUTELY, I still have NO idea if Adnan did it or not!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have no idea what you're talking about, but I bet if you could see the correct spelling of "Cereal" we wouldn't have had this hilarious misunderstanding.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And what a tragedy that would have been!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mortimer!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hello? Mortimer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Shh! I’m being a clam today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I finished your model ship.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think I used every marshmallow in the package.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do we need a piano in the bathroom?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: There's no room for a piano in the bathroom.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's what I thought about the living room, but I managed to fit FIVE pianos after I got rid of all the furniture.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let's play tennis.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: With spaghetti strainers?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And a piece of paper with the word "ball" on it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: 15 LOVE. C'mon, get your head in the game.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Skinamarinky dinky dink. Skinamarkinky ...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: NO.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've tired of our little dialogues, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?! But you used to love them.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I did at first, but now they feel forced and tiresome.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The fire is gone from your eyes, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's glaucoma.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm so sorry. I swear you said "kittens".

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: NO MORTIMER, I SAID MITTENS, M-I-T-T-E-N-S

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok, ok, calm down, at the very least, this might help with the scorpion problem in the warehouse.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WHAT SCORPION PROBLEM!?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Woo! Short week, eh buddy?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why would that make me feel better?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WHAT HAS HAPPENED TO ME?! LOOK! AM I MONSTER? IS THIS BECAUSE I ATE THOSE MAGIC BEANS?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's baby corn. You're the same size you've always been.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WHERE IS YOUR MOTHER, LITTLE ORPHAN COB?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't believe we have to work on Thanksgiving Eve!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Thanksgiving Eve isn't a real holiday, Mortimer. If they gave us off Thanksgiving Eve, it'd set a dangerous precedent that any day can be a holiday and therefore can be taken off.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's exactly what I'm saying! How awesome would that be?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes Mort?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I am thankful for you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What a lovely thing to say. I'm thankful for you too.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pass the potatoes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I want you to punch me as hard as you can, right in the face.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not doing that! Why would I do that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: C'mon, Monte! It's Black Eye Day, the biggest punching day of the year!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ugh. Now I kinda want to.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Unnnngggggggggggggggg.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: More pie?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monkey's Log, Day Three Post T-Day: leftovers dwindling. Coworkers starting to look delicious, but urge to hibernate slowly overtaking murderous inclination.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, are you ok?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: UPDATE: THE CAPLESS ONE KNOWS YOUR PLANS

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This is going to be a long winter.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've started my own fight club!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's absurd, Mortimer. Who'd want to fight you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Han shot second.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: *SLAP*HIT*SMACK*PUNCH*

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: With everything happening in the world today ... *sigh* ... there are just no words.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Rutabega."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wrong again, you left-coast elitist!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Care for a little basketball?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not very good, but OK.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nonsense, you'll be great. Here's my miniature basketball. Feed it twice a day.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's our movie tonight?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: TOP GUN. I know every line!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Great. Wait, where's the TV?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I sold it. We don't need it. So, the opening scene is all these planes taking off from an aircraft carrier. And the planes take off VVVRRRROOOOM! And the radar guy says "You've got bogeys at 12 o'clock" or something, and Maverick says "I'm flying a plane" and then they fire some missiles...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ♫ I come from Alabama with a banjo on my niece ... ♫

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Actually, the lyric is "banjo on my knee."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh. Rachel,can I have my banjo back?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just woke up from a coma!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OMG! How long were you out?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Near as I can tell, just a few days.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Whew. Well, I guess it could have been worse.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah. Congress is gridlocked, gas is under three dollars and the Foo Fighters are on tour. I'm sure glad it's still 1995.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, can you check my schematics?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, ok? So... this is for a train track that circumnavigates the world.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep, uh huh.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Snowpiercer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Someone's gotta prepare for armageddon.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That was a fictional premise, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Alright, I'm knocking you down several cars.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you eating an entire plate of carrots?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The lightbulb in the garage burned out.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why don't you just take the flashlight into the garage?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I accidentally swallowed it six months ago.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I can't be around you anymore.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The good news is: I got rid of that virus on your computer.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What virus?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...which brings me to the bad news...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My phone is broken.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a banana.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And it's broken.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Want to hear my poem?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Roses are red, violets are red, daisies are red, there's blood everywhere."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Will you read me a bedtime story?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK I'm ready.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Once upon a time, there was a ...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: zzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzz

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mortimer ...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Actually, Monte, I'm going by my alter ego now, Jerry Marzipants.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not calling you that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well then, how about Sigmund Butterskosh?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Final offer: Lieutenant Commander Flambébe?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's gotta suck having a birthday this close to all the holiday junk.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Definitely.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy birthday anyway, Mortimer!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's not my birthday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, it's someone's birthday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You've got me there.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I can't believe I bought a twenty pound bag of potatoes just because it was on sale. We're never going to finish all of these.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I have 'em?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What all of them? Uh, sure. Help yourself.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I am going to power SO many clocks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I made a snowman outside!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It hasn't snowed at all this year.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We're out of flour!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ask me why I'm holding a hammer and a clock.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hammer time.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HAMMER. TIME.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sure glad I got my crane operator's license.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Neat, I didn't know you needed a......wait, why did you get a crane operator's license?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'll explain later. Don't go back into the house for a while.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sup, Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: New phone. Who dis?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, I'm speaking to you in person.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just found this great new all-you-can-eat sausage place!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, what's it cost?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Depends on how many you eat.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, that's just a regular restaurant. By that definition, you can call any place "all-you-can-eat."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And I do!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nothin' like home for the holidays!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh cool, when are you headed back?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What? No, I'm staying firmly in MY home. Why would I feel relieved if I went back to my parents'?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Say, have you ever noticed how "lawn" and "prawn" sound awfully similar?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why would you even ask ... ugh, you filled the yard with shrimp, didn't you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do we have any butter?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What kind of gift is this supposed to be? Why did you fill my stocking with cheese?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh no. THE BELL PEPPERS. NOBODY EAT THE BELL PEPPERS.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: 'Twas the night before Christmas and all through the house, not a creature was stirring, not even a--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I opened all the presents.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, Mort?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I ate the milk and cookies.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I know.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I saved you one.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Merry Christmas, Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, have you made any New Years Revolutions yet?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is this why you spent all of yesterday shouting GOOD HEAVENS I'M OH SO DIZZY at the top of your lungs?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Um... no. But I see why you might think that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did I tell you that I'm learning to play the piano?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's cool!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah! I'm just having trouble figuring out how the black pieces take the white pieces.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't think that's how you-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And do I roll dice? Is it turn-based? There really should be a handbook that new players can consult.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I really feel like I didn't accomplish anything in 2014.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I felt that way too! I also felt that way about 2013.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I guess there's always next year.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: There's the spirit! Just imagine all the things we won't accomplish in the years ahead.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think 2015 is gonna be YOUR year, buddy.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: MY year? What does that mean, "my year?"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Like, you know, you're gonna OWN 2015.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Own? Why would merely HAVING a year mean anything good? I HAVE lots of stuff. I HAVE credit card debt and shingles.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy New Year!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Farewell sweet 2014, the year I made contact.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: With who?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I made a contact lens out of sausage casing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ah. No wonder I can't see.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Want to hear my new year's resolution?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I resolve to eat a large magnet.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: To get all the small magnets I ate last year.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let's play Eye Doe Noe.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How do you play that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Eye Doe Noe.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just won.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's a bird! It's a plane!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Please don't do this now--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's SUPERMORT! GIVE ME THE CAKE.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I will never take you to another wedding.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ughhhh I feel so nauseous.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yikes, sorry about that, was it something you ate?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It very well could have been the queso, chips and double-enchilada plate I just got for lunch.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I guess it could be the fettuccine and breadsticks I snuck from that catered lunch in purchasing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OR maybe it was the left over donuts I found in the break room?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We may never know why you're not feeling well.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey are you watching footba -

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Go Lions!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: LIONS? WHERE?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is today the day?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nope.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Look, Monte! Look in the monkey cage! Hahahaha they're so silly! HAHAHAHAHA!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a mirror, we're at home.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Look at his stupid hat!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here, I bought you a new hat. Put it on.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This is a fruit basket.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Now dance.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Great news! I got a job selling diet pills. Wanna hear my pitch?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do we really have to ...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Hello, sir! Are you sick of diet plans that don't deliver? Get rid of that appetite fast with INSTA-HEARTBURN!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This product appeals to literally no one.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Our patented blend of bacon grease, jalapenos and lemonade is guaranteed to ..."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Stop. Just ... stop.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Last night I had a dream where my underpants were on backwards.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But Mortimer, you're not wearing underpants.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OHGODICAN'TWAKEUP!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man this is a exceptionally delicious apple!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, that's definitely a salmon.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ah yes! The apple of the sea! Now you understand my confusion!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nope.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hahaha...oh, hey! Did you hear the one about the horse with the mustache?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Neither did I.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you ever think about -

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Stop. Just stop. Whatever you're about to say, you know I'm going to tell you no.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pizza?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow. Look at that fog.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know. It's mine.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What do you m--OH THAT SMELLS AWFUL.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you think there's life on other planets?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What makes you say that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because 5 years ago I slingshot my salamander into the sky and it still hasn't come back.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mortimer, what you got there?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's a box of chocolates! But don't get too excited 'cause I'm not sharing!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's just an empty chocolate box filled with rocks and pebbles...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WELL EITHER WAY I'M NOT SHARING!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Got any plans for this weekend Mortimer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Actually I do! I'm going camping!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow that sounds fun! It'll be great to spend a couple days away from all the distractions of modern life.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, plus I've got a bunch of stuff on my Netflix queue I've been meaning to watch, so it'll be a great time to do that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Guess who's back

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Back again

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mort is back

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Tell a friend

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where were you all morning?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The bathroom, and now let me co-opt a different Eminem song in order to tell you about that epic!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: SEA -

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think my appendix

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HAWKS!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm in serious pai

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: SEA

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Please call a

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HAWKS

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: omg we made it to the big game! my organs .... they're stronger!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: THE HEALING POWER OF VICTORY!!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: *yak*

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's your favorite board game, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Great question! I love Monopoly and Sorry and I'm always up for a game of Risk. What's your favorite board game?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't know. Maybe the one where you line all the boards up in a row. Or the one where you have to stack all the boards on top of each other like a house!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: None of those are board games! I don't think you really get what a board game is, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sounds like someone's jealous about being so bad at board ball!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pick a card.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Two of clubs?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I hate you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you like my new hat?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's a round block of cheese.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It used to be a triangle. Stupid sun.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, you going to watch the big game this weekend?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, actually, that's not till next weekend.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The big Duck Duck Goose competition I'm hosting at my house? No, it's definitely this weekend.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wouldn't miss it for the world.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte! I just heard about this thing called being friends with benefits. What do you think?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Personally, I think it's a strange arrangement, but it works for some people I guess.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, what I meant was do you want to be my friend with benefits?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?! Mortimer, I'm glad we're friends, but I don't really like you in that way...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Fine! I guess I'll just register for health insurance all by myself then!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you seen my credit card? I think I dropped it around here somewhere.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No I haven't, maybe you should call your bank and get a new one ASAP?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, it's not actually in my name. But whoever Steve Jenkins is definitely should have done that months ago.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay, lemme ask you this: What's been missing from our front yard all this time, but we never realized it until today?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: For crying out -

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If you guessed "a party henge," you're absolutely right!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wha -

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you know where to find druids?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm tired of Groundhogs getting all the glory, so I'm pushing for a new holiday. Happy Stoat Day!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What happens on Stoat Day?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We drive me to the pet store to buy stoat food!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I see.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Also, we get this stoat bite checked for infection!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: #StoatDay

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here, put your helmet on.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no, why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, don't move. Stay in the blast radius, please.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Remember Tetris?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah! I used to play it for hours.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, that's what I did to your stuff.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WHAT DID YOU DO TO MY ROOM?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I had to make room for the malfunctioning hot tub.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Check it out Monte, I replaced my desk at work with a couch. Take a seat!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It’s great Mortimer, but uh…why is this couch so uncomfortable?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, it doesn’t have any drawers, so I had to shove all my papers and office supplies under the cushions.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, this isn’t a very good idea.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I know, I’m never going to get any sleep on this thing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's THE BIG GAME, Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Indeed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Clash of the TITANS!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Impassioned rivalries! Honor on the line!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Calm down and pass me the nachos.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And this year nachos take it! A bitter defeat for queso!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Boy, I can't believe [TEAM NAME]s won the big game!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's right! That [PLAY] by [NAME OF PLAYER] was [AWESOME or TERRIBLE].

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yep. We are definitely having this conversation on Monday morning, and not on Friday before the weekend!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That is a true statement.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think they bought it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Help me figure out this word puzzle.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, this is a ransom note!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't know, these clipped letters aren't all that handsome. Hey, unrelated: Can I borrow $10,000?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Quick, I need a place to hide.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: From who?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: From my roommate before he finds out I sold all his clothes to buy a pewter football.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But I'm your roommate--YOU DID WHAT?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Birds are stupid.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Actually, a lot of birds are very intell--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then why can't they make spaghetti?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's with the three dots?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Come one come all to my new haunted house!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, Mortimer, don’t you think it’s a little weird to have a haunted house in February?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, it’s like that thing where you buy a winter coat in the summer and it’s on sale for really cheap.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, but in that scenario you’d be the guy selling the coats. No one’s going to want to buy them.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don’t think you understand how this works, Monte. I’m the guy who makes money with a haunted house. No one’s selling coats.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you have a place I can put this tub of hollandaise, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh no, that thing is HUGE, where did you find it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Out behind that restaurant.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's disgusting.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: NO MONTE, it's brilliant. I can have eggs benedict any time I want since that the hardest part is out of the way and now YOU'RE not invited.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BLEEP BLORB I AM MORTBOT

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Alright what's the story here.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: MORTBOT.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Right. Is this about the spreadsheets I asked for, like, two days ago?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: MORTBOT CANNOT PROCESS. DO NOT COMPUTE.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're an actual child, you know that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: MORTBOT WANTS ICE CREAM.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm starting a new band!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You can't play an instrument and you never learned to count.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YOU DON'T UNDERSTAND MY ART.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let's order a pizza.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's wrong with the pizza in front of you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's lonely.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Help me put up this tent.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Indoors?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, my art teacher said something about the importance of intent.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know what today is, right Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes yes. It's Friday the 13th. Blah blah blah.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, it's Valentine's Day Eve! But now you've spoiled it. You could say that ... I've lost that loving feeling.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You can't stop it, Monte. It's going to happen.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "YOU NEVER CLOSE YOUR EYES ... ANYMORE WHEN I KISS ... YOUR LIIIIIPS."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What is LOVE?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: A lot of people ask themselves that on Valentine’s day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, it actually stands for Launching Oscillating Velocity Earcraft. It’s a term I invented for the new airport I’m opening.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok, I’m going to ignore the problem of you opening an airport and just start with the fact that you spelled “aircraft” wrong.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know, I know but if you spell it right then the acronym is LOVA. And who ever heard of a lova?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Honestly, you’re kinda right.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Valentine's Day! Here's a dollar!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're a day late.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: AND a dollar short.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HAAAAAPPPY MONDAY BUDDY!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: i hate everything.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I found a unicorn!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a football with a corndog stuck to it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ENCHANTING

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here, try this.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mmm, delicious! I love key lime pie!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, that's not lime.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Want to watch the sunset with me?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Eh, I saw it earlier today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean the sunrise?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was upside down.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you heard the one about the woman who smuggled a frozen ham out of the supermarket underneath her dress?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I haven't.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Me neither. Let me know if you do.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Moritmer, what's up with the new hat?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was um...reading about skin cancer and I decided I should start protecting my skin from the sun.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Your whole body is covered in fur. I don't think you need a hat to protect you from the sun.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, you're right. But I'll just leave it on to keep the rain from getting in my face.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's not raining out. Plus, we're inside. What's up with you today?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Honestly, I just felt like wearing a new hat, but I knew everyone would expect something weird so I made up fake answers because I felt a lot of pressure to meet expectations.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow. Ok then.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, I have this hump on my lower back, can you take a look?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, you're pointing to your butt.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HA HA GOTCHA AGAIN!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I have made it very clear to you I am NEVER playing "Bum Looker".

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We should tell people to check out the T-List awards livestream on Woot today starting at noon Central to find out which shirts from 2014 will win big.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We sell shirts?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey man, you missed a crazy Internet debate today about whether a hamburger counts as a sandwich!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What a time to be alive.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Gimme a hi five!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hi five!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, gimme $5 for saying hi to you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I hope you like flowers!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Daisies! My favorite! Thanks, Mort, these will go great with my vintage flower plate collection.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Actually, these are meant to *replace* your flower plate collection. Which I accidentally destroyed this morning.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Also I used your credit card to buy the flowers.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm a little sad that Downton Abbey is almost over.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I know. It's been really good this year.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Honestly, I could take or leave the roast beef. But those curly fries! It's just a shame I have to drive all the way to the city for them.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How many balloons do you think I can eat?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Please don't.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wrong, seven! Also, I feel awful.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: First day of March, Monte! I wonder what Internet sensations will happen THIS month!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm really hoping for something pseudo-science-y and trippy photo of a garment!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't wait for another low-speed chase involving a clueless animal!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Speaking of- really hoping that more dancers dress up as animals and perform poorly at a national event!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm going to start things off slowly by taking a photo of my real surly cat and adding a clever, crotchety comment!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay, THIS time I've definitely discovered Nessie.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: A) We're looking at Lake Union

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: B) You're pointing at a disused and mossy shopping cart

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: C) I really need to find other friends

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: STOP! DON'T EAT THE FISH!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: *chew* *gulp* *smooch*

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you doing?? I said DON'T EAT THE FISH

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ooh I thought you said "donate a kiss."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uh oh.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, I've got a pair of aces.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ha! You lose! Eight of a kind!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh...that's not--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: READ 'EM AND WEEP OPENLY.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Listen to my band's demo CD.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a frisbee.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah. We suck.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yo Monte. Come try out my new hang glider.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No no no. Remember last time?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, but this time I put wings on it, you'll be fine.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It also has a built-in piano but I cut out the last few keys so it's lighter.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, why didn't you come to my party last night?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I did! But all your lights were off and your door was locked.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man it's too bad you missed it. It was a real rager.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I rang the doorbell a bunch of times...no one answered.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: People were getting crazy. Everyone was drinking and dancing!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I called you and I texted you! You didn't answer!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We even did the conga line!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: There was no party was there, Mortimer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm so excited for egg salad sandwich season!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know you can make hard boiled eggs any time, right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uh, gross. I only use Cadbury eggs.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've decided to take a vow of silence for the entire day starting .... NOW.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wait. Quick question: Where are you going for lunch? Okay, silence starting ... NOW.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wait. Did you see that video with the pugs? Alright, silence starting ... NOW.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Not-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, being silent for a day really makes you reflect on things. You should try it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: AIEEE Chupacabra!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a pile of rakes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Aren't you forgetting something?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh right. That's a pile of rakes, you imbecile.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, Monte, Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is it?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Trying out a spell. I say your name three times and you become a tree.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you a tree now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Guess which hand has a delicious cookie in it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That one.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nope.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok, that one.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wrong! It was in my mouth hand. Now it's in my stomach hand.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That hand soap you have in your bathroom smells amazing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh thanks. I made it myself.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really? What ingredients did you use? It smells fresh and bright, like lemon or basil.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pizza. I used pizza.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, want some pizza?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sounds great thanks!...Ugh this pizza is terrible! It's still frozen, Mortimer!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah I'm on the paleo diet. You can only eat what the cavemen used to eat.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm pretty sure cavemen didn't eat frozen pizzas.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you think the cavemen had ovens to cook their pizza, Monte? No! They had to eat it raw and now I DO TOO.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you think there's some alternate universe where we both have goatees?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I guess it's possible.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And do you think there's some alternate universe where I have a goatee and you don't?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure, why not?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And do you think there's some alternate universe where you have a goatee and I don't?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Logical enough.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man. Science is so cool.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Guess what happened over the weekend!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Don't make me do that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here's a hint: Turns out I can't actually eat a pound of butter in 20 seconds.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Fantast-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Also you're gonna need a new laptop.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy St. Patrick's Day! I'm so excited. The stockings are hung and the presents are wrapped!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No. This is the day when you wear green. How can you get that wrong?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh. Hm. So ... shouldn't have chopped down that tree in the park?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, you idio - wait, is that where you've been getting your Christmas trees?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy St. Patrick's Day!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've been watching TV all night.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh oh. Did you--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, I ordered $500 worth of miracle cleaning supplies.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: *sigh* Third time this month.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I spilled salsa on your white linens.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why did you do that?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was trying to distract you from your comforter.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why what's wrong wi--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's on fire.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I made dinner.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What ... what is this?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pizza salad!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's disgusting.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's OK. I put a taco in there, too.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's your favorite food, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hmmmm...I love some pasta with marinara sauce and a little cheese melted on top.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That sounds great! I'll have some of that!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I wasn't offering it...you asked me what my favorite food was.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't know. That sounded a lot like an offer to me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Fine! I'll make you some pasta.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, I finally finished my novel this weekend! Wanna check it out?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So this is just stick figure drawings, I don't think this is a novel.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's a GRAPHIC novel!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, this really is weirdly "graphic" for stick figures.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just got a phone call from a lawyer! He said he was gonna send me a CD! Kinda cool, huh?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, I'm not sure you heard him right.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm going to space.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How will you do that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I drive my car into the lot and park in a space.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I would like you to go to real space.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, it's 11:11! Let's both make a wish!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I wish it would be 11:12.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...and explodes into a fireball as I land on the mermaid planet. Sorry, I was finishing mine, what did you wish for?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, you going to the party tonight?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What party?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Huh?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: :::runs away:::

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you up to this weekend, Mortimer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm going to drive to Portland for the weekend to visit family!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That sounds nice, but...you don't have any family in Portland.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well I never said I was visiting MY family.

lines.speaker: mortimer
