lines.text: Hey Monte, I learned how to play chess! Wanna play?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, sure I have time for a quick game. But uh, what's that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That box is for a PS4.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh sorry, I learned how to play DESTINY. Haha, what kind of game is "chess" anyway? RPG?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm making salmon for dinner.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sounds tasty.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The recipe calls for capers, so do me a favor & prepare the getaway car.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You ever wonder if fish can smell?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm living an inescapable nightmare.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I bet they can.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: April Fools, Monte!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uh, you lowered your hood, Mort.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And I pulled yours up! Isn't it exciting?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're in my chair.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Now nobody's gonna know what's going on! SHEER MADNESS!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I ordered you 100 pizzas!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Haha April Fool's Day!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That was yesterday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know, I'm really hungry and embarrassed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'M SORRY! JEEZ!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: For what?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, you haven't been home yet? Never mind!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: SURPRISE!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh...I don't get it. We've been eating lunch together in the same room for the last twenty minutes. Nothing's happened. What's the surprise?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The surprise is that there is no surprise.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: To be honest, I am actually kind of surprised.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, Monte- bad news. You're going to want to never open that drawer on your filing cabinet again.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, what!? Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So I thought I'd get a good jump on Easter by hiding eggs around the office a couple months ago.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What I DIDN'T realize is that they were snake eggs and now they're all starting to hatch.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: As a bonus they seem especially annoyed that their eggs were painted.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Anyway happy Easter!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know that phrase "it's like herding cats?"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh. Sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A) It's as difficult as they say

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: B) Don't go in the bathroom

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So I read you can rent goats now ...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why do we let you have a computer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Got you some flowers!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know I'm allergic.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't worry, they're dead!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, let's go bowling!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sounds great!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Fantastic. Here's a stack of bowls. What do we do?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's time for your annual review. And I'm sorry to say, we're letting you go ...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WHAT? But WHY? What did I DO? How am I going to LIVE? :::sobbing:::

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ... CRAZY! We're letting you go crazy. Just staple and shred and make copies till your heart's content!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you wearing a dress, Mortimer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, Monte I am.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So...uh...why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because I'm a progressive individual. Just because I'm a man doesn't mean I have to conform to some stupid gender standard. I'm trying to break down barriers and make change in the world.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Also, it's laundry day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you hear the news?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: They're not very good without Huey Lewis.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay, so the good news is my effort to turn that break room coffeemaker into a time machine has been successful

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Here we go.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The bad news is Debbie from accounting lives with the dinosaurs now

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I can't believe it's only Monday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok, this time I've definitely spotted Nessie.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a shrimp cocktail.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I am a wizard.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No you're not.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ABRACADABRA!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where'd my burger go?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: *mouth full*

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you doing, Mort?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Practicing my Oprah speech.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Your what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: For when I'm on Oprah.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh. How's it going?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So far I have "Hi Oprah".

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You want to be my best friend?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've got cupcakes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well played.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte! I met the coolest guy at work yesterday!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh yeah? What was so cool about him?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, he had a cool hat just like mine and he was wearing the same shirt as me too!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Huh...where did you meet this guy?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: In the bathroom! We were both washing our hands at the same time! Can you believe it?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That really is unbelievable.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sometimes I get really down about who and what I am, ya know how I feel Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sounds like you're just being introspective.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah. I dunno. Sometimes I wish I were an octopus.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know? Eight arms? I would be so much happier if I could hold 8 tacos at any given time.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I'm really sorry, but I cracked your phone screen.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?! How did you even get my phone???

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well first I had this million dollar idea. But I needed an ostrich, a package of frozen spinach and--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: STOP! You know what? I don't even care about the phone.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Just please, don't make me listen to the explanation.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you ready for Pastaday, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's Pastaday?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What?! How could you not know about Pastaday!? It's the biggest international, non-denominational, government-sanctioned bank holiday in the world!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, I don't think that's a real thing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well if it's not real, then where did all these spaghetti noodles come from?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't know but that's a lot of noodles.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I mean seriously, that's so many noodles. Where did you even get all those?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I just can't get over how many noodles you brought in here.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Bye! I'm going to space now.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How will you get there?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I catch a bus to the airport, fly to NASA headquarters, then ask for directions.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: MONTE NO! YOU HAVE SO MUCH TO LIVE FOR!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What, I'm just reading a book.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just wanted to remind you that you have so much to live for. Bye!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey did you get that email I sent you this morning?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, sorry, I must have missed it while I was napping.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, did you go to that meeting I asked you to go to yesterday?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh no, sorry I was napping then too.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you serious? How many naps do you take?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm not sure. I'll think about it and let you know when I'm done with this nap I'm about to take.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, check out my new car- it's my first automatic!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, where is it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's this bean-looking thing! Apparently all I have to do is add water!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I feel like you were lied to by someone.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I hope not, I had to trade my cow to get this bean. Without Bessie OR a car, how am I supposed to get around?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, is that a potato on your back?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, it's a CHIP ON YOUR SHOULDER hahaha.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You'd be lost without idioms.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've decided to quit this job and start a food truck instead.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah? So I bet you've got a whole bunch of snappy names you're considering for the truck.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do I ever!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I forgot.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, let's go sky bowling.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How do you sky bowl?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You throw a bowling ball into the sky and run.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That sounds awf-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: RUN.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Boy, I sure do love the ocean.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What makes you say that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My brain. Which loves the ocean.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It wasn't me. And honestly, I'm insulted you even thought so.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Your orange fingerprints were all over the door handle.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Curses! Foiled again. DAMN YOU, CHESTER CHEETAH!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte. Would you like some soup?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, actually. Soup sounds great!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then you should go get some! And while you're out, can you get me a bag of marshmallows?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey do you know what the word "schlub" means?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think it refers to someone who's boring or dumb. Kinda like a "dud".

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whoa, you're so not any of that. Welp, anyway, back to work!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wh... what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HEY BUDDY! MAY THE FOURTH BE-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: -in the name of Monday mercy please stop.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Alright. New business idea.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hooo boy. Alright. Let's hear it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Four words: Conveyor belt tattoo studio.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I applaud your entrepreneurial spirit.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, get me my tool kit.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You don't have a tool kit.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uh oh.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why? What did you break?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My tools.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Help me do this yoga pose.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a Picasso.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Fine, whatever, now help me do it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where do you think the best barbecue comes from?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Like, from which animal?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Like which state.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hmm. That's a tough call. If I had to pick, I'd say "the state of being in my mouth unnnnngggggg."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: MONTE WAKE UP!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you talking about? I wasn't sleeping. You're the one who's been snoring at your desk all day!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, but now that everyone heard me tell you to wake up, they'll think it was you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Mother's Day, Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, thanks- did you make sure to tell your mom, too?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I hope she just remembers! I haven't gotten my flowers or chocolates from her yet.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I guess I never thought how much your mom must put up with.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I see you're busy behind your computer there, but I just had an epiphany about Yeats' fear of an unraveling Irish class structure in "No Second Troy" and I think you -

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: *snore*snort* wah? Huh? Did you say something?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I said farts are funny.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: idiot.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How do you feel about eye doctors?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh. They're okay.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What about now?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think they're still okay.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How about now?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ah.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And now?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: sigh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, try some of my chili.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mmm, that's very good!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah? No itchiness? Seeing spots? Blue blotches on your legs?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HAVE YOU SEEN MY CANARY?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, but I'm really sorry to hear you lost your--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: GO TO THE BASEMENT AND LOCK THE DOOR, DON'T COME OUT UNTIL I CAN RECAPTURE IT, NO MATTER WHAT YOU HEAR. BRING A FEW DAY'S WORTH OF FOOD AND WATER. AND A SHIELD, IF YOU HAVE ONE.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey look! An abandoned mine.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hello?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HELLO?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HEEELLLOOO???

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, give me back my sleep mask.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Birthday Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's not my birthday, Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I kind of figured. I just thought I'd say it to you every day so I don't miss your birthday by accident.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh...that's sweet, but my birthday was last weekend. You came to my party. You really should be able to remember that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Jeez Monte, what do you think I am, a human calendar?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, you've been surprisingly quiet today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Busy.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Doing, uh, what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Reconfirming suspicions of superiority by checking high school classmates' Facebook pages.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm making a hoovercraft. I need to borrow your vacuum cleaner.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you sure you don't mean "hovercraft?"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: maybe.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've decided to eschew my materialistic lifestyle and start living off the land.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And by "the land" you mean ...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ShopLand, that 7-story mall down the road.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ah.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I started a new diet and now I have a rash.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That looks like raspberry syrup.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It may be related to my all-raspberry syrup diet.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Want to help me dig for treasure?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: My favorite spoon!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Relax, I'll clean it after I find something in here.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: My ant farm!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Want to come with me to get a pedicure?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh ... no thanks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why not? Because pedicures are a girl thing and only GIRLS get pedicures? Honestly, Monte, I thought you were more progressive than that.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No. It's not that. It's ... it's just that ... well ... I haven't shaved my toes in awhile.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh. Cool. Well, bye then!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whatcha got there, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Just some lunch.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh gross. Who eats lunch? What is it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's a salad.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ewww salad! Gross!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ........ Can I have a bite? I'm really hungry.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The secret ingredient is: PEPPERONI! ALLEZ CUISINE!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This again?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: This time it's Iron Chef Dominoes against challenger Pizza Hut. You wanna be a judge again?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: As long as you don't try to make us drink your homemade "palate cleansers" between pizzas again.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Man, I can't believe WE have to work when everybody else gets a three-day weekend.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Seriously!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...what do we do again?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't open the fridge.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And if some scientists come by talking about dark matter, pretend like you and I have never met.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So no change there, then.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Get up, Monte, time to exercise.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You? Exercise?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yupper! Exercising my right to wake you up so you can make me breakfast.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I borrow your telescope?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What for?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't find my hammer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, what's the hardest thing you've ever done?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hmm. That's a good question. I guess the hardest thing I've ever done is say goodbye to someone I really loved. The timing just wasn't right and we both knew it, and we figured if it was meant to be, we'd come back together in the end. There's that famous saying, "If you love somebody, let them go, for if they return, they were always yours. If they don't, they never were." I really took that to heart. It's tough sometimes. I still miss her. But it was for the best. How about you? What's the hardest thing you've ever done?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh. I was going to say, "Lick my own eyeball," but having to listen to that story just now beats that for sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte! I need someone to pick me up from the dentist's office next Wednesday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why? Are you having some kind of surgery or something?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nah, I'm just going to stop by to say hi. But her office is really far away, so it's not like I'm gonna walk home.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: "Wub"?? That's not a word, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Words With Friends begs to differ, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Go wub yourself.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's June! What do you think the rest of 2015 has in store for you?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, gee. Work like a dog. Eat too much. Exercise too little. Lumber slightly closer to a fruitless retirement. That kind of thing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't forget Talk Like A Pirate Day in September!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh yeah. Something to look forward to.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you finish all that clam chowder?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, how could you be so shellfish?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: SHELLFISH, MONTE!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: :D

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, I found some buried treasure!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, where did you find $32 in buried treasure?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: In the bottom of your wallet.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, can you make sure my necktie is straight?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, this is an eel!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok, but is it on straight?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I like you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I like you too, buddy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Bono's a lucky man, then. (sigh)

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mort, can I ask you about something?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I had nothing to do with what happened in the kitchen!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I was going to see if you wanted to get lunch. What happened in the kitchen?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh uh...I don't know. But if someone let a bunch of birds loose in there, it wasn't me. I didn't even know about it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you see all those banana peels lying around?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, what was up with that? It took forever to pick them up.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: UGH you've ruined everything AGAIN. I just found all these red turtleshells too. We were so close to having everything together for IRL Mario Kart this afternoon!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Will you help me mail these random surveys?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, okay. What are they about?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sandwiches, movies, cars ... there's one about White House pets...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So wait. When you hear the phrase "random survey," you think ...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Surveys about random stuff!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Lookin' forward to the data.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Inspiration is everywhere!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: By "inspiration" do you mean "kale?"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I do. Kale is everywhere.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, don't use your room for a while.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's absolutely packed with coconuts.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was trying to order a 20 pack of cocoa nuts but I can't spell.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Check out my new watch.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You strapped a toaster oven to your arm.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, wait till you see the toast app.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Guess who I am!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: SCORE! WOOOOHOOOOO! Ok, your turn.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We gotta get the TV fixed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just doing my work. Definitely not browsing the internet. Nope, not me. Just working.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm definitely not watching videos on YouTube. That would be the opposite of working. Me? I'm working hard.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you say something, Monte? I couldn't hear you over all this WORK I'm doing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I didn't say anything, Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Jeez Monte, stop chatting and get back to work.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, what time is it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Time for you to get a watch!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Eh?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Get it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Huh? Huh?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're dead to me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's it! I'm tired of feeling like I'm not leaving an indelible mark on this generation and the many that follow. That's why I've decided to quit this job and do something that leaves a lasting, tangible imprint.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, ok.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sooo...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm going to become an architect.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are your qualifications?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Jenga?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, this is an intervention! You've got a problem, man!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh yeah, what's the problem?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're ADDICTED... to not buying me donuts.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not a problem for me, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Denial is the first step towards healing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, where's the coffee?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, we're out, I'll go to the store later today and--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: MONTE. COFFEE NOW. CODE RED. CODE RED.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Want to hear my band's demo CD?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's just car crashes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, took us months in the studio to get it right.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know what's the biggest marketing scam ever: toothpicks. It's like, "Get stuff out from between your teeth... BY PUTTING TOOTHPICKS IN BETWEEN YOUR TEETH!" Like, who died and made toothpicks the king of between the teeth, amirite?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, but you don't leave toothpicks in between your teeth when you're done, so...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hmm, I must say, this is an unforeseen development. Now, if you don't mind, I've gotta spit out some month old toothpicks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Good morning Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's 2 pm Mort. Where have you been all morning?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Where have I been?! Where haven't I been? Everywhere! Or nowhere! Or whatever!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was definitely not at the dentist. That's all I can say.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know it's ok to miss work sometimes for a dentist appointment.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, in that case I may have been at the dentist.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, do you know what time it is?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, time for you to get a watch!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Your terrible joke just reminded me it's Father's Day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, look! I stole your watch!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey! Mortimer!! Give it... but wait, I'm wearing my watch.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HA! GOTCHA! I went out and bought the exact same watch as you just to complete this awesome prank!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But this is an antique watch given to me by my grandfather. It's worth a lot of money now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know! I'm broke now! I won't make rent this month! But man, TO SEE THE LOOK ON YOUR FACE!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can you help me with the answers for this online quiz?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: "How many '90s movie stars can you identify by their left feet"?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah. Help me out?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: C'mon, I NEED this.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't think I can do this trip to Germany.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why not? Germany's an amazing country.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Isn't it full of Germs?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're right, stay here. Give me your ticket.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you know that ponies aren't just baby horses? They're, like, an entirely different breed all their own!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I did know that, actually.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK, Mr. Smarty Pants. Then how do you explain sliders?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, what do you do when you like a girl?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Just try to be normal. Just talk to her and try to get to know her a little bit.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hmmmm. That sounds easy enough I guess.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OR what if I just got my teeth cleaned a bunch of times in a row?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh...sure buddy. Whatever works for you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why don't animals hibernate in the summer? This heat is wild.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You could say... it's unBEARable!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You could say that, I wish you wouldn't.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm getting better at juggling plates! Check it out!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ahh! Jeez! Mortimer, you just broke three pieces of my grandmother's prized China. You call that, "getting better"?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah! You shoulda seen me last week! I didn't even know to throw them up in the air!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, Monte! Banana split!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, you say, 'who's there?'

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But you didn't say, 'knock knock.'

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh I love these! Who's there?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay, I'm really confused now...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy First of July!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, did something happen on this day?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes! July started!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think I might be sad.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Look at all these tears.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Those are mini tacos.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh. Then I'm happy!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, Monte! Nice haircut. Looking sharp, my man!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uhh... I didn't get a haircut.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know what they say, sometimes the best haircut is the hair you don't cut!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I've never heard anyone say that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: When in Rome, you say potato, amirite?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ♬ Daaa da da da daaaaaaa daaaa da da da da daaaaaaa ♬

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Happy 4th of July, Mort! So uh...why are you singing the graduation song?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is that the graduation song? Sorry I meant to sing this: ♬ Bum ba bum bum bum bum baaaaaa da da dun dun dun dun ba ba ba ♬

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You meant to sing the French national anthem? On the 4th of July?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Shoot! No! Ok, I've got it this time. Are you ready? ♬ Ba da BUP ba da da da da ♬

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok, that one's just Wake Me Up Before You Go-Go. That's not even close to the national anthem.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HAPPY 4TH OF JULY EVERYBODY!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you think you can add anything more to this list?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Bat mitzvah. Chad's going away party. My grandfather's funeral. Tuesday. Alright, I'll bite, what are you listing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: More opportunities for firework displays.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mortimer - what if pickles could talk??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: what?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you ever wonder if there's a portal to another universe in your washing machine?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: why are you - what's -

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I swallowed a Lego!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'M SUPPOSED TO BE THE IDIOT.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: success.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I've got an idea! Pretzels that aren't dipped in chocolate! Like, for people who are eating healthy.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So, like, normal pretzels?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Normal pretzels! That has a nice ring to it. How would you like to join my marketing department? It'd be as an unpaid intern at first, but trust me: there's a lot of room for upward mobility at Normal Pretzels Inc.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What up Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you wearing a potato shirt?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's a tater top.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey can you get me a glass of water?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure I can--MORTIMER YOU'RE ON FIRE!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah. Hence the glass of water please.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, take a look at this righteous scar.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OH GROSS, WHAT HAPPENED?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I got it at the scar shop.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte! I'm a man in love!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh boy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I feel like I'm walking on air!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I feel happy like I've never felt before!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I feel like the entire world is mine!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I feel...actually I feel really hungry. Can I have the rest of that sandwich you're eating?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OH

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: MY

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: GOD

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: IT'S CHILI DOG DAY

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'll get the fire extinguisher.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Gosh, there's a whole lot happening on the site today what with the murder of Lord Bleu-Grey and free shipping all day and the relaunch of American Apparel and

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: THIS IS TOO MUCH FOR ME. THIS ISN'T WHAT I WAS HIRED TO DO.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What exactly WERE you hired to do, anyway?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nothing. I'm just eye candy.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yikes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why is there a trail of cheese slices from the hallway into the break room?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm luring the murderer here!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And you know he or she likes cheese how?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because everyone loves cheese! C'mon, Monte! We're trying to catch a murderer! Not a robot!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Confess, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Confess to what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: CONFESS, I SAY.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok you win.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you smell that?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mystery.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, but I something's rotting in the fridge.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, that's my leftover mystery.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you ever find out who dunnit?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean wootdunnit.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Who?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, Woot.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok nevermind.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So Mort, tell me about this girl you're in love with.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, she's always wearing a white coat and she loves to put her hands in my mouth.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait what?!?! Is your new girlfriend also your dentist?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, she's not my girlfriend yet. But I'm pretty sure she is my dentist.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Like 70% sure, at least.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey! It's my birthday tomorrow!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: NO MORE BIRTHDAYS

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok, ok I was kidding anyway.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: NO MORE BIRTHDAYS

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ALRIGHT. Geez. Can we at least get pizza?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: YES MORE PIZZA

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here's my pitch for a cop show: one guy's named Hab and one guy's named Nero, and together their... Hab and Nero: the Spiciest Partners on the Force!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Cool. So, what's it about?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Cops.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No but, like, what makes it different than other cop shows, you know?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I don't think you're getting it: it's a pepper joke!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have decided to quit this job and become a banker.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Alright, well I wish you the best of luck.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What do bankers do?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Want a ride in my hot air balloon?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean the party balloons on fire over there?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: MY BABIES!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, how come this printer won't print my document?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's an ice maker.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Fine, how come this 'ice maker' won't print my document?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I really need a vacation.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But you just got back from vacation.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If you consider sitting on a white sand beach sipping mai tais in front of a crystal blue ocean for a week straight a "vacation," then yeah. I GUESS i just got back from "vacation."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh. That's exactly what I consider a vacation.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, agree to disagree.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, what do you call a cow in a baseball cap?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't know. What do you call him?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Depends on what his name is.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ugh that's a terrible joke, Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's not a joke! It's just your basic cow etiquette. Try to be polite Monte!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So. Who do you think she's going to pick?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ugh, the Bachelor and all its incarnations makes me so disgusted.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What? No, I mean Sarah. She's given us like four choices for the lunch meeting and I told her to surprise me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh man I just thought to myself, "What if a blue car drove by my window" and a BLUE CAR DROVE BY MY WINDOW!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow. You're clairvoyant.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Claire who now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think we need to have a talk about how many donuts you've been eating lately, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But I haven't been eating any donuts lately.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Cool. Well, that wraps up our talk about how many donuts you've been eating. Check your email later for the meeting minutes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hi Monte, ready to try my new sandwich?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, not another one. I still have sand in my clothes from the last one.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sand is good for you. Open up.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, check it out.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you wearing a walrus?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, it's my tuskedo.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've got news ... I'm getting married!!! Wanna come?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh my gosh! Congrats! Of course I'll come! Who's the lucky monkey?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I don't know yet. I just know that when you get married, you get a lot of gifts and get to eat cake.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Right.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So yeah. What's your availability in, like, 5 minutes?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wide open.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, quick: ask me what time it is!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, what time is it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: 10 o'clock to your business!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wait, did I do it wrong?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, wanna come over later? I'm making gravy brownies.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Gravy brownies? Is that just what it sounds like?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hahaha, no! It's a silly name for this new recipe I came up with.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's the recipe?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You bake a pan of brownies and then you put gravy on it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Thinking about going out for lunch. Maybe Italian. Interested?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No way. I never eat at Italian restaurants. Too risky.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's the risk?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you serious? The risk is that the chef might be a mad scientist who's genetically engineered snakes to be tiny and skinny and look like spaghetti!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You could get ziti.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No dice. In a world where a bunch of snakes can pose as spaghetti, nothing is safe. NOTHING!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hi Monte, eat this glowing cupcake.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not helping you with your science project.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, check out this treasure map I found.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a picture of money.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: THEN C'MON, WE HAVEN'T A MOMENT TO LOSE!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think the dog peed on the floor again.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But ... we don't have a dog.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, that's right. Huh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, this is awkward.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, let's get a dog!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't think that's such a good idea, Mort. Having a dog is a big responsibility. You have to walk it every day and feed it and take it to the vet...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hmmmm yeah I guess you're right.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Maybe you should get the dog and I'll just pay attention to it when I feel like it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I don't know what to do, I'm having a real crisis.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is it? Are you ok?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Where does the wax go when you're burning a candle in a jar? Is it in the air? Am I inhaling wax and "moonlight splendor" right now?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I... I have no idea. Oh god, where does it go!?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You ever wonder if --

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: STOP. Whatever you're about to say, just stop. I slept like crap last night. I don't want to entertain any of your inane hypotheticals.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't WONDER if insects have job interviews, or if we're surrounded by invisible people, or if the food has a party when you close the fridge door.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't care. Just let me be.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: -- rocks feel love?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's never going to get better, is it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've decided to quit this job and become a life coach.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And great news, buddy: You're my first client. Free of charge, even.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, I don't -

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It all starts now, my friend. Today is the first rest life of your day!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I want my $0 back.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, let's go get some burgers.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We're eating burgers right now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry I meant pizzas.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yo Monte, eat this.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That looks like a shoe.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Close. It's a *deep-fried* shoe.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm starting my own rock band. Want to be in it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure. What instrument do I get to play?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A rock. Duh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I think I'm dying.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's wrong, Mort?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My head feels really hot and my ears are all weird. I can barely hear anything!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you tried taking off that fur hat you're wearing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Jeez Monte who do you think you are? Some kind of doctor?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, have you gotten a chance to look at my trouble ticket?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes. Yes I have.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I guess I'm just wondering why I haven't heard anything in two days, I did mark it as urgent.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So it turns out, Mortimer, I'm not your personal taco delivery service.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh, you could at least direct it to the right resolver group.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Woo! I sure have missed football!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's still only the preseason.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Lot of important plays over the weekend!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's 85 degrees outside.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hope you've been taking notes for your fantasy team!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't like you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't go near the copy machine for a little bit.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wh-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let's just say Operation Pizza Clone needs troubleshooting.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I'm not feeling so good.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well yeah, you ate 64 donuts in an hour.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know, I couldn't get to 100 and I feel awful about it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yo Monte, let's go to the park.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Great! I love the park.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh did I say the park? I meant the haunted cave on Death Mountain.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't really have much to talk about today ...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: THAT'S A FIRST.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ... to my therapist.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I guess I do NOW.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know, Monte, sometimes I'm surprised that you still work here.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you talking about? I do all of the work here! You barely even show up, much less do anything productive.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's what I mean! I haven't done any work here in months!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You should try it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, Monte! I finally set up my video stream on my website, you should check it out!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh cool! Where can I find it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Go ahead and go to secretmontecam.com and I can show you what tab to go to.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I now have several preemptive questions.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I borrow your shoes?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, I guess. Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm making soup.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you know any Locksmiths?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, I think I've got a phone number for one. Did you lock your keys in your car or something?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What? No, I mean the family. The Locksmiths.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why would you --

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: To set up this HILARIOUS misunderstanding!!! Yaaaaay!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay well now you're not even trying.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, check out a huge spider I found.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: NO, I DON'T WANT TO SEE A SPI--oh, that's just a mop.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The spider is trapped in the garage, this is just its mop.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, help me rent a car.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, there are a lot of rental car companies to choose from--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry, I meant help me rent a plate of spaghetti.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I hate it when you're having a bad day and someone you don't even know looks at you and says, "Smile! It could be worse!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, that's pretty annoying. But I really hate it when people fill uncomfortable silences with chit chat or comments about the weather.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So what you're saying is ... it could be worse?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Man, can you believe this heat wave we're having?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I'm training for a hot dog eating contest!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, sounds like a lot of work Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not really. I just need you to get me fifty hot dogs and cook them and then get me some buns to go with them.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then I just eat them. So it's really not that much work at all.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Would you like to buy a candy bar to help my fundraiser?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure! What's it for?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: For me to reinvest in some more candy bars.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And then you sell those and continue to try to make money off your coworkers.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Haha, no! THOSE candy bars would be for me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We need someone to come out and fix the vending machine.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: SOMEBODY tried to remove all the candy using an umbrella.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Now the machine doesn't work.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And SOMEBODY would like their umbrella back.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Pretty excited about the football season officially starting soon.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Me too. I can't wait to see Eagles against Falcons! My favorite kinds of birds!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh. You know it's not an actual battle between eagles and falcons, right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, are you crying?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yup! Been taking crying lessons.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How do you—

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Bite down really hard on your tongue.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I want sugar.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, if we're going to do this diet—

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sugar now.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We only started 17 minutes ag—

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: SUGAR NOW NOW NOW NOW NOW.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sad news. My dog went blind.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You should get him a seeing-eye dog.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's ... the best idea you've ever had ever!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've got nothing to say.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, that's a first.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's probably because I already said so much stuff in our Weekend Adventure.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Our Weekend Adventure? What are you talking about?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Our Weekend Adventure! You can check it out every Saturday at Woot.com/blog

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow! I didn't know about this! I feel so out of the loop.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WELL CONSIDER YOURSELF LOOPED, MONTE.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't know who left this note at my desk, and I have no idea what I should do.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What does it say?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Get schwifty"?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think you better show them what you got.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Alright, unofficial last day of summer & it's time to get ready for fall! Hope you've got your heavy coat out of the closet!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I -

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What are your plans for Halloween??

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well -

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Only 108 shopping days until Christmas!!!!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'LL START BRINING THE TURKEY!!!!!!!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Aw man, I was gonna show you this new song I'm learning on ukulele, but I forgot it at home. :C

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh darn darn darn.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ... but I remembered my bagpipes!!! :D

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, why am I so tired?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Because you were up all night watching movies with explosions.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh yeah. Then tonight I'll watch movies about sleeping.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I ate too much.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why didn't you stop after your third pizza?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because that would be odd.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm going to get a massage. Wanna come?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No thanks. I don't like to be kneaded vigorously.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're still mad about the pizza dough, aren't you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: THAT GLUTEN WAS OVERWORKED.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: zzzzzZZZZZzzzzz

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, wake up!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know, you really need to stop sleeping at your desk.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're right Monte.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I should sleep at your desk so everyone will think you're the one sleeping.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WINTER IS COMING, haha, right Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's a mild cold front at best.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not a lot of excitement about the lower temperatures for someone covered entirely in fur.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yo Monte let's get tacos.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And stuff them full of pizza.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: O...kay.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And wrap them around a salt lick.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How do you feel about fountain pens?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I kinda like them. They're fun.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Really? They seem cruel to me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How so?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wouldn't the fountains want to run around? I support free range fountains ONLY.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte I don't feel so good.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well yeah, you ate a whole box of cookies.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But first I arranged them on the counter to form the word 'SALAD'.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I truly don't understand how you are alive.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yo Monte, let's go jogging.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You? Jogging?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I don't remember where I put my pizza and you need to help jog my memory.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh wait! I ate the pizza! Hey, can I borrow a few bucks to order another pizza?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, help me into these yoga pants.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No thanks. Why are you......wait, did you just pull those out of the freezer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well yeah, I want frozen yoga.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Spoiler alert, Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? What are you talking about?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I tried to turn the fridge into a time machine for food.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Spoiler alert: all our food is spoiled.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, none of my apps are really working now that I updated to iOS 9.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, it's kinda frustrating.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Without my favorite apps, I'm really not sure what I'm going to do while I'm in the bathroom anymore.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Woo! Happy Monday! Stay out of the elevators!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...and we're off.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just "learned" about "air quotes."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay I've definitely seen you use them before, so-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I like how they "absolve" me of "wrongdoing."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not wha-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I ate your lunch by "accident."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ah.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I have a confession...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have never thrown gasoline on a fire.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh. Well there's nothing wrong w--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...Until today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Halloween, Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? It's still September.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I dressed up as a time traveler this year.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Would you ever eat anything that fell on the floor?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Eh ... depends on the state of the floor and the viscosity of the food.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK so, this floor and the iced cookie I gave you earlier?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I already ate that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So that answers that question!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you like my new scarf?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's really nice! But, it's Texas, it's still 90 degrees out.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Fall takes a lot of sacrifices, Mortimer. I don't like "pumpkin spice" either but I keep drinking its terrible lattes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, check out my new telescope. I'm gonna use it to spy on our neighbors.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Don't do that! It's a total invasion of people's privacy!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ughh, Monte, I'm not talking about our regular neighbors! I mean our alien neighbors in other galaxies!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Jeez, what do you think I am, some kind of weirdo?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I signed up for a marathon.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, cool. I didn't know you were a running enthusiast.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Running?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Running.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uh oh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I thought I just had to binge-watch a bunch of TV shows for 12 hours.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok, I saw on the Internet that "pumpkin spice" is very popular these days.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Great.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And I wanna get it on the NEXT big thing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Right.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sooo...introducing the grapefruit marjoram latte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're a visionary.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't worry about dinner tonight, Monte, I took care of it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, that's so nice! What're we having?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Fruit!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a bowl full of wax fruit.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wax is full of fiber.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, did you get my text?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, what did it say?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It said my texts aren't working.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, do you want to take my survey?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If I bought you a pizza, would you be more willing to take my survey?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: On a scale of 1 to 10, 1 being just a little and 10 being a whole lot, how much would you say you don't want to take my survey?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I see what you're doing here.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, check it out! The vending machine gave me three packs of Reese's! Do you want one?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure, I'll take one. Sounds great!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then you should go to the vending machine and get some too. There's plenty left!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, can you help me with this?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Help you with wh--is that a gold bar?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uh yeah.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Monte! What are you doing with a BAR OF PURE GOLD?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Trying to get to the chocolate inside, now help me unwrap this.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've decided to quit this job and open a dry cleaning business.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok. Do you know anything about dry cleaning?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, but considering the fact that our local one is open like one minute a week, I'm looking forward to the easy hours!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's some wicked commentary there.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I AM ON FIRE.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thanks for letting me borrow your car.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BTW, if you notice a weird smell, don't worry about it -

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, why?? Wha-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, look, it's fine now. I got all of them out.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oops! Look at the time! Gotta go!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, what time is it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why don't you check the clock?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: JUST TELL ME WHAT TIME IT IS.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok fine, jeez. It's......I see you took down our clock and replaced it with the pizza you set on fire last night.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YES HAHAHAHA! *sigh* Good times.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We need some new wall art, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, funny you should mention it, I was just eyeing a great Van Gogh print--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I already put up an exhibit of foods I've run over with the car.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: :::SWIG::: Behold! The golden chalice of everlasting beauty and youth!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's the cup I keep my toothbrush in.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: :::SPITS:::

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, can I borrow a pencil?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure, Mort. Here ya go.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thanks! Can I also borrow some paper?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I also borrow $20?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well then I don't want your stupid pencil and paper either!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I'm moving out.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WHAT?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry, HEADING out. I'm heading out.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And I'm taking all my stuff with me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you get any of those spreadsheets done over the weekend?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hahahahaha oh goodness no. BUT if you need a comprehensive analysis of pizza metrics, well lemme just tell ya -

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I didn't do that, either.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Great.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Btw, what's a spreadsheet?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I read online that October is "National Skeptics Month."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh yeah, I bet you REALLY read that.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay, I see what -

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sure, I bet you TOTALLY saw.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You realize that slightly changing your emphasis doesn't -

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I definitely DIDN'T download a virus onto your computer.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Now I'm just confused.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, let's hit the beach.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's autumn and it's cold today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah but that beach owes me money so I'm going to hit it. A lot.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You dropped a quarter in the sand last summer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Payback time.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Rise 'n' shine, Monte, chop chop.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's five in the morning.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Never too early for chopping practice. C'mon, here's your machete.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I have a quarter? I need to make a phone call.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure. Here you go. Wait, why don't you just use your cell phone?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Huh? Oh. Those two thoughts were not connected. See ya!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: MONTE!!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? What is it?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just making sure your name still works.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It does!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's too early to wake up.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's 4:00 pm.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm on European time.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's great to be out on the lake.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I really enjoy the tranqu-AAAAAAUGH DRAGON IT'S A DRAGON, EVERYBODY RUN FOR THE HILLS

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a catfish.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: NESSIE LIVES!!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How's the juice cleanse going?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Terrible! I haven't lost any weight and I feel awful.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well what's in the one you're drinking right now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Kale, spinach, apples and cookie dough.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You put cookie dough in your juice?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Only because I ran out of gummy bears.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, how long have these fries been sitting out?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, those are pencils you're eating!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok. But how long have they been out?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I think I'm a wizard.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What makes you say that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I made your pumpkin pie disappear.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's 4 pies this week, Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm a really good wizard.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, it's hard getting old. Look at these wrinkles!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Those are your nostrils.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And this big crease!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That is your mouth.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And these giant bulgy things!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Those are two cupcakes you're holding in front of your eyes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: See? If I was younger, you wouldn't even question me eating two cupcakes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, can I have that slice of pizza that's on your desk?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh...there's no pizza on my desk, Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well you better get to work, then!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't feel like doing anything today, Monte. I think this is a do-nothing day.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But it's your day to do laundry and go grocery shopping.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, bummer that they all fell on the same day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, do you have any gloves I could borrow?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, sure, somewhere around here.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Follow-up question: Do you have any falcon food?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm taking up snowboarding this year.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sounds fun.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It should be. Only thing is I hate snow, so I'm practicing on a plastic slide at the park.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Also, I can't really afford a snowboard, so I'm just using a flattened box my blender came in.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I see.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: weeeeeee!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I'm having back problems.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no, like what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My back owes me money.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, I think you've had enough sugar for the day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WHY WHY WOULD YOU SAY THAT WHY I DON'T KNOW WHAT YOU'RE TALKING ABOUT SPIDERS SPIDERS ARRRRRRG ZZZZZZzzzzzzzzzzzzzz

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: *sigh*

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't worry, Monte. I took all of the razor blades out of the Halloween candy.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WHY WERE THERE RAZOR BLADES IN THE CANDY?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How else was I supposed to keep myself from eating it all before the big day?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Trick or treat, Monte! Now you have to give me candy!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, sorry. I don't have any candy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well then can I at least have a snack?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't have any snacks, sorry.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well then can I at least have a dollar?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ....yes. Just take it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HAPPY HALLOWEEN!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Trick or treat!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, Halloween is over.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Give me a treat.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You already ate all your Halloween candy--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: GIVE ME SUGAR OR I WILL DESTROY EVERYTHING.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: UGH, why didn't you answer any of my emails over the weekend? I marked them as urgent.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oooooh, is that what that red exclamation mark means?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What did you think it means?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I thought it was, like, a seasonal holiday version of our own logo.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You've never been more wrong about anything ever.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ah, the air is finally cool and crisp.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The leaves crunch beneath our feet.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The days are shorter as we turn our thoughts inwar-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: MY FANTASY ROSTER IS CRAP.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: 'tis the season.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Don't you love the colors of the autumn leaves?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, I love pumpkin pie.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But I was talking about--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're right, we should go get some pie right now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't believe I'm still working through all the Halloween candy!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You just bought that candy today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know! Halloween keeps getting longer every year.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've got some bad news, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I went back in History and accidentally erased you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OH GOD! WHAT HAPPENS NOW?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's fine, it's fine. I just closed the file without saving it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Photoshop joke!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte! I can't believe you were five minutes late for work this morning!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I know! My bus was running late.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait a second, you got to work after me! How'd you know I was late this morning?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I didn't until you said that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm off to the museum!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You? A museum?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, the pie shop is home to many works of art.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ah, golf was excellent this morning.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm glad YOU enjoyed it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you upset about this?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I wasn't invited. I know why. It's because I was too good last time. I'm a threat. That's fine. Whatever. I'm over it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You built a sandcastle in the bunker and totaled two golf carts.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'M OVER IT.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's 11/11! Make a wish!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: *gasp* MY WISH TO GO BACK IN TIME CAME TRUE!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I've had enough of city life. I'm roughing it and I don't know when I'll be back.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, I saw the tent in the garage.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I bought a bunch of gadgets for the house.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Like what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: These round energy chargers.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Those are donuts.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't understand why people are afraid of Friday the 13th.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, you mean Paraskevidekatriaphobia?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I understand why people would be afraid of that. Especially people in spelling bees!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why is the world so crazy, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't know, Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: *sigh* Me either.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But I made you some gumdrop pancakes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's so crazy it might just work.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I'm sorry I broke your rectangle lamp.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? I don't have a rectangle lamp.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh good, never mind!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WHAT HAPPENED TO MY LAPTOP?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ugh, Mortimer, you've really screwed up this time.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok, ok, I can explain. I was out of plates and your laptop was nearby and the spaghetti looked so good and I -

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, what? I was talking about the overdue report. What are you -

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: UH OH PHONE IS RINGING HAVE TO GO BYE

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...so, you know, it's kind of a catch-22.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, your laundry quagmire reminds me of the EPR paradox.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Eh?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The particle measurement experiment about interpreting quantum mechanics? You must have heard of it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is happening right now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: JUST KIDDING. I have no idea what those words are.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Whew.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, why is our house surrounded by birds?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I lined the house with bird seed.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...and secret formula that makes birds huge and crazy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yo Monte, I invited the president over for lunch.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WHAT? THE PRESIDENT? HERE?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, the president of our local Foodblasters, what's the big deal?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've eaten nothing but cereal for a week.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, you're probably OK if you stop now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: This morning, I pooped a marshmallow unicorn.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh dear. Then it's probably too late.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What are your Thanksgiving plans, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm actually not sure yet. My day is wide open.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Great! So you'll have plenty of time to make me Thanksgiving dinner then.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, I'm worried that your new diet is harmful to you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What, the All-Frosting Diet is doing wonders for.....ohhh I don't feel so good.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ready for the potluck? I made soup!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Looks a lot like a bowl of Fruity Pebbles.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Soup is in the eye of the beholder.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay, the stuffing is ready.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You've emptied the contents of a pillow onto a platter.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: THANKSGIVING FOOOOOOLS!!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: every year gets worse.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, I'm sick of hearing Christmas music this early. It's like we don't have a holiday in November.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, I agree.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I mean, how can we just bulldoze over Black Friday?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Thanksgiving, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Happy Thanksgiving to you, Mort!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And Happy Thanksgiving to you, my darling.

lines.speaker: monte
