lines.text: Please stop making out with the mashed potatoes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Good news, Monte. I've got a weekly meal plan all worked out for our leftovers.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh boy. I can hardly wait.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monday: Peanut butter and gravy sandwiches, Tuesday: Pumpkin pie pot pie, Wednesday: Turkey gelato, Thursday: Green bean casserole smoothies, Friday: Yam surprise.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's the surprise?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We don't have any more yams, so it's actually tuna.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok, I really like all the nicknames for these retail days, like "Black Friday" and "Cyber Monday," so...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...here we go...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...what do you think about "$aturday?"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Isn't that just "Saturday?"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh yeah, we're talking, aren't we? Ok, well, you can't hear it, but I'm using a cash sign for the "S."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ooooh. Very amusing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, you know what I could really go for?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Some turkey.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: *sigh.*

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mort, what's your ETA?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Every 30 minutes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Huh?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Aren't you asking for my Estimated Time for A nap?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm trying to come up with a really sappy and sweet way to sign all my holiday cards.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh. "Warm wishes?"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sentimental fool.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: BACK TO WORK, CRATCHIT.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, it's cold.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I know, I'm wearing my winter coat indoors.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We should be warm enough soon, I set fire to the shed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh, these cinnamon rolls are terrible.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort! Those are hands towels!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh. Well, they're terrible.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What happened to us, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's like we stumbled into an A-Ha music video.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh. Huh. I hadn't really noticed. Do you think others have?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nah!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ta da! Check out our new Christmas tree, Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow that tree is uh...really big. And kinda familiar.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, did you chop down a tree from our yard?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Chop is such a harsh word, Monte.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But yeah, I did.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you think there's life on other planets?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, good question. Maybe it's not life as we know it, but--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And do you think I could order a pizza with peanut butter on it. Would they do that, you think?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know, the mysteries of the universe, eh?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Aaaah. I feel really good today. Got a good 8 hours of sleep.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Had a solid workout this morning.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I even meditated for 15 minutes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Maybe this is gonna be the best Monday ever.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Heeeey, there you are. Did you have a good weekend? Super. Stay out of the conference room on Level 2. "Project: Indoor Slip & Slide" was a massive disaster.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: n/m

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, look at this thing I can do with my arms!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're just waving them around.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And now that I've distracted you from work, can I have some money and your car?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh no Monte, I think I have a cold.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How do you know?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm cold.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What're you counting, Mort?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...17...burritos I've eaten...18...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I would've expected you'd eaten more burritos in your lifetime.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...19...no, it's burritos I've eaten today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Would you pay a whole dollar to have someone read you a story over the phone?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um, no. That's a terrible idea.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know, right? I bet no one would do that.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mort, do you-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't know what happened to your spatula, Monte!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I didn't even know it was missing!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I HAD NOTHING TO DO WITH IT!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I was just going to ask if you wanted to order a pizza.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK YOU GOT ME I TOOK THE SPATULA.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pizza sounds great!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, I started tennis lessons today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How's it going?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Apparently I'm very good at love.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Birthday!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's not -

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Time to cut the cake!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ah, you got excited and bought a giant sheet cake for no reas-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: TIME TO CUT THE CAKE!!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I won the lottery!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? Wait, seriously??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry, I meant "I enjoy pottery!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think I'm sick, Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well yeah, all thanks to me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You did this to me?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I'm always doing sick skateboard tricks so it probably rubbed off on you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, look at us, Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Whoa! We're back to normal! We look like ourselves again!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hooray!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hooray!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Anyway, Star Wars.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, check out my rad shirt!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're wearing a Star Wars poster.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Haha yeah! Make it so, Force wizard! Right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uggggghhhhhh Monte. I feel terrible.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What happened? Are you ok?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just...Christmas cookies...for every meal...for days. I'm so stuffed.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's too bad because I was just about to offer you one of these gingerbread men I made.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just one?! Jeez, Monte. Don't be so stingy.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mort, tomorrow is the winter solstice, the longest night of the year.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey wow, tomorrow is also the anniversary of that time I fit a football in my mouth!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That was the longest night of my year.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay, I've got an amazing idea that's gonna take Woot to the next level. Just hear me out.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ugh, okay.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you ready?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ok. . . we get into the t-shirt business.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You should pitch that to the head of Shirt.Woot.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you have his number?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok, I've got the perfect holiday product to pitch to the bosses.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sigh. Alright, I'll bite.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's the winter season, but you want that summertime glow, right? So you buy my new fake tan cream.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...which is called.....?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: O Tannin' Balm.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm going home.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, I got us a reindeer!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Whoa! Mort, where are we going to keep a reindeer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well it already ate all your clothes so I let it stay passed out in your room.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I just love Christmas Eve so much! The magic! The stories! The-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The toilet's overflowing again.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why is there cheese everywhere???

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because it's Christmas!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't follow.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know. Goodwill to man. Pizza on earth. Yadda yadda.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Boxing Day, Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you even know what boxing day is?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well...no.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But I still want you to have a happy day!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh no, I overslept!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What did you miss?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Boxing Day!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh. Right. Because you-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Dress up as a boxer and beat up sandwich boards, I know! I'm a holiday institution.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey there! Sorry I was out sick yesterday. Thanks for covering.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh sure. No problem.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You weren't here either, were you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't believe it's all coming to a close.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I know, what a crazy year, right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Year? I'm talking about Star Wars hype.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Happy new year, Mort!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy new year, Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I resolve to exercise more and eat healthier!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Now why did you have to ruin the mood?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Happy New Years Mort! Got any resolutions?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just want to be a better friend to you Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Aw, that's so sweet of you! You could start by sharing some of those tacos with me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, my other resolution is to eat more tacos. So I guess I'll start with that one. Sorry, Monte.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think I'm getting sick, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why? What's wrong?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I feel super nauseous. And I'm all hot and sweaty and I just want to lie here and not move.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Don't you think that could have something to do with the 20 tacos you just ate?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No. But it could have to do with the 10 cheeseburgers I ate right before that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow, first Sunday of the new year! It's a special occasion, Monte, let's go out for pizza!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're not getting out of dishes duty.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OH COME ON.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yo Monte, what's this thing?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why do you have a ship rudder?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A ship...uh oh. I have to get back to the harbor right now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I LOST MY WALLET!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: uh. it's right here.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I LOST YOUR WALLET!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ew. Who bought these cookies?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Those are sponges.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh. Well, not bad for a sponge.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Remember remember the 7th of January.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, I don't think that's-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So I'm thinking of sleeping in my workout clothes so it'll be easier to get up in the morning and exercise.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But you don't have any workout clothes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's why I currently sleep in my shopping-for-workout-clothes clothes, but so far the plan hasn't worked.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Want a piece of birthday cake, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh..sure. But whose birthday is it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't ask questions where cake is involved.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey I found this pizza on the street. Can we keep it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ew! No!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Fine, you take it to the pizza shelter.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mort, are you......

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort? Where are you?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: His room is empty. All his stuff is gone.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But all his leftover pizza is still here.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: MORTIMER?!?!?!?! [to be continued]

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: [continued] OK, so Mortimer has disappeared, all his belongings are gone, but his precious food is still here. Something's amiss.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, here's a cassette tape under his pillow! Good thing we still collect boomboxes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: (voice) Hi Monte, if you're listening to this, I've disappeared without notice. But you can find me in that one place you know no one would ever look for me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The health food store!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: (voice) This message will self-destruct in 5 seconds.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: AHHH!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: (voice) Kidding! Although this is a cassette so the player will probably eat the tape--*garbled* [to be continued]

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: [continued] Alright, I'm at the health food store where Mort told me to go. Now where--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte! I knew you'd find me!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort! What happened? Why are you hiding?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because they're after me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Who?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: NASA. [to be continued]

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: [continued] Wait, NASA is after you? Like "NASA" NASA?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, Monte! They want to launch me into space.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How come?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I may have accidentally signed up to be a test monkey pilot.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, tell them it was a mistake.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Will you text them for me? [to be continued]

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: [continued] Good news Monte, I called NASA and I'm off the hook. They're not going to launch me into space!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That is good news, Mort! Now you can move back home.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, there's some bad news too.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I volunteered you as my replacement. [end]

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte! Quick! I need a squirt gun, a can of chocolate syrup, and a model rocket.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Whatever you're planning is not going to work.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But I do happen to have a can of chocolate sauce. So here you go.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, check out this incredible website.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a piece of paper with the word 'WEBSITE' on it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I said it was incredible.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's Monday! You know what that means!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I literally have no idea.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: uh

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monday!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ..but you know, that's how Mom is. She cries at the drop of a hat.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A drop of what now?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The drop of a hat.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why is she crying about falling hats? Was she hypnotized or something?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, dude, it's...it's just an expression. How have you not heard this phrase before?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't look at me like I'm the crazy one. You're the one forcing your mother to cry about gravity-induced hat tragedies.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I can't live like this.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, I wrote a song for you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey wow, can I hear it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whoa whoa whoa, you have to pay to get into the concert.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow I can't believe I just ate that whole casserole.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, you just ate a stack of magazines.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I need glasses.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you hear? They hired the Aflac duck to play Batman in the next movie!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Haha, no. They actually hired Ben Affleck.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WHAT? That's ridiculous. And just when you think they finally got it right ...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, what's your favorite food?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Frozen pizzas!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really? Wouldn't you rather cook them? Hahaha. Gotcha!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, that is the oldest joke in the book.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But also I can't because my oven is broken.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I must return to space.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's time you knew: I was sent to Earth long ago but now I must return to my people. Goodbye, dear friend.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're not getting out of laundry duty.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...so it turned out to be a pigment of my imagination.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: figment.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: eh?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: it's FIGMENT of the imagination. not pigment. that's called an "eggcorn," by the way.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: uh, pretty sure you mean ACORN. dummy.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: sigh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's hard to believe National Soup Month is almost over.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um. Soup?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uh, YEAH. Wait, you didn't do anything to celebrate? No decorations? No gifts??

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...I guess not.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow. Jeez. Well, I guess this stocking full of gumbo is for SOMEONE ELSE, then.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oooooh I ate too much candy.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What did you do with all the wrappers?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wrappers? Uh oh.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sometimes I think I should just quit cooking.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, no! Don't give up on your dreams! Hey, I'm right behind you 100%, buddy.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're hungry, then?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Starving.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wanna hear a joke I read on a popsicle stick?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What does a parrot want on Independence Day?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A fire cracker.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ugh. Can I change my answer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HEY THERE MONTE! WHAT A GREAT DAY, HUH? SO MUCH TO DO! LET'S GET GOING!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow. You're very energetic for seven o'clock in the morning.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's seven in the morning!?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I thought it was seven at night!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm going back to bed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Last day of January! Good riddance, stupid month! Come to me, glorious February!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Tomorrow is Monday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: February, you traitor!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm going to the grocery store. You need anything?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Maybe just some milk.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But we have milk.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nah, it smelled funny so I poured it out.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Seemed fine in my cereal this morning.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That was before I put the cologne in it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Groundhog Day!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Groundhog Day!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oookay, I see where this is going.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Gr - yeah I've lost interest.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I'm going for a run.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: When will you be back?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: As soon as I get to the donut shop down the street.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte! I killed an alien!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah! Look at that!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...That's my favorite sweater.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh. Well. Sorry it's on fire now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you know that one of your eyes is bigger than the other one?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?! It is?! LET ME SEE!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nah, I was just kidding. But now they're BOTH bigger than they were before.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte. Want to go get breakfast?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure! That sounds great. Where do you want to go?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I don't want to go anywhere.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I want you to get breakfast and bring it back here to me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ahhhhhh, this is how to enjoy a good lazy Sunday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow you filled the whole bathtub with cheese fondue.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WOO, what a game yesterday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes indeed. That play by [PLAYER] was very exciting.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was so glad that [TEAM NAME] won.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...why are we speaking generically?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: the writer wrote this on friday afternoon.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you know it's National Toothache Day?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why would that need to be a day? What is the point of that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I dunno, but I got you a present! It's ... a PLAQUE!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: PLAQUE!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I love Wednesdays.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why is that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: By the time I've pronounced 'Wednesday' correctly it's already Thursday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OWWWWWW!! MORTIMER!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What is it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I was using the computer and I reached for the mouse-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, you must have found my mousetrap.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm thinking of doing a Craigslist ad.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh yeah? What are you selling?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I dunno. I've got this rolled-up, nearly empty tube of toothpaste.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I bet you get a few hits.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, I cooked dinner!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's nine in the morning, Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well then I guess I cooked breakfast!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This is just a bowl full of nails and screws.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well then I guess I didn't cook anything!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Valentine's Day, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You got me some chocolates!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Correction: I got you a box that usually holds chocolates.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Looks like someone's got a case of the Mondays!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean my new briefcase?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah! What's in it? Mondays? Hahaha!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Tax forms.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well that's not funny at all.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you get my card?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh how sweet, what's the occasion?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The occasion is we're playing cards and I'm the dealer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ahhh, nothing like hot soup on a cold day.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's bacon grease.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh. But ahhh, it's nice and hot.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I think I may have a cold.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Just because you bought 12 boxes of tissues?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Actually I bought a tissue company. I think you have a cold too. Have a tissue.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, wanna grab lunch?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No thanks. I filled up on like 20 cheese papers.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's cheese paper?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know when the cheese from a cheeseburger sticks to the wrapper? That's cheese paper.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So what you're really saying is, you ate 20 cheese burgers.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm not proud.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I had the weirdest dream last night!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I cooked the most delicious pasta. But then instead of eating it, I decided to just throw it all over the house.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh...that wasn't a dream. That's what you did last night. I've been waiting for you to wake up and clean it up.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So you're saying we still have pasta?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, did you know the name Sunday was derived from the day of the sun in Hellenistic astrology?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I'm pretty sure it was invented by the SUNDAY SUNDAY SUNDAY guy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's it. I'm quitting this job. I'm gonna become an Uber dryer.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Dryer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I BOUGHT A LAUNDROMAT FOR ONE STUPID TERRIBLE PUN.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Knock knock!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Who's there?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Money!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Money who?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I borrowed $50 from your wallet!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This joke sucks.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's your favorite soup, Mort?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The soupermarket.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Haha nice one.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What are you talking about? I'm serious.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, do you have any paper clips?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What do you mean, we just bought a whole case of them.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah well, my paper clip fort needed a second bedroom.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mort, are you going to watch the Oscars this Sunday?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pfft. No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Unless they nominate me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, let's make dinner!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort it's nine in the morning! It's too early for dinner.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok then let's make pasta for breakfast!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Finally, February is almost over! Can't wait for March.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's a leap year. We have one more day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Very clever, February.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok, why is the printer spewing out suds?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because HR told me to fill out all those foams.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So close.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Aaah. February 30th. My favorite day.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not a day. It's just March 1st now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh what, now you're in charge of the calendar, too? Who do you think you are?? HEY WORLD, FATHER TIME IS STANDING RIGHT HERE BEFORE ME.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Your free sandwich coupon expired yesterday, didn't it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Stupid short month.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, why doesn't my computer work?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you tried rebooting?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, I've been kicking it with my boots all day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Good news, Monte. I got us a gravy boat!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no, is it...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A yacht overflowing with gravy? You betcha!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte! Wake up! We've been burgled!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We have? Oh no! What did they take?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: They stole all of my red M&Ms! Those are my favorite!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait. I saw you eating those last night. Remember? I even asked you why you were only eating the red ones.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh yeah. I remember now. Guess I better call and cancel the insurance claim.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Mort. What do you call it when someone falls over at work?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't know. What do you call it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A business trip!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, it's 3/6/16! Make a wish!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, I don't think that's how--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I WISH FOR A CHOCOLATE PIZZA CANNON. Alright, that ought to do it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ugh, okay. Why is there a massive black bird in the break room?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: DUH. That's Steve. I'm buying a house, remember?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That is an insufficient answer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The real estate agent said something about needing S. Crow.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yep there it is.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What do you want for lunch?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, I dunno. Something to pass the crawling hours between my anemic-looking breakfast and my unfulfilling dinner before I climb into my uncomfortable bed and start the fruitless cycle over again tomorrow.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Applebee's it is!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, you left your neckties all over the floor.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, they really tie the room together.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I'm going for a walk.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What a great idea, it's such a beautiful day! Can I come?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok. I'm just going to kitchen, though.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I ate two pieces of cake. I feel terrible.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That actually seems pretty normal for you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, but it was some kid's birthday cake.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And ...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And let's just say it never made it to the party.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte! Let's spend the afternoon at the beach!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, the beach is hours from here.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well then let's spend the afternoon watching videos of beaches on the internet!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ......Ok, I'm in.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BEWARE THE IDES OF MARCH!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The Ides are the 15th of March.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Drat, I have to return this goblin costume today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't understand golf.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's to understand?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Like ... why are there so many birds?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Maybe don't get bogged down with the jargon.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are your brackets ready?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep! Here they are!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: These are pieces of shelving units.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The people at Ikea were soooo mad.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, want to go bowling?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I didn't know you bowled. What's your average?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can eat 38 bowls of cereal an hour.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, we're out of butter.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What do you mean, I just bought--WHAT IS THAT?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My butter statue of a unicorn destroying the planet Saturn. Duh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Big news! I'm running for President.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you think you're qualified to be President?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Does it matter?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Fair point. So which party are you running for?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: All of them! I love parties!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ughhhhh. That meeting this morning was so boring.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We didn't have a meeting this morning. Today's Saturday, Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well I guess that explains why everyone at work was doing yoga.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Looks like it's going to be a beautiful day!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not a window, that's the TV.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you know 1 in 4 people are afraid of the dark?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Makes sense to me. That's where the monsters live. They thrive in the darkness.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It nourishes them. Makes them stronger.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And after they feast on the dark, they're able to go about their horrific business.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hahahaha. I'm just kidding pal. Anyway, goodnight.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Guess it's time to think about spring cleaning.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I already took care of that.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wha? How?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A very therapeutic dumpster fire.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Join my band, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't play any instruments.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's ok, you don't need to.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's the name of the band?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte On Fire.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh I hate going outside when it's raining. Think I'll stay put.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Then stay inside with me and watch 'The Making of an American Dictionary'.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Where's the umbrella?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I totally got robbed by the vending machine.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did it steal your money?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, it only gave me one can of tuna.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You actually bought the vending machine tuna?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I went for candy, but then I noticed that the can of tuna was sorta just dangling there. I thought if I bought it I'd score two cans.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You actually bought the vending machine tuna?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you coming to my party tonight, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Of course! Need me to bring anything?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah actually some snacks would be great. Also some drinks maybe. And some plates and cups. And decorations!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And also some guests would be great. I only invited you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Last Sunday of March! Let's do something crazy!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean like turn off the wifi and--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whoa whoa whoa, I said 'crazy', not 'psychotic'.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I have a date tonight, and I need a good icebreaker in case there's a lull in the conversation.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: uh

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: hm

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ok i got it:

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "you ever smell a dead rattlesnake in a grocery bag?"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Weather. We'll stick to weather.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wooo! Just got your voicemail! We're in the final four!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Eh?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ooooh. No. You misheard.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I said, "We're getting a vinyl floor."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I hate you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I'm starting to learn oboe.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, right on! Great instrument.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah yeah. Do you have any oarrows so I can do some otarget practice?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you ready for tomorrow?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's tomo--oh no.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I LOVE APRIL FIRST.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Never in a million years did I think I'd end up as a bidet salesman.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's not that big a stretch. We've been selling "Bags of Crap" for years.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Douché.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think you mean "touché."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nope.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nice hat, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But I'm not wearing a hat.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ha ha! Made you look!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But I didn't look.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ha ha! Made you think that maybe you did look!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How long are we going to do this?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, time to do laundry.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We can't use the washing machine.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because YOU decided my couch fort had to be dismantled so I had to improvise a new one.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Woo! 4/04! You know what that means!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I sure don't.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's a day full of errors!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Isn't that...like....EVERY day for you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ouch.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah that was my sickest burn yet.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you hear what happened with the legal team?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, they need to review all the jokes we're doing now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's crazy!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I know! What a bunch of [AWESOME COOL LEGENDS].

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm nothing, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Aww, Mort. What's wrong?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't even finish this third pizza by myself.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I love sushi.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So do I! What's your favorite roll?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Roll? Oh, you haven't met Sushi, my new cat.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You named a cat Sushi?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sushi, scratch his face.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You hitting up any of the Cons this year?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know it! I'm going as YOU.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really? Cool!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah cuz when I go as myself I get harassed for, like, hundreds of autographs. Figured I'd go as a relative unknown this time.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer i need you to write that -

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hi, this is Mortimer. Sorry I'm unavailable right now, but please leave a message after the beep. BEEEEE -

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: you're standing in front of

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: EEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEE

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: this is absurd

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: EEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEE

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: fine. i'll do it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: P.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ahh, I love lying out in the sun.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're inside, and where did you get 30 desk lamps?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't ask silly questions. Also, if the police ask for me I'm not here.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Woo! I'm doing a radio interview!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nice! Which station?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Station?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You don't know which station, do you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I thought there was just the one.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have to make a phone call now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: KNOCK KNOCK

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: no.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, why haven't you eaten anything but apples for a week?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's supposed to ward off doctors.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, I'm learning guitar.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow! Show me what you know.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay: chun chun chun chun reeeeeeoooooowwwwww--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Never mind. Goodbye.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm selling my house. Wanna buy it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How many bedrooms and bathrooms?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: 2 beds, 17 baths. 580 square feet.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Any chance one of those bathrooms could be converted to a third bedroom?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's a really stupid idea.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wake up! WAKE UP!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm awake, Mort. I've been awake all morning.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was talking to myself, Monte.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I'll be honest: I lost the car keys.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no. Well, where was the last place you saw them?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: In the car. Which is also missing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, I hate getting mail for the wrong address!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That keeps happening at my place, too! It's a real pain.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wait, do we live together?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I've never really been sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Huh.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I feel listless, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: oh?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I feel like I'm wandering blindfolded through a forest. I don't know where I started or where my journey is supposed to end.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I had that once.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Turns out it was just gas.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, it's 4/20 today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hee hee hee hee hee.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, why do the lights keep flickering on and off?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, it's my little science experiment.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Which is...?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Studying the effects of flicking the light switch on and off on my roommate.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do these pants make my butt look big?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're not wearing pants.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YOU TAKE THAT BACK.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let's plant a garden!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a lot of work, Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then let's go to a garden!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But then we have to outside.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then let's just stay here.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good idea.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What cooks and is also cooking?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, I give up.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Our kitchen!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Our kitchen is on fire. My fault. We should probably call the fire department now.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why is there a raccoon in the conference room?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: CONFIDENTIAL BUSINESS SECRETS.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ok before you get upset. . .

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ugh here we go

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: . . . don't think of it as losing a laptop.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: think of it as gaining a cutting board.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: why do we keep letting you in the building?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you up to date on Game of Thrones?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uh...sure, I love sports. Is it the semi-finals yet?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Never mind.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can toss a throne like 7 feet.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think my phone is broken, can I borrow yours?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure you c--wait, this is a piece of cardboard with 'PHONE' written in marker.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just need it for another second...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ARE YOU DOWNLOADING THE PINA COLADA SONG ON MY PHONE AGAIN?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let's say you find a Slinky just sitting by itself in the mail room. Would you say that Slinky is fair game?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: If it's been sitting there awhile and no one has claimed it, sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Cool, cool. Now say that Slinky isn't a Slinky, but $20. And the mail room isn't a mail room, but your wallet.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mort! Check out this funny picture!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: LOL

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know, you don't have to say LOL in real life. You can just laugh for real.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I DON'T HAVE TIME FOR REAL LAUGHTER MONTE!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: MAY DAY! WOOOOOO! PUT ON A SILLY HAT AND MASH A BUNCH OF PIZZAS TOGETHER! WHERE'S MY FEATHER BOA?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You have no idea what May Day is about, do you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: NOPE. WOOOOOO!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm excited to watch this new Western movie.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, it should be a good one.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Remember that one time I rode a horse?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That was an ottoman.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I wrangled that sucker.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I've decided we should be more like a certain sports show involving "hot takes."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I disagree.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Does that count as a hot take?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: TAKES.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: May the fourth be with you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, it's 'Force'.

lines.speaker: mortimer

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: what?? what is that made out of?? it's not snowing outside.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: the stuff inside your duvet looked a lot like snow

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, I found a penny!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, I found a dollar!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, I found a twenty!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, put my wallet down!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey it's the winter solstice.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yup, the longest night of the year.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, back to TV.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What're you writing there, Mort?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm working on my new year's resolutions.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How far have you gotten?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I drew a cow, sort of.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Merry Christmas Eve Eve!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not a thing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know what is a thing?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A humbug.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Point made.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I DON'T KNOW WHAT IT IS, MONTE, BUT SOMETHING ABOUT THE HOLIDAYS ALWAYS MAKES ME SO EXCITED!!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Maybe it's the five peppermint mochas you had for breakfast this morning.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YEAH MAYBE THAT HAS SOMETHING TO DO WITH IT.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Merry Christmas, Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Merry Christmas, Mortimer! Let's toast with some eggnog!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uh, don't drink that.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's not eggnog.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: hope you like the boxing day breakfast i made!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: yeah, it's pretty good. say, where's all that wrapping paper we left out last night?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: uhm. well...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ugh, i thought "tinsel scramble" was just a festive name.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: hope you like the boxing day breakfast i made!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: here's your dumb book

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: uh oh. you didn't like it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: no, i didn't!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: i was expecting to learn some awesome new one-liners for my open mic night!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "divine comedy" my butt.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Please pass the turkey & potatoes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, are you...is that Thanksgiving leftovers? How can you eat something from a month ago??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Actually it's leftovers from Thanksgiving 2015.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: 2016 is almost over.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, and I'm glad--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ***AIRHORN*** GOT MY 2017 AIRHORN READY.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, I'm actually gonna miss 2016.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh my god! What's that over there?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?! What is it?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ha! Made you look!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Every time!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: HAPPY NEW YEAR, MORT.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HAPPY NEW YEAR, MONTE.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WE SHOULDN'T HAVE STOOD SO CLOSE TO THOSE FIREWORKS.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WHAT DID YOU SAY?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: hey, what are you eating?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: cookies

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: what about your resolutions???

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: there's always 2018

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, I guess it's about time to take down the tree.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Already taken care of!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh...how? Where'd you put it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: All excellent questions. Let's just say the neighbors should've covered their pool this winter.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This is why we have to move every year.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I thought you were going to exercise more in 2017.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I am. I'm exercising my right to watch TV.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Could you please move to the left.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Be careful out there today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know: "Be wary, be wary of the 5th of January."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not a thing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes it is. It rhymes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know what I like best about you, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is it my wit? My charisma? My charm, perhaps?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was going to say your modesty, but forget that now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Got any big plans for 2017, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yup! I'm going to reorganize the whole office! What are your plans for 2017?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm probably going to spend most of the year messing everything back up again.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well at least you're being honest.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's official: I'm a police officer!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh...how did you become a police officer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I found a badge! So I'm a police officer.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a Captain America sticker.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Shut up, you're under arrest.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Remember when I told you I'm making lobster for dinner?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That thing you said three hours ago? Yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's not going well.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've never seen anything so angry.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let's give it the house and leave town.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Barstow, here we come.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: whew! boy am i sore from that workout i just did!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I WISH SOMEBODY WOULD ASK ME ABOUT MY CHALLENGING WORKOUT

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: fine. i'll just tell twitter.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: i win!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here's an advance copy of my memoir.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? You wrote a memoir--wait, it's one page.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Read it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: "Monte then went to the store to get me a tuna sandwich--" nice try.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok Monte, eye exam: how many kittens am I holding up?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I told you, we're not getting a kitten.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You lack vision.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Today is the worst day ever. Everything that can go wrong, has. And I have this sinking feeling that it's just going to get worse. Much worse.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, being afraid of Friday the 13th is nothing more than silly superstition.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's Friday the 13th?! OHMYGODWE'REALLGONNADIE!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, that's a lot of candy you've got there, Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't worry, Monte. I'm not going to eat it all for breakfast...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...just most of it!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey I got a new laptop!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a sandwich grill.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Which is all I used my last laptop for!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You ever think we should star in a reality show?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: nope.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Think about it: RETAIL STARS. That's what it would be called. It would be a dramatic and compelling glimpse into our daily hijinks, and I'd get in fights with you like every week! RETAIL STARS.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: this is a terrible idea.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's TV gold. I'M WRITING TO THE NETWORKS!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: watch out, snooki.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: i'm gonna start taking tennis lessons!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: uh. ok. do you even know anything about tennis?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: uh, YEAH. i know all about it! i know about the strings and the keys, and i know about the notes and the pedals, and i know - oh wait....

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: yep

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...i got tennis and piano mixed up again.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: uh huh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: i gotta call john mcenroe.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nice haircut, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Huh? I didn't get a hairc--oh no, you didn't.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Listen, it's not my fault I cut hair in my sleep.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy National Popcorn Day!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: *sigh* I see you've filled every room with popcorn.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I love holidays!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just ate a crumb on my desk that I think was a raisin but I'm not certain of that.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What else could it have been?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A fly I squished yesterday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Meh. They taste about the same.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good morning Mort! You're up early!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Morning?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh yeah...it's seven am.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Seven AM?!?! I thought it was seven pm! I'm going back to sleep!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pick a card.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: They're all credit cards.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: hey wait, they're MY credit cards.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And I'm letting you have one of them back.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's 1/23! You know what that means!!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: eh?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: yeah?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: it's uh

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: numbers

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: i'm going back to bed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: hey monte, i think there's a hole in your shoe

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: hmmm....no, i don't believe so

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: sure there is

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: otherwise how did you get your foot in it????!!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: hahahahahahaha

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: every day you're the worst

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Look at this amazing painting I got for us!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a stop sign.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, someone just left it on the street corner!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't know if I should go to this job interview. Seems shady.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Shady how?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, it's in a building.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...And?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So it's an inside job.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm sorry I filled your bathtub with fake blood.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No you're not.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK I'm not. How did you know? It's like you're reading my mind!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm so thirsty!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Would you like some water?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nah, I'd rather just keep complaining about how thirsty I am.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pass me the chips.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We don't have any chips.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Perhaps I'm being too subtle. Please go to the store and get some chips then return home and pass them to me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ahhh. nothing like throwing on a comfy robe during my day off...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WAIT DON'T PUT YOUR HANDS IN THE POCKETS

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: EW EW EW. is this chowder??? WHY????

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: we were out of clean bowls. :C

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: hey monte! what happens when a frog's car breaks down?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: i don't know. tell me what happens when a frog's car breaks down.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: it gets TOAD away!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: right, of course it would. most broken cars get towed away.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: no, no, i mean TOAD. like...toad. like...uh. hmmm.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: this has backfired.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: *pumps fist in quiet triumph*

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Finally that awful January is over! Hello lovely February!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's your night to do dishes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I hate February.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can you believe there was ever a time when donuts didn't exist?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort? You ok?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WOOOOOO FRIDAYYYYYYYYY!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you yelling about? You don't even work.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I LOVE YELLING.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: February the 4th be with you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, I don't think that's how that joke works.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Haha yeah whatever. See you March 4th.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Who do you think will win today, the Patriots or the Falcons?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The ball. That thing scores more than anyone.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Looks like it's quittin' time!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's 9am. Your watch is broken.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But it sure does LOOK like it's quittin' time hahaha.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Also I'm sad now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nothing like relaxing in a swimming pool.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We don't have a swimming pool.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And that's why sitting in this flooded ditch is nothing like a swimming pool.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm feeling sad today, Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is it because I lost your turtles?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: YOU WHAT??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh uh never mind, tell me more about your sad thing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HAPPY NATIONAL PIZZA DAY!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes I know, you've been telling me about this day for months.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: QUICK, LET'S ORDER SOME NATIONAL PIZZAS!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's time I told you the truth, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh oh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I am actually a visitor from space, but now I must return to my home planet Kranduur. Please, shed no tears. We Kranduurians prefer to simply say "Daxxa Miguthu." Goodbye my friend.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're not getting out of clean-up duty. Get back in the bathroom.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OH COME ON IT SMELLS LIKE KRANDUURIAN POOP IN THERE.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you wearing horns and playing pan pipes, Mort?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just celebrating Satyrday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are there 50 rolls of carpet in our garage?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Calm down, Monte. I was acting on an inspiring Latin aphorism.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's CARPE diem.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh no, Valentine's Day is tomorrow and I still haven't put up the tree!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, I think you may have the wrong holiday, Monte.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Shows what you know. Now help me stuff this pumpkin with fireworks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Valentine's Day, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, a box of chocolates! Thanks Mort!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well it's actually just a box....now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Valentine's Day!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh. That was yesterday, Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh darn, I guess I'll have to hang on to this 20 ton chocolate heart.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Knock knock.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Who's there?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, go to the butcher and get me two knockwursts.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're the wurst wurst.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey remember talking about us getting a fancy new rug?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh yeah, what kind of--OMG THERE'S A LIVE BEAR IN THE LIVING ROOM!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah I didn't have the heart.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, just came back from the gym. Check out these muscles.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you showing me a fitness magazine?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Someone left it at the gym.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, want to test the life-size catapult I made?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok no worries. Well, unrelated, why don't you have a seat in this special chair I made--I mean bought?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You gonna eat that, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean this elaborate tuna casserole I just spent all afternoon making? Yes of course I'm going to eat it--WHAT THE WHAT? IT'S ALL GONE. HOW DID YOU DO THAT?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Gotta act fast.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let's just take a vacation, Monte. Right now. You and me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok sure. Where should we go?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The new pizza place across the street.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think it's time we bought a new TV.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We just bought a new TV an hour ago.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But look at the clock.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes I see you replaced all the numbers with "TV".

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I baked you a cake, Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: YOU? You baked a cake? For ME?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I bought a cake and then put it in the oven and forgot about it and now it's a black rock.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh...thanks?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sure thing. You rock!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Want to see a magic trick?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok, as soon as I'm done with my sandwich--WHERE IS IT?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Tah dah! Or should I say tah dah-licious!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I love Saturdays. Passionately.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What about Sundays?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I only like-like Sundays. Wouldn't go steady.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let's go see a live performance.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: YOU want to see a live performance?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah! I know a place you watch as they make the pizza right before your very eyes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, have you seen my pork pie hat?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That was a hat? *burp*

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Here Mort, have an apple.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: FINE, I GET IT, MONTE. I'LL GO AWAY.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? What did I do?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I JUST GOT MY DOCTOR'S LICENSE.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I got a 24-pack of light bulbs.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I want to have some good ideas.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh, I've got to lose weight. Going to the garage!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Throwing out the spare tire in our car.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not how--oh never mind.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey it's Saturday, what should we do today?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How about a hike?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Great! Hike down to the pizza place and get us a couple larges.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't go with, I have to load the blu-ray.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, have you seen my bedsheets, blankets, towels, and half my clothes?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uh, no. Well, I'm going parachuting, bye!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm off to the airport! I'll send a postcard from France.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why France?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have a hankering for French fries.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok Monte, I'm going for a run.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: YOU are going for a run?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well yeah, I'm being chased by a jaguar--whoops gotta go!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I borrowed your toothbrush, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort! Gross!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey hey hey, I cleaned your toothbrush thoroughly. Don't worry.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ugh ok. I guess it's not so bad, it's just our teeth.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Teeth? Uh...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We need a new computer.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: "We"?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well yeah, I don't have a computer and I had to use yours to prop up my popcorn stand.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Finally, it's Friday! Let's get some french fries, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know you can get french fries any day of the week, right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My life is a lie.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort? Why is there a hammer in our TV?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: They cancelled my favorite show.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You couldn't just turn off the TV and email the network or something?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was also looking for a place to hang the hammer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ahhhh I love a lazy Sunday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you clean the garage yet?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No can do, it's Lazy Sunday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know that Lazy Sunday is not an official day, right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry, not listening, Lazy Sunday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm very much like Garfield.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Let me guess, because you hate Mondays? Haha.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, because I love lasagna.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What a coincidence, I *just* made a lasagna--HOW DID YOU EAT THE WHOLE THING ALREADY?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey it's 3/14, Monte. You know what that means, right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uh. What was that?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The first 101 digits of pi.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Huh? Are you gonna make a pie today or not?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BEWARE THE IDEAS OF MARCH.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's the *Ides* of March.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My idea is better.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can you get me more floss at the store?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure, but why are you flossing so much lately?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm studying to become a flossopher.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Top o' the mornin' to ye, Monte! Care ye for a shamrock shake?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Níl go raibh maith agat.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What language is that, Klingon?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: *sigh* Happy St. Patrick's Day to you too.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ahhh, I love Saturdays. Watching TV, microwaving pizza bites, and blasting my fave tunes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Paying bills.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Paying bills?! No way, grandpa. Pfffffft.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well until you pay the electric bill you won't be doing any of those things.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Two questions. First, need anything from the store?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, we need bread, eggs, milk, butter, tortillas, salsa, peanut butter, cheese, cookies, spinach, apples, bananas, donuts, frozen pizzas, meat sticks, and root beer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Great. Second question, can you go to the store?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, we should start our own company.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Doing what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Selling the stuff in our house we don't want anymore. And we make it funny somehow.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't think there's any money in that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: First day of spring! Spring break has begun! Let's go skateboarding on the flowers!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Spring break doesn't necessarily start on the first day of--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: *CRASH*

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Omg Mort, are you okay?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm spring broken.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What should we call our company, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean our company that sells stuff from our home that we don't want anymore?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How about 'Secondhand Stuff'?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok, 'SUPER DUDE COOL TREASURE FROM THE NAKED SPACE TACO' it is!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, it's national puppy day again--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No Mort, we can't get a puppy, you know I'm allergic.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well you'll have to tell that to the ten adorable puppies playing in your room.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte! We've got our first customer!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really? Who?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That guy out there! He's buying ALL our stuff!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's the garbage man.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, it's your turn to pick for movie night.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well I *would* pick something but SOMEONE purposely got 'Space Jam' stuck in the blu-ray player.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, you mean the TIME-HONORED CLASSIC 'Space Jam'? Good choice!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you doing, Mort?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: A real push-up involves you pushing yourself off the floor, not pushing nachos up to your face.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But there are no nachos on the floor. 28...29...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monday! Time to head to the office.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean the kitchen?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah. I'm late for a meeting.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean an omelet?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't make me report you to HR.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oooh I ate too many M&Ms.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You should cut back.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah. I'll just have an M.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Manatee Appreciation Day, Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you celebrating Manat--oh no. You didn't.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I did! Meet your new roommate, a pile of manatees!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I write off my 10 pizza lunch as a business expense for our company?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How is that a business lunch?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because that pizza was THE BUSINESS.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Fine, never mind. I used your credit card anyway.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That was a good march.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, it was a pretty good month, wasn't it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I just marched to the bagel place.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy April 1st, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no. What prank are you pulling today?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let's just say you're standing in it now.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, I'm glad April fool's day is over. I can only take so many of your pranks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hahaha--wait. Oh no. Uh, Monte, don't flush the toilet. For a month. Two months, to be safe.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I had this horrible dream that it was already Monday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It *is* Monday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then I'm going back to bed until I wake up.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, watch me ski off the roof.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I can't, I've got to do taxes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I didn't know you drove taxis.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Now you're just being a jerk.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Maybe. C'mon, this roof isn't gonna ski off itself.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh man, I overslept.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, you were binge watching pretty late into the night.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I better go binge watch some sunlight.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How's our business doing this month?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We've sold one product.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Was the product worth a million dollars?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Drat. That was our entire business plan.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, want to start a band?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I thought you were developing a solo act.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, that fell apart. Creative differences with myself.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ahhh I love weekends.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ready to go?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: To what?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We promised my mom we'd move her piano up five flights.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I hate weekends.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I fix you some eggs, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, how nice!--wait a minute, what kind of eggs are these?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How should I know, I found them in a cave last summer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm calling in sick to work today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Aren't you your own boss?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I approved it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, it's time we had The Talk.

lines.speaker: monte
