lines.text: Oh no, not again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've outlined 50 additional reasons why The Force Awakens is the best Star Wars movie.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, I got a new phone!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Right on. Who are going to call first?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You can call people on this?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh, Monte, running a business is hard. Let's go bowling.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, we can't just go bowling every time work gets hard.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So then let's go bowling every time work is easy too.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Strike.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Finally, it's Friday! Three day weekend!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, it's still a weekday, you don't get today off.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, my boss is such a jerk.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You are your boss.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then all employees take the day off!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Want to go to the park?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can't. Working on my science project.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: A science project? You??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes. I'm studying the effects of cupcakes on marathon binge watching.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Aaaand we're back.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, where's our screen door?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was making spaghetti and I couldn't find the strainer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh, how can it be Monday again?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I know, the week goes by fast.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I mean it was Monday 10 minutes ago, then 6 minutes ago, and I just checked and it's STILL Monday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I think I'm sick.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How do you know?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I sneezed on the lawn and now it's on fire.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, I've been slammed all day.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean because of your door slam video stunt?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yup, finally got a good take! Looks great!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy 4/20, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Happy 4/20, Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Check out this trampoline jump!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, you got so high!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I've invented an app for our business! Our users can request an item and we'll go get it and bring it to them.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, sounds labor intensive. What's it called?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: MonteDelivery.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Saturday. Guess I better mow the lawn.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You destroyed the lawn last week.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Woo-hoo! Chore-free day!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Help me solve this math problem, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You told me you hated math.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah but this is important. If I have 8 slices of pizza and 120 fries, how many fries go on each slice to create equal portions?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HEY CHECK OUT THESE COOL HEADPHONES MONTE. WOW IT'S LIKE MY HEAD IS MADE OF MUSIC.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: They aren't plugged in.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WHAT'S THAT? YEAH WHAT A KILLER BEAT.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, check out my kitchen tool.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: A crossbow?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Gets marshmallows to my face much faster.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, can you give me a little help with my book?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're writing a book? About what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't know, that's why I need your help.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I made you a hat, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, thank y--wait, what's this?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's a shirt that says 'hat'.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you eating, Monte?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I couldn't decide between coffee and pizza.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ah I see, you just--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Care for a cup of a slice of coffee pizza?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let's go play frisbee!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok, where's the disc?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just throw these personal pizzas at me, I've been working on my mouth catch.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Guess what month starts tomorrow, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: May.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: May you what?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm walking away now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Alright! First day of May, LET'S DO THIS.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Go back to bed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here's your party hat, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh. What are we celebrating?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The party hat I got you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We're out of toilet paper.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? I just bought a 24 pack!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know, but I needed the rolls for my tube castle.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What did you do with the paper?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I flushed it down the toilet, duh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You will make me a triple decker taco.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No I won't, why are you...are you trying to use the force?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Darn it! I think the online force course I took was a scam.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: May the 4th be with you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, it's Friday, let's skip work early.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean skip out on the small business we run out of our house?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah! We'll let the intern take over the rest of the day.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Intern? Wait, you don't mean--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Roomba, you're in charge now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If you need me I'll be watching all three Lord of the Rings extended cut movies.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey wait, you're supposed to mow the lawn today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The intern's doing it now.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, for the last time, THE ROOMBA DOES NOT CUT GRASS.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok I've watched the new Guardians of the Galaxy nine times and there's one thing I don't understand.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why haven't I watched it ten times?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I got up on the wrong side of the bed.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh oh. You mean...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yup, I shouldn't have put all those cactus plants on the bed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just can't get out of bed today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'll make some coffee.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No no, I glued myself to the mattress last night.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But I'll take some of that coffee.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've got an idea for marketing our business.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We send out a tweet.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...and?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's as far as I've gotten. What's a tweet, by the way?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Check out my new shoes!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Those are bowling shoes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, the guy at the bowling alley just GAVE them to me!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's Friday, let's go out for fries!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What did you do on Thursday?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ate a whole bucket of thurses.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mother's Day is tomorrow, did you send your mom a card?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I did! My expired credit card.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't worry, she doesn't know how to use it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Mother's Day, Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, I'm not a mother.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh really? The 30 baby turtles I put in your bathtub would say otherwise.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh, Monday morning. I'm hitting snooze.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: When will it wake you up?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Friday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I could never be an organ donor.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've never even played an organ, let alone owned one.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mort, have you seen my doorstop?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mmmstmph?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh...are you eating my doorstop?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: *spit* I thought it was cheese.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm in love, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: With who?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: This sausage and basil pizza that I met at--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Never mind.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do we have any more butter?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What do you mean, I just bought a whole 8-pack yester--WHAT IS THAT THING??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Excuse me, my butter sculpture is not a "thing", it's art.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I've been thinking...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no, what is it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Those birds have been living in our tree rent-free for too long.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thginot sria skaep niwt wen eht.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I said the new Twin Peaks airs tonight.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I don't give you enough credit for being my friend. Thanks for always sticking with me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What did you do this time?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The toilet's on fire.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think I need to see a doctor.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh oh, why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I need to know what a doctor looks like for my doctor cosplay.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's sunny outside!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, isn't it great?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I can barely see the TV screen.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: GONE. GONE FOREVER. HAHAHAHA. UH OH, HERE COMES ANOTHER INNOCENT PIECE OF BLANK PAPER.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh oh. Have you been at the paper shredder all day?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Want to see the new Thor movie?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's not out yet.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah but I edited together all the teasers, trailers, clips, behind-the-scenes, and fan reaction videos into a 90 minute feature.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ahhh, Saturday is my second favorite day of the week.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait what's your first favorite?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Next Saturday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can you go to the store and get a few things?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sure I can.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So....are you going then?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I thought we were just playing Questions.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thought I'd arrive at work early today to impress the boss!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're at home in your pajamas and you're your own boss.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And I'm impressed!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you know a helicopter has a better safety record than a regular car?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, for the last time, we are NOT trading in our car for a heli-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Too late. Sorry.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nah, I'm not sorry.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yay June! I love June!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Last year you couldn't wait for June to be over.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: SHHHH I'm trying to get on June's good side this year.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why do people always assume bananas are a monkey's favorite food?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Maybe because for a solid month you've only eaten banana pizza, banana soda, and banana pie.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's just the diet I'm on.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm so bored today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You could take out the trash and do the laundry.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'd rather be bored.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, you've eaten only cereal today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah but I'm having salad for dinner.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sure! I mean, it's a cereal salad. With the leaves removed and milk added. And...it's cereal.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just joined a band and all the other members are weasels.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, what are you called?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The Rolling Stoats.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't find my keys.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: When did you last see them?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: When I was hiding them a week ago because I thought they were yours.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I found us a vending machine!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow! What's in it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Raccoons.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, do you know where I can get a filing cabinet?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, you don't need a filing cabinet. You don't have any files.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't need it for files! I just need something to stand on so I can reach the snacks I hid in the ceiling.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh Monte. I'm so tired.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, you've been asleep all morning.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I know. All that sleeping really wore me out!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you going to watch the new season of OITNB this weekend?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, but I will be GOANWTV.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whoa what's that? A new Netflix show?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: "Going outside and not watching TV."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, I've been practicing my origami. Look, I made you a frog!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, this is just a wet ball of paper.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You never understand my art.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ughhhhhhh Tuesday mornings, am I right?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, it's only Monday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was just anticipating that tomorrow morning isn't going to be that great either.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, have you seen my other sock? It looks just like this one.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's my sock.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, yes. Your sock... Have you seen "your" other sock?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I had a crazy dream last night.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh yeah, what happened??

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I was wearing your hat and--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WHOA! That IS crazy! Don't tell me any more. It's too scary.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, my computer's not working today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you talking about? Your computer's working just fine.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, did I say my computer? I meant to say me...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm not working today. See ya!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What'cha doing Monte?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just working on my wedding registry.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But Mort, you're not engaged to anyone.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's true. But it's never too early to start planning for presents!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte! Did you know that in the old days phones didn't used to have games and apps on them?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, Mort. I knew that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Huh. I wonder what people even used them for back then.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you call your dad for Father's Day, Mort?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah I called him...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...I called him the greatest father ever!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But did you actually call him? On the phone?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No. I forgot.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I love Mondays!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really? Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: There are plenty of places to park at the beach!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I hate Mondays!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's Tuesday, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not for me! I haven't been to bed yet, so it's still Monday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hello! Is anyone home?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No! No one is home!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh! Except me. I'm home! Where are you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte. Check out my cool new computer.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, that's not a computer; that's a spiral ring notebook.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I prefer to think of it as an analog computer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have an announcement! I'm going to live on a desert island!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort! You'll never survive on a desert island!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did I say desert island? I meant dessert island....

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...I just have to find one first. They exist, right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte I'm really worried about global warming and melting ice.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh wow. I didn't know you cared about issues like that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I didn't until it melted all the ice in my drink.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Now my soda is all watery!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, are you ok? You were asleep for a really long time.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm fine! I'm training for a sleep marathon.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's a sleep marathon?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's when you sleep for 26.2 hours!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where have you been all day?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Where was I supposed to be?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Work.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hmmm, that doesn't sound familiar. Are you sure?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte! Do you want to go get cheeseburgers?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure, that sounds like fun. Where should--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Great! Get me one without pickles. I'm starving!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey folks, this is a friendly reminder to check the batteries in your smoke detector.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WHAT DID YOU DO?!?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow, your lunch looks great Monte!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Looks healthy and delicious.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mmmmmm and it smells so good.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: If I give you half now, will you leave me alone while I eat the rest of it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Deal!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte! I think my phone's broken.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's probably because you threw it off the roof last week.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, that's my other phone.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: This is the one I dropped in the toilet yesterday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Quick! I need 100 rubber bands and some super glue!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't even want to know what those are for.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Good! Because I don't want to tell you!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HEY MONTE! DO YOU LIKE MY NEW HEADPHONES???

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, but you should take them off when you talk to people. You're shouting at me!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: SORRY, WHAT? I CAN'T HEAR YOU OVER THE SOUND OF THESE NEW HEADPHONES!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How much wood would a woodchuck chuck, if a woodchuck could chuck wood?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you talking about, Mortimer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think we have termites.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How was your trip to the dentist yesterday?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pretty good, but she said I need to start flossing my teeth.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, I thought you said you flossed every night...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I do! But not my teeth.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What does it all mean, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What does what mean, Mortimer? Life? The Universe? Love?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No no no... These Ikea instructions! What does it all mean?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I don't feel like working today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really? Today's your first day back from vacation.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know! All that vacationing really wore me out.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer! You're late for work again!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm not late. I'm early for tomorrow.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Tomorrow's Saturday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well then I guess I'm just really early for Monday then!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Check out my new phone!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, that's not a phone, that's a coconut!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Huh. That explains why it gets such bad reception.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Knock knock!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Go away!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, that's not how these jokes are supposed to work.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, you're not wrong...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Great, so we're in agreement.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I never said that. Just because you're not wrong, doesn't mean you're right!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, that's exactly what being "not wrong" means...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, you're not wrong about that...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Happy Birthday, Mortimer!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Birthday, Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I got you a cake!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know. It was delicious!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Another year older, another year wiser- eh Mortimer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't make any promises...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte! I stayed awake all night last night!!!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Then why aren't you more tired right now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because I slept at my desk all morning.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Check it out Monte! It's the world's tallest pancake stack!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, that's only like six pancakes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well I got hungry!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm so tired of modern life, Monte.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just want to live in the wilderness and be free!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know there's no internet in the wilderness, right? And no snacks or tv either.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I'll just bring that stuff with me!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ♪ dunnnn dunnnn da da dunnn dunnnn ♪

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort please-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ♪ da da DUNNNNNNNN ♪

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I know Game of Thrones premieres tonight and you're excited-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ♪ dunnnn dunnnn da da dunnn dunnnn ♪

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: -but you've got to stop singing the theme song!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ♪ DA DA DUNNNNNNNN ♪

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do these pants make my butt look big?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, you actually have to be wearing the pants for me to answer that question...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Just a heads up- I think we are out of coffee creamer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's ok. I'll just put a scoop of vanilla ice cream in my coffee, like I do on the weekend.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That explains a lot actually...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Want to go out to a bar and sing karaoke with me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Not really.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok, we can just set up a microphone and sing karaoke here!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you ready for the big meeting today, Mort?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But I am ready to get an "emergency" phone call right before the meeting happens.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well Monte, I've finally decided to set a world record.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh yeah? What record are you going to go for?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: World's largest pizza!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, the record for largest pizza weighed over 20,000 pounds. Do you really think you can handle that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hmmmm...maybe I'll go for world's smallest pizza instead.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey check it out! I made homemade lasagna!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, that's not lasagna. That's a bowl of spaghetti.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well at least I made it myself.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you really make it yourself?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well...no.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mmmmmmm...there's nothing like a big stack of pancakes for breakfast on Sunday!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's two in the afternoon.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then there's nothing like a big stack of pancakes for LUNCH on Sunday!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you going to the post office today?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes. Do you need to mail something?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah can you send this for me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort- the envelope just says "Mom"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, who else would you expect me to be writing a letter to?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte- did you enjoy the long weekend?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, there was no long weekend...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Maybe not for everyone!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: *sniff sniff* Is someone making popcorn?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You can't have any!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't want--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I SAID YOU CAN'T HAVE ANY

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I'm thinking about becoming a pilot!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But Mort, you already have a job.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, but this would be one I'm actually going to do!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm going to get so much accomplished today with my new to do list!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: All your list says is "Make a to do list."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I've got to start somewhere!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Guess what, Monte? I'm dog sitting all week!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: If you're watching a dog, then why you have an iguana on a leash tethered to your desk?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The dog is at home. The iguana is unrelated.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, well, well...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, what? Did you just figure something out?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nah, I was just looking at pictures of wells on google images.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WHEN WILL IT EVER END?!?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Life? The universe? Suffering? What?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, the timer on my microwave pizza bites!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What happened to your head?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I got a haircut yesterday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Who cut your hair?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Maureen. Do you want me to make you an appointment?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: NO! I mean... No, thanks. I like my hair to look... Not like yours.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, it's finally Wednesday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What happens on Wednesday?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I can start looking forward to the weekend.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You don't do that every day?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wanna go out to lunch?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I thought you brought your lunch today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I did...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...but then I got hungry and ate it for breakfast.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I walked to work backwards today!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is that why you're four hours late?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I also overslept for three hours.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've got a great idea, Monte and I need your help! I just need some paperclips, some dental floss, and your sense of adventure.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I have literally none of those things to give you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well then I guess you won't be the first to test out my homemade living-room-to-kitchen zipline!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I rode the bus to work today!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But today's Sunday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I also rode the bus home when I figured that out.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's going on in here?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What does it look like is going on in here?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you bake some sort of exploding cake?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Um, not exactly. But, yeah- that's what happened.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Will you bring me a glass of water?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why can't you get it yourself?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because it's easier for me if you get it for me. Duh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Look! I made a cake!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow- that looks really yummy. Can I have some?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: DON'T TOUCH IT! It's too pretty to eat!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So, what are we supposed to do with it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ummm... I hadn't thought about that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte. Take this hazmat, store it in your desk, and don't ask questions. Ok?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Whatever you're doing, it seems like a bad idea.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I said no questions!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That wasn't a question.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, no statements either!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My life's goal is to see a real life dinosaur!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, all the dinosaurs are dead.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well since I can't achieve my life's goal, I guess I'll just go back to wasting time!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pancake time!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, are you sure you want to eat all that. That's too many pancakes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, you know the old pancake saying: "If the stack's not high, you're probably going to die."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, no one says that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I do!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh, Monte. I'm so hungover.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh...yesterday you got up, ate breakfast, and immediately went back to bed until now. You didn't have anything to drink.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know...it's a pancake hangover.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think I'm a psychic!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, I'm too busy to talk right now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I knew you were going to say that!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do we have any beach towels?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you going to the beach?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nope. But all our regular towels are dirty.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can you help me move the couch?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, probably.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh you mean now? No. I'm busy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte! Try to guess how many Skittles I have in this jar!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok. I don't know...342?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wrong! There's none. I ate them all while you were guessing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: This work is so easy I could do it in my sleep.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Cool! You should do your work then.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, just because I could doesn't mean I feel like doing it right now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm finally gonna do it Monte! I'm going to run a marathon!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow! When do you start training?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: As soon as I finish eating this entire bag of Oreos.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, the product reviews on this toaster are terrible.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, you're looking at reviews for The Emoji Movie.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well that explains why I stuck this piece of bread in the DVD player.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I really don't think it does.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's that smell?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm baking a lasagna.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hmmm. Interesting. That's not what my recipe for lasagna smells like. What's your secret?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I take it out of the oven before it burns to a charred mass of cheese and sadness.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh... I'll have to try that next time.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where are you going with those umbrellas?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: These are umbrellas?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, have a good day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have a declarative sentence to make!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok, Mort. What is it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I declare!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...Was that a joke?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mort! I have a really important plan, but first I'm gonna need 10 AAA batteries and a fish tank full of goldfish.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Stop making so many plans and do some work!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You say that like making crazy plans isn't work.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte! Did you know that the amount of suction created by an ordinary household vacuum is not enough to propel a monkey through a homemade underground pneumatic tube?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you trying to say, Mort?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I broke the vacuum.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte! Let's start a band!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Great! You learn to play all the instruments, and I'll be the cool front man.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've created the ultimate grilled cheese sandwich! Want to know the secret ingredient?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I added a ground beef patty to the middle.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, that's a cheeseburger.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow, you're right! I invented the cheeseburger!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Monday, Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you happy about it being Monday?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm happy every day I get to see you!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well gosh, that's really sweet of you to say Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So... Did you bring anything for lunch? Want to order a pizza?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you know how to get chocolate stains out of an orange cape?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you ever considered not getting chocolate on your cape in the first place?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nope.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort where were you yesterday? We missed our email appearance!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I got caught up in an experiment. Why didn't you just do it without me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, I can't have a conversation with just one person.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why not? I do it all the time!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, what year is it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How sure are you?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Pretty sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hmmmm...so time machine attempt #5,631 definitely didn't work.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nice chef's hat Mort!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thanks! I'm learning to cook!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Cool! What can you make?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, nothing yet. I decided to start with the hat and just let the rest come to me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Labor Day, Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Happy Labor Day, Mort!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What are you going to do with your day off?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Probably lay on the couch dreading the eventual transition into Tuesday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Me too! Aren't three-day weekends great?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well that didn't go as planned.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No it did not.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What should we do now?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Try and forget the whole thing ever happened.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What thing?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Exactly.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's Wednesday my dudes!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, have you been on the internet again?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No...yes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What did I tell you about the internet?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That it's a dank and scary place full of meta memes I can't possibly understand.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And was I right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No...yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have a great idea for an invention Monte!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's sort of like a drone, except it can carry a bunch of people...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...also it's much more aerodynamic and it has wings instead of propellers! Pretty cool, huh?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort that's an airplane.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Where? I don't see one!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm going to do it Monte! I'm going to run a marathon!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know you have to train carefully, right? Start running small distances and work up to the whole marathon?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nah, I think instead I'll just run as fast as I can for a really short time until I get totally exhausted and give up completely.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow! Look how many posters you put up!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yup! Just felt like decorating. Definitely not trying to hide anything behind those posters.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you holding a sledgehammer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've gotta go!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey! Who arranged the papers on my desk?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No one arranged them. The stack just got so high that they all fell on the floor.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nice! Free desk clean off!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow! Those are some fancy Bluetooth headphones!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I said WOW THOSE ARE SOME FANCY BLUETOOTH HEADPHONES!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Huh?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: FANCY!! HEADPHONES!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Let me take my earplugs out; I can't understand you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You look sad- what's wrong?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The waffle maker ruined my pop-tart.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why didn't you put the pop-tart in the toaster oven?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because my pop-tart from last night ruined the toaster oven.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: With fire.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Good news! I got a new waffle maker!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I told you, the old one was fine. It just needed to be washed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Buying a new one was easier.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte! Want a cookie? I made them with my family's secret recipe.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ugh! Mort, these are terrible!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, that's the secret! They look great but they taste awful.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: April fools Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's not April...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well that's what makes it so foolish!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte! The tree I planted last week grew to 50 feet tall!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That doesn't sound right. Are you sure you're not getting your tree confused with a tree that was already there?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Maybe...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...but either way, I'm taking credit!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Birthday!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's not my birthday...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I got you this cake.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This cake has already been half eaten.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Surprise!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What do you want for dinner tonight?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh I don't care. I'll eat anything.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok that's great. Maybe tonight we can finally try the place--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pizza!?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No the place by the--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pizza!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok, pizza again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I took the bus to work today!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Don't you take the bus all the time?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No I mean I took the bus to work. See, the bus is right here!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh my god Mort, how did you manage that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let's just say a bus driver owed me a favor.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, come quick! There's cookies in the break room!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not falling for that lie again. It's just going to be some mess you made that you want me to clean up.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's not a lie! But I did drop some of the cookies and it would be great if you could clean it up.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte. Wanna hear some cool fish facts?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Great! Then go to the aquarium. I'm not your fish fact finder!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte! What are you doing at work on a Sunday morning?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I left my phone charger at my desk. What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well I'm definitely not renting out the conference room on the sly as a yoga studio. Definitely not.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Please ignore all the people in yoga pants.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Where are you going?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Work... Why aren't you dressed? We have an important meeting today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh I can't come. I uh... broke my leg.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know I'm looking right at you. We live together. I know you didn't break your leg.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I have plans to go skateboarding today. So maybe I will break my leg and then I won't be able to come into work. In fact, I think I'm going to need to take the week off to recover...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wanna sign the cast for my broken leg?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer- that is clearly just several pairs of tube socks layered over a perfectly healthy leg.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I still need the week off.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How's your leg today?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My what? Oh! Yes, my leg. The leg that I broke... Yes, it's doing... better?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So you think you'll be able to come into the office tomorrow?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No! I can't. Sorry. My leg is still...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We're having pizza for lunch.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'll be there!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was not involved in the incident in the sixth floor conference room and I have an alibi to prove it!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's your alibi?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was busy lighting fireworks in the eighth floor conference room.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, some people in this office really need to clean off their desks.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, your desk is the messiest one in here.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...I just think that seeing other people's clean desks might really be the inspiration I need to get started on mine.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte come quick! The copy machine's jammed!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is this another one of your jokes where you just spread jam all over the copy machine and tell everyone it's jammed?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, the copy machine actually has a paper jam! But also I did spread some jam on it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I'm going to Australia!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know that the flight to Australia will be like 15 hours long, right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I'm going to spend the rest of afternoon day reading about Australia on Wikipedia.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That sounds about right.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's the worst that could happen?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think you're supposed to describe a situation first before you ask that question.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I mean, in general, what's the worst that could happen?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really- you have to give me something to work with...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you want a pumpkin spice latte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, that sounds great.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Good! You can get me one too while you're out!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you know that tattered denim is coming back in style?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I didn't know that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well please keep that in mind when you see the pants you let me borrow last night...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mort! What are you doing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Stocking up on spitballs to shoot at the marketing team.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Shouldn't you get back to work.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Honestly, it's been so long since I did any work that I can't remember what my job is anymore.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort! You're really late for work!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's because today is bring your snail to work day, Monte!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Walking to work with a snail added approximately 6 hours to my commute.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: My desk just broke!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can fix it for you!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's ok...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...I'd rather just work with a broken desk than trust you with power tools!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, I love sleeping late when it's rainy outside.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But it's sunny out. It's been sunny all day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well I didn't know that until I woke up.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, I loved your slide show presentation at work today!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Thanks Mort! What part was your favorite?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The nap I got to take while you talked about whatever it was you were talking about!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh Mort, you look sick. Should you really be in the office right now? Maybe you should go home...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But if I go home then who will take care of me?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can you get me some soup?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well I hope you're happy- you gave me your cold.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I guess that means I don't have to get you anything for your birthday!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, will you water my desk plant for me while I'm on vacation?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure thing, Mort!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Also can you keep watering it for me after I get back? I can never remember to water it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well Monte, I finally finished that big project we were talking about.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You finished the expense reports?!?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No! I covered the entire stairwell in slip 'n slides!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But now that you bring it up, can you do an expense report for all these slip n slides please?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HAPPY SATURDAY MONTE!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's six am Mort. Do you have to be so loud?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't have to be so loud.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just prefer to.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Help! Monte! I think I'm getting FOMO!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know that FOMO isn't the kind of thing you can miss work for, right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know, now that you say that, my FOMO is starting to feel a little better.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But I'm pretty sure I'm getting the flu though.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think I need a haircut

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh yeah? How can you tell?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My comb is stuck and I can't get it out.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: There's nothing in the world more lovely than a crisp fall morning!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I feel like a lot of things are more lovely than a day where it's slightly colder than usual...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Name one thing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I told you, there's nothing more lovely than a beau-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: FRESH PIZZA FROM THE OVEN

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, well yes. I suppose that is also quite a beautiful scene to behold...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Mort, can I borrow $20?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You still owe me $20 from last week!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I was going to use this $20 to pay you back!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte. Your phone went off while you were in the other room.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not falling for that one again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No really...it really went off this time!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok...huh there is a text.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, it's from you...and it just says "BUTTS!"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: GOTCHA MONTE!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's your birthday. Someone gives you a calfskin wallet-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: For the last time, Mort, I'm not a replicant!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I took an IQ test! Are you ready to hear the result?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok. I got...Dumbledore!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort that's a quiz on what Harry Potter character you are.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, but Dumbledore's the smartest one. So this tells us my IQ is probably pretty high.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you seen the new Blade Runner?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nah, I didn't really like the first one.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But Mortimer, Blade Runner is a cinematic masterpiece! The visuals, coupled with th-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It didn't have anything about ice skating in it. A movie called Blade Runner should have at least one speed-skating scene.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Listen I'm really sorry about earlier.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What happened earlier?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Never mind!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I ask you a question?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure, Mort. What's up?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can you get tennis elbow from sharing gym socks with someone?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't even want to know why you're asking me that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Woo hoo! Friday morning!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, it's only Thursday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I'm not coming to work tomorrow either way.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Check it out Monte! I made a weekend to do list!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hmm..let me see. "Sleep all day, play video games, eat snacks." Mort, this is all stuff you do every weekend anyway.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, but this weekend when I do it, I'll feel accomplished!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Quick! Monte! I need you to take me to the library!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know that's where they keep books, right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh wait. Hmmm...in that case can you take me to the nearest place where they have tacos?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I'm going to turn the bathtub into an aquarium.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But where will we take a shower?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WHO CARES ABOUT CLEANLINESS WHEN WE HAVE EXOTIC FISH?!?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just got back from the dentist!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Your dentist appointment is next week.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That doesn't mean I can't just drop in and say hello!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: MORT! Get down from there!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: This is part of my costume! I'm King Kong!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That doesn't mean you can climb on top of the vending machines!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You are ruining Halloween for me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you still in love with your dentist?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: All I know is that every time I'm in her office and she's working on my teeth I feel all floaty and calm. If that's not love, I don't know what is!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's nitrous oxide, Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Looks like we're going to need a new rug for the office.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you talking about? The rug here looks fine.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sure, it looks fine. But can it withstand temperatures of up to 500 degrees?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't think so.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well if we can't cook pizzas on it, what good is it?!?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, where have you been all morning?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was in another world, Monte. A world where dreams are real.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So, you were sleeping?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte. What would you say to the idea of a water slide on the roof?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'd say that it sounds dangerous, reckless, and like a waste of time.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're right Monte...that's too much fun stuff to pass up!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Check it out Monte! I invented a machine that makes peanut butter sandwiches.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Huh. So that explains why there was peanut butter all over the bathroom this morning.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, that was more of a personal project...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, will you sign my petition?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's your petition for?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: To get the basketball net reinstalled in our office

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, I'm the one who took the basketball net down.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Your support would mean so much in this campaign.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I got a new volunteer for our office dodgeball team!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's great! Is it Ted in accounting?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, it's Joey from the coffee shop next door.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um, Mort... He doesn't work here.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I couldn't do my job without his coffee, so I think he's eligible.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where have all the pens gone?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh I was hoping you wouldn't notice

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So, where are they?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you need them right now?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It really bothers me that you're not answering my question.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte. Want some candy?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure. Sounds great!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well then you'd better go buy some, because I'm not sharing mine.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Theoretically, what would happen if someone were to bring a large horse into the office?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why would you ever need to bring a large horse into the office?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because you're not allowed to leave them parked outside the building.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mort, did you finish those spreadsheets yet?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I did you one better, Monte. I deleted them completely.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How is that better?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, it's better for me, at least.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think my computer might be broken.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I threw it off the roof.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let's just say that testing for my laptop parachute invention isn't going so well.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Whoa, Mort- are you sure you want to go outside dressed like that? It's pretty cold outside.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know what they say, Monte. You've got to dress for the job you want!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And what job exactly are you dressing for?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A lifeguard on vacation!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I forgot to pack my lunch today

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's ok Mortimer, you can share mine.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh... I think you also forgot to pack your lunch today. It's not in the fridge

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's not in the fridge?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ....anymore.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you been working out?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Me neither!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm getting a motorcycle!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Make sure you get insurance.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, you're the only person in the world who could make getting a motorcycle sound boring.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mort. What's all that stuff you've got there?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, just some supplies I picked up for Thanksgiving.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You need a grappling hook, a skateboard, and a pack of gum for Thanksgiving?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have very specific Thanksgiving plans.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HI MONTE.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, why are you shouting?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I GOT THESE NEW NOISE CANCELING HEADPHONES SO I CAN'T HEAR HOW LOUD I AM.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why don't you just take the headphones off?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I JUST REALLY NEEDED A WAY TO TUNE MYSELF OUT.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you gotten your flu shot yet?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Not yet. I'm going to get one this afternoon.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Would you mind going and picking an extra one up for me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not really how that works...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you get that flu shot for me like I asked you to?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No. Again, that's not how flu shots work. You have to go get them yourself.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I've just being doing a lot of shots here so I think I'll be ok.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Shots here?? What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Tequila, mostly.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Happy Thanksgiving Mort!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thanks! I've already eaten some turkey, some mashed potatoes, four chocolate turkeys, and six dinner rolls.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow. Uh, Mort? You know it's only 9 AM right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't mess around when it comes to Thanksgiving, Monte.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Check it out Monte! I made the ultimate Thanksgiving leftover sandwich!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So you're feeling better, huh?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: At least until I finish eating this sandwich I am.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm definitely not going to make it to work tomorrow.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really. Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Gotta sleep off all the turkey I've eaten since Thanksgiving.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm anticipating a solid 24 to 48 hours.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What are you wearing on your head?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: A festive Santa hat. Why are you looking at me like that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't think Santa is going to be too pleased about you stealing his hat. You're going to be on the naughty list for sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm looking forward to our Christmas vacation!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We're going on a Christmas vacation?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm going on a Christmas vacation. You're getting a vacation from me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh wow, that is something to look forward to!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What a lovely day!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: UGHHHHHHH

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I guess if you like sunshine and nice weather and all that kind of stuff then yes, it's a lovely day.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you steal my pen, Mort? I could swear I left it right here on my desk.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Who cares about a stupid pen, Monte? Life is too short to worry about material things!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So you did take it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes. And I lost it. Sorry.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you ever miss the good old days, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What good old days are you talking about?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know, the days when you could light fireworks in the office without your manager getting all up on you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can't say I miss those days.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, is it raining?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Instead of asking me, why don't you just look out the window? It's right next to you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nah, I'm gonna look it up online.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: JINGLE BELLS JINGLE BELLS JINGLE ALL THE WAY

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you really have to sing that right now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: 'Tis the season!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, but 'tis also 3 in the morning...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think I drank too much hot chocolate...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How can you tell?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We're out of hot chocolate, and my tail wont stop dancing...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you seen my mittens?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What are mittens?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know, the things for your hands. Like gloves but different.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Never heard of them. Sorry. Wish I could help. Can't though. I don't even know what mittens look like. I haven't seen them. I didn't even know you owned mittens. I wouldn't know where to look. Sorry. No mittens.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok, what happened?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can explain...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, there's better than going home after a long day's work.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's only ten am!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're right. Going home early is better than going home after a long day of work.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, that meeting this morning was so boring.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How would you know? You slept through the whole thing!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah and I didn't have any interesting dreams at all!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Alexa. Alexa! ALEXA!!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: For the last time, Mort, you have to stop treating me like an Alexa.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But you always know what the weather is.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mort! I've been emailing you all morning! Where have you been?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I only communicate by carrier pigeon now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Unless it's about free food. I'll check my email for free food.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you remember where I put my shoe?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Which shoe?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Any shoe. Preferably a left one, but I'm not picky.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you late for something? Why are you walking so fast?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's a fire drill- we have to exit the building!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not sure I understood the email you sent out earlier. Can you clarify?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's simple really. I was typing at my desk, trying to look busy while the boss walked by, and then I accidentally hit send on an email to the entire company.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh... Yeah, that makes sense.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man I can't concentrate on anything today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How is that different from any other day?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Today I'm actually trying to concentrate.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Guess what Monte? I've started seeing a personal trainer!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow. I didn't know you were into working out.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm not! I just see him walking around the neighborhood sometime.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte! Do you know how to tie a tie?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Of course I do. Do you need help putting one on?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, but I could use a little help putting one on my betta fish.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte help! A crime has been committed! Someone broke into our fridge and ate all the cookies!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, you did that last night.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh. Well, case closed then I guess.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Lately I've been feeling a little blue

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no! Do you think the winter weather is making you depressed?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No. I think my blue marker is leaking on my paws.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you excited about the royal wedding coming up?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Me either. But do you think they'll let us take the day off anyway?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Brrrrrr it's so cold outside today!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you actually been outside today?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: In this weather? No way!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Christmas Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, it's not Christmas yet.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok then...Happy Christmas eve eve eve eve Monte!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ughhhhhhh Monte that meeting went on for sooooooo long.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You weren't even in the meeting. I was in the meeting.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know. But I was lonely without you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Time for dinner!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, it's only 10 o'clock.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I already ate my lunch, so dinner's what's next.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you putting out a plate of gum for Santa?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I figured after all those cookies he might need to clean his teeth a little.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You ate all the Christmas cookies didn't you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Merry Christmas Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Merry Christmas Mortimer... What's that smell?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, it was your Christmas present. But now it's just a weird stain on the carpet.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's the thought that counts.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Woohoo! It's Boxing Day! I can't wait to eat all my favorite square shaped foods!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not really how Boxing Day works.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know. I just really like square shaped foods.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you seen my stretchy pants? I think I put on some extra weight over the holidays.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Maybe you should try taking off your footie pajamas before putting on your regular pants...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No. That's out of the question. Come on and help me look for my stretchy pants!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte! Where were you yesterday?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where were you? I had the day off and you were supposed to cover for me!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well I didn't want to come to work without you here.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte check out this cool dance I made up for 2018. I'm going to do it for you right now!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Huh....ok.....hmmmmm....oh, wow!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, what did you think?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think it's gonna be a long year.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My New Year's resolution this year is to think of a good resolution in time for next year.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow. That's a good one, I guess.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Right now I'm thinking it'll be to eat more ice cream, but I've got a whole year to work out the details.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: New year! New me!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh yeah? Are you planning some big changes for 2018?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I just want everyone to call me by a cool new nickname

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What nickname is that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You can't give yourself a nickname, Monte. Everyone knows that.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mortimer, any luck getting a new nickname?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Someone in a car called me a name when I was riding my bike home from work yesterday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What did they call you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I can't repeat it here. It wasn't very nice.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Keep trying, buddy. I'm sure something good will come along soon.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hi Monte, I'm scared of sharks.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Then why did you adopt this shark?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It was free with the smoothie.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let's go sledding Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok. Where's your sled?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I brought something even better...a go-kart with some bottle rockets strapped to it!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why did I agree to this?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, did you ever finish up those expense reports that I asked you about?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I had a dream that I did them!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But in real life, no. I did not.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, you really should take your Christmas decorations down now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nah I'm going to leave them up all year.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm hoping they'll trick people into thinking it's Christmas and they'll give me presents in July.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow, Monte, your lunch smells delicious.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's crazy that you're eating lunch right now because I'm actually so hungry also.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I seriously just cannot get over how good that smells, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: *sigh* Ok, Mort, would you like a bite of my lunch?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow. All that hinting and you're only going to offer me one measly bite? I thought we were friends, Monte.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'VE NEVER FELT SO ALIVE!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ah, I see you discovered the new office coffee maker...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Life is a series of cruel practical jokes played by fate

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok, what happened?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Life happened, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is the coffee maker broken?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: IT'S ALL SO DEEPLY UNFAIR

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where are you going with that hammer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Our office manager said that we could only get a new coffee maker if the old one was unable to be repaired.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So you're going to repair it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...not exactly.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Woohoo! I just got my driver's license!!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You just got a driver's license?! I loaned you my car last week!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's ok, I just used it to take a nap in the backseat.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, all the lights are off in here! Why are you working in the dark?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The florescent lights hurt my eyes!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Also, I'm not working; I'm trying to take a nap at my desk.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Would you like some coffee, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Would you like a doughnut to go with your coffee?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Would you like to lend me $20?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you really think that would work?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It seemed like it was worth a shot. Also, if you're not going to give me the money, I'll need the doughnut and coffee back please.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm thinking about going to the coffee shop. Do you want anything?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh good, then you can go to the coffee shop instead.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you get me a muffin?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you want a muffin?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's a silly question.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you ever wonder why we're here, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think about that stuff all the time. What do you think our purpose in life is?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, not like that. I meant why are why are we here at work when we could be out getting ice cream?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ughhhh I have so many meetings today. It's so annoying!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You never go to any of your meetings.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know! But it's a lot of work thinking up all those excuses.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just got back from the marathon and I'm so tired!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You ran a marathon?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No. But watching everyone else run one really wore me out.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: There's nothing like a nice quiet Sunday morning.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: About that...my band is coming over to practice...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...and also my speakers are stuck on the highest volume...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...and also I'm about to do some sanding and drilling with these power tools.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: There's nothing like a nice loud Sunday morning, right?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I got your iced coffee with cream!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But I said COFFEE ICE CREAM

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just finished cleaning out the storage closet.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did something crazy happen? Are you covering up a major blunder with a seemingly inconspicuous confession?

lines.speaker: mortimer
