lines.text: Wow. Is that really how you see me? Some sort of wild force of nature? A source of endless chaotic upheaval?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...Um, yes?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, you're wrong. I'm a complex character, capable of growth and change.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Also, I did spill pancake batter in the storage closet.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's been exactly one month since Christmas Eve.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think it might be time for me to take the ham out of the slow-cooker.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, do you want to see something amazing?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, me too. Let's ditch work and see if we can go find something amazing to look at.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Check it out Monte! I replaced all the desks in the office with trampolines!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But where will we put our computers?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't worry, I replaced those with trampolines too!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Whoa! Did you move all the furniture around?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep! I'm redecorating!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So you're trying to cover up a bunch of stains you left on the carpet?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Birthday Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: My birthday isn't for months.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, but I thought I'd just get it out of the way early this year.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, Mondays are the worst...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's Tuesday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know. Tuesdays are the second worst.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm so sleepy!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You should try what I do when I feel sleepy

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sleep.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, the TV's broken.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We've been over this: just because the remote is lost, doesn't mean the TV is broken.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah but it's easier to just buy a new one than it is to look for the remote.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wanna see me do a magic trick?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, not really.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Good! I actually don't know any magic tricks.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you putting cereal on your ice cream?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The way I see it, ice cream is just hard milk.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Then why are you also eating pizza with ice cream?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because I also see ice cream as sweet, cold cheese.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HAPPY MONDAY MONTE!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you so excited about Monday?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because it's a three-day weekend!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ummm... No, it's not.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It is for me!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, did you see the new printer? It's so nice to finally replace that old piece of junk.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you know what they're going to do with the old one? I'd love to bring it home.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But, the smell... the noise! That thing was awful!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I found its air of controlled chaos to be very soothing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, that does it. I'm never eating at the hot dog restaurant ever again!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: They kicked you out?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That has nothing to do with it!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Check it out, Monte. I finally cleaned off my desk like you asked.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, but you just dumped all your trash onto my desk.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I figured that way you wouldn't ask me to clean my desk anymore.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wooohoooooo it's pizza day!!!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But you eat pizza every day, Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's why I'm so excited. This is one holiday I'm actually prepared for.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've made a decision: I'm going to learn how to play tuba!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know, playing tuba is really hard and it requires years of practic.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well I really wish someone had told me all that before I bought this "World's Greatest Tuba Player" mug.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, let's go to the roof and throw water balloons off of it!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That doesn't seem like a very responsible thing to do, Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know! That's what makes it fun!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Knock Knock

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Who's there?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't know. There's someone at the door.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Someone at the door who?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just told you, I don't know.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, is there someone actually at the door?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, is it true that if you sign for a package then it legally belongs to you?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No. Not at all.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hmmm. What's our lawyer's phone number again?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Number four on the speed dial. Good luck buddy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How do you know when you're in love?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It just makes you feel good inside.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Huh...I think I get it...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...it's like how you feel when you eat a cheeseburger!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: There's nothing like the smell of fresh coffee in the morning!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's 2pm, Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Time is relative, Monte.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow, you look very fancy this evening. Where are you going?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I have a date!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: With me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? No. Why would you ask if I had a date with you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I never see you talking with anyone else...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm feeling pretty good today!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's great. Now I can tell you about what happened in the laundry room!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, it was nice while it lasted.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Time for a meeting!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But Mort, it's Sunday!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Meeting" is my code word for "nap".

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Something feels weird today...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That makes sense. There's a lot of exciting things happening around the office as we begin to roll out the new--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm going to go get a burrito. I think that will make me feel better.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok, but when you get back we should probably talk about what we're going to do for the big announcement on the--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm going to take the rest of the day off after I get my burrito. We'll talk about whatever you're talking about tomorrow.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you know that Amazon Prime members now get free shipping on Woot when they log in with their Amazon account?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um, yeah. We've been planning this change for months.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow. I really need to start reading my work emails.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you wearing those giant red cowboy boots?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Now that I get free shipping on Woot! I decided to treat myself to something special with all the money I'll save each year.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So you bought cowboy boots?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I bought a horse.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can we stop talking about how Amazon Prime members get free shipping on Woot if they log in with their Amazon account?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No. We're contractually obligated to talk about this for the next two weeks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BUT EVERYONE ALREADY KNOWS!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My horse Steve is sick.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: He's sick of me talking about how much money I'm saving with free shipping for Prime members on Woot!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I really should have seen that coming.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How do you know when you're in love?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a pretty big question. I guess the best way to be certain is--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: FREE SHIPPING FOR AMAZON PRIME MEMBERS ON WOOT WHEN YOU LOG IN WITH YOUR AMAZON ACCOUNT

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow ok, we're not even trying anymore...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm going to take my horse to the vet.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is your vet open on Sundays?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, we're going over to her house for lunch. It's a social visit, but it's still covered by my horse-owners insurance.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: DING DONG

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Umm... who's there?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, I know. Why did you just walk into my office and shout "ding dong"?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm spontaneous like that.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I didn't get any sleep last night thanks to that--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Horrible beeping sound?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Loud shouting coming from the basement?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Existential dread about the future?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hmmm. Well I don't think I can help you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What James Bond movie are you watching?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...Mort, this is Olympic figure skating.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's my favorite one! I'll grab popcorn!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you get my email?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, Mort. I did.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And did you forward it to 12 people?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That ghost is going to haunt you, Monte. The email said so.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'll take my chances.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's the first day of March!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's the second day of March.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Close enough! I'm still taking the day off work to celebrate!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you going to finish eating your sandwich?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I haven't started eating my sandwich. It's in the fridge.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know. I started eating it. Are you going to finish it, or can I?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where have you been?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh you know, around.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The boss is looking for you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Still? I thought for sure they would forget...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What did the boss say to you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Lots of stuff. Really important things. They were good, mostly. I think.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You forgot already?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: To be fair, I didn't forget. I just wasn't listening. It's different.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you met the new intern Jake?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm pretty sure that Jake is the pizza delivery guy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: AND now he's also our intern. His first project is to go get more pizza!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That is a good match for his skills and experience...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm so tired.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh oh, do you think you're getting sick?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I hope not! But I've been using all of your dishes just to be safe.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Great.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, would you be able to drive me to the doctor next Thursday?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh yes, I'm a very good driver.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Great, thank you. That's a big help.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I'm not going to drive you to the doctor next Thursday. I have plans! I thought you were just asking if I knew how to drive.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Phew! I sure am tired from hiding all these coupons all over the Woot! site...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is that still happening?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh, you never care about my art.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort do you know why the water bill was so high in the office last month?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, it might have something to do with the water wheel powered generator I built in the ladies bathroom.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why would you build something like that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just wait till you see how low our power bill is going to be!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I feel so relaxed and recharged. Aren't weekends great?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: They'd be a lot better if you'd tell that circus group they can't use our living room as their practice studio.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But then where would they practice? You're so short-sighted Monte.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't find my hat.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're wearing it right now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I'm looking for my other hat.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What does it look like?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It looks exactly like the one I'm wearing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you found your hat yet?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No. I'm positively distraught!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well at least you have the one you're currently wearing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, but it's not the same.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I thought you said they were the same.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, but it's different.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Different how?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's missing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Notice anything different about me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you find your missing hat?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well what is it then?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I stopped caring about my missing hat!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you seen the new Plaque Panther movie?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Don't you mean Black Panther?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No. I mean Plaque Panther. The story of a mild mannered dentist on the hunt for evil plaque deposits.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's days like today I remember what my grandpa used to say to me...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What did he say?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't remember today. But on days like today I usually remember.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm thinking of going back to graduate school.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HA! Hahaha, oh boy. That was a good one. You're not normally such a jokester, but that sure was...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wait, are you serious?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh. Well. That's... great?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just don't understand. Why would you want to go back to school when you already have the best job in the whole wide world right here at Woot?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did it ever occur to you that some people just really love learning new concepts and skills?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What am I going to do if you go back to school? Who will I talk to all day?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You could make some new friends.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: This plan just keeps getting worse.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you ever considered going back to school and getting an advanced degree?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No way. I don't think they'll let me back on campus after the degree I got last time.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What degree was that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A Second Degree Misdemeanor with a minor in Criminal Mischief.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I've been saving up for graduate school for a while now

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Under your mattress?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: In the sock drawer?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: In the freezer?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: In the bank.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh yes, of course the bank... I forgot about that one.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Time sure does fly...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you been throwing clocks out the window again?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No. I'm been considering our impermanent nature and the vastness of the universe. Our own fragile existence swept up in a sea of chaos and turmoil...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ... while throwing clocks out the window.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's the deal with airplane food?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What about it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why do they only serve it on airplanes? What if I want tiny pretzel packs at home? What am I supposed to do, huh? It's unfair.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you doing coming out of the kitchen covered in soot?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I was going to make you breakfast.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh great. You burnt the breakfast.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I decided to make a small fire instead of breakfast. It was a creative choice. I don't expect you to understand.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I need your signature on these papers.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't have a pen with me. Will ketchup work?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No. No it will not.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: They let me sign my mortgage with ketchup. I don't know why you think you're so much more important than that.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You don't have a mortgage. Remember? They kicked you out when you tried to sign the documents with ketchup.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't recall that incident. Now if you'll excuse me... I need to go get more ketchup.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you met my friend Sal Vader?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: For the last time, I introduced you to him AND his name is Salvatore.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you think he's related to that Darth Vader from Star Wars?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I am 100% certain he is not.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you like gouda cheese?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Who doesn't like good cheese?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We really need to get your hearing checked.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You really need to work on your Italian accent.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're sitting in my chair.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't see your name on it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It says Monte right there on the back.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wait, which one of the Woot monkeys am I?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're Mortimer. I'm Monte.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you sure?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: To be honest...Not really.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: In every generation…

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: There is a chosen one…

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nothing good ever happens when you use that movie trailer voice.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: He alone will...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You ate all the pizza again?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...yes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You are not the pizza slayer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You can't prove that!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Saturday is the best day of the week. It's the only day when I can sleep in as late as I want, and stay up as late as I want.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But you sleep in and stay up late every day...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, but on Saturday I don't have to feel guilty about it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: GOOD MORNING MONTE! I have a surprise for you!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh gosh, what's that smell?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I found the Easter Eggs I forgot to hide last year, so I've hidden them for you to find today!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HAPPY APRIL FOOLS DAY!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, it's-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HAPPY APRIL FOOLS DAY!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort the

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HAPPY APRIL FOOLS DAY!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, if you jus-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HAPPY APRIL FOOLS DAY!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Happy April Fools Day, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you believe in the power of positive thinking to attract positive change in your life?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, I guess so.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok, good. Keep that in mind when you see the kitchen at home tonight.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can we get a pet?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, Mort. A pet would be too much responsibility for you right now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But come on- dogs love us!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Dogs love to eat us. There's a difference.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Fair point.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, we have got to talk about your fashion choices...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's wrong with the way I dress? I think I look nice!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You've got no pizazz! You've got no glamour!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, I suppose I could stand to get a few new capes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm glad to hear you say that, Monte... Because I accidentally shrank all of your old ones in the washing machine.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You ruined all my capes? How could you?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: In the washing machine, like I said.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I mean- how could you doing something so awful?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: In the washing machine, like I said.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, I guess I'm going to go shopping today to replace all my capes that you ruined.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Where are you going?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: "Capes, Caps, and Capers"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I love that store! Let me know if you see any new caps that might look good on me for spring.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Caps aren't really my thing, but I'll take a look.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How was your shopping trip yesterday?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It was good. I got three new capes and some socks. You know Mort, I'm a little glad that you ruined my old capes. These new ones are definitely more stylish.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm glad to hear you say that Monte, because I didn't actually ruin your old capes. I just told you that so you would buy new capes!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really? Wow. That's oddly sweet of you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, not really. But it would have been really nice if it was true.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Someone sent us tickets to the art museum. Do you want to go with me tomorrow?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nah, art's not really my thing. I'm a serious sort of chap and I don't have--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: When did you get kicked out of the art museum?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The preferred term is "banned" from the art museum, Monte. I wouldn't expect you to understand.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't believe you went to the art museum without me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're banned from the art museum, remember?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, but what about solidarity? What about the bonds of brotherhood?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We're not bothers...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well you see, Mortimer, a 401(k) plan is simple. It involves your employer and-- Hey! Are you listening to me?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WHA-- Oh my gosh I just had the most boring dream. You were there and

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So, back to what I was saying about your 401(k)

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OH NO! I CAN'T WAKE UP!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hooray for the weekend!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hooray indeed. What are you going to do with your two days off?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Complain about work, mostly. You?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Same.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why does everyone like baseball so much?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, it's a fun sport where lots of people work in different roles to achieve the same goal. So, that's kind of nice. Why do you ask?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't like baseball. I just don't.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you going to make a fun joke about baseball? Is this conversation leading towards any logical punchline?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No. I just really don't like baseball.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh boy, it's Monday again...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yep, sure is.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I wish it wasn't.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, soon it will be Tuesday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's not too much better than Monday, but I'll take it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Does whitening toothpaste work the same as stain remover?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um, no...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok. Well, the tablecloth has a weird stain and we're out of toothpaste.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Could you ever just greet me with a "good morning"?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Good morning. The tablecloth has a weird stain and we're out of toothpaste.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you know what you're going to be for Halloween this year?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ummm. I hadn't really thought about it yet.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok, well let me know when you decide. I want to be the same thing, but better.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow. I'm not sure if I should be flattered or annoyed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why not both?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The following Monkey Chat is brought to you by Kellogg's Frosted Flake Cereal!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What did you just say about cereal?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We're out of cereal, and I want to see if we can get more by leveraging our celebrity status into a sponsorship.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The lawyers are not going to like this at all...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You look like you have something important to say.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, since you asked... Knock Knock

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't know what I expected.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Knock! Knock!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Woohoo! Saturday!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yep, it's the perfect day to relax and get stuff done around the house.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Or we could go to the water park!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The water park isn't open yet. It's still too cold.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We could still go there and look at it through the fence.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'll pass. But you're welcome to go by yourself.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're soaking wet!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just got back from the water park!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But the water park isn't open for the season yet.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know, I didn't have to stand in line for anything!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you heard of this thing called a "conference call"?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you been reading your work email again?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I try to look over them every month or so.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think Steve in accounting is trying to get me fired.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What makes you think that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: He keeps assigning me work!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well obviously I'm not going to do it, and that's the kind of behavior that could get a person fired.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you ever considered actually doing the work that's assigned to you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, never.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well perhaps you should consider it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok... I considered it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm not going to do it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is there anything you like about work?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The paycheck.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Anything else?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The health insurance.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh boy...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Perhaps we should think about finding you a project at work that you'll be excited to work on.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Could I be a CWO?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's a CWO?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Chief Waterslide Operator.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: "Water Slide" is two words.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Could I be a CWSO?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sunday! Sunday! Ba-da, ba-da-da-da-da...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know the words to that song are actually "Monday Monday" right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's a shame to waste such a good song on such a terrible day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, it's Monday. You know what that means...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What does it mean?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know... There's a thing we have to do on Mondays.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You don't remember?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Darn. Neither do I. But I'm certain that there's something we're supposed to do today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can you lend me $20?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What do you need it for?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm not sure yet. I want to go shopping.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you know where I can get a fake ID?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why on earth would you need a fake ID?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The restaurant next door gives out free lunches on your birthday. I want to change my birthday to leap year day so they'll take pity on me and give me free lunch every day.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's quite the plan, Mort. Best of luck.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A true monkey makes his own luck.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you seen my new hat?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you lost it already?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I just really like showing it off!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The salesman said my new hat makes me look young and handsome.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You look the same to me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well I guess I was already young and handsome then.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you think we could order takeout for dinner tonight?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure, I don't see why not. What kind of takeout do you want?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The kind that you go and pick up for me while I stay here... It's my favorite.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: On Sundays I like to stay in my pajamas all day long.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You like to do that everyday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, but on Sundays I don't get funny looks from people at the office.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's in the big box by the door?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A present.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: For who?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: For me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: From who?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: From me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I bought myself a trophy.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not how trophies are supposed to work.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well then they shouldn't make them so easy to buy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's taco-Wedensday!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Isn't it supposed to be taco-Tuesday?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But today is Wednesday and we're having tacos.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't know why you have to make everything so complicated.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you get my memo? I faxed it to you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't have a fax machine.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I faxed it somewhere. Either way, I expect your report by Monday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: IT'S FINALLY FRIDAY

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, we should probably pl-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: FRIDAY!!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: There are still a few work rela-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: FRIIIIIIII DAAAAAAYYYY

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Will you help me weed the garden?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The garden looks great already! It's so lush and green and filled with my favorite yellow flowers...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Those are weeds, Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, they're still my favorite flowers. Don't you dare touch them!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I planted some strawberries in the garden.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You can grow strawberries?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where do you think strawberries come from?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The grocery store.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Promise me you won't talk to me today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok. I won't.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You already broke your promise.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What? You have nothing to say about that? Typical.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I love the smell of coffee in the morning!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's the late afternoon, Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I also love the smell of coffee in the late afternoon. That's why I've started wearing it as cologne.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm thinking about joining one of those dating apps.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Because you're the only person I talk to on a daily basis.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's wrong with that?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uhhh

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you crying Mort?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I put hot sauce on my bagel

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And now it's ruined?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, now it's amazing! I'm sad I didn't think of this sooner!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Friday?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Friday!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: FRIDAY!!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We should probably plan a day to do spring cleaning around the house

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a really good idea. Did you have a day in mind?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes! I'm going to be out of town next week, so any of those days would be ideal.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you coming to my birthday party tonight?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But... tonight isn't your birthday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And you're having a birthday party?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I like cake and presents.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My birthday party last night was amazing!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But it wasn't your birthday

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, it was still a great birthday party. Maybe I'll throw another one next week...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're my best friend, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Thanks Mort. That's really sweet of you to say.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, it is. Please keep that in mind when you see the inside of the refrigerator.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Living with you is no cakewalk!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you still upset that I wouldn't let you walk on all those cakes?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's called a CAKEWALK! What else was I supposed to do?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: *cough cough* PANCAKES *cough cough*

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you just yell "pancakes"?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, not at all. But now that you mention it, pancakes sound great.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not making you pancakes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You can't just bring up pancakes and then say you're not going to make them!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you excited for the long weekend?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're not fooling me Monte. I know that there's no long weekend this week.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: There actually is. It's Memorial Day. Remember? They made an announcement about it on Monday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know I never go to the office on Mondays!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Since you never go to the office on Mondays, I guess this week will be just a regular week for you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No way! I'm taking Tuesday off.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But Tuesday isn't a holiday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, but why should everyone else get a day off if I don't? That's unfair.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What are you going to do with your day off on Monday?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Probably have a picnic and watch some of the--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm going to delete all of my work emails. All of them.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not really a Memorial Day tradition...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Maybe it should be.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't think you really understand this holiday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've changed my mind. I'm going into the office today!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But no one will be there. Everyone has the day off.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Exactly. Today is the perfect day for me to install that ball-pit in the conference room.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mort, where were you yesterday? I tried to find you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I took the day off.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: From what? You barely work.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: From barely working, of course. After a while, all that barely working really takes a toll on my health.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I find that very hard to believe.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I went to the spa

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really? After what happened the last time?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, they didn't let me in. But I went there!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you know that zebras are real?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...Yes. Did you really not know that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So, are unicorns real?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No. Of course not. What would zebras have to do with unicorns?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, it there are weird striped horses, how much harder would it be to believe in a horse with a horn?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Fair point.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So they're both real?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I want to have a party at our house.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you asking me if you can throw a party at our house?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nope.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you get an invitation to my party this week?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, awkward. I guess you're not invited.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, you could invite me right now...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry, Monte. The guest list is already finalized.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you have an outfit picked out for my party this week?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not invited, remember?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, but what will you be wearing while you're not at my party?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't know, pajamas maybe.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: See, this is why you're not invited to nice parties like mine.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: HELLO!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm not talking to you today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well... You just did.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Dang.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How was your party last night?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It was HUGE. Everyone was there. Literally EVERYONE. The entire office, plus my game night friends, then Jerry and the gang from college...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow. Sounds like you invited literally everyone except me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well if it makes you feel any better, I didn't invite my dentist.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That does not make me feel better.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Phew, the weekend is almost here. Do you have any big plans?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm going to go whale watching off the coast.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That sounds under-WHALEMING

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That was a terrible pun.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Tail me about it...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Shipoopi!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm sorry, what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Trying out a new catchphrase. I'll use it for both "hello" and "goodbye" like "aloha!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: …absolutely not.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It also means "can I have more toast?"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm outta here.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Shipoopi!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mahna Mahna

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Doot doo do do do

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mahna Mahna

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Doot doo de dooooo

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mahna Mahna

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Doot doo de doodoo, de doodoo, de doodoo,de doodoodoodoo dootdooot doodle DOO!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hahaha... OK, we have *got* to get some work done today...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Bonjour, mon ami.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...I'm sorry, are you speaking French?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Absolument pas. Je ne sais pas parler français!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh man. I think the translation setting is stuck.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Je me retrouve à rencontrer le sentiment le plus incroyable. Cette langue, ces mots, j'ai l'air si belle.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey! Why is there peanut butter all over the keyboard?????

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Très humbles excuses, mon frère. J'ai envie du fruit de l'peanut... Oh, there, it's fixed now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Boy oh boy, did I have a boring weekend...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, I just sent you 12 emails of stuff we gotta finish this week.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Boy oh boy, I can't wait for the weekend...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why is there a fish in the bathtub?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I put it there.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, just for the halibut.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: In sooth, I know not why you will annoy me so.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I trow that you can see the humour in a wedgie.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: My rear is crammed with distressful pants.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: These Shakespeare classes are beginning to pay off.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, but chatting in iambic pentameter ain't easy.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: If we finish all our work, we should go on a picnic.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Y'know, you're like a sharp pencil.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How so?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You both have fine points.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So that's a yes?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I finished my music class!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How'd you do?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The teacher said I was noteworthy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm One Spunky Monkey, Jasper!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm trying out new catchphrase ideas. I'm One Spunky Monkey, Jasper!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But you don't know anybody named Jasper.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're just jealous because you don't have a catchphrase. You should get one.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're an idiot, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's a good one!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We're a great team, Mort! I feel invincible!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Who's that?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Who's who?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Vince.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And just like that, it's gone.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, Monte. I don't need that email password anymore, I got it from that hotdog.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How on earth did you get information out of a hotdog?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I grilled it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...I don't know what I was expecting.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How is an old Polaroid camera like a perfect steak?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't know. How is an old Polaroid camera like a perfect steak?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: One is a rare medium, the other is medium rare.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm stuck on a math problem. What's sixteen divided by four?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Four.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's deep.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How is four deep?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because it's a root number!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That customer service operator must've been great in school!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: She always answers when called!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have some advice if you ever want to make jalapeno-boysenberry-deviled egg smoothies.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But why-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I SAID DON'T!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you smell something?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is it like fireworks mixed with fudge Jell-O?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh good.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, hold up...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I invented a new soup starter.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's in it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Spam and Tang. I call it Spang.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You should call it a soup ender.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Supercalifragilistic

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: expialidoc-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Shhhh! You wanna get sued?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't wait for Woot's birthday coming up!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Me, too! We should have cake!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I like banana bubblegum.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You like bubblegum in your cake?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep, it's the cake that you just keep chewing and chewing, it never ends! Never-ending cake!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...that actually has a twisted logic to it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's the matter?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That bulldog next door is freaking me out. I think he's a dumb, stinky-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Now, now, like my mom monkey always said, "If you don't have anything nice to say-"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "-say it in private with your friends!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not how the saying goes, Mortimer...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why didn't the chicken get hit when crossing the road?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Because it was lucky!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow. Don't take this the wrong way, but sometimes you are a comedy black hole. A black hole from which no humor can escape.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...how on earth is the RIGHT way to take that??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The music at this vegetable party is awesome. Sick beets.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, I really wish they'd turnip the volume.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh boy, it's Video Monday!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yup! you know what that means?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Um, the weekend's over?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, yeah, but also our first MONKEY VIDEO is premiering on Woot.com! Go check it out!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...are you talking to me or them?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, both?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How meta of you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Great video yesterday, genius.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok, ok. I messed up. Our first video did NOT go live yesterday. But I have great news!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My Mortimer Pox isn't contagious?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? No.. ew. The Good news is that our Facebook, Twitter, and main Woot.com webpage are NOW live with our FIRST VIDEO!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Y'know, if it doesn't work this time, you're gonna get canned.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...don't I know it :(

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Forth!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That "Fourth"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But I go Forth and eat hamburger sandwiches.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Gimme a hamburger sandwich and I won't criticize you until tomorrow.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: [Yawn] That was a great nap

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're napping? There's so much to do?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Like what?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So many things in July this year! Woot's birthday, Prime day, BOCs, Woot-offs, special surprises, new videos, and more!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow, that is a lot. I better rest up. [snooooooze]

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Woot's 14th Birthday is coming up fast!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know! It's July 12th! I can't BELIEVE what they got for B'day BOCs.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um, I don't think Security is gonna let you talk about the super secret BOCs here.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Aw, heck with that. I'm gonna love seeing the winner's face when they get a huge [REDACTED] or hundreds of [REDACTED] or even a pristine [REDACTED]!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Told ya.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A big sturgeon stole my canoe!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, just jumped in and paddled away.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What did you say?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "There's something fishy rowing on"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Y'know, someone said you look like an owl.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Who?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: [snickering]

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Who? WHO?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Bwahahahahahaha!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Our new video "Bugged" is going live today !

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, I'm still miffed about that one...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh hush, you can barely see the scars on your face.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: [grumbling]

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, Monte. What would you most want in a BoC if you won one?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: A Lenovo Laptop! Absolutely!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wrong! You shoulda asked for a BoC filled with like a hundred more BoCs!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I love that your brain runs on 3rd grade logic.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh! I thought of a joke!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hit me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why did the chicken cross the road?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because she was allergic to fennel-AW MAN I FORGOT TO SAY THE PART ABOUT THE FENNEL.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happpy Birthday, Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Thanks, Mortimer! Same to you!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow, 14 years and you're still putting up with me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I credit caffeine and deep breathing exercises...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oof. I'm moving a bit slow after yesterday's birthday celebration.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Too much cake?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You could say that. Plus root beer. And Pixie Stix. With whipped cream.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You should have more cake.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hair of the dog, my friend, hair of the dog.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm just gonna put my feet up and watch our first livestream on Twitch this afternoon... Ugh, angry monkey tummy...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Does it bug you at all the Prime Day is not on a prime number?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Not really.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But the beautiful symmetry of it all! It would have been glorious!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, you keep pondering the aesthetics. Me, I'm gonna go buy stuff on some killer deals.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: prime day

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Prime Day

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Prime Day!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: PRIME DA-coughcoughcough... ok, you win this year's Prime Off. But seriously, head to Woot for killer deals, y'all.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's still Prime Day!!!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure is!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's like two days of Xmas :)

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I wouldn't go that far...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nope, there's no opportunity to explain to my grandmother AGAIN why I didn't become a doctor.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WHEW! Looks like B'day and Prime Day celebrations are at an end!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not quite.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's left?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Responding to all the violent threats from BoC missers.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That should keep you busy until next B'day!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: @NKatsPhoto pointed out that our Norwegian Death Metal video on Woot.com should have been "Norwegian Black Metal"-- it's the Swedes that are known for Death Metal!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok, sure. Duly noted. My throat still hurts from the growling, FYI.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's so metal...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why did the cat do well in school?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It was purrfect, yeah, I got it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, it was the teacher's pet!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Both punchlines are equally infuriating.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What did the weatherman get when he broke all his arms and legs?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Got me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Four-casts!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I got a new girlfirend

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: She's dead, but I met her ghost

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's dark

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I call her "My Boo"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What do you get when you get when you cross a owl and a nurse?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Who cares?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Exactly!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where is my alarm clock?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I threw it out the window. Becau-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: DON'T

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: -se I wanted to se-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: FINISH

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: -e time

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: THAT

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: -fly!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: JOKE ...dangit

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why is my name scratched off my office inbox and replaced with a crayon scrawl of "1 Funky Monkey"?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I thought that would be self-evident...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I need an arch-enemy.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: A what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: An arch-enemy. A polar opposite who defines me by their very existence. A white whale to which I can tilt my harpoon, as it were.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Any candidates?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Rick in Marketing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Godspeed, Rick in Marketing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok, I got a joke.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm prepared.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If a potato farmer had a potato and he was really proud of that potato and he wanted to share the potato on a video sharing site for potatoes, which would he use?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Huh, I dunno.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YouTuber.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, are you eating a stick of butter?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know what they say, "Stick of butter, clear your tummy clutter!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That makes no...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Man, you're gross.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YEAH!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This turkey tastes funky.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What was that?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I said this turkey is funky.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: GET DOWN!!!! <dancing>

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I sure feel [FEELING] about [INSERT HIT MOVIE]

lines.text: Huh?

lines.text: Oh, just getting ahead on these here monkey chats. I'll fill it in later.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You better not forget.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: {pfft} It's going up in July, I got plenty of time, you [INSULT].

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have nothing to say to you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OK, I'll go. Did you know that Neil Diamond was inspired to write "Turn on Your Heartlight" by the movie E.T.: The Extra Terrestrial?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: This is a terrible monkey chat, I'm pulling the plug {power-down noise}

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's already August?? I have to get my back-to-school supplies!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But you haven't gone to school in years.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uh-oh, can I copy your notes?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Remember to whistle while you work!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, but you never whistle.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Exactly!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think you need a little more "work" in your "work/life balance"
