lines.text: Everyone's sharing their BOC pics! #BOC #WootBirthday

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yup!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Look at this pic!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh did you get a-EUGH!! This is a close-up pic of your back skin!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, what do you think of that mole? Little irregular, right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Everyone's sharing their BOC pics! #BOC #WootBirthday

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yup!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Look at this pic!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh did you get a-EUGH!! This is a close-up pic of your back skin!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, what do you think of that mole? Little irregular, right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yer momma's so-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: STOP.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: As part of the Woot Humour Act of 2012, all "momma" jokes have been outlawed, ever since Ian in UX lost an eye to a flying stapler.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Dag, yo.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, buddy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: GREETINGS COMPATRIOT. AMUSING INTRO.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, did Mortimer replace himself with a bot?? I KNEW those coding classes were a mistake...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: AMUSEMENT. DERISION. PUNCHLINE.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I had an interminable game of golf yesterday... It took fore ever!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You have any kids

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Get it? FORE-oh, no i don't.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's amazing you sprouted the ability to Dad Joke without them.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ouch.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let's do a little improv. Remember, the no. 1 rule is to say, "Yes, and..."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OK

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Boy oh boy, sure is cold here on Mt. Everest!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, and you're an idiot.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's a start!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, Woot offices are just lousy with dogs. How come we can't have other types of pets?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: If this is about your giant centipede again, I want no part of it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: DON'T DISPARAGE DR. FEETS.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I lost my favorite tuber!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Don't worry, it'll turnip.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hi Schnuckles!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What the heck is a Schnuckles?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's my new pet name for you!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, no, no. I am not now nor will I ever be a Schnuckles.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Fine, Cranky Schnuckles.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, do you have any staples?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No. Do you know why every piece of paper on my desk is stapled together?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So, do you have any staples?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, Mon.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no, are you in your Reggae phase again?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Naw, y'know how you call me Mort? I also shortened yours for speed of communication.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Monte is quite short enough, thank you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But I'm pretty sure that at a quarter second savings over 365 days, that's 91.25 minutes or 1.5208333 hours saved a year!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...Mon it is then.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You are such a flibbertigibbet.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, you mean based on Middle English word flepergebet, meaning "gossip" or "chatterer?"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...I have no response, you win this round.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BOOSH!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: filbert

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: cobnut

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...HAZLENUT!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Blast! Checkmate.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What do you call a homeless snail?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: A slug?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YOU'VE BEEN READING MY DIARY AGAIN!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wanna play strip poker?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WHAT?! Oh heck no!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Jeesh, relax. I just have this antique fire poker I'm trying to strip the paint off of.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That was needlessly misleading.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here, smell my finger.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What, ew. No!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh come on, I'd smell your finger if you need me to.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you NEED me to smell your finger?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I mean it's not an emergency or anything...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Fine, get back to me when you fall into a crisis where the only possible remedy is to jam your finger up my nose.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte! Wake up!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: zzzZZZZNK-Whu? What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We need to defuse a bomb!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OMG! WHERE!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, anywhere. But we MUST defuse a bomb at some point. It's on my bucket list...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm coming up with a new coffee flavor. I need your help naming it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What do you like more: I Link Monkeys A Latte, Monkeychino, or Dirty Monkey Simian Brew.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...Is "like" my only option?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What kinda soda pop can you mail?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Flat.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because, y'know, it'd fit in a mail slot and stuff.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Explaination does absolutely nothing to improve a joke.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have a new magic trick. It makes $500 disappear.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Does this end with an explanation of why my Diner's Club card is maxed out?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...for my next trick-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: For MY next trick I'm gonna saw you in two.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...do you half to?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whatcha snackin' on?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Cashews

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Gesundheit!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where is my toothbrush?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Aren't my shoes shiny?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I swear to everything if those two things are related...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know you have to finish your chores, right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Shrug.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you... You can't just say "shrug", that makes no sense

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Shrug.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Fine. SMACK.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ow!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you have any comments on these cost projections?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Without my calculator, I have nothing to add.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OK, great... wait a minute.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Fall is coming!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You make me feel like a tree in the fall.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: All snuggled and warm and ready for hot chocolate?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, the longer you're around, the more I pull my vital essence within myself to escape you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Dag, yo.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We have a long car ride this afternoon to the campground. Are you going to use the facilities?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That depends.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: On what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My Depends.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Knock, knock!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Who's there?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ryan.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ryan who?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ryan earth does this count as a joke?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why on earth does-oh, you beat me to it...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Somebody called you an owl.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Who?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: CLASSIC!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Want some snuts?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are snuts?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's a new word I invented for-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm gonna stop you right there with my "I Don't Care" card.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow, those are single use, you hated the set up that bad?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yep.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So I got into a blender accident with Draclua and-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Gonna stop you there, does this end up with a jar of Monster Jam?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Does it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're a party pooper.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I prefer Smarty Pooper.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Short week onnacounta the holiday!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think they prefer "length-hindered", Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Who? The weeks??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're anthropomorphizing units of time again. No more Circus Peanuts until it's outta your system...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've got a great idea for Halloween this year!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nope, no way, you know I hate your group costume ideas-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: -A semicolon-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ......OK, but I get to be the colon part.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hooray!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You have Coulrophobia.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A fear of clowns.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: no I don-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: LOOK, A TINY CAR FULL OF WEIRDOS!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: AAAAH!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Told ya. :)

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ham

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ham who?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: KNOCK KNOCK

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't think we're doing this right...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, that girl is so Fernblatt.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, nope.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You are still forbidden from inventing slang, as per the 2004 "That's a Sticky Flinker" Accords.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That one shoulda caught on...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh ...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's wrong?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm involved in a never-ending, circular argument on Facebook wherein the other person refuses to hear reason and consistently contradicts himself. It's exhausting.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Then why don't you just stop posting?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BECAUSE I HAVE TO WIN!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you ever feel like there's someone up there? Y'know, watching over us?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't really like to discuss religion with co-workers, Mortimer. It's a guaranteed recipe for hurt feelings.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Religion? I'm talking about the drop ceiling. I swear, sometimes I see one of the tiles move.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: EXTREME ENCHILADACAM! EXTREME ENCHILADACAM!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Would you get that camcorder out of my face? I'm trying to eat here.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: EXTREME ENCHILADACAM! EXTREME ENCHILADACAM!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I hate to do this, but... there. See how you like having enchilada sauce smeared all over the lens.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The joke's on you! That just makes it more EXTREME!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, my new touchscreen laptop is here! Awesome!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, but check my new tablet out. Never needs charging, holds hundreds of documents, super-intuitive touch-sensitive navigation, and I can draw or write directly on the surface with a simple, cheap stylus available at almost any store.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Isn't that just a pad of lined paper?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It doesn't have Wi-Fi, but the Internet is pretty stupid anyway.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm just saying, it would be hard to have to share your husband with the world like that. To always be there, waiting for him, putting your own life on hold while he's out changing the world. And then to never even get any recognition for it. My hat's off to her. I couldn't do something like that.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: For the last time, there was no Mrs. Coffee.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: See? That attitude is exactly what I'm talking about.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Of course, the building staff had to pick right now to close the bathroom for maintenance. But I showed them, heh heh...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? Sorry, I'm kinda busy right now, trying to check this surveillance footage.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Surveillance footage?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah. With all those office supplies going missing lately, we installed some hidden cameras in the supply closet. Now I'm going to see what they've recorded so far.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh. Uh. Wow. That's cool. Hey, could you hand me that roll of paper towels? I need to go clean something up.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Last night I had a dream where my underpants were on backwards.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But Mortimer, you're not wearing underpants.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OHGODICAN'TWAKEUP!!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, I never heard from you yesterday. Is everything OK?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, me and the guy who helps me type were stuck in that hurricane Florence evacuation of North Carolina.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oof! Is everything ok?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Beach house was wrecked so I'm glad we got outta there! We're OK though. One thing I can say, hurricanes really bl-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: -PG-13, Mort, keep it PG-13.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...Nevermind.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, Monte! Remember that we're launching #PunnyThursday tomorrow! All the WORST puns imaginable!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Got it marked on my calendar! I'll be sure to check Facebook and Twitter for Woot's Thursday pun and the ones submitted by Wooters. Hey, you DO have enough puns right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: {pshh} What does a cold drink?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Cough-ee!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yup! That's really awful!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's our first #PunnyThursday on the Woot social channels today! Oh man, I hope Wooters submit their own stinkers. Got any puns to kick it off here?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I got a rejected one here. But i warn you, it's bad.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hit me!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, like dangerously bad... OK, what metal do they make port-o-potties out of?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I dunno!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A-loo-minum.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...I regret everything.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I WARNED YOU!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, it's your turn to pick for movie night.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well I *would* pick something but SOMEONE purposely got 'Space Jam' stuck in the blu-ray player.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, you mean the TIME-HONORED CLASSIC 'Space Jam'? Good choice!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Check it out, I took 10,000 phone pics of a gross dumpster!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're not going to have any space left on your...hey...THAT'S MY PHONE.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't worry, I sent you copies.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let's have a staring contest!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Umm, okay, I guess...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I win!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? But I didn't blink yet.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was going for speed, not endurance.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You ever wonder how they get the peanut butter into the middle of a peanut butter cup?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No. I'm sure it's boring and industrial.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's the world like without magic, Monte? Is it as dark as it seems?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Y'know Monte, you're a lot like a fried Twinkie.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How so?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You got a hard, rough exterior but inside...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm actually sweet?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, you are full of white puffy goo.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: For the LAST time, I'm sorry I ate all your marshmallows.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's #PunnyThursday again!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You got one to get the ball rolling before everyone goes to our social channels to share their own stinkers?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What did the elephant say when he accidentally sat on the basketball during the big game?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Whut?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "I'm not a player, I just crush a lot"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yup, I hate you!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: {sigh} Hey man, I'm sorry if you experienced any blow-back in the media after last night's epic fight.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I have no idea what you are talking about.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, my heart-stopping Twitter feud with Mrs. Butterworth.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't care about any of this.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: She's in complete denial about how high her blood sugar is. I mean, they already took both her feet!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WHY DO I KEEP RESPONDING TO THESE TEXTS

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yay! It's the weekend!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yup! Same as every Saturday!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why are you such a grouch?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not! I was being genuine!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A genuine grouch...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: One month to Halloween!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I can't wait!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you gonna go bobbing for apples this year?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean "bobbing for spit and face paint"?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...Yes?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Then no.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have a case of the Mondays.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are the symptoms?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pain in my in the abdomen, muscles, neck, and pelvis, and it's hard to swallow anything.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um, that's not the Mondays.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, right. Mumps. I have the Mumps.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, that Woot-off last week was on fleek-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: it was off the chain-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: in the hizzy?!?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Got put a washcloth on your head and lie down, you are over-popcultured.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: PICK one, people!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Pick what, monkey?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pancakes, flapjacks, griddlecakes, hotcakes, it's too much!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I guess you're "flipping" out, huh?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Heh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What have I told you about hijacking my setups with half-baked and ultimately nonsensical punchlines.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's a day in the Box.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I wish I was a space marine...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I wish you did laundry.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...Are you literally allergic to imagination?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I should probably complete my degree someday

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes you should! How many credits do you have left?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hmmmm, I'm not sure. How many gold stars make up a credit?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sigh. Mortimer, are you talking about finishing kindergarten?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's the worst thing about Halloween?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Bobbing for Apples.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...Um, Monte, we just did a bobbing for apples joke.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Asked and answered, your honor.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ASKED AND ANSWERED, YOUR HONOR.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Move in, now move out

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hands up, now hands down

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Back up, back up

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Tell me what you're gonna do now

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Breath in, now breath out

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Keep rollin', rollin', rollin'

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ah, I love starting the day with Limp Bizkit Calisthenics

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well? What do you think? How is it? How does it taste?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's... uh, it's OK... the crust and the icing are kind of weird together...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Curses! Back to the drawing board!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Listen, Mortimer, you should really get some sleep.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No! I will not rest - I cannot rest - until I've succeeded! I will be the first chef to ever fuse cake and pie!

lines.speaker: mortimer

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sounds like you struck gold.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: God, I love monkey chats on the weekends...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Make me some flapjacks.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, why should I? Make 'em yourself!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Make me some flapjacks. {finger wiggle}

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I keep telling you, Jedi mind tricks don't work over text messages...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Make me some flapjacks.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...wait, did we just start over?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, why is there a rabid dog in the bathroom?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And why is there peanut butter in my pajamas? ...oh god, don't say it-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: PRANKMASTERS!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's like I'm stuck in a production of "No Exit" for preschoolers...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What up Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you wearing a potato shirt?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's a tater top.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, you going to the party tonight?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What party?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Huh?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: {runs away}

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mother-father! Did you plucking eat my plunking leftover chicken?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Fell no, ant-hill!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You lyin', you basted turkey.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whew, I'm really glad they installed the automatic chat censoring software.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Whatever, all-swipe. Yer lyin' ax-bowl owes me a chicken.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I miss the old dial-up noise :(

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean the cat-screeching-in-a-coffee-can-in-a-wind-tunnel noise?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, it wasn't that bad, was it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Your power of nostalgia is impressive.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Speaking of which, you want a Crystal Pepsi? I bought a case because it's the BEST SODA POP EVER.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The Solstice is past! The days'll get longer now!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thank goodness, it's so gloomy now that I replaced all the bulbs with heat bulbs like you said.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I SAID to replace them with "full-spectrum" bulbs!!! You mean heat lamps like in an Arby's?!?!?!??!??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you smell a medium-well couch?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I finished my Letter to Santa but it's so late I'll have to bring it the to post office myself!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, poor Monte, you still believe in fairy tales like that?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Whu-what ever do you mean?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: There's no such thing as a U.S. post office that can efficiently send overnight mail! Hahahaha!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I made sure Santa doesn't have any gluten, nuts, dairy, soy, or shellfish in his cookies!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why would there be shellf-Hey! There ARE no cookies!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Only way to be sure! ...is that glass of milk dairy-free?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm thankful for you today, buddy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My name is Mortimer, but I appreciate the sentiment.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: {BEEEP} "Hi, folks! We're taking a couple of days off for the Holidays and like everyone else we're pawning off our work onto our Intern Steve for TODAY's event: STEVE'S PICKS!!!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: PHONE>SETTINGS>CALL FWDING>SEND ALL>"STEVE"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: {BOOOOP} STEVE: What? What do I have to do? Like, make a joke or something?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: STEVE: Hello?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: STEVE: ....today is gonna be brutal, man.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's you favorite dog breed?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Cavapoo?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...Monte, you don't have to ask, just go.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you bite your thumb at us, sir?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, sir, I do not bite my thumb at you sir; but I bite my thumb, sir.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well don't, you don't know where that thumb's been... sir.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you know that interest rates are still at an all-time low?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, are you considering purchasing a home?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What? No. I just meant that the amount of interest I have in what you have to say is pretty much non-existent.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nice.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm thinking of getting a baby.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: A baby what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A baby baby.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, you can't just go out and get a baby.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's not what the guy at the baby store told me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think I've come down with a Monday morning bacterial infection.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, you mean "a case of the Mondays"?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Maybe... do "the Mondays" come with a really disgusting armpit rash?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy New Year, Monte! It's the year of The Monkey!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Actually, in the Chinese zodiac, 2019 is the year of The Pig.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...Did you just call me a pig?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No! I meant... Oh, let's just skip the confusion and call it the Year of Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HOORAY!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's wrong?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I still have a bananana-over from yesterday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Aren't you gonna aske me what a bananana-over is?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No. Despite what you may think, I do not exist solely to setup your jokes, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What the heck are you doing with those peas, Mortimer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Um, splitting them one at a time to make split pea soup, duh! Man, I've got a new found respect for chefs! This cooking stuff takes FOREVER!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But that's not how... You know what? Never mind. This'll be fun to watch.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So, wait. Should I halve them or quarter them?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Actually, for best results, I think you want to cut them into eights.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What do you like best: flapjacks, griddlecakes, johnnycakes, hotcakes, batter cakes, or pancakes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, johnnycakes should not be on your list as they are made from cornmeal. But to answer your question: None, I have a gluten sensitivity.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: {Sigh} I think you have a humor sensitivity.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Now don't flip out...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What. What did you do, Mortimer. Did you destroy something? Pawn something I loved? Text my mom again? WHAT?! TELL ME!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sheesh! Nothing! I just didn't want you to flip out. Way to not follow a best friend's advice, buddy. {Snort}

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man I love EDM.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Eugh, really? I find it repetitive, derivative, and lacking soul.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Really? I love what it says about Hamlet.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: There's techno in Hamlet? ...wait, what are we talking about?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm just surprised you feel so strongly about the 6 volumes of Ensler's Dramaturgy Manuals.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know I know you do this on purpose, right...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Wednesday!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's so happy about it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I won the lottery over the weekend.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: REALLY!?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, in a dream.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Flippity Floo, I've Got Something for YOU!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ooo! What is it? What is it?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I picked up your mail, here.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know, you really shouldn't get people's hopes up with entertaining rhymes...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, I went down such a rabbit hole last night.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Not like, a real rabbit hole, right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Naw, Wikipedia rabbit hole.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How bad?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Started with the quadratic formula... ended with a chart of Capt. Kirk's girdle sizes throughout the years.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Dang, that IS a deep rabbit hole...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Knock Knock

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Who's There

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Beef Jerky

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Beef Jerky Who

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nothing, I just like it hahaha!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...baffling...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, did you know that, like fingerprints, everyone's tongue print is different?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Fascinating!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: AND did you know that I just took a tongue-print off my favorite lollipop in my lollipop collection?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Um, is this a good time to say what a great, and VERY forgiving friend you can be?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you know it's impossible to lick your own elbow?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, I've heard that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I'm here if you ever need help, buddy.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um.... thanks?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Will you donate to my fund raiser to send a worthy student to Ronnie James Dio's "Amp Camp"?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Does the "worthy student" have a prehensile tail that they use to tap arpeggios on the neck of his Sears guitar he got for his 12th birthday?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...I cannot disclose the demographics of our students.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I thought so.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Monte! Let's spend the afternoon at the beach!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mort, the beach is hours from here.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well then let's spend the afternoon watching videos of beaches on the internet!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ......Ok, I'm in.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey! Matt from Marketing is eating an 8' cake on Twitch today!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You got a typo there, you mean 8". 8' means "eight feet".

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know what I typed, Jasper. It's 4"x3"x8'. It's a full sheet cake that feeds 48 people. It'll be on our Twitch channel 4pm CT.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We truly live in magical times... magical and disgusting times...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey I know we're not supposed to talk about religion, but I have a question.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I already regret this...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If a Minotaur and a Centaur had a baby would it be born with the body of a horse and the head of a bull?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Or would it have the head of a human and the body of also a human?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Give me back my D&D Monster Manual.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm going to do it! I'm going to fulfill my dream as a child and become an astronaut!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's great, Mortimer. Just remember, it's going to take a lot of effort. You've got to stay strong and focused.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know what would be awesome? If there was a space-themed pizza place, and instead of having garlic knotts, they had "Astro-knotts." Get it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You've already lost your focus, huh?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My focus on what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If I could have one wish, it would be for a new way to enjoy fried potatoes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What about French fries? Hash browns? Potato chips? Home fries? Tater tots? Potato pancakes? Seasoned fries? Waffle fries? Poutine? What else could possibly be left?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Unlike you, I refuse to accept any limits to what the fried potato is capable of.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you finish all that clam chowder?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, how could you be so shellfish?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: SHELLFISH, MONTE!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: :D

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Shqueaked-ed... Shookapuh... Sleeeowut...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is happening here?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm trying to figure out a way to phonetically write out the sound of the original Star Trek door opening effect.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You do know your annual review is next week, right? And that 50% of that is a peer-review? ...and that I'm your only peer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Um, so I'm headed to the replicator, Cap'n. Can I get you a cup of tea, Earl Grey, hot?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yo Monte, eat this.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That looks like a shoe.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Close. It's a *deep-fried* shoe.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, Monte. Smell this?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You don't even know what it is!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, the answer to that question is ALWAYS no.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Everything is better with sticky googly eyes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mona Lisa?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Better.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Magna Carta?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Better.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Twinkie?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: MUCH better.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: They're coming back for a reunion tour!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Who?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Barbie and the Rockers! I hope there are still good seats available!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm guessing you won't have too much trouble.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Fun Fact: Did you know the middle finger cannot fit in a nostril?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...that's not true!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You totally tried didn't you, you dirty monkey...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...and so the Pope says, "Easy, put the dingo in the mayo and call me a cab." HAHAHAHAHA

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...WHAT?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's a new experiment. I just say the punchline without coming up with a joke. You try!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: "Well," said the proctologist, "why not? I mean, when's the next time I'm gonna be in Buenos Aires with access to this much PVC tubing?" Hey, that IS fun!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, I don't think you appreciate me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I want to hear one compliment, one nice thing from you, about me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You make me want to be a better monkey.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's maybe the best compliment of my life.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, maybe I overshot a little because I was aiming for just enough to keep you from killing me for putting toothpaste in your yogurt again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wanna start a band?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I dunno, I'm pretty busy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh come on! We can start a bongo/harmonium duo and call ourselves "Zen and the Art of Monkey Maintenance"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...That's a helluva elevator pitch. I'm in.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Y'know, we're not so different, you and me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Isn't it "you and I?"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Isn't it, "'you and I'?"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wait, what? ...ok, I'm tapping this monkey chat...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: TGIF!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I didn't know you were a blue cheese fan.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, that's the acronym, right? "Thank Gorgonzola It's Friday"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ..........I'll see you on Monday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Boy, I really have to start saving for retirement.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I sunk all my money into coffee.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Coffee futures? Rather risky, isn't it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I literally sunk $12.37 into a bag of coffee beans. It's in the kitchen.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you catch the BIG GAME yesterday?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I chased it for hours, but couldn't run it down.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you... I'm talking about the football game.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was talking about the antelope I chased around the zoo all weekend.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: As always I regret asking you anything ever.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Taste this.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I am 1000% NOT tasting anything, last time you had me taste something it was live bees.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I promise it's not bees this time.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's that buzzing sound?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Your tingling sense of curiosity?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I really miss rock anthems. There was always one on every album.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, you mean something like "Ode to Granite?, or "Bitchin' Basalt"? or "Love is Like an Igneous Projection"? or the 16th century Gregorian Chant, "A Songe for Unto a Pebble I Sawe One Daye?"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why do you hate everything I love?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wanna play Hide-n-Seek?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK, you hide in this locked closet and slowly count out your social security number while I, um, hide or something.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Stop trying to take out credit cards in my name!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think we need new bunk beds.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We don't need bunk beds. We have our own rooms, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But then how will I get my Limp Bizkit Tribute Room with Real Durst Action?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: By moving out? ...please?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If I asked you who you'd rather go to the movies with - Rhett or Rick - that would be a Rhett-or-Rick-al question, right? Eh??

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you ever thought about how much you could do if you put your mind to something other than dumb jokes?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No. It would take too much mind power away from the dumb jokes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you have a quarter I could borrow, Monte? I'll pay you back.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure. And don't worry about paying me back. It's just a quarter.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Great, can I borrow $683.32 for a ne Go-Ped?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?! No!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That'll teach you to encourage me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know, despite everything, I like you, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Despite everything"? What does that mean?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Put it this way, I forgive you for making soup outta my old socks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...message received.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sure is snowy out here in Seattle!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're telling me! My tail froze when I was shoveling the driveway.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, it's frozen like that? I just thought you were very surprised.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I've got an idea! Pretzels that aren't dipped in chocolate! Like, for people who are eating healthy.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So, like, normal pretzels?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Normal pretzels! That has a nice ring to it. How would you like to join my marketing department? It'd be as an unpaid intern at first, but trust me: there's a lot of room for upward mobility at Normal Pretzels Inc.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Will you be my Friendentine?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Your Friend Valentine?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yup!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Am I contractually obligated?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yup!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Fine.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yay!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's the most wonderful time of the year!!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? You mean Valentine's Day? That was yesterday, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Naw, it's "50% off Valentine's Candy" down at the drugstore. Gonna buy a truckload. :)

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's the most wonderful time of the year!!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? You mean Valentine's Day? That was yesterday, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Naw, it's "50% off Valentine's Candy" down at the drugstore. Gonna buy a truckload. :)

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I love Staurdays.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think you mean "Saturdays"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, Staurdays is the ancient Icelandic rite of shark pickling.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Your insistence on doubling-down on typos is infuriating.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Sunday, Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Happy Sunday to you. Did you take out the recycling?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...It's somehow less happy now...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh. This is frustrating me. What's that song where they're talking about the train?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um, do you have any other details about it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No. I do not. Now please stop stalling and answer my question.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Crickets. Why do I keep hearing crickets? Can you hear the crickets?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: There they are again!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We need a bigger TV.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: "We"?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK, you, whatever. All I know is I can't read Marie Kondo's tiny subtitles and it is NOT sparking joy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's BOC Day! Rejoice!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We're selling BOCs on the site today? That's nothing new.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: First of all: I find your lack of faith disturbing. Second of all: We've hid them all over Woot.com! All day!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Whoah, that DOES sound fun!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: TOLD YOU.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, I don't know why everyone loves ice coffee so much. It just tastes like water to me!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's actually iced coffee, with a d.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh... that makes more sense. I just froze my Venti and my tongue kept sticking to it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, I miss old fashioned spit takes. Comedy gold.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Then chew on this: We've been alive longer than a lot of real monkeys.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: {spit take}

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Thought so.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Aw man, now my phone smells like a machiato.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We're rolling out the red carpet to appreciate our Prime customers this week!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I wonder why the carpet of honor is always red?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We tried a Diane Von Furstenberg pattern but it gave everyone vertigo.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We're kicking off Prime appreciation week with a PSA: Remembder, lil' monkeys, always brush after every meal!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you kidding?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I eat like 12 meals a day, I'll wear my chompers down to nubs.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ....what a horrid mental picture.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WOOT-OFF!!!!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YAY!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: YEAH... wait, you're never this excited about work.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Woot's off for the day!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, it's a Woot-Off which means... {sigh} Sure, I'll see you on Thursday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's appreciation week. I appreciate you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I appreciate me, too.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...I think my snark is finally rubbing off on you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm looking forward to our vacation next week when Prime Appreciation is done!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not going on a vacation...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I know. I am and you are getting a vacation from me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...I'm into it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you seen my spaghetti?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why would I know where your spaghetti is?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're sitting in my spaghetti chair.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is that the chair where you EAT your spaghetti?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not exactly...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm sitting in spaghetti aren't I?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Seems like. Can I have it back please I'm starving.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Left! Left! Left right left!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you doing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's March. I'm Marching.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not... You know what never mind just keep marching in THAT direction.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sundays just aren't the same since football season ended.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I didn't know you even liked football.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't but I LOVE nachos.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you seen a tightly sealed jar that says "SPIDERS" on it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: There's a jar with no lid on it that says "SPIDERS" right over there.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We should go. We should go RIGHT now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Want to go zip lining today?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I can't. I have to organize my pants.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I already did that for you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You did?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I composted 'em. C'mon ZIP LINE ZIP LINE ZIP LINE

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ah, here's the fool. Methinks a prank upon him I shall play!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, how many times do I have to tell you: soliloquies don't work in real life.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't know what you're talking about, Monte! But here, you should pull my finger.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Forsooth, someone has alit him unto my devious plan! But who???

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Aahhh. I love days like this, when you can wake up late, take an hour shower, and just veg out before the TV.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...it's only Thursday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And your point is...?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oooh, my stomach.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you sick?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, last night was my bimonthly "drumless percussion squad" rehearsal and it was my turn as bass drum.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...you have too many hobbies.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, did you hear? They put me in charge of the Woot Facebook page!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a lot of responsibility, Mortimer. We have a lot of likes on there.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, how many of them are from doctors? Because I'd really love to get some opinions on this rash I've got right...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Walking away now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What do you call a strong female role model who can't stop yawning?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You got me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Snoozin' B. Anthony.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's... awful.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, did you hear? They put me in charge of the Woot Facebook page!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a lot of responsibility, Mortimer. We have a lot of likes on there.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, how many of them are from doctors? Because I'd really love to get some opinions on this rash I've got right...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Walking away now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I haven's showered in a week.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I noticed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, I am one funky monkey.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You went a week without bathing for THAT joke?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm nothing, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Aww, Mort. What's wrong?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't even finish this third pizza by myself.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You have any plans this weekend, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, actually, barring inclement weather --

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm going to a water park tomorrow.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OK...good to know. Why did you ask me a question if you just wanted to answer it yourself?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why else would you ask somebody a question?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm thinking about growing out my beard.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uhhh, Mortimer, you don't have a beard.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know -- that's why I have to grow it out.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I mean, you're physically incapable of growing facial hair. You're covered in fur everywhere else on your body, why do you want a beard?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uniformity.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, help me settle an argument I'm having with a friend of mine

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OK.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is it rude to poke your finger in a donut to see what's inside, and then not take that donut?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man! I really thought you'd be on my side.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why? I'm the friend you're having the argument with.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Man, I have such a headache every day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's me, isn't it...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What classic rockstar translates to "put on a shirt"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh god, please, it's too early for an awful pun...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ASK IT.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: DO IT NOW.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: {sigh} I don't know, wwwhat classic rockstar translates to "put on a shirt"?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don Henley! See, that didn't hurt too bad, now did it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...I thinkk i ruptured sommethingg...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Good news, Monte. I got us a gravy boat!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no, is it...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A yacht overflowing with gravy? You betcha!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think I'm going to start getting into shape.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's great, Mortimer! What are you thinking? Running? Biking? Swimming?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Those sound like pretty advanced shapes. I'll probably start with square and work my way up to circle.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What do you call 7 ducks in a swamp?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A quackmire!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ew, y'know... WAIT YOU ALREADY TOLD ME THAT JOKE

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know, but you didn't laugh the last time so I thought I'd give you an opportunity for corrective action.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: VEGAS BABY

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: VEGAS BABY

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...amazing. We're not in or planning to visit Vegas, but you respond every time I say VEGAS BABY

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: VEGAS BABY

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: A fascinating Pavlovian response.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, do you have room at your place for a broken photocopier? I need to get it out of my garage. It's yours for free if you want it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I don't have room. And if I did, I wouldn't want to fill it with a broken photocopier.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK, just thought I'd ask. Well, I gotta go. I need to run to the stationery store on my lunch break.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What do you need from the stationery store?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Like, 12 rolls of wrapping paper. You're not gonna BELIEVE what I'm giving you for your birthday!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: oo! Bargain Bin sale is today! I'm gonna snap up some deals!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't like those sales.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? Why not? You can get some CRAZY deals on stuff.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The only "stuff" in the last bin was three rotten bananana peels, an empty dim sum container, and some pencil shavings.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, that was a trash bin.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: False, FALSE advertising I say, sir! It will not stand!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, absolutely not. No way.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Come on! It'll be fun!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, it won't be. Jumping out of an airplane and careening through the sky on a thin filament of synthetic fabric is not going to be fun for me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well SOMEONE has to operate the camera for my sweet extreme sports highlight reel.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What if you crash and horribly injure yourself?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We should only BE so lucky! You get way more money for a "Fail" shot.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think we need to have a talk about how many donuts you've been eating lately, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But I haven't been eating any donuts lately.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Cool. Well, that wraps up our talk about how many donuts you've been eating. Check your email later for the meeting minutes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Today I'm honoring the sacrifices and contributions of American workers with the ultimate gesture of solidarity: a one-day strike!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But you have the day off anyway.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If this strike had consequences, it wouldn't be a gesture.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You want to be my best friend?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have cupcakes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well played.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, check out a huge spider I found.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: NO, I DON'T WANT TO SEE A SPI--oh, that's just a mop.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The spider is trapped in the garage, this is just its mop.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh man, I overslept.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, you were binge watching pretty late into the night.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I better go binge watch some sunlight.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Mort! Wanna go on a CRAZY adventure???

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure. Why not? Where are we going?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow...uh...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I didn't expect you to say yes, so I actually didn't plan anything.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Didn’t see you in the Daily Digest yesterday. Was it because of the site outage?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not sure, I dropped one of the servers in the tub and spent most of the day trying to dry it off.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, that explains the outage.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What outage again?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think I have that thing where I hear colors...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't believe you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay, so what color would you say your scarf is?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Orange.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: See, I heard that!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm thinking about growing a mustache, you know, since mustaches are kinda cool now.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But you've always had hair on your upper lip. So you've always had a mustache, sort of.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh gross! Even when it wasn't cool? WHY DIDN'T ANYONE TELL ME?! Ugh! No wonder Heather Locklear never answered those emails!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Want to watch the sunset with me?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Eh, I saw it earlier today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean the sunrise?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was upside down.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, all the lights are off in here! Why are you working in the dark?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The florescent lights hurt my eyes!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Also, I'm not working; I'm trying to take a nap at my desk.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Guess it's time to think about spring cleaning.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I already took care of that.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wha? How?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A very therapeutic dumpster fire.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OK, it's April. I guess it's long past time to take down the tree.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Already taken care of!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh...how? Where'd you put it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: All excellent questions. Let's just say the neighbors should've covered their pool this winter.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This is why we have to move every year.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you see all those banana peels lying around?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, what was up with that? It took forever to pick them up.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: UGH you've ruined everything AGAIN. I just found all these red turtleshells too. We were so close to having everything together for IRL Mario Kart this afternoon!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Saturday. Guess I better mow the lawn.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You destroyed the lawn last week.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Woo-hoo! Chore-free day!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, Monte, can I borrow five bucks? There's this game in the break room I've been trying to beat and I need more quarters

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Management put a game in the break room?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, but it's REALLY hard. You only get one try each time, but I've nearly cleared the chips and stale pastries from the board.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Right. Tell you what, if you bring me back something from one the candy levels, you've got a deal.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey the boss says we have a lot of new people reading. Maybe we should reintroduce ourselves?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I’m Mortimer, you’re Monte. Can I have a PopTart now?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, I mean, shouldn’t we give people some context? Like, we’re roommates…

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: …and we work at Woot.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: …well, “work” is a pretty loose term. At least it’s a paycheck.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wait, you’re getting paid for this?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So, it’s Mischief Week at Woot.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Silly stuff happening on the site and around the office.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is that why my desk is covered in loose staples?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, that’s unrelated.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I’ve just had a revelation!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: About what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: When I pull this lever on my chair, it goes up!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You didn’t know that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No I did. But it went up, so I revelated myself.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I must buy you that dictionary.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think it’s time for a career change! I’m becoming a coder.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That’s great! Are you going to do an online course?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No need. I already know how to code. Look! 22 14 14 19

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You just wrote Woot using numbers. That’s not exactly what coder means.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You need to pay me more now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, will you read me a bedtime story?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's like 11:30am

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Good call. Hey Monte, will you read me a powernap-at-my-desktime story?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ahhhh the weekend. It sure is nice to have a couple days off from the rat race.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah all the hustle and bustle of the corporate world really can wear you down.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Corporate what now? I'm talking about the underground rat racing ring I run at the office. Did I not tell you about that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Easter, pal! Did you find the eggs I hid for you?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you referring to the dozen eggs you "hid" in my bed while I was sleeping? You know you're supposed to hard boil and decorate them, right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Who has that kind of time? I have stuff to do.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Stuff like cleaning all this raw egg out of my bed?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nooooooooo... stuff like seeing how many Peeps I can fit in my mouth at once.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you have a good commute this morning?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think you know I didn't...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because I put all the leftover Easter ham in your briefcase and dogs chased you all the way to work?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Because you put all the leftover Easter ham in my briefcase and dogs chased me all the way to work.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why is it so hot in our office today?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm getting ready for summer and acclimating to beach life.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I was going to ask a followup question about the large box marked "SEAGULLS" but I think I got it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's actually for an unrelated project. I'm training them to steal french fries.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How's it going so far?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not great. They're good at TAKING the french fries, but I haven't figured out how to get them to bring them back here.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's WOOT-OFF DAY!!! Are you ready to ROCK!?!?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I thought HR took your megaphone away.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But not my BACKUP megaphone. I keep that one hidden.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why do you want to know?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Purely for personal research and definitely not for any kind of anonymous email to HR or anything of the sort.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is this bowl of gross-looking slop in the fridge?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know how I like sandwiches?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I combined all the stuff I like ON my sandwich into one big bowl to save time.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Even the meats and cheeses?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ESPECIALLY the meats and cheeses.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This is why we lost fridge privileges at the office.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is going ON in here?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know how people always say you can't compare apples to oranges?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm putting that theory to the test with science.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: By throwing apples and oranges against the wall of our office!?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: SCIENCE!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How about that Avengers movie, huh?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No spoilers.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just think...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: NO SPOILERS! I haven't seen it yet.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think the Emma Peel parts were my favorite.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think you watched the wrong Avengers movie.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: NOW who's being a spoiler?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wake up, I made brunch!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Every time you cook something it's a disaster.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not this time. Y'know how brunch is breakfast+lunch? I made wafflads!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is this a salad you put in a waffle iron?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WITH croutons and blue cheese dressing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm going back to bed.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer! What happened to yesterday's Monkey Chat?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well you see it's a complicated situation involving several technical aspects, flowcharts, workflows, a low pressure weather system coming in from the...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You overslept and forgot to post it, didn't you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why do they even MAKE snooze buttons, they're like an invitation to fail!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: An invitation to which you ALWAYS manage to RSVP.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here's your party hat, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh. What are we celebrating?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The party hat I got you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, get in this barrel with me! We'll be a barrel of monkeys!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why would we do that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: For Halloween.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's May.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Preparedness, Monte. Preparedness.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you think those little foosball players look like they've lined up for a kick routine, or am I the only one?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You are most assuredly the only one.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, then the guys in the break room are gonna be really confused when they see all the miniature hot pants.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Proper oral care is important, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Of course! ...wait, why wold you say that? Where's my toothbrush?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Right there.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh whew. {brush, brush, brush}. Wait, why does my toothpaste smell like Scrubbing Bubbles?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Proper oral care is important, Monte.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I throw a pancake at you?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why? Is that a joke setup I'm not seeing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I just wanna hit you with a griddlecake.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: {sigh} knock yourself out.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BANGARANG!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, where have you been?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I finally got access to the executive bathroom!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We don’t have an executive bathroom.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then what is that comfortable private booth on the second floor.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hello, Facilities? We need a cleanup in the conference call booth.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I borrow your shoes?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm making soup.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man. I had no idea you were such a snorer.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I know. I've tried everything. Even those little strips you stick to the sides of your nose to open your nasal passages. Nothing works.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Maybe you should see a doctor about it. You're probably not getting very good sleep. It certainly kept me up all night!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, maybe. Hey wait a minute! What were you doing in my room??

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort! You're really late for work!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's because today is bring your snail to work day, Monte!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Walking to work with a snail added approximately 6 hours to my commute.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pardon me, sir, do you have any peanut butter?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, I know it's you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I am a butter connoisseur and would like to assess the quality of this 'peanut' variety.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Your mustache is falling off.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No it isn't.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's on the floor.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I like it there. Peanut butter please.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I notice you've been updating your LinkedIn page. Thinking about a career change?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uh, heh, no, of course not! What makes you say that?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The fact that you list your occupation as "Boudoir Photographer".

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK, look: keep this between us and I'll waive the sitting fee on your next session.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why don't people drive their cars in reverse more often? Like, on the highway?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean, other than for the reason that they can't SEE that way?! Well, cars can't actually go very fast in reverse. See, the gear ratio is such that...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I'd appreciate it if, for once, you wouldn't use logic and science against me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm thinking of getting my eyebrows waxed.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um ... but you don't have eyebrows.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You can be really hurtful sometimes, you know?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm sorry. If you had eyebrows, I'm sure they'd be expertly groomed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's too late.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Alright, Mortimer - I'm going to prepare the ENTIRE meal tomorrow. All I need you to do is make mashed potatoes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Now, how do you define "mashed." Because I think of it more as a state-of-mind, you know?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Anything to get out of doing some work, huh?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pretty much.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My face hurts.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It hurts me, too ZING!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You see, this is why I am who I am and you are who you are.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Time for dinner!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, it's only 10 o'clock.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I already ate my lunch, so dinner's what's next...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You will need to be nicer to me now I’m an inventor.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I’m scared to ask. What did you invent?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wearable pizza.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is - … Give me my hat back, but clean that pepperoni off first!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hater.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WHAT is that NOISE?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What noise?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That awful blaring klaxon??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, that's the Not My Problem alarm.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really? Because it's a smoke detector over a toaster that looks like it's crammed with eight Toaster Strudels.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Huh, weird coincidence.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, why are all the developers outside?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The CEO said the developers needed to work on a fire drill.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That’s not exactly right – he said this problem needed to be worked on AS a fire drill.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But what if there’s a fire?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Then we evacuate, but that’s not what he – … why am I even engaging on this?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Safety first!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh! People keep talking about the Game of Thrones! Didn't anyone read the email I sent about waiting for my viewing party?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But Mortimer, it's all over the news, on the radio, everywhere. That's hard to ignore.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know what else is hard, Monte? MAKING A 47-LAYER DRAGON-SHAPED CHEESE DIP!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, did you seriously make a 47-layer dragon cheese dip for your belated GoT party? Why 47 layers?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I wanted one layer for each person I invited on Facebook.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's surprisingly sweet of you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I like to make people feel special, by way of cheese.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Check it. I got one of those sweet wing suits to go sky diving.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Who just GIVES you these things? Shouldn't you have to prove you can sky dive NORMALLY before you get wings?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: All it takes is a credit card.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I thought your cards were all maxed out.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, but this one has "generous overdraft protection." Whatever that means.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte! I got a new guitar!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a chainsaw.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I didn't say this was it...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...and now, i dunno. i have this fundamental sense of malaise about everything.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You feel corn?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Didn't you say you feel maize?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You have the vocabulary of an apple.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Apples are notoriously well-RED. heeeeeyyyooo.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm leaving.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer i need you to write that -

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hi, this is Mortimer. Sorry I'm unavailable right now, but please leave a message after the beep. BEEEEE -

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: you're standing in front of -

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: EEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEE

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: this is absurd.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: EEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEE

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Fine. I'll just do it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: P.

lines.speaker: mortimer
