lines.text: How about burgers for lunch?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Great, wake me up when they're ready.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How was your three-day weekend?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not great I was stuck at the office the whole time.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You had that much work to do?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No I mean I was STUCK at the office. This super glue stuff is no joke.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, no. That orange vest can only mean one thing: somehow, you got appointed office Safety Czar. Gold help us all.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Now, now, Monte, the term "Czar" is so grandiose. I'm just a humble servant.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, that's a good sign, I guess...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You can just call me "Safety Pharoah".

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BOC BOC BOC BOC!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you doing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My chicken impression for BOC day!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's B.O.C. Day. As in Bags O' Crap. How long have you been working here?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hmmmmm... I'll be right back I have to call a farmer and cancel something.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is it a chicken farmer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'll thank you to stay out of my personal business.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just ate cookies for breakfast.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Breakfast is the most important meal of the day. You should probably eat something healthier.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, you're probably right. Next time I'll have pancakes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: There you go.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm just saying, I've never met a cheese sauce I didn't like.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, we were talking about the debt ceiling.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Exactly.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm trying to find the words to describe my favorite dinosaur.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh yeah? Which one is that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thesaurus.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are we friends?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, what's that you got for lunch? Looks good!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's a frozen burrito. I bag-cooked it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Bag-cooked it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, you know, the style of cooking where you put a frozen meal in your bag, forget about it for a week, then find it again and just eat it because it's fully thawed.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Remember when I said it looks good a second ago? I rescind that comment.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey man, you missed a crazy Internet debate today about whether a hamburger counts as a sandwich!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What a time to be alive.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know the old farmer's adage, "Three cats on the deck, it's gonna rain like heck"?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No. In fact, I'm positive those words have never been said in combination.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You got me-I just made it up! Today is National Adage Coinage Day.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That statement is also false.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Aw shucks. You're smarter than a wizened Kentucky marmot, Monte.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you been to the new museum about the classical art?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I feel like you're just saying things to make yourself sound cultured.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No way. This is totally sincere and real. Anyway, are you available next week to play a round of caviar?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I finally cleaned my place this weekend.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Cleaning is a fool's errand. It's just going to get dirty again.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well...yes...but...what do you do??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I move to a new apartment every time my old one gets messy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't you think it's weird that there are spices that aren't spicy?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Not really.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well then you're part of the problem, not the solution, Monte.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Listen. I know I don't say it enough, so I'm going to say it now. You really mean a lot to me, Monte. You're so smart, and you're a really good friend. I don't know what I'd do without you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Awww, thanks buddy. That makes me feel really ...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ... Monte, can you keep it down? I'm talking to my best friend Monte on the phone.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Gah, that drive to work was - wait hold on, I'm a monkey.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, it's weird. I don't even know how we landed these jobs, to be honest.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I like cheese.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Cool.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No. I mean, I REALLY like cheese.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Like, you LIKE it like it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ... would you judge me if I said yes?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: woo! i had a great time at the happy hour yesterday! we partied 'til the cows came home!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: this is the part where you tell me i've got several cows in my living room, isn't it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: y'know, it's no fun when you figure this stuff out.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you fill my sippy cup with iced tea?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's not iced tea.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...what? What is it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, it's not iced tea, I can tell you that.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you have a sharpie?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I suddenly feel the need to write my name on all my cups.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Good news, Monte. I got us a gravy boat!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no, is it...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A yacht overflowing with gravy? You betcha!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, help me rent a car.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, there are a lot of rental car companies to choose from--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry, I meant help me rent a plate of spaghetti.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Want to hear my poem?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Roses are red, violets are red, daisies are red, there's blood everywhere."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ughhhhhhh Tuesday mornings, am I right?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, it's only Monday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was just anticipating that tomorrow morning isn't going to be that great either.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My face hurts.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It hurts me, too ZING!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You see, this is why I am who I am and you are who you are.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, want to go bowling?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I didn't know you bowled. What's your average?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can eat 38 bowls of cereal an hour.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm so tired I could eat a horse.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think you mean you're so HUNGRY you could eat a horse.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I mean I'm so tired that if I'm not careful, I might do something unspeakable like eat a horse by accident.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you doing right now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pizza.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sounds about right...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you eating an entire plate of carrots?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The lightbulb in the garage burned out.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why don't you just take the flashlight into the garage?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I accidentally swallowed it six months ago.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I can't be around you anymore.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just woke up from a coma!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OMG! How long were you out?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Near as I can tell, just a few days.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Whew. Well, I guess it could have been worse.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah. Congress is gridlocked, gas is under three dollars and the Foo Fighters are on tour. I'm sure glad it's still 1995.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's our movie tonight?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: TOP GUN. I know every line!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Great. Wait, where's the TV?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I sold it. We don't need it. So, the opening scene is all these planes taking off from an aircraft carrier. And the planes take off VVVRRRROOOOM! And the radar guy says "You've got bogeys at 12 o'clock" or something, and Maverick says "I'm flying a plane" and then they fire some missiles...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is there an echo in here?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is there an echo in here?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Shhh, Monte! Be quiet! I was trying to listen for an echo.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, I know, I was just playing along!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Echos aren't a game, Monte! They're serious!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you smell that?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mystery.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, but I something's rotting in the fridge.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, that's my leftover mystery.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you know that ketchup was originally sold as medicine?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh yeah? Medicine for what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Dry fries.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I read on the internet how i can turn my apartment into a sovereign country.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's definitely not a real -

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YOU ARE BANISHED FROM THE REPUBLIC OF MORTIMOPOLIS.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why is there a meatloaf in our cubicle?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's a mnemonic device. Reminds me not to loaf around.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...please tell me you'll replace it daily.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No need. I shellacked it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you have 300 rubber bands?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, yeah, in my desk, why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just a resources check should I ever need to defend the office in a dramatic slo-mo rubber band fight.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It must be so loud in your head.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It is. It really is.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you like the efficiency booster I added to the elevators?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean how they blast "What's New, Pussycat" at top volume now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yup! Now people just BURST from the elevator in the morning ready to start the day!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think you need to take body language classes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I borrow your hot glue gun?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes-wait. What for?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I want to pretend I have a cold.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Gross.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm going to the 4th picnic and I'm bringing pickles, peppers, pork sausaage, and. hmm... Faygo!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oo! I love this game! "I'm going to the picnic and I'm bringing pickles-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's not a game, it's my shopping list.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh. Disappointing. I just-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YOU THINK PICNICS ARE A GAME?!?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I know it's the 4th, but I am SO EXCITED for our 15th Borthday next week!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I KNOW! I haven't had a Borth in AGES!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Alright, it was a typo, just relax.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't! I have to get the traditional Borth Borscht ready for the Borthstivities. Oo! I hope I get a visit from the Borth Fairy!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...I'm really glad I get a long weekend away from you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: uUUggHHHgggHHHHH

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You entered that pie eating contest after I told you not to, didn't you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: NooOOOooooULFFF!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The fact that there is now rhubarb, peach and marionberry on my shoes says otherwise...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey{burp} don't forget our 15th Brthday next week-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: DON'T CHANGE THE SUBJECT!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, let's go get some burgers.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We're eating burgers.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I meant pizzas, let's go get some pizzas.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm so stoked for the US Women's Soccer Team!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The US Who What?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...seriously? They've won 3 World Cup titles? Four Olympic gold medals? 8 CONCACAF Gold Cups-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OH! Of course! With the ball!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, there you go.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I hear Wayne Gretsky is the one to beat.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ..........you're hopeless.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: IT'S BIRTHDAY WEEK!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: IT'S BIRTHDAY WEEK!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you copying me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Come on, we're 15 now, stop with the childish games.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Soooo, my Full Contact Flashlight Tag team is a non-starter?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you following the Tour de France?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wait, wait, I know this one! People just riding around on fancy bikes eating stank cheese and drinking champagne in France?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know what? Yes... that's exactly what it is.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: USA! USA!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What should the theme of our 15th birthday party be?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How about 2004, the year of our nativity.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I can't remember 2004! I was 0 years old!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, there was Martha Stewart in prison, John Kerry losing the election, that guy from N'Sync revealing J. Jackson's-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know what? I'm going with pinatas, everyone likes pinatas.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What are you hoping to get for our 15th birthday this week?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I asked for a protractor, thirty paperclips, and a shoe horn.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, what did YOU ask for?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: JETPACK! I've always wanted a jetpack.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So 200lbs of explosive fuel strapped to your back that takes you far, far away? ...I think I'll ask for that, too.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HUZZAH!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's our 15th Birthday today!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I KNOW! I'm all nostalgic for when we started all the way back in Naught Four.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Seems like 100 years ago.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: 'Twas a simpler time, when Henry Ford broke the land speed record of 91.37, boys wore short pants, and Teddy was re-elected.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Seems like 115 years ago.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I was on the wrong Wikipedia page, my bad.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Knock knock

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Not today, buckaroo...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ask me why I'm holding a hammer and a clock.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hammer Time.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HAMMER TIME.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just found this great new all-you-can-eat sausage place!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, what's it cost?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Depends on how many you eat.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, that's just a regular restaurant. By that definition, you can call any place "all-you-can-eat."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And I do!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: {non-sequitur}

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: {humorous misunderstanding}

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you using keyboard shortcuts for our chats?!?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: {word play on homophone}

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This is the laziest thing I have ever seen.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: {retort calling into question your parentage}

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: HEY!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So the Pope said, "Not with MY biscuits, Steve!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did i miss something?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm lazy today so I cut to the punchline. It's fun, try it!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So my podiatrist goes, "But officer, where do you get 38 lbs of sweet cream butter in Albuquerque at THIS time of night??"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...Hey, that IS fun!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, quick: ask me what time it is!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, what time is it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: 10 o'clock to your business!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wait, did I do it wrong?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm thinking of doing the Paleo thing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh yeah? You getting into the whole CrossFit movement?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Heck no. I just thought it'd be cool to walk around eating giant turkey legs like a caveman.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My life's goal is to see a real life dinosaur!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, all the dinosaurs are dead.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well since I can't achieve my life's goal, I guess I'll just go back to wasting time!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wanna hear a joke, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then maybe you should buy yourself a comedy album!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't get it...Is that punchline to the joke? Or are you actually telling me to buy a comedy album?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Both! Pretty efficient joke, huh?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, have you "liked" Woot's Facebook page yet?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Me? No way. I don't do that Facebook stuff.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, I'm not sure about it either. I prefer real experiences over virtual ones. And I find the commercialization of online community space a little troubling.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, me too. Plus I was banned from Facebook for life for running a pyramid scheme promoting fraudulent diet pills. But mostly because of that other stuff, yeah.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm thinking of investing in the sock market again.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, that can be a- Wait. Did you say sock market?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah. You can make a lot of money flipping socks.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm getting that feeling like I'm having a stroke again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I had that same feeling two years ago when the toe-sock bubble burst. Look for a proven performer, like a solid black tube sock, to carry you through.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Want a piece of birthday cake, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh..sure. But whose birthday is it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't ask questions where cake is involved.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, I see you're using whiskey stones to keep your drink cool, too.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What? Oh, no. That's a sample I have to take to my urologist.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I see. Say, do you have a Sharpie?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here you go. Why?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It suddenly seems very important that I write my name on this glass.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, could I get that 20 bucks you owe me?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sure, here you go.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...This is a ticket stub for the movie "Rat Rockers 3D"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You can give me my change whenever. No rush.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you ever get the feeling that life is order wrong the in moving?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whoa. I did just now, yeah.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: cosmic filter, and chewed up, and spit out again?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Or, like, maybe, everything we say gets caught in some

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sigh... looks like our email server needs a whackin' again. Hand me my IT stick.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My public gets cranky when they don't get enough of me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And cranky when they get more than enough of you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have a very finicky public.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, check out my snazzy new elliptical machine!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nice, but what is that goo stretched across the handles?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I use it to make taffy while I'm working out.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ah. Problem and solution, all in one convenient package.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm efficient that way.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do these pants make my butt look big?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're not wearing pants.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YOU TAKE THAT BACK.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What does that cloud look like to you?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I see a duck. Or maybe a dog with wings. Yeah, see, there's the snout, and there's the wing. What do you see?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Huh? Sorry, I wasn't listening. Been jammin' on my new fave song, 'What Does That Cloud Look Like To You'.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Looks like it's going to be a beautiful day!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not a window, that's the TV.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Break my code, Monte: z,pmyr dyomld

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How did you know I took a remedial cryptology course? Let's see...got it!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mp esu!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes way - you're speaking as though your hands were shifted one key to the right on a QWERTY keyboard. And I do not stink, thank you very much.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I had the weirdest dream last night!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I cooked the most delicious pasta. But then instead of eating it, I decided to just throw it all over the house.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh...that wasn't a dream. That's what you did last night. I've been waiting for you to wake up and clean it up.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So you're saying we still have pasta?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, did you know the name Sunday was derived from the day of the sun in Hellenistic astrology?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I'm pretty sure it was invented by the SUNDAY SUNDAY SUNDAY guy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's it. I'm quitting this job. I'm gonna become an Uber dryer.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Dryer?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I BOUGHT A LAUNDROMAT FOR ONE STUPID TERRIBLE PUN.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, check it out.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you wearing a walrus?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, it's my tuskedo.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte! I lost my car keys!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no! Where do you think they might be?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Probably in the car. Which I also lost.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, you really buried the lede there, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: NO WAY, YOU REALLY THINK IT COULD BE BURIED?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My leg hurts.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Because you kicked the inside of a baby crib for a half hour yesterday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I heard it's cool to kick it in a crib.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...Ok, I don't think--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I NEED TO BE COOL.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Play this card game with me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, where did you get all these credit cards?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: In a crowded elevator. The lights went out.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What does this button do?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's my elbow.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Monday!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Never.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I bought myself a trophy.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not how trophies are supposed to work.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well then they shouldn't make them so easy to buy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you know that if you take all the hotdogs in the world and line them up end-to-end, they would reach all the way to the moon?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow. The moon? Really?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: AHHHH HAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA! Good one, Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did I say "moon"? Sorry. I meant "my mouth."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's our movie tonight?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: TOP GUN. We hafta get ready for the sequel! And I know every line!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Great. Wait, where's the TV?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I sold it. We don't need it. So, the opening scene is all these planes taking off from an aircraft carrier. And the planes take off VVVRRRROOOOM! And the radar guy says "You've got bogeys at 12 o'clock" or something, and Maverick says "I'm flying a plane" and then they fire some missiles...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...and the sandwich didn't even have any cheese!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ha! That's just like a story Jeremy told at Matt's party.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Matt had a party?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here, I bought you a new hat. Put it on.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This is a fruit basket.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Now dance.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Look, Monte! Look in the monkey cage! Hahahaha they're so silly! HAHAHAHAHA!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a mirror, we're at home.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Look at his stupid hat!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Last night I had a dream where my underpants were on backwards.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But Mortimer, you're not wearing underpants.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OHGODICAN'TWAKEUP!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay, so the good news is my effort to turn that break room coffeemaker into a time machine has been successful

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Here we go.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The bad news is Debbie from accounting lives with the dinosaurs now

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I can't believe it's only Tuesday

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That dual-core laptop looks pretty nice, huh?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'd never get a dual-core myself.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really? Why's that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Out of respect for Aaron Burr.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know what I noticed? Adult diapers only come in even numbers!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How and why you came to this observation are two questions I don't want answered.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here's my idea: we open a restaurant that sells weird stuff that foodies would want to try. Our signature dish: refried Mexican jumping beans.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um, I don't know, Mortimer. Those things have larvae inside. In fact, the "jumping" is caused by the larvae spasming in an attempt to roll their beans to a cooler environment.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So you're saying we'd have to have a vegetarian option?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Dude, are you going to the vending machine? If you bring me back some mini-pretzels, I'll be your best friend!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, friendship isn't about the things one can "get" from another. It's about trust, respect, patience...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is borrowing a dollar anywhere in there? 'Cause your best friend needs to do that, too.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, my dreams of being a big-shot theatre director are shot. Stupid reviews. SO MUCH FOR ART, I GUESS.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You have to admit that asking an audience to bring their own SCUBA gear is a little over the top.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's called "Shakespeare in the Waterpark" for a REASON, Monte!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know, I'm really a lucky guy. Lucky to have friends who are always ready to come to my aid when I'm in a jam, who always spring into action when I need -

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not going to clean your ear scabs again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why not? Didn't you hear how lucky I am?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, why is 6 afraid of 7?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Because 7 ate 9?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nooo. Because 7 will CUT you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oo! The Post Office closes in 20 minutes! I better get there fluckadrift!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte! Kids read these things!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, "fluckadrift" means to move with excessive urgency.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Who said anything about fluckadrift? I'm talking about saying "Post Office"! No one under 30 even remembers what they look like!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte. I think my phone is broken!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh oh! Did you spill water on it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...but I did drop it into a bathtub full of fruit punch.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why would you-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't ask.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, Bob is really giving me a headache with his "Big Trouble in Little China" trivia. I can't get anything done!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you escalated it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why would I do that?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Because if it hinders-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I mean, the escalator only goes to the second floor coffee shop. OH! I should just relax and have a Quad-Soy-Half-Caff-Latte? Great idea!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm taking lunch orders, whatcha want?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: A salad.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...and?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's it! Just write down "Mortimer = Salad"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: {scribble scribble}

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um, you forgot the "L" and an "A".

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, no I didn't.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's first day of September already! Can you believe it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know, every day with you reminds me of the first day of summer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whu-why thank you! Is it my sunny disposition?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, because it always feels like the longest day of the year.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thanks for inviting me to your Memorial Day BBQ!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, it's LABOR Day. Memorial Day is at the beginning of summer and Labor Day is at the end. You always mix those up!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whatever, they both have hot dogs and that's good enough for me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pick a card.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Two of clubs?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I hate you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, my Canadian model girlfriend that I met at summer camp will just NOT stop texting me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...really...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, her wanting to be around me is a constant... I call it "Static Cling" ;)

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I KNEW it! I knew you didn't have a girlfriend!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...joke's pretty good, though.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: NO IT'S NOT.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you hear the news?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What news? What happened?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't know. I just ask that so in case something DOES happen, I won't seem so uninformed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh! The mechanic says it's going to cost TONS of money to fix my car.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Jeez, what happened?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't know. Something with the oil intake system.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you use the wrong oil?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, that's just the thing! I only ever buy the best stuff I can find. I'm talking extra virgin, infused with garlic and herbs, the works!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Happy Saturday, Mortimer!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How can you be happy with the state of things?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, I mean, it's a weird time around here but we'll pull throu-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I mean, there is not ONE cookie in this house. It's a travesty.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you still sore about not having cookies?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I'm sore from trying to bash open your piggy bank for cookie money. I'm HURTING, man.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WHY WOULD YOU BASH DR. PORKINS???

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So, what, you don't think the Nightmare On Elm Street series is better?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No one's disputing that, Mortimer, but-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So why won't you sign my petition?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I just feel there are better, more reality-based issues than officially declaring every Saturday the 14th "Freddy Day."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Fine. You'll get yours when you go to sleep tonight.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know the old farmer's adage, "Three cats on the deck, it's gonna rain like heck"?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No. In fact, I'm positive those words have never been said in combination.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You got me-I just made it up! Today is National Adage Coinage Day.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That statement is also false.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Aw shucks. You're smarter than a wizened Kentucky marmot, Monte.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You look great, Mortimer. Have you been going to the gym?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah. I've really been working on my French press.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You mean your bench press?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I mean French press. I like to watch people exercise while I have my morning coffee.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Remember to tune in to Twitch.tv/wootdotcom all next week for MischiefTV!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, I know that. Why are you telling--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hijinks! Deals! Shenanigans!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, who are you talking to?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It'll be a Hullabaloo!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: {sigh} I'm not even part of this conversation, am I?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My phone's broken.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a banana.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And it's broken.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What kind of lizard always finds its way home?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A navigator.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's so awful. You are LUCKY this is going out on a Saturday...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I like brunch.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Me, too! A relaxing meal to catch up with friends and--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I just like smooshing words together. Look at my new hunchie! it's a hamster smooshed with a scrunchie.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...that is an abomination.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OH MAN! MischiefTV starts today on Twitch.tv/WootDotCom!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I know, I'm so stoked!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, and... I'm sorry, I just can't get past the word "stoked" coming out of your mouth.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What, not natural?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: As unnatural as a headcheese parfait.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, that bad, huh?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Man, did you see the Man Versus Dog competition yesterday on the Woot! Twitch stream?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Naw, I can't watch cruelty.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?! No! It was a pie eating contest!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, and they cruelly didn't give me any pie.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you see yesterday's live Scooter Jousting on Twitch.TV/WootDotCom?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It was amazing no one got hurt.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I KNOW. I had 35 bucks riding on a compound fracture...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Whew! This MischiefTV on Twitch.TV/WootDotCom every day this week is really exhausting our fellow Woot! employees.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is THAT why there's no coffee left by 8am????

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, that's because of your new "caffeine shower" regimen, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh right! My skin feels so AWAKE!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Last day of MischiefTV on Twitch!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know, I'm about ready to go back to watching my reg'lar stories.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What you watching now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's a 80s reboot about two country boys roaming the post-apocalyptic wastelands together in their antique muscle car.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's it called?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nukes of Hazzard.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ugh, you're the worst.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I love Saturday!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Right? It's great to get a break from work!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And a break from you!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ....did you literally just start this chat to insult me?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: See you Monday!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WE ARE ROOMMATES!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm still catching up on all my stories since MishiefTV was all last week.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you watching now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's a Historical Fantasy. It's about the living statues on King Midas's castle and their musings on the inevitability of life ending.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's it called?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Golden 'Goyles

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You ever wonder if Shakespeare actually wrote all those plays?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This isn't another attempt to get me to forgive you for lining the cat box with my Second Folio copy, is it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You should let things go. Like The Bard said, "All those moments will be lost in time, like tears in rain."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: THAT WAS RUTGER HAUER.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Quick, Quick, Quick!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Relax! They pushed back the due date on the project. But while I have you so gung ho, take a look at these numbers--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Slow, Slow, Slow!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Quiz: If I eat all the ingredients of a pizza is it the same as eating a pizza?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, I don't think you'd want to eat all that raw dough.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Correct. I'm going to throw up now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you know that ____

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Huh? I don't understand.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, that's because ___

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is happening?!?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I'm just getting ahead of the month's monkey chats by sketching them out for the week. I'll circle back with the funny in the next few days.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This is NOT a good use of my time, Mortimer!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you ever get the feeling you're being watched?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can't say that I do.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So, never? Not at home, in your house?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No. Why? Do I seem like the paranoid type?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No. I just wanted to make sure my hiding spot was good.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You ever feel like you're just going around and around in life, seeing the same things over and over until life just spits you out, sweaty and exhausted?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Stop playing in the dryer, I mean it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've got a riddle!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good for you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ....ouch.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I want to re-watch "Freejack" today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The Hopkins/Estevez/Jagger vehicle? You shouldn't ever text something like that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Because now there's digital evidence that a) You voluntarily watched "Freejack", and that b) You wanted to do it again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nixon and Kissinger?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, you never like my Halloween costume ideas.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...I don't like ANY of your ideas, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK, which one you wanna dress as, Milli or Vanilli?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You want to be two fakers who used other people's voices to get rich?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, we didn't even write this monkey chat.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...whoah.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Girl, you know it's true.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But I ALWAYS wanted to be Jerry for Halloween!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No one's gonna get the reference.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pshh, all I hafta say is that we're Tom & Jerry.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, people who hear "Tom & Jerry" will NOT be thinking of Tom Cruise and his character Jerry Maguire.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But it's so META.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You SURE you wanna veto my Steely Dan group costume idea?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No bad ideas in a brainstorm, Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...you are a category 5 idiot.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK, you didn't like my Punisher/Microchip suggestion, you hate Sonny/Cher, I couldn't even get you on board with my amazing Allegra/Dust Mite group costume. WHAT do you want to be for Halloween?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...At home, on my couch, resting my weary bones with a sleeve of Rolos, a cup of chamomile, and all the lights turned off so those darn kids stop knocking on my door.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That sounds like the worst Halloween ever. If you're gonna be a fun-sucker shut-in, I'm gonna go without you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Aaand my work here is done.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What do you MEAN it's not scary, it's got a rotting corpse, kids going berserk and hotdog slinging clowns!!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sorry, Mortimer, I just don't think "Don't Tell Mom the Babysitter's Dead" counts as a horror movie.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: MY favorite entry in the Blair Witch catalog is DEFINITELY Book of Shadows. I didn't sleep for a WEEK.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And now I'm not gonna sleep for a week wondering how I ended up with a roommate who lacks any semblance of good taste.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK, OK, I'm hearing you, no Blair Witch, how about the subtle artistry of Saw V?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...I'm going to bed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: {calling after} Don't worry! I'll set the DVR!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I want to make a Chad Michael Murray joke--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why? What'd he ever do to you? What if he's a fan and he's flipping through the app and he sees your joke and it ruins his Waffle House breakfast?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ....you ruin everything.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have an airtight Halloween scheme.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hit me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I only offer Good 'N Plenty or Candy Corn to kids so they won't want 'em and I get to keep all the candy.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nice plan. Wait, won't that just leave you with a big bucket of awful candy?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...almost airtight.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you smiling?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I smile when I'm nervous.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you nervous?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because I knew you were going to ask me why I was smiling!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: DRUMS.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Please stop hitting my casserole dishes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Check it out, I got a used bilge pump from the thrift store.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you have a boat?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Naw, but I think it'll handle getting all the Jell-O Jigglers out of the pool.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's the last time I leave you alone during vacation.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know what always bugged me about Daredevil? He had echolocation powers or whatever but never made the noise for the echo!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What, like the way bats squeak? Kind of ruins the intimidation factor, doesn't it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're telling me if you look up to see a guy in red spandex chittering like a squirrel and leaping around the rooftops you're not going to be intimidated?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Point taken.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: This is the worst hat.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a pancake.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Clearly Drake is the Alpha and is therefore the best.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're crazy! Are you discounting Josh's soulful eyes? You could get lost in 'em!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, Monte. What do you want to be when you grow up?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hmm. Well, after much consideration, contemplation, and to reflect my love of the natural sciences I have decided to pursue being a geologist.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh. I wanna be a velociraptor!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why do you even START these conversations?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, you PROMISED you would make dinner tonight.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How could you think of food at a time like this?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Time like what? It's 7:30 PM, I did my work AND yours today, and my stomach is about to eat itself.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The Syndicate just handed Mulder over the the aliens and I'm worried sick for him!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh for pete's sake, ORDER THE 8th SEASON ALREADY... and a banana pizza.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What fall activity do you want to do this weekend? Hay Ride? Haunted Corn Mase?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HAUNTED CORN MASE?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...that was a typo, I meant corn maze-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh man, that means I'll never realize my dream of seeing a haunted 90s mumble-rapper. {a single tear traces his cheek}

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But WHY?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Because you're not responsible enough for me to trust you with a pet.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I AM responsible!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really? You don't remember selling the office tickets to "HamsterPalooza"?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...OK, I gotta go call the Wolverine Rescue Fund.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh{cough} Monte? Is that you? I don't think I can make it into work today. 'Tis the season and all.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: For the last time, you can't actually catch "Football Fever" like the TV said.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So you don't want to invest in Chug-a-Burger?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why on earth would anyone want a beef smoothie...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why on earth would they NOT?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mmm, cheese.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: "That's how it started, with 'Mmm, cheese.'"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What are you doing

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Just pre-writing the apologies to our bosses for whatever idiocy comes next.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I had a nightmare all the trees were turning different colors last night.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That doesn't seem too scary.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But just imagine me trying to fly my dream-pegasus while Joseph and the Amazing Technicolor Elm Tree blasts wave after nausea-inducing wave of 1988 neon purple at me!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Actually, any dream with you in it would indeed be my nightmare.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Fatback.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you making a breakfast order or sending a complaint about my body?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Take your pick.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, Mortimer. I don't think there is anything like Universal Truth.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sam L. Jackson is and always will be cool.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...I stand corrected.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I borrow this 600 feet of cellophane tape from the supply closet?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why did you use the word "cellophane"? Don't we just call it "scotch tape"?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ah, a common misconception. Scotch Tape is actually a brand name! Ha!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ha! That' so interestin-HEY get back here and tell me what you need that tape for!!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh man that's gonna bug me all weekend.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How come no one does armpit farts anymore?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Because we grew up and now work in a business environment that does business and not Babytown Frolics?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you have fun surgically removed from your body?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you know Heinrich Isser the Austrian bobsledder-luger?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Heini" as he was called by loved ones won five medals at the European luge championships with two golds (Men's doubles: 1952, 1954) and three silvers (Men's singles: 1953, Men's doubles: 1951, 1953).

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You just searched Wikipedia for a way to put a buttock euphemism in a Monkey Chat, didn't you...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: {snicker}

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Heads or tails?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Heads! Did I win?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Huh? Oh, I'm just taking a poll...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Which Elvis should I be for Halloween: Young, Prime, Old?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Be the one on the stamp so I can send you far, far away.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nails or Fish?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ....I am terrified to know exactly what situation would require you posing that question to me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I got a set of vintage encyclopedias!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Phat!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I hate when you try to bring back old slang.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: 23-Skidoo, Jasper!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A bunch of our staff has to go to Perth, Australia. Why is that so far away?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So the spiders can't get us...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not even kidding.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: keeping with the Australia theme, what do you call a boomerang that won't come back?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: A stick.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, you're just SO smart, aren't you {huff}

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't believe it's all coming to a close.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I know, what a crazy year, right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Year? I'm talking about Star Wars hype.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ... so the morel of the story is, don't eat mushrooms that grow in a dumpster!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh I see what you did there. Nice.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Where Have All the Cowboys Gone?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: {looks at watch} Well, it's 5:15 PM so probably sitting in traffic.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow, Paula Cole. See how easy that was to answer that question?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My boss says I'm doing just average.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's horrible!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I told her that was very "mean" ;)

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...a middling to sub-middling joke.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mediocrity is my super-power.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How'd the extreme skydiving go?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't want to talk about it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yikes! What happened to your leg?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WHAT KIND OF MORON STILL HAS A ROOFTOP ANTENNA FOR HIS TELEVISION IN 2019?!?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Man, I need to upgrade my cell phone.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pshh, your phone is perfectly fine! Why would you want to upgrade? I've used my clam shell-style flip phone for 15 years.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, yes, I shouldn't feel the pressure to pay a lot of money just to feel current and-WAIT A MINUTE. Your phone is just a clamshell with numbers painted on it in blue Sharpie.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, and I've never gone over my minutes!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I'm going for a run.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: When will you be back?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: As soon as I get to the donut shop down the street.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte! I killed an alien!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...that's my angora sweater.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, sorry about that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So no alien autopsy then?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Turkey?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What was that?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Turkey. Turkey turkey. TURKEY TURKEY TURKEY!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh no, I have my annual turkey ear-blindness. Won't be better until Thanksgiving.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Turkey.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...That was a correct translation, wasn't it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I organized your socks! I put all the left ones in the top drawer!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where did you put the right ones?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Huh, good question.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's a dang good thing I don't wear socks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ungh. Ungh. UNGH. UNNGGGGHHH. UNNNGGGGGHHH-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer! What are you doing, and why is it so loud?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just some stomach clenches. Part of my new desk-side workout routine.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, it's pretty gross.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then you definitely won't want to be here for the gastrointestinal flexes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: One more word and I microwave this tilapia and broccoli quiche for like an hour.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, here's that bag of yard waste you asked me to bring to the office.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, thanks. Here, I'll take that.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So what are you going to do with - HEY! Watch it! You're dumping it all over the floor!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I WAS going to make a big leaf pile for us to play in, but there aren't any leaves in here at all! This whole bag is grass clippings!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Great idea. Now there are grass clippings all over the place. What fun.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah. Remember this the next time you're procrastinating about raking up your leaves.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know, the holidays are starting up.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mm-hm.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We hav a LOT of work to do before Black Friday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yup.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Soooo maybe you should put that coloring book away?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wait, what? Look, when you keep babbling to me about- about- whatever it is you're talking about, it's REALLY hard for me to concentrate on coloring in Cobra Commander.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Got a great business idea for you to invest in, Monte: We rent out an old sports stadium and do mega-bumper cars!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That sounds expensive. First for the stadium, and then we'd have to buy a bunch of cars.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not if we make it BYOC!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: BYOC? Bring your own... oh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, really, BYOC&B. They'd have to bring the bumpers, too.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: hew, I just finished reading The Brothers Karamazov.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, Mort! I didn't know you read classic novels.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What? No, I just finished reading the title.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Took me two hours to get through the 'Karamazov' part.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Your breath smells like diesel. Just sayin'.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ugh, can we be done with "just sayin'" now? Can we step away from these two-word phrases that add no value to our lexicon and make us look like infantile Internet geeks at best and, at worst, complete morons?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay, good point. From now on, "just sayin'" is SO OVER.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Dangit.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I'm training for a hot dog eating contest!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, sounds like a lot of work Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not really. I just need you to get me fifty hot dogs and cook them and then get me some buns to go with them.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then I just eat them. So it's really not that much work at all.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh MAN, it's so close to Turkey Day!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you thankful for this year?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Besides turkey?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Gravy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I like to ate ate ate aypples and baynaynays.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I like eat eat eat eepples and beeneenees.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I like to ite ite ite ipples and bininis.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I like to ote ote ote opples and bononos.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I like to ute ute ute upples and bununus.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That was fun.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The word of the day is "Eggcorn."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can you please use that in a sentence?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I sat in the park and watched the squirrels gather eggcorns.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh I see what you did there.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Holy crabapples! It's BF/CM Week here at Woot!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've been DYING for this all year!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Me too! I can't wai... Hold up, you're excited? What do you think BF/CM stands for?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Big Fat Crabby Monte. This is the time where I annoy you on purpose!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How is this different from any other week?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: There are party hats.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We have SO MUCH going on this week, from Deal-O-Meter to Wootbusters to FIVE THOUSAND BAGS O CRAP! There's so much to be thankful for!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: {tskZ} Well, I'm glad you're happy after the tragic Monday night I had.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no! I'm so sorry, what happened?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I finally watched that last season of "Lost".

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...In all seriousness, you have my condolences.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't know which Holiday Party to RSVP for this Friday! Do I go to Angela's, Rei's, Steve's, Bob's? Which one are you going to?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I... I wasn't invited to any of those.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh.... sooooo-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, you can borrow the car.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey! Can you help me in the kitchen before everyone gets here?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: {sniff} What on earth are you cooking?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Turhadouken. It's like a Turducken but it shoots fireballs out its giblet hole.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're a Turschmucken

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WILL you PLEASE get out here and help me string the Xmas lights??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No time! I'm prepping for Cyber Monday deal shopping?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is that a question?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The period button is broken on my phone?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This Monkey Chat is going nowhere. PUNCHING OUT.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sit on his lap, honey! This is for the Holiday Card!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh don't be fussy, tell Santa what you want!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why not, sweetie?!?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Because that's not Santa. That's the bus driver. And he's busy. Driving the bus.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yo, Monte! I need you to do me a favor.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sigh. What is it now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I need you to write "Mortimer will be an hour late tomorrow" on a sticky note and stick it on your monitor.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, you're going to be late tomorrow?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I was late today. Just make sure the boss sees the note when he comes by. I told him I told you about it and you forgot.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh, I feel like a Swede with nothing to do.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How's that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Bjord.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I moved into a corner office.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WHAT? You barely work? How did you get a corner office?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Dang autocorrect... I moved into a coroner office.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Before you ask, yes, wall-to-wall ghosts.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've been having trouble accessing my holiday cheer, so I signed us up to help Andrew move.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's so thoughtful of you. I'm pleasantly surprised.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Say, thanks! I'll let him know you'll be there at 6am!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait a minute, aren't you helping? I thought you wanted to get into the spirit of giving and stuff?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I did, and it felt sooo great giving you this opportunity!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Cheese and crackers!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know what's one word EVERYONE loves?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: SATURDAY!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: HECK YEAH, SATURDAY!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: See?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...shouldn't there be an actual joke here?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why? I mean it's Saturday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I do my hair toss, check my nails...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, I love that song.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What song? I'm just going over my to-do list for the day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let's plant a garden!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a lot of work, Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then let's go to a garden!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But then we have to outside.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then let's just stay here.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good idea.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: These days are depressing me...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I know, the sun sets so early.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sun? Naw, I meant that I've caught up with all my Netflix shows and now have nothing to watch between seasons.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know, you might want to unplug and enjoy some nature. Henry David Thoreau once said--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh wait, there's Hulu! And Vudu! and Disney+! And poorly produced vids on YouTube! ...What were you saying?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nothing... Obviously nothing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: --OK, FINE.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Now repeat it so I know you understand.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: {Sigh} "I shall not microwave tilapia under penalty of death."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I signed us up for a yoga class!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's great! There are so many benefits to it: strength, cardio, mental health, flexibility--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow, all that from learning about curdled milk?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...you meant yogurt, didn't you...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ha! I'm a SCAMP!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Unnnngggggggggggggggg.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: More pie?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I have a surprise, Mortimer!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I love surprises!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I invited your entire family to the holidays with us!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Even Aunt Koko?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yup!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh, she talks to much with her hands full.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you have a puzzle I could put together?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Puzzle this one: why am I friends with you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you missing anything?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No... WHY?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, nothing. Nothing at all. Not a thing.... BTW, does your Rick Astley cassette collection lose any value if it's coated in peanut butter?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you think the Flintstones wore underwear?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Maybe, but they'd have a punny name.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Liike "Fruit of the Loam" or "Rock-a-Roos?"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wanna do a different kind of gift exchange this holiday season?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you thinking?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Gift Relay: You give me a gift THIS year, and I give you a gift NEXT year...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Fine.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow, I didn't think that would fly.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Look at what I got at the Woot! office white elephant gift exchange!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is that... a mermaid tail?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, yes it is.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's lovely.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thank you. If you need me, I'll be in the tub for the next 12 hours.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you taping everything to the ceiling?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I need to clean the floors.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: By why don't you just--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: CLEANING THE FLOORS, MONTE.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte I'm going to need you to be real quiet I have a pretty bad headache.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm sorry, Mortimer, I hope you feel better.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Shh

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you turning the lights out?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: SHHHH

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, this is MY office.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pardon me, sir, do you have any peanut butter?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, I know it's you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I am a butter connoisseur and would like to assess the quality of this 'peanut' variety.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Your mustache is falling off.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No it isn't.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's on the floor.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I like it there. Peanut butter please.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Merry Xmas Eve!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Merry Xmas to you, too, Mort!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I leave early?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I told you, you can take the day off today!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh... can I rescind that Merry Xmas Eve for another day?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: {yawn} Hey, what's all this shredded wrapping paper? Did you open a present last night?!?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, what was it again?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What was, what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know, the Golden Rule of Christmas! The one that says we get to open...what was it? One? Yes, one present on Christmas Eve.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you...just make that up? I’m pretty sure the golden rule states to treat others the way you want to be treated.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Exactly! So I treat myself to one present on Christmas Eve and I get to open the others the next day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, clear something up for me: A chameleon is different from a chamelein, because it blends in with the surface it's ON, not the room it's IN, right?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, only one of those things exists. There is no such thing as a chamelein.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh. Then I've got a bone to pick with a lizard salesman.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you know the rose is a type of flowering shrub that belong to the family of plants called Rosaceae?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: {sigh} Yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And the large number of petals is a result of mutation?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: {argh} Uh-huh...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I recently read that most roses are deciduous but a few, particularly from South east Asia, are evergreen or nearly so.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OK, OK! I'm sorry I got you a boring book on gardening for Christmas!!!!!!!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If you were stuck at work and a zombie apocawhatever broke out, where would we hide?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: In Accounting.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...Wait, why?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: There's safety in numbers.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Fascinating. This article says they're actually cloning pets now... Monkey cloning can't be far behind.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I wouldn't want a Mort clone.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I couldn't live with myself.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ohh, my tummy hurts. I'm calling the doctor.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Which doctor?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Naw, the regular kind.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I bought Fireworks for New Year's Eve!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's dangerous! And illegal in this state! And dangerous!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, mistyped that. I brought Fire Works for New Year's Eve! Like wood and fire starters and stuff for a cozy, roaring fire.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...Are you SURE you don't do this on purpose to me? Because my cardiologist says stress on my heart is--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy New Year, Monte!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Welp, back to work after a long holiday season.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yup... wo what are you gonna do to ramp back up into working?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: 3 words: Coffee Hot Tub.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no, and they JUST replaced the coffee carafes...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, I have this hump on my lower back, can you take a look?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, you're pointing to your butt.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HA HA GOTCHA AGAIN!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: {sob}

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Don't cry out loud.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: {sniffle}

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Just keep it inside, learn to hide your feelings.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: {Sigh} Thanks for cheering me up with my favorite song, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No prob. It's a good thing I was singing it, otherwise it'd just seem like really bad advice...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ugh, you are a filthy roommate.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WHAT? I'll have you know I just gasped so hard that almost toppled my pyramid sculpture. Have your seen it? It's made out of--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: TOENAILS, YES I AM AWARE OF IT.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here's your dumb economics book.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You didn't like it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: There was NO mention of fish WHATSOEVER.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why were you expecting it to be about fish?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hellooo? You told me it was about MACKEREL economics.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So close.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Look, it's our first week back from vacation and we really need to put our nose to the grindstone.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm ready!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good. Get all this paperwork sorted, align the budget, and get buy-in from the stakeholders.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Good thing we don't have vampires working here.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because of all the stakeholders.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: {sigh} It's gonna be a long 2020.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: --and then I cover it with cheese.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: As much as I appreciate hearing your entire 37-step Sloppy Joe recipe, I should really get back to work.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But I haven't said that you can make it a Sloppy Joseph if you class it up with Manchego!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you just staring off into space with your feet on your desk?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm in deep thought.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: About what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: When I can go home.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can you not?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not what?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Take your pick.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You want fries with that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Never ask me that question again.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Woah, did I offend you or something?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, just trying to save you some time since the answer will ALWAYS be YES.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I get six hamburgers?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I said, "CAN I GET SIX HAMBURGERS?!" Man, this is the worst drive thru.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I imagine that's because this is my bedroom. And I'm in bed. And I don't have access to hamburger sandwiches.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What I'm saying is that you are missing something of the core concept of drive-thrus here.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I want you to stop eating erasers.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Your feedback has been noted, thank you for your concern. {CRUNCH-BOING}

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: My trivia neurons are tingling!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Huh?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We're premiering the new Ken Jennings Trivia Game on the Woot! app.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Woah, the "Jeopardy!" guy?!? The GOAT?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: My whole life of reading textbooks and watching documentaries has led to this moment! {deep breath}

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: This explains so much about you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
