lines.text: I'd like to take a minute

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just sit right there

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm already sitti-- oh no...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'll tell you how I became the prince of a town called Bel Air!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Should I get my lip pierced?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is it 2004?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...are those two related?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: --and that's why you may now refer to me as "Lord Senator Finklebottom."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I leave you alone at the DMV for just ONE hour...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why is there a mountain of shipping boxes in the living room?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have a new system: I order clothes online, wear 'em once, return 'em and then use the refund to buy the NEXT outfit!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You only wear a hat and cape!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, right...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: {intense look}

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: {INTENSE LOOK INTENSIFIES}

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ohhhh, the sausage making side business I set up in your bedroom, right...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thank you for meeting with me today. Here's my card should you want to do business.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, we work at the same company.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And that's a memory card.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you see that?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And you never will.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Confusing AND frustrating in two sentences. You are in rare form today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thank you!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hi, Monte I'm sorry.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you sorry about?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I'm about to eat all these Pixie Stix so it's a preemptive sorry.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I’m working on Woot’s commercial for the Big Game. It’s supposed to show what shopping on Woot is really like. Any ideas?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Remember when you tried to buy that computer from a guy on a message board?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean the time when I showed up to meet the guy and he whacked me with a bag of frozen sausages, took my money, but left the sausages?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: (-Submitted by @mydearWootson)

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ew! Why is my shoe full of beans?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh yeah. I dumped a whole heap o’ beans in it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, if you can’t handle the answer, don’t ask the question.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: (- submitted by @bsmith1)

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I FOUND AND CAPTURED BIGFOOT!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OMG, that’s a bear!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: {eyeroll} Fine! Then I caught Barefoot…

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: (-submitted by @benjaminleebates)

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I’m at the smoothie shop. You want Banana Flavor right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why? Just because I’m a monkey I MUST ONLY LIKE BANANA!?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is that what you’re implying? With your rude stereotypes?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Unbelievable...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But yes, Banana Flavor obviously.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: When I say "Bag Of" you say "Crap! "Bag Of!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BAG OF!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: {Monte has left the chat}

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Crap.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: In the end, dad looked at me and said I was “Chimp-sane”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Was that entire story leading up to a pun?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You drive me insane

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You mean “Bananas!?”

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: (Thanks @Thundersson!)

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why did the chicken cross the road?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't know.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't know either!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you planting corn all over the office?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because soon I’ll be able to hear everything!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That’s not how it works. Those ears don’t do that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So are you saying this idea is kind of corny? Because I thought it was a-maíz-ing!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: (thx, @tee2dajay!)

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, check out this new video I found.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Don’t. I already know you’re trying to Rick Roll me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I heard the song coming from your room.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We need soundproof walls...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you know if you put Aluminum Foil in a Microwave and turn it on, it catches on fire?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Of course. That's common sense.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ah. Well I didn't....

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: By the way the Fire Marshall wants to have a word with you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And we need a new Microwave

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, where are you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I’m under here!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Under…w… wait a minute. I’m not going to say that!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But I did just make you say THAT. (thx, @tee2dajay!)

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My poodle got a hair cut today!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really, what did that cost?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A bushel and a peck and a ring around the neck.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Go wash your face in the commode again!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: (thx, @Palmettogirl56!)

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, that wasn’t very nice.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You called me a curmudgeon in front of everyone in that meeting.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, what I said was the conference room floor looked like a crumb dungeon after eating my muffin in there.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: (thx, @bsmith1!)

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I’m thinking of starting a business

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok. I’m listening…

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I’ll call it Monkey Business

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: {facepalm} Let me guess… you sell shenanigans?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That’s much better than what I was thinking! Hold on, let me write this down.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: (thx, @tee2dajay!)

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's a perfect day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: {gasp} ...and "nothin' standin' in your way?"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You were clearly starting to sing the hit single "Perfect Day" by early 2000's effervescent pop sensation Hoku from the Motion Picture Soundtrack of Legally Blonde!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: {singing} "-NOTHING STANDIN' IN YOUR WAY ON. THIS. P-E-R-F-E-C-T D-A-A-A-AY!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ....I hate today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're my best and oldest friend!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I know, sad, isn't it...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And right now I don't know why!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, can you lend me a--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Animal, vegetable, or mineral.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm trying to catalog your ridiculous requests to save time. Now:animal, vegetable, or mineral?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Um, anim--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: REQUEST DENIED.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Will you sign my petition to get two separate words for the two separate feedbacks: the opinion kind and the guitar kind?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No. Because confusing the two has never been a problem for me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, congratulations to you! What a privileged life you lead to never get harsh guitar feedback when all you want is constructive criticism.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Aw man, I was gonna show you this new song I'm learning on ukulele, but I forgot it at home. :(

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh darn darn darn.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ... but I remembered my bagpipes!!! :D

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What time is it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Fart-Thirty.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not funny.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then why did I just laugh so hard I spit coffee all over my tie?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That hardly means-- Wait, you don't own any ties... STAY OUT OF MY CLOSET!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My new 2020 resolution is not to burn any more plastic.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Had you been burning plastic before?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No. I prefer to keep my goals achievable.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Clearly.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Or, better yet, already achieved.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte? You asleep?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Not anymore. What is it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was wondering if you were asleep.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's National Do a Grouch a Favor Day!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you telling me this

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And I would choose my next words very carefully...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's Presidents Day. And in addition to our great leaders,

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We would like to also remember all those struggling actors-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: -who played either Washington, Lincoln, or a very rare Teddy Roosevelt-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: In local car dealership commercials.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here's to you, Julliard-trained actor who got me to buy an Acura because he, "Could not tell a lie... about these savings."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Stop throwing banana peels out the window!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: BUT MARIO KART!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That’s littering!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: .... where did you get that turtle and why is it painted blue?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: (thx, @thundersson!)

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: EEEeeooooUHLP!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you just poke my funny bone???

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, got yer attention, didn't it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How come that Bag O’ Crap is just sitting there next to you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I don’t know. It’s too full of fun and disappointment for me to bother with.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Seriously? Wait, it says ‘Anthony’ on it…

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah. Actually, it’s just not my Bag.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: (thx, @archetype6!)

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm going on a trip!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here! {slip} Ha ha Whoah! {SLAM} AH CHEEZITS, MY BACK, OWW!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: {sigh} You went through all that just for a joke that doesn't even really make sense.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Y'know, from down here you can really see that you need to trim your nostril hairs.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oops, I-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: DID IT AGAIN, I PLAYED WITH YOUR HEART--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure, whatever.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Stop fooling around with all those streamers!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But I wanted to show you I appreciate you on Prime Appreciation Days!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Making my cubicle look like the Rose Bowl threw up does NOT make me feel appreciated...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But then HOW will I show my appreciation for you, Monte? -- I mean if we're gonna get in the true spirit of Prime Appreciation Week here, I need to show you how important you are to me!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: If you can tell me how a two-story macaroni sculpture on the lawn of Woot! offices where I'm pinching my own butt shows your "appreciation" for me, I'll clean it all up myself. Go.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...Um ...Fine, I'll get a ladder and a fire hose that spits that "al dente" water.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why do you keep rejecting my appreciation on Appreciation Week, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Because you have no idea how to show your appreciation in a way that makes me feel like crud.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But I made you breakfast! In bed even!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, you didn't. You made instant oatmeal in a leaf blower and shot it at me... in bed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Rubber Baby Buggy Bumpers. It's a tongue twister! You try one.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort Must Mop.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hmm, that's not long enough.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort Must Mop the Mildew he Made Making his Malted Milk Mackerel last Month.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ....that's too long.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you read our literature for M.O.N.K.E.Y.?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? No, what's that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's our organization for the betterment of simian kind. It stands for Making Other Non-violent Key... uh...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Go on.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Um, kinda thought you would've stopped me by now.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Just as I thought.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why would you pass up Cancun for some gloppy, gross island for Spring Break?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's the Galapagos, and I love sea turtles.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How about I just get you a tee from Sr. Frog's that has skanky mermaids doing shots off a sea turtle's shell?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ....I don't know why, but that sounds like a decent trade-off.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If I could have one wish, it would be for a new way to enjoy fried potatoes

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What about French fries? Hash browns? Potato chips? Home fries? Tater tots? Potato pancakes? Seasoned fries? Waffle fries? Poutine? What else could possibly be left?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Unlike you, I refuse to accept any limits to what the fried potato is capable of.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whoa, look Mortimer! My secret admirer sent me flowers!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The card says, "Mortimer, pretend these are from a secret admirer. Love, Mortimer."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: He's revealed! And very attractive if I may say so myself!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Beware the ides of March, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, that's two weeks away.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just said to be aware. I didn't say "WATCH OUT THE IDES OF MARCH ARE RIGHT BEHIND YOU!" Jeez. Listen next time.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Joint compound looks like mayo.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Odd, but yes, that's true.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Joint compound REALLY looks like mayo.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: {sigh} Lunch is gonna be awful again, isn't it...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, Monte, can I borrow five bucks? There's this game in the break room I've been trying to beat and I need more quarters.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Management put a game in the break room?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, but it's REALLY hard. You only get one try each time, but I've nearly cleared the chips and stale pastries from the board.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Right. Tell you what, if you bring me back something from one the candy levels, you've got a deal.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte I'm so bored.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've never been so bored in my life.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm dyinggggggg of boredommmmmmm.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why don't you find something to do instead of just complaining all the time?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because complaining is actually turning out to be pretty entertaining for me!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, can you cover my shift tonight?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Moonlighting again?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Look, it's just a half hour.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Fine. What's the job?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Shark dentist.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I didn't get that modeling gig for my favorite local bakery.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Aw, that's too bad.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Apparently I am not a roll model.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh I hate you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I broke the sit-o-matic.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sit-o-matic.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, the chair.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Tomato, tomato.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You just said 'tomato' the same way twice.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Today is 3-11, which is also the name of my 12th Favorite 90s Band.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why would I need to know that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just know that we have always been down... down

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let's go join a gym.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you more interested in cardio or resistance training?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Which one has the peanut butter / chocolate / banana / mango protein shakes?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, it's Saturday, let's skip work early.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean skip out on the small business we run out of our house?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah! We'll let the intern take over the rest of the day.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Intern? Wait, you don't mean--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Roomba, you're in charge now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If you need me I'll be watching all three Lord of the Rings extended cut movies.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey wait, you're supposed to mow the lawn today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The intern's doing it now.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, for the last time, THE ROOMBA DOES NOT CUT GRASS.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you watering your earphones?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Earbuds.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Fine, why are you watering your earbuds?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because I want them to grow into a full head of phones!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Like, headphones? Because they're ear "buds" you see--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Explaining it doesn't make it any less awful.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is it Take Your Squid to Work Day?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ......well, it's as close as it will ever be to Take Your Squid to Work Day I suppose.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HOORAY!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, check out my new car- it's my first automatic!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, where is it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's this bean-looking thing! Apparently all I have to do is add water!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I feel like you were lied to by someone.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I hope not, I had to trade my cow to get this bean. Without Bessie OR a car, how am I supposed to get around?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, I think you've had enough sugar for the day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WHY WHY WOULD YOU SAY THAT WHY I DON'T KNOW WHAT YOU'RE TALKING ABOUT SPIDERS SPIDERS ARRRRRRG ZZZZZZzzzzzzzzzzzzzz

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: *sigh*

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, got a few minutes to serve your country?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh... sure...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Cool. Help me slice this birthday cake into 300 million slices.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: If we're going to be working at home for a while, we need some ground rules.Rule No. 1 is-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No mayo sculptures?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do I even need to have that as a rule?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So I CAN finish my mayo sculpture?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I LOVE WORKING FROM HOME!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yep.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I LOVE THAT WE CAN HAVE COFFEE WHENEVER WE WANT!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yep.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I LOVE BEING UP AT 3AM!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Please stop.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: THIS IS ALL SO NEW!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What is this?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It’s a juicer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And this?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It’s a waffle maker.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have we always had these?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: IT’S LIKE I’M A GUEST IN MY OWN HOME!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why is all this sand in the kitchen?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: First Annual Monkey-lympics! This will become the long-jump pit.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You… Forget it. I’m going to take a bath.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Let me know what you think of the water polo setup!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So, it's April Fool’s Day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes. Yes it is.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, then. Have a good day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes. You as well.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here we are in the primate's lair, as one of nature's perfect predators goes in for the kill.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Get out of the houseplants and stop pretending you're in a nature documentary.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Its savage teeth rip apart its prey with chilling precision!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: CAN I EAT MY SANDWICH IN PEACE?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It has noticed our presence!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hello coworker! TGIF, am I right?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you doing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Work-from-home banter. Did you sign Sheila's birthday card?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Who is Sheila?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The couch.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The fax machine is jammed again.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We don't have a fax machine.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then what is this?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's the toaster.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That explains the smoke.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where have you been all day?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Exploring the forgotten corners of our apartment. I just summited Mt. Laundry!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You didn't happen to DO any of it, did you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can't talk, I'm off to the Haunted Caverns of the Hall Closet!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, I have a question for you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ooh, a riddle!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where is all the pasta, and why does it smell like rubber cement?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Some riddles are best left unsolved.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Birthday!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's not my birthday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Up to 364 more tries to go...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is that tapping noise?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I'm using Morse code to talk to our downstairs neighbors.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And where are the drapes?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The guy across the street only knows semaphore.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How long are we home for?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think anoth--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: --I CAN'T TAKE IT ANYMORE I NEED FRESH AIR!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You can go outside.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: NO I MEAN FRESH POPCORN AIR AT THE MOVIE THEATER!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sorry, buddy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'M MELTING THIS BUTTER AND DRINKING IT AND YOU CAN'T STOP ME!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So, there's no zombies, or vampires, or bounty hunters?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nope.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No sword fighting, or shooting, or crashing cars?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nope.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You just hang out with cute animals?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yep.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, this seems bori--WAIT, is that an owl in a BOW TIE?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Told you it was cool.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Morning.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Morning.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't mean to pry, but why are there hundreds of Post-Its covering our bathroom detailing the full timeline of the Crimean War?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A monkey needs hobbies, Monte.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can we order two car batteries and some dry ice?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Should I even bother to ask why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm making a time machine to go back and eat that burrito again.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Next time I'm just going to say no.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sooooo, yes?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Beware! It's Friday the 13th!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's Monday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Beware! It's Monday the 9th!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No. It's still the 13th.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Beware, it's Friday the 13th!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I hate this so much.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where's all the margarine?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Actually, why are you *wearing* all the margarine?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You said while we were home we should...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...better ourselves. I said BETTER ourselves.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you painting?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, just trying to keep my mind sharp.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, then "Color" me "impressed!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Was that an art pun?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Looks like you're not in it for the "Monet!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Leave me alone.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, I'd better be "Van-Gogh-ing!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: He's POST-impressionist, you heathen.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Grocery delivery is here! We've got...4 cases of Pixie Sticks?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: They were a good deal.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And that's it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're right. I should have gotten 6 cases.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How long have we been working at home?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm not sure about the number of days, but I've showered twice.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Eww.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can we order a pizza?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's wrong with the pizza in front of you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's lonely.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: FYI, I moved my desk into the new corner office.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We don't have a corner--hey, is that my mattress in the hallway?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I was sleeping too much and couldn't get anything done.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, what's your bandwidth look like right now?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, actually I'm kinda--wait. Why are you using office lingo?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just trying to feel more productive at home.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok great. Your first action item is to deep dive into the unfinished laundry and then circle back with a status report by EOD.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whoa, whoa, whoa, not THAT productive.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is that smell?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I made my famous Condiment Casserole! Want some?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Absolutely not.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: To be honest, it's probably more like hot, salty pudding.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Still no.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BLEEP BLORB

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you doing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BLEEP BLORB

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I don't want to deal with MortBot today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BLEEP BL--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I said no!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: IF MORTBOT HAD A HEART IT WOULD BE BROKEN.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Looks nice out.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Probably should go for a walk.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We're going to keep watching TV, aren't we?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are there purple footprints everywhere?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You didn't notice the ink pad bathmat?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We're never getting our deposit back.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You want flapjacks for breakfast?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I prefer pancakes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: They're the same thing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No. Traditionally, a flapjack is tray-baked oat bar, containing oats, butter, brown sugar, and golden syrup.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok fine then, do you want pancakes?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I prefer griddle cakes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, Turkeyneck!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What did you just call me?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm bored saying Monte all the time.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So, how's it going, Turkeyneck?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I wish I had bought those noise-canceling headphones.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry, Turkeyneck.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The bilge pump isn't working.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We don't have a bilge pump.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then what is that in the basement?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean the washer and dryer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Huh?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You've never done laundry, have you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you see that memo posted in the breakroom?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What breakroom, we're at home--WHAT DID YOU DO TO MY BEDROOM?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Geez, sounds like you need a break. You should try the new breakroom!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can you walk the dog for me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We don't have a dog.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I made up an imaginary dog to occupy my time!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Let me get this straight, you want me to walk your imaginary friend?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Dog.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Dog. Sure, why not. I need some fresh air.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't forget the imaginary poop bags! He likes to poop next to the imaginary mailbox.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This isn't going to work.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It is!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No it's not.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Believe in me!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'd rather believe in physics.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Our homemade bungee jump business is never going to take off with an attitude like that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Aciu dievui jau penktadienis!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sorry?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hvala Bogu da je petak!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Het is bijna weekend!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok…

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Schönes wochenende!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Umm, you too?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Нема за що

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey I made you breakfast.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, thank you!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And there's hot coffee.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And fresh-squeezed juice.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, what did you do?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So, you know your Precious Moments figurine shelf...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: *vip* *vip* *vip* *vip* *vip*

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sigh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: *VIP* *VIP* *VIP* *VIP* *VIP* WHO SAYS CORDUROYS ARE ONLY AN AUTUMN THING?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can you please get off the treadmill? I can't hear you over your pants.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: AND THINK OF THE ENERGY WE CAN GENERATE!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: {vip}{vip}{vip}

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sigh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: {VIP}{VIP}{VIP} WHO SAYS CORDUROYS ARE ONLY AN AUTUMN THING?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can you please get off the treadmill? I can't hear you over your pants.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: AND THINK OF THE ENERGY WE CAN GENERATE!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: When we go back to work, I bet our plants are really gonna miss us.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That still doesn't explain why you sleep with the ficus.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: RANDY IS DIFFERENT.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ughhhh. Rrrrrr. HHNNNNGGG!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is it now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why do they make vitamin bottles so hard to open?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Considering all the Flintstone's Chewables in your last muffin recipe, I for one am glad.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, that's it. We've watched every single thing on Netflix. What are we gonna do now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We could talk?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think Hulu has a promotion going on.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm gonna get a snake!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm gonna get a new roommate.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Never mind!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good talk.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is that awful smell?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have dinner in the oven.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ummm, this is a burrito...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...stuffed with Mike and Ikes?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I call it a "Rainbow Roast."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Check out this funny TikTok!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you mean a Vine?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, it's a TikTok. Vine is gone.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh oh, I think I'm behind the times.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Maybe research the current trends?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good idea! Let me just open up Netscape.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, Mort?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We just want you to know...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...in these uncertain times...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WHAT ARE YOU DOING.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, nothing, just trying my "concerned voiceover" voice.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You've been playing that video game for three days straight.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just lemme get this bill through appropriations...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What game is this?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Legi-Slay-Ture IV: Rise of The Red Tape"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: At least it's accurate.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm playing in Lobbyist mode. It's almost too easy!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hmm, says here that 99% of people cannot touch their tongue to the elbow.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What? That's easy! See?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Stop it, they meant their OWN elbow.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you dragging a 10-gallon jug of water through the living room?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: For watercooler talk.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I live with an idiot.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So, how about that Tiger King, huh?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hi everyone. Monte dialing in.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BLEEP BLORB. MORTBOT HERE.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BLEEP BLORB. MORTBOT ON CAMERA!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, please. This is an important conference call—

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BLEEP BLORB! SEND PIZZA TO MORTBOT!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We’re both getting fired.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wanna play “The Floor is Lava?”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wanna play “The Dirty Dishes are Stinky?”

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That’s a two-player game.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you fold the laundry?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not yet.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you seriously playing another new video game?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But it’s relevant. It’s Folding Simulator VI.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: “Monte started the day with a cup of coffee. He sits with an exhausted sigh at the kitchen nook, staring at his roommate, Mortimer.”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you doing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I’m your external monologue!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: “Monte aimed a devastating glare at his clueless roommate.”

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: “Monte then moved to his desk to begin work, listening to his audible life narration.”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How long will this go on?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: “He reflected on his joyless existence, except for the one bright point in his life: his roommate and best friend, Mortimer.”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I DRAW THE LINE AT INNER MONOLOGUES.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We need to talk.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is it about all those boxes I just bought for my Ultimate Mort Fort?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, this was about how all of my socks got French-braided, but let’s go back to the box thing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The socks are a good story, though…

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Come on!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: NO.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just say it out loud, you might like the idea once you say it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Stairway butter luge.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And???

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nope, still hate it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: This one is called “Apex”

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: This is “Constellation”

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: This is “Radiate”

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I like this one, it’s called “Silk”

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oooooh! “Night Owl!”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OMG JUST PICK AN ALARM SOUND ALREADY

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok, here are all the Classics…

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ah, I love the smell of fresh cut grass!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I hate it. It plays heck with my hay fever.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok, uh… But the birds singing in the morning is a great way to start a day!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean that one mourning dove that depresses me?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: …who hurt you?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I’m sorry I was grumpy yesterday. I was just having a sad thought.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you want to tell me about it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I…I’ve seen all six Transformer movies.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I’m so, so sorry.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Aren’t you gonna ask about the new ball pit in our foyer?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I WILL NOT GIVE YOU THE SATISFACTION.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What’s another word for annoying?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you doing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Writing a strongly-worded email to my soon-to-be-ex-home-office-mate.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you mean me?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, this is for the fridge. I’m sick of it being empty.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: When we go back to the office I’m SERIOUSLY gonna take things more seriously.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good idea.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Starting with these SERIOUSLY cool business slacks.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Your fly’s down.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: SERIOUSLY?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What’s the crate in the living room?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you want to buy a baby wallaby?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Crap, I wasn’t prepared for an affirmative response.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I got a joke for you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hit me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why did the chef sneeze on his Cobb salad?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because he was allergic to fennelOH CRAP I FORGOT THE PART ABOUT THE FENNEL

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: If it helps, this is the most I’ve laughed at one of your jokes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why is there a goat in a clown wig on the davenport?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: On the what?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The davenport.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You mean the couch?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: HEY THIS IS NOT A TIME FOR SEMANTICS.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What cartoon character would you be if you had to choose?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Funky Phantom.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Who?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Technically, his name is Jonathan Wellington "Mudsy" Muddlemore. He even had a cat named Boo!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You’re weirder than I thought.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What have I told you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No throwing sauerkraut in the kitchen?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, the other thing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Stop trying to sing the vocal pitch that breaks glass?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, the OTHER thing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Quit leaving the windows open for birds?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: NO, THE OTHER THING…

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What’s the best way to make a hamburger?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well there are two schools of thought…

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...oh no, never mind. I just wanted you to make ME a hamburger.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you mind if I listen to some jazz?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Um, I guess.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What’s wrong?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Jazz always makes me do jazz hands.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: They’ve asked me to brainstorm a new slogan for Woot!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So far I’ve got “Woot! It rhymes with boot!”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We’re in trouble.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How’s the new slogan coming?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: “Woot! The W stands for SAVINGS!”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeahhhh, keep trying.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oooohhhhhh………

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you regretting trying to beat Joey Chestnut’s hotdog eating record?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I was always a Kobayashi man, myself.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I’ve got it!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The new slogan? Let’s hear it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: “Woot! It’s like a pill you take, but it saves you money!”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is wrong with you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you want help with the new slogan?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think I just nailed it: “Woot! Just do it.”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Pretty sure that’s taken.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not the Woot! part…

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: PLEASE let me help you with the slogan.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh. Fine.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So what’s the value prop?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are your brand pillars?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Brand pillows?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This is gonna take a while…

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So, a slogan has to be catchy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: “Woot! Catch it!”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I mean it has to stick with people.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: “Woot! We’re sticky!”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Just…stop.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: “Woot! We sell stuff!”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Needs a little more description.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: “Woot! We sell broken stuff!”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you WANT to get us fired?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: “Woot! We have deals!”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Better.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: “Woot! We have better deals!”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Better than what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Better finish this soon, I’m hungry.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OK let’s take a break from the slogans.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Good idea, I was getting tired from all the research.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You were doing research?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sure. I did a whole bunch of focus groups.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That’s impressive! What did you learn?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: People will say anything for free food.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you drop a fork in the disposal again?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, this is a CD of my college band, FunkeeMunkee.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So, is that a goat? And a train passing by?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm on bagpipes and Scary Liz is on train whistle.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Amazing you never got signed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So, this is being read by millions of people?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yep.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So, should I keep saying my Woot! password out loud?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Probably not.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK I’m changing it to Mort1234. Better?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow, you can really dance.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, YOU can really dance.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...wait, do you think referencing that obscure meme is going to be understood by anyone?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What meme? I just like the way you merengue.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OHH, FARFEGNUGEN!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What’s the matter?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I stubbed my toe.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow, your swearing is SUPER lame.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's with all the indoor greenery?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: They're saying now that people stuck at home would do well to have some plants about the place.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And you BOUGHT all this?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Eh, I just got it from the back yard.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ah yes, makes sense now. Say, do you know what poison oak looks like?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not reall—where are you going?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: To see if Woot! sells industrial tubs of calamine lotion.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I CAN'T STOP ITCHING.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really feeling yesterday's mistake with the poison oak, huh?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah. They must be sadists.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Who?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The people who write this stuff!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: MORTIMER! I told you never to break the 4th Wall! Our reality could be completely scrambled!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You mean, like, more than it already has lately?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...touché.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Since you broke the 4th Wall yesterday our reality is in flux!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Relax, there are worse things than a literal existential crisis.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean like a stampede of orange elephants charging THROUGH OUR WALL?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, yeah I guess, if that were something that could actually happen...wait, do you hear thunder?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What have you done.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Apologize RIGHT NOW for almost screwing up our reality and risking us disappearing in a puff of logic.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Look at the bright side! If we're just made-up monkeys, we can probably go hang out with OTHER made-up animals!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'M NOT GIVING UP FREE WILL TO BBQ WITH THE GEICO GECKO.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, we're still here, so I guess we're not in danger of realizing we are just fictional monkeys.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yup, no chance at all that we are imaginary characters.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hmm. Although, when you think of it, as imaginary characters we could have been anything...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, that's depressing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...superheroes, mad geniuses, quintuple-trillionaires...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: At this point, I just want a cleaner apartment.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm bored.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wanna play Shark-Robot-Vacuum? It's just like Rock-Paper-Scissors: soggy Shark shorts out Robot, Robot smashes inferior technology Vacuum, Vacuum sucks all the water off Shark!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This has nothing to do with the fact that we sold a Shark Robot Vacuum last week, does it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't question the Head Gamemaker!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, where do we keep the extra poop tickets?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: UGH, can you maybe not ask in such a gross way?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: In what Flatulatorium Cabinet dost thou house our Papier-de-Monkeybutt?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I hate you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mind if I trampolined on this here trampoline I erected in the living room?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I wish you considered me a little earlier in your trampolining process.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Like when?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Like before you ripped all the springs out of my mattress.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BOO! Did I scare you?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I guess that makes this $1,000 custom ghost costume that I put on your credit card kinda useless.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: AAHHH!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Aha! A delayed reaction!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It feels weird to say we’re in “The 20s” again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I’m gonna outsmart the stock market crash THIS time around.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well it’s not like the 2020s will play out just like the 1920s…

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So should I get my money out of hobo bindles, then?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Maybe call your broker.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I feel like a Norwegian with nothing to do.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How’s that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Bjord.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Go away now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, will you time me? I want to see how long it takes this Fruit Stripe gum to run out of flavor.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure, let me set the timer for--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Never mind.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why does it sound like a new age bookstore in here?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I’m learning to play this vertical xylophone.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Those are my wind chimes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It’s July! You know what that means!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Time for my annual Baskin-Robbins “Flavor a Day” gauntlet!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How many did you get to last year?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: 25. Cotton Candy Crackle is my Everest.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know what I REALLY like?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It’s not silence. I know that.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good news! I got sparklers for our July 4th BBQ!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No one likes sparklers.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Should I return these snakes too, then?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don’t think anyone is coming to our BBQ.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you think it was because of your invitation?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I mean, I was pretty clear. “No Food. No Drinks. No Fireworks. Just Meditation.”

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, that can’t be it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Aw, fartball. I dropped my gluten-free flax muffin.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Please don’t use that language.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You have a problem with “fartball?”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It was my nickname in kindergarten.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow, kids can be so cruel to other kids.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I was the teacher.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What’s that smell? Is that your laundry?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah I have about 3 weeks of socks to do.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This reminds me of a time in kindergarten...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here we go again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I’m going on a new diet. It’s nothing but Pixy Stix.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: If you only eat pure sugar you are going to fall into a coma.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Where the pounds will just melt away!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Awww FAR---

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Don’t say it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I wasn’t going to say “fartballs.”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: YOU JUST DID.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, you kinda MADE me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So the weeklong Woot! birthday bash starts tomorrow.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sure does!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you gonna buy?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: One of everything.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can you afford that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It’s on your card, so you tell me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It’s Woot!’s birthday!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How old is Woot! now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Dang, that’s like 51 in monkey years!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No wonder they keep talking about buying a Corvette.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So if Woot! is 16, how old are we?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We’re timeless!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well that’s a clever way to avoid that conundrum.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, the Marketing team told me to say that.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Brian wants ideas for this week’s Pointless Pushes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow, that guy never works.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This, coming from the monkey who hasn’t left the couch in 6 days.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I do my best work from my Official Comfort Zone.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Seems like the Woot! birthday is going well.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, Katie in Shipping is super busy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ooh, I like Katie in Shipping.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think she’s dating Brian.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: UGH BRIAN IS MY NEMESIS.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Woot-Off tomorrow!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How can you tell?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can sense the crap coming…

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I got a bag of poop!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, you work here. You’re not allowed to buy a Bag O’ Crap.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I mean, I found this weird bag of poop outside—

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: GET THAT OUT OF HERE WHAT IS WRONG WITH YOU

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That was a good birthday party.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I need some aspirin.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Too much punch?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think someone punched ME.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Not sure how that could have happened at a virtual party, but somehow I’m not surprised.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Look! You can see Saturn through this telescope!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That’s a Pringles can.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No wonder my eyes feel crunchy. I thought it was the power of Saturn.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We just launched Woot! Grocery.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Cool! Can I order a sardine and mayo ceviche?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Eww. I think that would be a Grossery.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, have you got anything from the Woot! Grocery site yet?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yep, what's your favorite soup?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The soupermarket.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Haha, nice one.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What are you talking about? I'm serious.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, can I tell you a secret?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Of course you can.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Cool.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So ... what is it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I don't have one right now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let's make dinner!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, it's nine in the morning.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok then let's make pasta for breakfast!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, that’s…well…actually, sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: SEE? I HAVE GOOD IDEAS.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey I'm going on sabbatical.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, is everything OK?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep, I gotta use the restroom.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don’t think that word means what you think it means.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, now I've wasted half of my sabbatical arguing with you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, why doesn't my computer work?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you tried rebooting?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep, I've been kicking it with these boots all day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Words you hate: Go!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Slacks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Vestigial.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Shunt.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Woot.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, what?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You gonna eat that salad?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know, yesterday I really did not appreciate you disparaging my dinner.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, uh, last night I did not welcome yourself denigrating my supper.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: a-HA! I KNEW you stole my thesaurus!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm so thirsty!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Get up and get something to drink.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nah, I’m too lazy. I'd rather just keep complaining about how thirsty I am.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pass me the chips.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We don't have any chips.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Perhaps I'm being too subtle. Please go buy chips and then come home and pass me the chips.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: …so anyway, the Brett Michaels impersonator was indeed allergic to lobster, so it actually WAS our fault so we were banned from all Days’ Inn properties in perpetuity, BUT I had a bunch of fake moustaches in my trunk so we all--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know, "fine" is a perfectly acceptable answer to the question "how was your weekend"…

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, can you tie my foot ropes?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean shoelaces?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: To-may-to, to-mah-to.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: …and you’ll see that each course is served with a small index card detailing the ingredients, as well as a short history of the dish!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Amazing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Thank you!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, it’s amazing that you could make eating so boring.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm working on a joke: What smells while making things grow?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't know.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Fartilizer.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I hate that... and I kinda hate you now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I SAID I WAS WORKING ON IT.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I heard a rumor we were out of butter.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I didn't spread it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I borrow these sunglasses again?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Those are binoculars... and you're looking in the wrong end.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ohhh, that's why the mailbox looked so far away.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you just making a long-winded excuse for why you didn't get the mail yesterday?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm starting a new band!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You can't play an instrument and you never learned to count.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YOU DON'T UNDERSTAND MY ART.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, have you gotten a chance to look at my trouble ticket? I put it in three days ago.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, I have. Turns out, "I ran out of tacos" is not as severe as you would think.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...I can't wait for that feedback survey.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you finish those rush orders?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's not really in my milieu.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...your job is not in your milieu?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm more like an auteur.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're more like an idiot.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Didn't you wear that cape yesterday?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...seriously?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I got LASIK but they botched it and now I have laser eyes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I have a feeling I'm about to solve the Mystery of the Missing Laser Pointers.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wanna play 20 Questions?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OK. Do you to eat it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Banana Cream Pie.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...I think we're spending too much time together.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: --and THAT's why all our faucets dispense fruit punch now!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I have to ask, is it exhausting being you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...you have no idea.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Remember when you lent me the corporate card and told me to buy essentials from that big box store?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no, please no.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I only dealt with the essentials! Tah-dah!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh thank goodness, I was getting chest pains.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: By the way, I maxed that card out on mayo but it was essential for my world-record condiment high-dive attempt.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you pack for our camping trip this weekend?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh yeah, just the essentials.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, good--Oh, no. Where are all our kitchen appliances??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh yeah, speaking of which, when do we pick up the generator?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OK, I'm setting up camp. Can you get the sleeping bags?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Haha! Right?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I thought you were kidding. You sleep in bags?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This will be a long weekend.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you clean--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: --Seriously, haven't you clued in by now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I think I'm sick.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How do you know?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I sneezed on the lawn and now it's on fire.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just don't think it's that impressive that someone could eat an entire wheel of cheese.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I guess it just depends on the size of the wheel.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But an entire whale of cheese, now that's a challenge!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Dream big, my friend.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mortimer, how are you... OH JEEZ! Are you okay? How'd you get trapped under that computer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was trying to turn my desktop into a laptop and it backfired.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Turn your desktop into a laptop?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, by plonking it in my lap. It didn't work, obviously. But the good news is I can sue the computer industry for confusing verbiage!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's your biggest pet peeve?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Talking animals.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah. Like in movies, or mascots in commercials. It's just unnatural. Really off-putting.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you use “pajamas” or “pyjamas?”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I prefer “pyjamas.”

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok, just didn’t want misspell this: I tie-dyed all your “pyjamas.”

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Where’s the rest of the cake?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I got rid of it for your health.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: …I can think of something else I’d like to get rid of for my “health”…

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: --I’m telling you, you are a nerd.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I am not!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Quick, how many socks do you have?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are we talking tube or trouser? Because one is indeed a type of “sock” hosiery, but the other is more of a stocking--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The Prosecution rests.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Who’s your favorite superhero, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, Capt. Ahab in my “Illustrated Melville” had the superpower of unwavering, monomaniacal focus I suppose--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: UGH NEVER MIND

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: TRUST FALL!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OW! How come you didn’t catch me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I had no idea what you were doing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But how can I trust you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you know I practice remote viewing?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can see things in the future! For example… an ice cream truck is but four blocks away!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Tell me, how does the music jingle that I can clearly hear factor into your remote viewing powers?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I’m going to have to ask the non-believers to leave the house… and buy me a Push-Pop while you’re out.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do we have any more doughnuts?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You ate them all.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, can I have another cookie?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You finished those last night.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How about your secret stash of candy bars?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nope, all gone.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: NOOO!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: “And Alexander wept, seeing as he had no more worlds to conquer.”

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well fiddle-de-dee, me foine bucko! What would ye do for a farthing--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No. Just, stop.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But my young man! I am but a humble liniment merchant here to share my wares! Good save ye! You see, I travel the West--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Here's a tip: If the joke setup requires a soliloquy, the punchline better be commensurate in magnitude. Otherwise, your listening audience may be wondering why they had to stop making us grilled cheeses to hear about an Old West liniment salesman..

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I-- uh- verily... I got nothin'.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hand me that tube of spray cheese, will you? And the lemon sherbet while you're at it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Whatever you're making, it's going to taste awful.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I will not have my vision tampered with.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did my crown arrive in the mail yet?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The plastic one? Yeah, here it is.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thus begins the Golden Age of Mortimer. As my first edict--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The population of this house does not recognize your sovereignty..

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And yet I say unto you that I am your king. For I enact kingly acts only a king could.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The mere act of purchasing a gold plastic crown off the internet does not give you supreme power over me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The serfs revolt! I will put down the rebellion with boiling oil, see if I don't. HA!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Was that tepid Mountain Dew you just doused me with?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, well, we were running low on boiling oil. Anyhoo: THINK'ST on thy CRIMES 'gainst the crown as you sit there in stickiness!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But I am your King!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'll give you this whole box of Twinkies if you hand over that toy crown.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The coup has succeeded! The Crown has fallen! I shall now be exiled to the Isle of Bedroom with only these rations to sustain me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Will you contribute to my charity? It's for M.O.R.T. which stands for--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sorry, I already gave to N.A.W.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: N.A.W.?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: As in, "Not Another Word."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I get two ferrets?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? No!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay, I'll just get the one then.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, have you been reading my Amazon negotiation techniques textbook again?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...Let's put a pin in that, let's circle back, I have to take a bio break, have we leveraged our assets to... uh... No?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I borrow a shoe?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure-- wait, one shoe? Um...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...nope, no that sounds too weird and I won't condone it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay, but my Lowly Worm costume is gonna be ruined.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh! I love Richard Scary! Sure you can have an--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: TOO LATE.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you have a nice three-day weekend?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WHAT?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...you forgot and called out sick, didn't you...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, so that's why my boss's voicemail was so confused.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I love salt water taffy and all, but it's just the--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Salt water part, right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Right?! It's like, what are YOU bringing to the table, salty water?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: SURPRISE!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? Where's the surprise?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: THAT'S THE SURPRISE!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can you believe this guy? What's he thinking calling me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What do you mean? What did he do to you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: He's trying to make me use my phone as some sort of talking device.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Not in MY house, brother!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm trying out catchphrases.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't like that one very mu--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "BUTTER YER PANS, SON, IT'S FLAPJACK TIME!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...I like that one better.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you know that you can hire a person to put together your IKEA furniture?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That sort of defeats the purpose of it being cheap, don't you think?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah. I guess so. Anyway ... how would you like to make an extra few bucks?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What do you mean why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What do you mean what do I mean why?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How long are we going to do this?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, try this pie I made! The secret ingredient is garbanzo beans!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That is vile. Why did you do this?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I love the word "garbanzo."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I mean, this tastes like some kind of hummus abomination.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: garbanzo.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Simply scrumptious.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know right? You can't tell my secret ingredient is in it!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...oh no, what's your secret ingredient?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, there's not really a word for it in the human tongue, but in the language of snails it means--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: GET ME WATER GET ME ALL THE WATER WE HAVE

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, why aren't you wearing yellow?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's Thursday! You've gotta wear yellow on Thursday!! See?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That is clearly a mustard stain.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Every tradition starts somewhere!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You smell like hot dogs.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I feel like I have to tip-toe around you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? I'm so sorry you feel that way! I guess I can be a bit stand-offish, perhaps brusque, but your are undoubtedly my best frie--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I mean because all my tarantulas escaped and are currently under your chair.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I replaced all the carpet with bubble wrap.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...no set-up or anything?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Look, I got a migraine so can we wrap this up?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We good here?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I gue--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Great, see you Monday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yawn.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good morning, roomie! It's a bright, beautiful day outside and--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is it still 2020?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm going back to bed...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wanna play Fury?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What childish distraction have you come up with now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We crawl around under laundry baskets while spit-balling dried peas at each other until one side surrenders.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...Okay, but I'm Brad Pitt.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Dangit!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WHEN I SAY "PAN" YOU SAKE "CAKES"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: PAN

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: CAKES!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: PAN

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: CAKES!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think our daily Breakfast Psych-up was a great idea.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And you don't do the dishes, and you alwasy lose the remote... oh, and ANOTHER thing, you never keep your room clean!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you going to just... filibuster all day?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'll give you $50 to define "filibuster."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, that was the fourth estate... of the barony of... um...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Knew it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you doing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uh, DUH. Same thing I do every day. Putting turnips in the doorway to ward off dragons. Grandma always said, "Turnips in your doorway keeps the dragons at bay."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's definitely insane.

lines.speaker: mortimer
