lines.text: Oh really? When's the last time we were eaten by dragons? Never. BOOM. Proof. You're welcome.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know, I could really go for a--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Pizza.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...how'd you--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm magic.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What smells?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is that the start of a joke or a real query?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You have different responses fore each?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, either, "A shoe with a nose," or, "My prosciutto fondue."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why do side sleepers get their own special pillows? Nobody ever made a pillow for the way I sleep

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Don't you sleep hanging upside-down by your toes? How would anyone even design a pillow for that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It would be a nice gesture. That's all I'm saying.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Boy, I could really use a garment steamer myself.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really? You never seemed like the type to worry too much about your clothes being wrinkled.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, what is that supposed to mean?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It means I've never even seen you wear pants.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: -- Never gonna get it, never gonna get it --

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: -- Never gonna get it, never gonna get it --

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: -- Never gonna get it, never gonna get it --

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: -- Never gonna get it (WHOA-WHOA-WHOA-WHOA!) --

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay, enough rehearsal. I must admit En Vogue was an inspired Halloween costume idea.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, but I'm going to be vacuuming silver sequins out of this carpet for the next 6 months.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, this is very illuminating.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, yeah. I tried glow-in-the-dark paint as sunscreen.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I see.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I thought, scientifically, that by emitting light rays, it would collide and cancel each other out.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But it was more like in that episode of Dragon Ball Z where-- Hey, why aren't you making fun of me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, you're doing just fine on your own.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, what's a funnier word: Pooky, Boink, or Herfuffle?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Isn't that our poll today? Like exactly?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...I couldn't think of a joke.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I have another chocolate truffaut?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you mean another chocolate truffle?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...I said what I said.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay, I'll just go dip a French New Wave film director in milk chocolate and get it right back to you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have to tell ya, I think you've gotten pretty out of shape while we work from home.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I certainly have not! Look, I'll do 10 jumping jacks right now!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep, this little piggle's got a wiggle. :)

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Remember that scene in Ratatouille where all the rats come pouring out of the ceiling?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you also remember how I lost my hamsters three years ago?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I wanna lose weight. I'm gonna try fasting.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, short-term or intermittent fasting is medically okay, but you really think you can go a day without weating?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Without eating?! I thought you just ate really fast before your body figures out you just mowed a whole box of Krispy Kremes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: TGIT

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's so great about Tuesday? It's not even Hump Day! Now you made me realize how far away the weekend is and I'm cranky!!! WHY DID YOU DO THIS TO ME?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry, sat on my keyboard.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I absolutely, positively MUST get organized.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sounds like you have a strong impetus there.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WHAT HAVE YOU HEARD? Oh, you said "impetus," sorry.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: GONE. GONE FOREVER. HAHAHAHA. UH OH, HERE COMES ANOTHER INNOCENT PIECE OF BLANK PAPER.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh oh. Have you been at the paper shredder all day?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey! I've got an axe to grind!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Huh? What's the problem?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, seriously, I just bought an axe and it could use a good grinding.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, real quick question. Hypothetically, how many eggs is a dangerous amount of eggs to eat?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Depends on if they are cooked or not.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay, let's say they were uncooked, hypothetically.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Let's hop in my car and finish this little talk on the way to the hospital, shall we?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: W-w-would you l-l-like some c-c-coffee?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Dear God! Why are you twitching? And why are your eyes the size of dinner plates??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: T-t-there was a s-s-sale on es-s-spresso beans at the superm-m-market.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Perhaps you have had enough java for the day? Maybe week?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I t-t-think I can see time.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pick a card.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Two of clubs?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I hate you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Funny Words. Go.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Balogna.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Curmudgeon

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Weasel.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Chiffarobe.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay! See ya tomorrow.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why is the world so crazy, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't know, Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: *sigh* Me either.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But I made you some gumdrop pancakes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's so crazy it just might work.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can you look at this weird skin thing?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?! No! That's gross.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Aw come on, I'd do it for you!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay, fine. Let me see... How long has this been here?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: About three weeks, Oh no, Is it bad? Is it some sort of mutant growth??

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, it's a Fruit Loop, and we really need to talk about your personal hygiene.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Monte sat unaware of the impending doom that was about to befall him."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Slowly, in the shadows, the Other moved like oiled cables, quietly rearing up directly behind him."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Spiked teeth leaking venom. Ridges rise up along its hackles. Until at once, like a scream shattering the air, the Other POUNCED!"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You didn't yell.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Monte would be a lot more surprised if he wasn't able to hear the narration.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I got an owie.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean you hurt yourself?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can you put a Band-Aid on it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, okay sure. There you go.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Will you kiss it an--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do I have to bust out the "Understanding Roommate Relationships" seminar again?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I bought way more stuff online than I needed to.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I know what you mean, I think we have an above-ground pool arriving Monday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Cool. We can stick it right next to this 9-foot cardboard cutout of Harry Styles I just bought.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "If there's a bustle in your hedgerow, don't be alarmed now, It's just a spring clean for the May Queen--"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I hate to interrupt your one-monkey Led Zeppelin recital, but do you think this is going to go much longer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I still have to do my "Tribute to the B-sides" suite, but that shouldn't take more than 45 minutes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mm-hm. In that case I am going to join my legs in being fast asleep.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay, but you're gonna miss this wicked harmonic I hit in "Black Dog" with two kazoos up my nose...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can we order out again?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't know, we've been doing it a lot lately and our budget is tight.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...I'll let you pick the pizza toppings...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oo! Caviar and mascarpone?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know what's ironic: that the only way to get a bat out of your house is by using a bat.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean, a baseball bat? That doesn't seem like an effective way of getting a bat out of your house at all.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But let's pretend it is. Did I at least use "ironic" right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Will you come to our Mongolian Throat Singing Choir's tribute to Layne Staley?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What about "Colors of John Williams Through the Lense of Kazoo?"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hard pass.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then you have to come to my Knuckle Crack-off Semifinals!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Gross. And no.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think I'm in love.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wonderful! How do you know?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have a deep empty ache that is nagging me at all times, a void that needs to be filled.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you sure you're not just hungry?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh yup, that's it. Sorry, I get those two mixed up.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Help me Monte, I don't know what to dress up as for Halloween.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I thought you were going as someone with short term memory loss.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh yeah!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What do you think of my new shoes?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think they'd probably fit better on your feet than over your ears.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I got a food truck!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What kind of food will you make?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Make? No, I just drive around and pick up food.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I love busting our my corduroys in the Fall!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Vip! Vip! Vip!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can you at least just let the pants talk for themselves?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I love busting our my corduroys in the Fall!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Vip! Vip! Vip!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can you at least just let the pants talk for themselves?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I'm moving out.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WHAT?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry, HEADING out. I'm heading out.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And I'm taking all my stuff with me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What is up with beets anyway?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How do you mean?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I mean they taste like dirt. Why would anyone eat them voluntarily?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What would you suggest instead?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Cotton candy.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: EWWWW! Why did you show me that?!? There's nothing "heartwarming" about that picture!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You misheard me. I said "heart-wormy."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ouch, I stubbed my toe.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, being an adult sucks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm so tired.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh oh, do you think you're getting sick?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I hope not! But I've been using all of your dishes just to be safe.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Great.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, my new TouchPad is here! Awesome!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, but check my new tablet out. Never needs charging, holds hundreds of documents, super-intuitive touch-sensitive navigation, and I can draw or write directly on the surface with a simple, cheap stylus available at almost any store.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Isn't that just a pad of lined paper?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It doesn't have Wi-Fi, but the Internet is pretty stupid anyway.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you know that narwhals are the unicorns of the sea?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I know that narwhals are real and unicorns are not.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So then I guess you could say that narwhals are the real narwhals of the sea.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You could.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Everything is up in the air right now.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I know, it all feels so unsettled.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I mean I've been practicing juggling and everything is literally up in--LOOK OUT!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are those chainsaws???

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't worry, I'm taking YouTube courses and they don't let just ANYBODY make those...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I feel like I'm forgetting something.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's pretty much my go-to mental state.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just look at it all, Monte. Isn't it beautiful?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, the company really outdid itself on the Early Thanksgiving lunch this... Mortimer, are you crying?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's just so... so... so free!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, have you signed up for SocialVoid yet? It's the social networking site I'm starting for people who hate social networking.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Then no, I won't be joining it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HaHA! Got you! The only way to join SocialVoid is NOT to join!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I guess wasting your own time wasn't enough. You had to waste a few seconds of mine, too.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wasting my time? SocialVoid is up to 6,842,784,809 members!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you think dogs who live underwater get mad at the audio industry for stealing the word "subwoofer"?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you ever listen to the questions you ask and feel ashamed of yourself?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I asked you first.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you hear what happened with the legal team?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, they need to review all the jokes we're doing now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's crazy!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I know! What a bunch of [AWESOME COOL LEGENDS].

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So, you've heard the phrase "Too Much Sugar Is Bad for You" right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hmmff-Mmmff

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, let me upgrade that for you: "Eating a Bag of Powdered Sugar Is Really Quite Terrible for You Especially When You Chase It with Two Quarts of Kool-Aid.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't feel my brain right now....

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did I tell you that I'm learning to play the piano?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's cool!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah! I'm just having trouble figuring out how the black pieces take the white pieces.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't think that's how you-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And do I roll dice? Is it turn-based? There really should be a handbook that new players can consult.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can we get a tree this year?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Only if you're good!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...your puritanical arboreal morality is suffocating.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That far down the Naughty List, huh?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm down somewhere around "Telemarketers" and "People Who Hog the Overhead Storage Bin"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I miss our buddies at the office.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I do as well, we had a lot of chums, you and I.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm... Yeah, I'm sorry, you worded that in like, the weirdest way humanly possible and it plumb threw me off my joke.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I disagree, I don't believe I speak too formally.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let's see, do you reply to normal questions with a single "indeed"?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Indeed!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Indeed?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...Oh, indeed. Sigh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey! This year let's not do a turkey, let's do a stuffed Cornish game hen!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, okay!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, but when I say "saffron stuffing" I mean queso. And when I say "Cornish game hen" I mean a double cheeseburger.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: There he is.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: --so anyway I said to him, "Look, if I could get away with dressing like that I totally would and that guy's in Foreigner so he DEFINITELY can" ...wait, is that recording?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh crap, did we start the Monkey Chat??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ahem. So, Mortimer--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Psst. YOU'RE Mortimer!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, let's just bag it and pick it back up in the morning.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sorry, folks. We have a few tech issues to iron out, we'll see you tomorrow!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...you have to stop it recording.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, for the love of--{CLICK}

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: 2020 is almost over.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, and I'm glad--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ***AIRHORN*** GOT MY 2021 AIRHORN READY.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WHAT?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Whew, what a week. I'm really gonna need to recharge my batteries this weekend.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OMG you run on batteries??!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's just a figure of sp--Ow! Get off me!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WHAT HAVE YOU DONE WITH MY FRIEND YOU ROBOT JERK?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Another Woot-off coming up at work…

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Perfect, can’t wait to help out all the customers find the deal of their dreams.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, as long as that dream is disappointment and complaints on the forums.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: (thx @zachrusswoot!)

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mort, are the forum users still writing our dialogue?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Am I unusually clever and pithy?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because I didn’t get a BOC yesterday, shame on you, Woot!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Aha. Yes they are. (thx @archetype6!)

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What’s that on your shoulder?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It’s a chip.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I thought you were on a diet?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What does a diet have to do with playing cards? (thx @drcsci!)

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Check out my new hammock!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You filled your bed with ham.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If there was a movie made about my life, who would play me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh. Huh. I dunno. Maybe Bubbles the Chimp ... or Steve Buscemi?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was thinking more like Meryl Streep BUT WHATEVER.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've been playing Minesweeper for six years.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really? I played that as a little kid.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I mean I've been playiong this game of Minesweeper for six years.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, that tracks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How much money would you give me to eat this whole turkey in under 30 seconds?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Zero. I would give you zero dollars to do that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK, how much would you give me to NOT eat this turkey in under 30 seconds?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hmm. Well, I guess I'd have to say ... also zero dollars.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't get the whole "no shirt, no shoes, no service" thing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't know for sure, but I think maybe it's a health code issue.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you SEEN me after work? I'm pretty sure it'd be more of a health hazard if I leave my clothes on.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, I'm brewing fresh bubble tea. You want some?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um, not if it's just tea that you've blown bubbles into with a straw.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So, that's a no then.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm thinking about getting a dog.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's exciting! What breeds are you thinking of?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Maybe a malamute or mastiff.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, those dogs would be five times your size!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well yeah, how else could I ride it to work?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I keep thinking it's only Monday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It *is* only Monday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You, too huh?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Gah, that drive to work was - wait hold on, I'm a monkey.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, it's weird. I don't even know how we landed these jobs, to be honest.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte! Get over here right now and help me analyze how well I fulfilled my 2011 New Year's resolutions! Now, I say!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, you could have just asked me nicely, you know.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But that would contradict #4: "Be more assertive."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why won't you learn my TikTok dance?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I object to the idea that monkeys our age are on an app meant for kids... and also the name.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's wrong with The Stank Stomp?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, Monte, Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is it?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Trying out a spell. I say your name three times and you become a tree.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you a tree now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Guess which hand has a delicious cookie in it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That one.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nope.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok, that one.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wrong! It was in my mouth hand. Now it's in my stomach hand

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That hand soap you have in your bathroom smells amazing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh thanks. I made it myself.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really? What ingredients did you use? It smells fresh and bright, like lemon or basil--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pizza. I used pizza.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Guess what happened over the weekend!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Don't make me do that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here's a hint: Turns out I can't actually eat a pound of butter in 20 seconds.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Fantast--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Also you're gonna need a new laptop.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What would you do if you found a bunch of money in an envelope on the street?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'd take it immediately to the police station and turn it in.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK. Same question, but with used chewing gum instead of money.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's that smell?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm baking a lasagna.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hmmm. Interesting. That's not what my recipe for lasagna smells like. What's your secret?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I take it out of the oven before it burns to a charred mass of cheese and sadness.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh... I'll have to try that next time.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Brrr, it's colder than my mother on my birthday!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Haha! You're funny.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What d'you mean "funny"? Am I funny to y--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I swear to God, if you start Pesci'ing again I will throw out your presents.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Awww, shucks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's yer least favorite Xmas carol?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Deck the Halls.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm allergic to holly. And parties.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You sad, sad monkey.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think I saw Bigfoot!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WHERE?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, sorry it was just the dust bunnies migrating from YOUR half of the apartment.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know that filing a false Bigfoot sighting is punishable by... well, it's just rude is what it is.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...Okay, I hear it now. This joke sucks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I TOLD you that in the Writers' Room THREE days ago, dude!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You want another crack at writing one of these jokes?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, yeah. Um. DId you scrub the--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Also?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's a Best Practice to keep them under five lines.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh okay, how many did... YOU JERK.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Lemme save you time: if the next verb in that sentence is pour, spill, dunk, immolate or defenestrate, I'm probably your monkey.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you going to give me a present?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you going to give me a reason to?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...fair point.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I'm off to the mall to see Santa.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Aren't you a little old for that, Mortimer? I mean, sitting on Santa's lap and asking for presents is what children do.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I'm not going for that. I'm going to ask him why he didn't give me all that stuff I wanted when I was a kid. And I'm not settling for anything less than an itemized list of the exact naughty transgressions that impeded my ability to get what I desired.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good to see you're handling this like an adult.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Would you call this a dill or gherkin pickle.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Let me taste.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mmm. Most definitely dill, but it's subtle difference, but I think it's more of an Overnight Dill rather than a Kosher Dill.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Overnight Dill, huh?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Now why would someonme leave a fancy pickle like that in the shower at my gym?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OH MY GOD.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I missed you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, Mortimer. That's very touching, I'm glad we can still appreciate each--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, "missed" ?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WHATEVER IT IS DON'T THROW IT AGAIN.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's here! It's here! My waterproof Action Cam!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Please, Mortimer, before you spend any money, let me try just one more time to convince you that your idea just isn't going to-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: NOPE! Not listening! Nothing you can say can stop Project Margarita's-Eye View!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But see, once the blender gets going, the camera's just gonna get chewed up by the-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Aw, you're just jealous you didn't think of it first.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How big is too big when it comes to rims for my Escalade? Or is there even such a thing as "too big"?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You don't have an Escalade, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know, I don't shoot you down when you talk about things you don't have, like friends.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Boy, I could really use a garment steamer myself.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really? You never seemed like the type to worry too much about your clothes being wrinkled.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, what is that supposed to mean?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It means I've never even seen you wear pants.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why do you keep looking from the floor to the ceiling really quick?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Gotta be sure there are no banana peels or anvils around.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, how many times do I have to tell you: they're just cartoons.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BUT WHAT IF THAT'S WHAT THEY WANT ME TO THINK?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm going to spatchcock the turkey in front of everyone this year,

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No response to that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nothing I could possibly add would be as funny as that one sentence.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm gonna start taking tennis lessons!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh. ok. Do you even know anything about tennis?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uh, YEAH. I know all about it! I know about the strings and the keys, and I know about the notes and the pedals, and I know - oh wait....

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yep.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...I got tennis and piano mixed up again.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh huh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I gotta call John McEnroe.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thanks for being my friend, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Thanks for being my friend, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OW!! WHAT WAS THAT FOR?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's Boxing Day! You see it's when you--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: STOP THE JOKE AND BACK AWAY SLOWLY.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you playing that new video game you asked for?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What do you have to do?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I sit in a small room with every snack food imaginable and try to keep my sanity.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good Lord, what's it called?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: 2020: The Foodening

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ANOTHER HORN OF COFFEE, BARKEEP!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Stop throwing coffee mugs!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's my new business venture that melds viking history and coffeehouse culture!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's called The Buzzed Berzerker.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I can't believe I signed a two year lease.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Flarb!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's gonna be my catchphrase of 2021. For example: "Uh-oh, I Flarbing did it again!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Let me try. Ahem: "Mortimer, you are a Flarb-headed, weak-Flarbed, son-of-a-Flarb with a Flarbing Flarb for a Flarb." Hmm, I like it!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: There is so much hate in you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Happy New Year, Mortimer! It's been a memorable one!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It sure has, uh... I want to say, Brenda?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh, my head. It must have been all those shots of {BANANA JUICE} last night.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wait, what the heck just happened?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's the new 2021 language filters Corporate installed over the break.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...Are you {TRUCK}ing with me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is all that racket??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm putting together my new exercise machine. I'm hitting those resolutions hard and early this year.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's an ice cream mixer....

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yup! Those dispenser handles are really hard to pull.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you make any resolutions this year?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: To find a new roommate.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...ouch. Man, there wasn't even a setup to that.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well THAT'S what you get for adding a Whoopie cushion nozzle to my air mattress!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Heh. That sure was a long fart.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: .Mortimer, I feel like you weren't raised with discipline, so I learned some child psychology and will be treating you like a kid.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: For Example: If you clean your room by tonight, I'll give you these Sour Patch Kids.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And if I don't?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: They go down the disposal along with a treasured plush toy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whu--which one?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You won't know which until it's already happening.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Who'd you learn parenting from, Stalin?!?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: 2021 is gonna be better, right?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yup, you know why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Because we'll do our best to MAKE it better.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: and THAT is why you are my best friend.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you make any New Year resolutions?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, I did know that. It's "panino" if it's singular, right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, you're supposed to say, 'I had pani-NO idea!'

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We can't do these bits if you're not going to give me my part beforehand, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I AM SO THIRSTY

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you want a glass of water?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Eww, I'm not THAT thirsty.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Want a bite of PB&J?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure, I'm hungry.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OH GOOD LORD WHAT IS THAT HORRID THING

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pff, didn't your mom ever make you a Prune, Bean & Jackfruit sandwich??

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: NO.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I call you Chuck?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm working on an insulting rhyme.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've got to say, the whole thing with the eclipse was pretty overrated.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really? I thought it was amazing. It was a once-in-a-lifetime event!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It was more of an oh-no-my-eyes-are-burning event for me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Lunch time, buddy! What did ya bring?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Salad.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Salad and what?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Just salad.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That doesn't make sense. Salad is what you eat to distract you while you're waiting for the real food to show up.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wanna bite?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OW!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you seen my purple banana suspenders?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I threw those out. You should thank me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not going to thank you for throwing out my property!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're right, it was more of a favor to all the people that have to look at you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Tonight for dinner we're having--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: SPOILERS!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What stinks?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oo, a riddle! Um, old cheese? Ten sneakers? The last season of Lost?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: While you were guessing I solved the mystery.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Was it Lost?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It was your laundry...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, Saturdays are my FAVORITE!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, get your shoes on, we're shopping for slacks today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...Man, Sundays are my FAVORITE!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Howdy, partner!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no, are we playing Westworld again? I don't think I have the emotional fortitude right now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Naw, Toy Story 3.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OMG THAT'S WORSE.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hi, Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Fine! Great! Never better! Top of the world! WOOOOO!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, now I know where that 5lb bag of sugar went...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: --gonna save you the trouble. If your question involves "break", "spill", or "destroy", I'm your monkey.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Duck, Duck, Duck--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Don't do it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Duck, Duck, Duck--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: There's no one else here and--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: GOOSE! HAHAHAH!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OW! GET BACK HERE RIGHT NOW!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You thought we forgot to fill out the chat didn't you? WRONG!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you accomplish all your 2020 Resolutions?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Absolutely.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really? I'm just happy I made it through...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That was my resolution: JUST GET THROUGH 2020.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good plan.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's the beauty of low expectations!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Saturday, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sigh. What is it now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm giving you the day off from my hijinx.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ....that is the best gift of all time.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Who's your favorite composer?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Shostakovich!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WATCH YOUR LANGUAGE. Kids read this thing, man!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Monday, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you drink all the coffee?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Does a bear--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: --it's 8am!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What can I say, I'm an overachiever.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Shut your trap!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What? How DARFE you speak to me like that!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, Mortimer! Shut your hamster trap! Professor Fuzzkins is back!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hooray!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Every night in my dreams...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Stop.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I see you, I feel you...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: If you sing one more word from Titanic, I'm never talking to you again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...Let it go, let it go

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you seen my lederhosen?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...why do you need your traditional Bavarian short-shorts?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh! I am practicing with my yodeling octet after work today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Please don't tell me you're practicing h--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: --And we're practicing here!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you wearing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I found it in the back of the closet.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is that cat hair?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, that explains all the itching...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...and the rash.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Actually, that's from something else.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I wrote you a friendship haiku.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's...well kind of moving. Can I hear it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YES! <ahem>...I ate your lunch bro. It was only OK though. I hope you don't mind.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WHAT IS THAT RACKET?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OH, IT'S HEAVY METAL MORNINGS. IT'S MY NEW ROUTINE! DO YOU LIKE IT?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: IT'S FILLING ME WITH RAGE!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: GREAT! IT'S WORKING! COFFEE?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, the music you are playing this morning is much more pleasant than yesterday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know you hated Heavy Metal Monkey Mornings so this is Minuet Monkey Mornings.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How wonderful! Is there coffee?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I fell asleep making it during the second verse.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you believe in love, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you holding that boombox and looking up at somebody's balcony?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Quick, put on this big nose and feed me romantic lines!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Umm...are you trying to create some kind of Cyrano De Cusack?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good morning, Mortimer, how did you slee--DEAR GOD WHAT'S THAT DEMON ON YOUR SHOULDER??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's Hank, my naked mole rat! On account of it being Naked Mole Rat Day which is something I made up!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And how does it involve a sagging pink plop of skin with teeth??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Shh, he can hear you! ...I think. Well, if he sees his shadow, we have six more weeks of frozen pizza.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And if he doesn't?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I dunno, what's the return policy at Gino's Pet Depot?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do we have any black markers?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: They're in the-- Why are you making giant signs?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: To protest Duck Tape! Think of all the cute baby ducks!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not what duct-- you know what, sure. Let's go with that.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, what are you still doing here?! I TOLD you my date would be here for dinner tonight!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...oh, your were for serious? I thought you were having a fever hallucination or something.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, I wasn't and you need to go.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But I'm not done with my Howie Long butter sculpture!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'll buy you 40 more pounds of it and you can make him a John Madden friend.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Deal!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So, how'd your date go?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That good?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You told her about your toe thing, didn't you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: YES, IF YOU MUST KNOW.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, real sorry your date didn't go too well.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's okay. It never would have worked. I wasn't... entirely honest on my profile.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You didn't tell her you were a monkey schilling for a website, did you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nnnnope.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's Monday morning. Did you remember--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Crap.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You didn't even know what I was gonna say, did you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Does it matter? This is me we're talking about.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...no, I suppose it doesn't.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm starting a band!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you think our neighbors would appreciate that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know, you'd look great in lead-singer Spandex.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...Okay, but I get a harpsichord solo on every third track.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you wearing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I found it in the back of the closet.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is that cat hair?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, that explains all the itching...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...and the rash.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Actually, that's from something else.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you doing on my computer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Buying and selling, y'know, like you do.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? No! Why are you looking at stocks?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not stocks, STONKS! I'm reading reddit.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ooh! Any update to r/monkeyswhoaretoogreatatloving?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: --and THEN, I set my hula hoop on fire while i juggle three chainsaws and one Fabergé egg.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I really think you're putting too much thought into this company talent show.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Cheese, man. Cheese exists.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What... why do I understand that right now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's SNOWING!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Outside?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ... I realize you're asking me, so that's a very valid question.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You still haven't answered my very valid question!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That was crazy, how much snow we got over the weekend!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's crazy is that you threw out my Flexible Flyer so I couldn't sled...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: THAT WAS IN 1995!!!! Are you ever going to let me live that down?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let me ask you something. Do I have wind in my hair, a pair of snow gimlet eyes, and a childlike smile literally forzen on my face?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: THEN NO.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You want a kale smoothie?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You want a punch in the mouth?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: These rolling blackouts are a real problem.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep, dinner prep can be so messed up. Want frozen fish for dinner?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We had fish in the freezer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nope…aquarium froze during the last blackout.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: (thx @braines1!)

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I have a dime for the wishing well?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean the crusty plastic fountain outside Auntie Annie's?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't editorialize, just cough up the ten cents, buddy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I had this dream last night.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I’m going to regret this…what was your dream?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was sleepwalking & found an ice skating rink in the yard.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you put water in the kiddie pool?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ummm, told you I was sleepwalking.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: (thx @braines1!)

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Merfle, Merfle Munch?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ....can you please swallow and try that again?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ah, that's better. I was asking if you wanted any of this calamari ceviche?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, raw squid isn't really my thing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: .....raw whatnow?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know, many physicists think there's a possibility that we're all just living in a computer simulation?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What like we're controlled by some unseen, massive technological network? Pfff, not a chance.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uh-huh. You working today?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No! The WiFi is down in our apartment so I can't do ANYTHING and... oh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Greetings, Professor Falken.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...Really? You're going to ruin this joke with an obscure reference to "War Games" at the last line?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I do as I am programed to do.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't take these FREEZING temperatures anymore!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I know! Last night my ankle froze to the windowsill!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's nothing, my tongue froze to the bumper of a Buick Riviera.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, how did your tongue freeze to the bumper of a Buick Riviera?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Eh, I wondered what'd taste like I guess.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...Didn't we have the same conversation last winter?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Naw, that was a Buick Regal. Totally different flavor.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Bite of my Butterfinger?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I'm more of a classical 5th Avenue bar kind of monkey. Butterfinger lacks the nuanced flakiness that is really the hallmark of a peanut butter confection.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...and you wonder why no one wants to sit with you at lunch.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: GAH! What? Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hammer Time.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have to tell you something about the antique pocket knife you leant me yesterday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is the thing you have to tell me that you have it right there in your pocket, unscathed and ready to return to its rightful owner?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, my poor, naive friend...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can you help me put together this Ikea piece?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure. What is it, a desk?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't know. I lost the box and instructions and the hex key. And I think one of the screwy thingies.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...this is going to be a long night.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Aw, you're the best. Hugs!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: If you needed it, I'd give you a kidney.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Aw, no thanks.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ......."no thanks"?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I had one in a steak and kidney pie once and it was rubbery and gros--OMG YOU MEANT A REAL KIDNEY! Monte, that means so muc--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: THE MOMENT''S GONE.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you eat my last Toaster Strudel?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I WILL RAIN DOWN UPON YOU GREAT PAIN THROUGH THE FURY OF MY BREAKFAST VENGEANCE--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Buddy. Remember how we talked about your disproportionately strong Pastry Rage?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm starting a jug band. Wanna be in it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Who's in your line-up?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Um, well, so far it's just me and the jug.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well it's a start--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Although the jug is still 57% full of apple juice.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uhh. I have a tummy ache.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What did you eat today?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just a Toaster Strudel, three bananas, an animal cracker (camel), a pound cake, a T-bone steak (medium rare), a good long pull at the moonshine jug, snapped into a Slim Jim, oh and five smelly purple pencil erasers.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Whuh-- Buddy, let's just agree to START with the non-food items next time, okay?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm sad I didn't take more meaningful photos over the years, to remember the good times.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I mean, I have 780 pictures of lunches on my phone and not even ONE picture of, like, that that time I accidentally got you detained in Bogota...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...Y'know what? I'm fine letting some things fade from memory.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I wonder if Patrick Dempsey blew his nose today?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WHAT IS WRONG WITH YOUR BRAIN?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm learning to read auras.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What color is mine?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...is "pasty" a color?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What Ho! Fair Tidings and Well Met, Squire!“

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: PLEASE NO REN FAIR LINGO. Wake me when it's Oktoberfest.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whyeth dost thou besmirch the name of the grand fest that is a Renaissance Faire?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: First off, "whyeth" isn't a thing. Secondly, it's because I don't want to get trichinosis from a half-mummified, sun-warmed turkey leg.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, that was like ONE time...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Exactly what impact on the world would I need to make to earn the title: MORTIMER THE TERRIBLE?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How about letting them smell your sock collection?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're not wrong.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, National Buy A Bro A Sandwich is coming up.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not a real holiday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ha! You got me! But seriously, buy a bro a sandwich?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I got you a new coffee mug.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? Oh, this is great! This is so out of character for you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Would you say my actions are more surprising or more confusing?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is this one of those online psych tests?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm going to go with "more confusing."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Where are my orange cotton quarter-crew socks?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Top drawer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How about my purple wool thermal support socks?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um, middle drawer. My I ask what exactly is going on?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm showing my sock collection at the TriState Hosery Expo in a few days! Are you excited for me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure. Well, about as much as anyone can get excited about their roommate's socks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Right?? It's a wild ride!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, I have to say that broth you've been simmering all day tastes amazing! It has a taste I can't quite decipher; pungent, yet familiar.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Um, yeah, so you know how I'm preaparing my vintage sock collection to exhibit at the TriState Hosery Expo?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes? So?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And remember last night when I remarked on how much I needed a gentle way to dissolve the soil from between the fibers of all my German knee-high--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: STOP TALKING. STOP TALKING RIGHT NOW.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My sock collection won third prize at the Hosery Expo today!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How weirdly wonderful for you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The German adjudicator awarded me the Grüne Innensohle for "Excellence in Darning!", Executive Mid-calf Category - Silk through Rayon Division.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Every dumb word you say somehow knocks one smart word out the other side of my brain.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OUCH! What did I just step on?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's a caltrop.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay, I'll bite. Why is there a battlefield implement meant to slow down cavalry in our kitchen?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You never know when the Hun horde might attack our supply chains.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's it, no more late-night History Channel for you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you ready to watch the Lord of the Rings Extended Edition?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I have to go to the kitchen. Move over.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You shall not pass!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But I was going to make some of my famous parmesan popcorn.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...Fly, you fool!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm hungry, how many pears do we have left?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: All of them!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...I hate you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Grizzle-spizzle-greasy-HE!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why did you just throw glitter in my face.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm trying some magic spells!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Was that one meant to moderatley annoy me?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Shoot, no. It was supposed to cure those AWFUL split-ends.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, remember that bar crawl in Reno?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, and--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, it was great especially after I got you in the pineapple costume and wouldn't--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: --AND I'd like it to remain unremembered, thank you very much!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You have to stop falling asleep in front of the TV.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Because there are Mortimer-shaped indents in the couch.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know, the butt-print is especially good at holding my popcorn bowl.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think I'm gonna trake up Jai alai.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: YOU are going to take on the worlds fastest spot...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I'm bored.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know, Churchill used to stave of boredom and melancholia by laying brick in his back yard. He used to spend WEEKS making brick walls and that can be correlated to his foreing polic--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thank you, I am no longer bored.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, now you've made me strraight up sleepy. Nap time!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't go near the copy machine for a little bit.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wh-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let's just say Operation Pizza Clone needs more time in Research and Development.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I'm not feeling so good.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, well I just watched you eat 18 hotdogs.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know, I couldn't get to 20 like I wrote on my vision board last night and it's killing me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, let's go to the park.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Great! I love the park.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh did I say the park? I meant the haunted cave at Death Cove.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not a real place and you know it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I adopted a pack of dogs!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wha-!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, by "dogs" I mean hotdogs and by "adopted" I mean purchased at the grocery store.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can I have one?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why can't we get a real dog?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Remember the little experiment we ran to see if you're responsible enough to own a dog?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Kinda...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, well there's been a stuffed animal waiting by the door to go out for the last six months.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Maybe he's just very tired.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I've never SEEN such wanton toxicity, such an absolute disregard for human safety.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, my chocolate lasagna isn't that bad.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It seems Old Man Winter has finally loosened his arthritic grip on our land, allowing the delicate Spring to reach her porcelain hands towards our singular star...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WOW, you make words boring.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer? Where are you? Why is all the bedding missing? And why is there this big X on the floor? NO NO NOOOO!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: PILLOW FIGHT DIVE BOMB!!!!!!!! .....ouch.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good thing I have our orthopedist on speed-dial.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do we have milk?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do we have cereal?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do we have a bowl--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WOULD YOU JUST GET UP AND LOOK YOURSELF!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy April Fool's! I really liked your Suez Canal prank.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Thanks. And I thought your shrimp in the cereal prank was GENIUS.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I feel like we really outdid ourselves this year.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's your turn to cook tonight.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you in the mood for BBQ?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I am!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Cool, will you order some?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: LOOK at the DATE!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, and?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's cool!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um, I guess.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You don't enjoy anything, do you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Where are all my pants?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: In the washer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What am I supposed to wear today?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You don't wear pants.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: .....oh yeah.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, WHY do you own so many pants??

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I need to transfer some funds from savings to checking.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Transfer what from what to what now?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Whuh-- don't you have a bank account?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Does my vintage Cathy piggy bank from 1983 count?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'll take a T-bone steak and some chocolate pudding.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We've been over this. I'm your roommate, not your waiter.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, your Yelp profile is gonna take a hit now.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Everything you've done at work this week was late.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you ever consider that I'm working in a different time zone?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait. You're asking me, WHILE I'M LOOKING AT YOU, if I think you're working in a different time zone.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh, I think I've watched every TV show available over the last year.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you tried reading a book?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: EWWW. I'll just start Bridgerton again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OH MAN! It's April 9, 2021!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Look at the numbers, man, the NUMBERS: 4-9-21!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah still not getting it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Last night I ate 4 tacos at 9pm and then played Blackjack all night!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What a time to be alive.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You want some scrapple for breakfast?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Pass.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But I even added some ground smelts!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hard pass.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can you help me with this video game? I can't get past the this part.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: This isn't a video game, it's my online banking page..

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And it says you have tried 23 incorrect passwords.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, I CANNOT get past this level.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you staring out the kitchen window?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: There's a one-eyed pigeon out there.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, that's just how their eyes are positioned.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But I can't see the other side of his head, so how do I know?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good point. I'll take the next shift.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Roses are red, violets are blue...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Woot! has great deals so you should shop here.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think this is the week we get fired.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte? Why are we here?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hmm. Well the search for Life’s Deeper Meaning has occupied philosophers since time immemorial--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I mean at the store.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, toilet paper.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mmm, I just love the smell fo fresh cut grass.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nothing like the acrid, cholophyllic aroma of fresh cut grass to really start your Spring.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, fresh cut grass is one of lifes simple pleas--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK OK I'll mow the lawn today, happy?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Now I am.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sooo, just out of curiosity, where do we keep the calculator? And the stamps? And our W-2s?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The tax deadline was extended to May 17th.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YES OF COURSE I KNEW THAT.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why is there a diner booth in the kitchen?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Since we still are stuck at home, I thought I'd start a small business! Welcome to "Mort's Greasy Spoon!" I was just waiting on a delivery of hog fat.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Spoon grease, for the greasy spoons!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think I've lost my appetite.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I keep a baby elephant in our apartment?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: NO.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Follow-up question, do you know if Pete's Pachyderm Post has a good return policy?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's, uh, 4/20. Happy 4/20, Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, thanks!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait for what again?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's, uh, 4/20. Happy 4/20, Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, thanks!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: COWABUNGA!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That didn't work out as planned.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: PUT ALL THE CUSHIONS BACK, NOW.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ugh! This coffee tastes terrible!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What? I made it myself! Ground the beans and everything!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, what kind of coffee beans did you use?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wait... do they have to be COFFEE beans?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Happy World Copyright Day!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: To commemorate, I would like to read a quote from my favorite author, Ursula K. Le Guin. Ahem:

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: {QUOTE REMOVED DUE TO COPYRIGHT VIOLATION}

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, she sold the Internet Humor rights to {NAME OF COMPANY REMOVED DUE TO LEGAL LIABILITY} mega-corporation. They own pretty much evertything now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I hate that {CENSORED} rodent.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just look at it all, Monte. Isn't it beautiful?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, the company really outdid itself for Free Lunch Friday....are you crying?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's just so... so... so free!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I'm training for a hot dog eating contest!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, sounds like a lot of work.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not really. I just need you to get me fifty hot dogs. And cook them. Then get me some buns. And have some water ready. And a comfy chair. And a bucket if needed. And a motivational music playlist.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then I just eat them. So yeah, not that much work at all.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Would you like to buy a candy bar to help my fundraiser?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure! What's it for?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: For me to reinvest in some more candy bars.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not sure that's how that works...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: STONKS!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We need someone to come out and fix the vending machine at the corner store.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: SOMEBODY tried to remove all the candy using an umbrella.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Now the machine doesn't work.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And SOMEBODY would like their umbrella back.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I want sugar.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, we've done nothing but sit in our apartment and snack for the past year. If we're going to do this diet—

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sugar now.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We only started 17 minutes ag—

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: SUGAR NOW NOW NOW NOW NOW

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Whew! So that's the first 24 hours of our diet! I feel great!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mmf-hmf!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, did you throw out all our candy like I told you to?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mmf!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And did you throw them out in your mouth?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, that saved some time.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OWWW! This new toothpaste is burning my mouth!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, that's Tabasco sauce. I don't even know how you mixed that up.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: THAT'S why my wings were so minty last night.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is wrong with you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Honestly, I thought spearmint blue cheese was a good choice.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you seen my coffee table book about famous 19th century trains?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you going to tell me where it is??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: For your sake and mine, no.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We need to take your nerding down a notch.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: 12 train whistles, 37 railroad spike replicas, and a closet full of conductor hats?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's just a hobby!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Your 600-page locomotive fanfic, "The Caboose is Loose?"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, you got me there.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I finally finished drinking my stash of Crystal Pepsi.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's impressive that you've made it last for 27 years.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, the last few years have tasted pretty rough.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have we ever talked about hard pretzels vs. soft pretzels?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nope.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Great, let me put that on the schedule. How is Thursday, September 9th, at 2:30?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why can't we just talk about it now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: This is my time to schedule conversation topics.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you ever have that dream where you're eating sheet cake and it's the most wonderful tasting thing in the world?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Never.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, what do you think it might mean?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It means you have no idea what sheet cake tastes like.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, will you please go change clothes?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why ever for?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You've been wearing that ratty bathrobe for two months straight.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Tsk, I didn't think of you as being tied to such paltry, earthly things as the outward appearance when all that matters is what's in your heart.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I should have never lent you that Philosophy 101 textbook.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Now if you'll excuse me, I have to go buff my chakras.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh, that giant toothpaste tube you bought is sticking my lips to my teeth.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean the caulking tube I was using to seal the tub?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: MMM mmm MMMMPH??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Tag! You're it!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um, okay. Tag, you're i--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: NO WAY, I'M ON HOME BASE

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...ironically, this is pretty much what elementary school was for me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YOU'RE CHEATING! MOMMM!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are all the dishes in the tub?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Streamlining household processes. I'm starting my bath in a few minutes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do NOT call for me if you have trouble.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I really miss you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then work on your aim.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: (The intrepid wildlife photographer has spent all night in the jungle hoping to catch a photo of the illusive Montemonkey.)

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What happened to all my ferns?? Why are you laying on the floor??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: (It has spotted me! It begins to charge!)

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, look at this cool scar!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OH GROSS, WHAT HAPPENED?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I got it at the scar shop.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you finish all that clam chowder?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, how could you be so shellfish?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: SHELLFISH, MONTE!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: :D

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I found some buried treasure, look!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where did you find $32 in buried treasure?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Buried in your wallet.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, can you make sure my necktie is straight?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, this is an eel!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok, but is it on straight?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mort, can I--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I had nothing to do with what happened in the kitchen!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why, what happened in the kitchen?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't know. But if someone let a bunch of birds loose in there, it wasn't me. I didn't even know about it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Inspiration is everywhere!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: By "inspiration" do you mean "dirty laundry?"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I do! Dirty laundry is everywhere!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Check out my new smart watch.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You strapped a toaster oven to your arm.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, it's got a toast app!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Guess who I am!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You are Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: SCORE! TWO POINTS! WOOOOHOOOOO! Ok, your turn.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We gotta get the TV fixed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just doing my work. Definitely not goofing around on my phone. Nope, not me. Just working.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm definitely not watching videos on Tik Tok. That would be the opposite of working. Me? I'm working hard.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you say something, Monte? I couldn't hear you over all this WORK I'm doing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I didn't say anything, Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Jeez Monte, stop chatting and get back to work.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm tired of feeling like I'm not leaving an indelible mark on this generation and the many that follow. That's why I've decided to quit this job and do something that leaves a lasting, tangible imprint.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sooo...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm going to become an architect.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are your qualifications?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Jenga?

lines.speaker: mortimer
