lines.text: Monte, where's the coffee?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, we're out, I'll go to the store later today and--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: MONTE. COFFEE NOW. CODE RED. CODE RED.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't think I can do this trip to Germany.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why not? Germany's an amazing country.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Isn't it full of Germs?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're right, stay here. Give me your ticket.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I simply MUST get organized!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's good to hear you taking responsibility for... wait, WHAT are you organizing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: These peanuts in size-order!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you know that red food coloring can come from crushed insects?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Just think, those M&Ms you're eating could contain insect powder!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why do I live with you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: THE GOOSE IS LOOSE!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ugh, is this another one of your attempts to create a catchphrase?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: NO, I WENT TO A FARM THIS MORNING AND LOOK OUT!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Knock knock.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Who's there?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Your wallet.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Your wallet who?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I lost your wallet, sorry.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm inventing a napkin that snaps to your pants. It's called a "Nappy-Snap!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Don't you mean "Snapkin?"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YOU KNOW I HATE IT WHEN YOU IMPROVE MY INVENTIONS.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: HEY, I'M IN THE BATHROOM HERE!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry but Google Maps says it's the fastest way to the kitchen.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I'm going out for a while, taking the car.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We don't have a car.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Fine. I'm going out for a while, taking this shopping cart and an oar.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you do the laundry like I asked?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Define "do."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: To clean. To wash and fold and put away.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...define "laundry."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This is because you've been binging courtoom dramas all week, isn't it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I object!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I borrow your credit card?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not going to just keep handing over my money to you anymore. I need more context.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Fine. Can I borrow your credit card because I have a chunk of spinach caught between my teeth and we're out of floss?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...I really should just learn to say no to all your questions.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ow! Ow! Ow! Monte, help!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? What's wrong? Are you hurt?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: First brain-freeze of the season.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And just HOW am i supposed to help with that??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I dunno... moral support?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where have all the spoons gone?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh. I was hoping you wouldn't notice.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So, where are they?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you need them right now?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It really bothers me that you're not answering my question.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just wait until you hear my answer!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Theoretically, what would happen if someone were to bring a horse into the office?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why would you ever need to bring a horse into the office?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because I keep getting parking tickets when I leave him outside.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, did you finish those purchase orders I assigned to you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I did you one better, Monte. I threw them all out.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How is that better?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, better for me at least.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you still in pajamas? You're almost two hours late to work!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm on London time.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's currently 5:52 PM in London.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then I'm on Beijing time?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't get mad.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? I don't have time for this! WHAT DID YOU DO?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just thought you shouldn't get mad. Guess I was too late.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ugh, my portfolio took quite a hit this year. I'm bleeding money.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, you should see a doctor about that.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not sure you were listening...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I'm pretty sure I wasn't.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I feel stupid.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, don't say that, friend. I think you're of very average intelli-- wait, why are you touching my arm?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I see, I "feel stupid." Get it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, now I'm irascible.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: When did I eat corn?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Gross.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So to backup your Outlook inbox, you have to create a .pst file and--HEY! Are you even listening?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Huh? What? Oh man, I was having the most boring dream.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Anyway, to backup your email you have to--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OH NO I CAN'T WAKE UP

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Auuuhhhh...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...How many times have I told you...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...Uurrrrhhhh...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...You CANNOT have Flaming Hot Cheetos, SweetTarts, and French bread pizza on the same day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm going to take up competitive kazooing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, that seems like a quiet and non-irritating hobby that won't grate on my nerves at all.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I was being sarcastic.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh. I was gonna say, like 80% of the reason I got this thing was to annoy you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What sounds more powerful: "Godlike" or "Omnipotent?"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hmm, "Godlike" I guess? What are you doing, anyway?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just editing my Wikipedia page.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You shouldn't lie on there. It's an open repository for knowledge and only with the hightest integrity can we-- Wait, you mispelled "Schmuck" and "Boring" only has one R. Hey, is that still your page?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, now I'm editing yours.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Man, today wasn't great.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, you know what they say,:"Ob-La-Di, Ob-La-Da!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think you mean, "comme ci comme ça?"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, no. Uh... I meant, you know what they say: "Su-Sussudio!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's very comforting, thank you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I got you a new shirt, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey thanks!...wait, this has your name on it--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And here's my ID, have fun today!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have fun doing what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Covering my shift, they opened the summer beaches today!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I think my computer's broken.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hmmm. Have you tried turning it off and turning it back on again?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, but I tried banging it with a hammer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It didn't help.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I found a spider in my room.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And that's why you're moving into my room?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No! I just...thought we weren't spending enough non-spider time together.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, I think we're getting drone delivery today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, they actually started doing that? How do you know? What are they bringing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I know because I poked the beehive in the yard lots of times.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: They will probably bring pain.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mort! What's new?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not this sandwich I'm eating, that's for sure.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? Then why are you still eating it??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: To quote George Mallory, "Because it's there."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...anyway, if you like ceramics from the late middle ages, this PBS special will blow your mind.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can we talk about pizza now?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...I really need to get a second friend.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I got a food truck!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What kind of food will you make?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Make? No, I just drive around and pick up food and eat it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I notice you've been updating your LinkedIn page. Thinking about a career change?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uh, heh, no, of course not! What makes you say that?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The fact that you list your occupation as "Boudoir Photographer".

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK, look: keep this between us and I'll waive the sitting fee on your next session.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm thinking of getting my eyebrows waxed.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um ... but you don't have eyebrows.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You can be really hurtful sometimes, you know?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm sorry. If you had eyebrows, I'm sure they'd be expertly groomed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's too late.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Which cereal do you think makes the best cereal milk?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What on earth is cereal milk?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, you know, the sweet slurry of milk at the end of a bowl of cereal.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh yeah. Well then, I guess I'd have to say ... Raisin Bran.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh. Why do I even bother?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why is your cape on backwards, Mort?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because I just realized I'm naked.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, I finally finished my novel!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This is just stick figure drawings, I don't think this is a novel.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's a GRAPHIC novel!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, it's 12:12, let's both make a wish!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...and then I win a Nobel for brokering peace across all monkeydom and I get a smooch from Heidi Klum. Sorry, just finishing mine, what did you wish for?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I wish I had another friend.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This will never work.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Believe in me!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'd rather believe in the laws of physics.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Your lack of vision is really interfering with our backyard bungee course.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay, this time I have DEFINITELY found proof of Nessie. Look at this picture!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a rubber snake in a bowl of clam chowder.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Och, she's a wily wee beastie!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you wearing a mumu?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I NO LONGER ADHERE TO SOCIETY'S STANDARDS OF FASHION

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Also, it's laundry day

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry, I punctured your waterbed.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? HOW?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I wanted a sandwich but the baby alligator I bought off the internet was being fussy, plus I knew we were out of mayo so--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know what, I don't care anymore. Just don't make me listen to the explanation.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's the Forth! Let's eat!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think you mean "Fourth."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...I know my history, Monte. It's "Forth."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok, use it in a sentence.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "And Uncle Sam said, 'Go Forth and eat hamburgers.'"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This new rug is so soft! I love it!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thanks! And thanks for helping me with it!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? How did I "help" you with buying an area rug?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I didn't buy it, I've been collecting all the monkey fur off your hair brush for the past year and wove it into this fine area rug.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You were kidding, right? You didn't REALLY use all the monkey fur from my hair brush to make this area rug.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, no.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ah, GOOD! Whew.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I mean not ALL of it. Some of it I got from the shower drain.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you seen my knee-high, auburn wool socks? I'm missing the left one.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh, I forgot about your sock collection.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, it's a normal hobby!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I could use two dozen adjectives to describe your obsession with used hosiery and "normal" is NOT one of them.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sssssqqqqrrrrggggrrrruuuurrrr

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What was that??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My stomach is talking to my sandwich.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where's your sandwich?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: In the fridge.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: All those health articles are lying. "Superfoods" aren't doing me any good.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What did you try?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I put a Twinkie in the microwave with a spider. I ate the whole thing like six hours ago, but I still can't shoot webs or climb walls.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You really should try reading more than just the headlines.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte! I lost my car keys!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no! Where do you think they might be?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Probably in the car. Which I also lost.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, you really buried the lede there, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: NO WAY, YOU REALLY THINK IT COULD BE BURIED?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hand me the remote control, would you?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: EW! Why is it all sticky?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, well you know how I HATE to miss TV when I'm getting snacks AND the kitchen is so far away--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: GET TO TO THE POINT.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Short answer? Marshmallow throw pillows.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think I'm gonna change my name to Nortimer.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't think Marketing will allow that, we got the whole alliteration thing of "Mort & Monte."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: THEY'RE NOT THE BOSS OF ME!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...they are quite literally the boss of you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: EWWWW! Why did you show me that?!? There's nothing "heartwarming" about that picture!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You misheard me. I said "heart-wormy."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Does Woot! have LASIK benefits?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why? You don't even need glasses.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I won't be happy until I can read the fine print in those injury law commercials.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Does anybody ever buy scissors?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've got, like, four pairs of scissors here and I've never bought one.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, those are mine! I guess you don't have to buy scissors when you have a co-worker to steal them from.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oooh, who did you steal yours from?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My heat bill is going to be through the roof this month!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, it's July. Why are you running a heater?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Equilibrium. Won't feel hot outside if it's equally hot inside!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think you might have sweat out your sense of logic.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Just bought plane tickets home for Thanksgiving.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ha! Monte, that's like forever from now!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's saving me hundreds! You should do it too!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Better idea: I buy a suitcase with breathing holes and I fly home as YOUR luggage!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think “better” might be the wrong word there.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mortimer, what you eating there?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It’s a dönor kebab. And it’s dëliciöüs.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think you may be using those umlauts excessively.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whätëvër! Tëll thät tö Mötley Crüe.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, pull my finger!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That is not something that sounds remotely appealing to me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, seriously. I jammed it. I need you to pop it back into place.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, if you really need me to …

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: :::pfffrrrttt:::

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't even know why I'm surprised.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's the worst kind of pizza?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean pizza restaurant, crust style, or recipe?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ERRRRRRRR. Wrong answer. All pizza is delicious.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't know about that. I'm not a fan of Hawaiian...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ERRRRRRR. DELICIOUS!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Come on, sign the petition! Every voice counts!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, there is no way they're going to make pencil-break an official sport at the Olympics.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not with defeatist attitudes like yours.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm thinking about starting a new career as a DJ.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You need a cool new name then.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know, I'm going with DJ Extra Cheese. I'm only gonna play pizza jams.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I didn't know there was a pizza music genre.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, that reminds me, can you help me write about three hours of pizza songs?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't believe we share like 93% of our DNA with our human coworkers.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I can't believe I share 100% of my DNA with you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Anyone who puts cheese in their coffee every morning has GOT to be a different phylum from me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you see that car crash video I texted you?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeas, and it was harrowing and unpleasant. I'm just glad no one was hurt.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Really? That had me cracking up all night.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think there might be something wrong with you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're just now figuring this out?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You ever wonder how they get all that E-Z Cheez into the can? It must be fascinating!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No. I'm sure it's boring and industrial.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...what's it like being you? Is it as sad as it seems?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you finish setting up tomorrow's Tools sale?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's New Business, we only talk Old Business on Mondays.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Anything to get out of doing some work, huh?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pretty much.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OW! Why did you just slap me?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I demand satisfaction, my good monkey. You have insulted my simian honour. This effrontery will not stand, I say!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is this because I made fun of you for eating that expired guacamole at lunch?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You mocked me! I demand a duel!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know what? Fine. Swords or pistols at dawn? And I assume this is to the death?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...I shall let you off with a warning THIS time. Good DAY, sir.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's the name of that show that--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thundercats.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, the one with--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The Greatest American Hero!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can I finish asking--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: MY MOTHER THE CAR!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh... I don't feel so well.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You might have that stomach bug that's been going around the office.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But that's why I ate all those spiders!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ah! Smell that Summer air!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It makes me sad.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ah, yes. Sometimes the overwhelming beauty of Nature can make one melancholy as we think of the fragility of life. Sigh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What are you talking about? I just hate mowing the lawn.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's Taco Tuesday!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's Saturday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...any day can be Taco Tuesday if you believe hard enough.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is that NOISE??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's my new hardcore band!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It sounds like pots and pans in a washing machine.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Right?? By the way, we need a new set of pots.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And a new washing machine I presume.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh yeah! One of those, too!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh good! My business cards finally arrived!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you go through HR for that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Read 'em and you tell me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: "Mortimer Monkey - Ruler of All He Surveys." Hmm. Yes, I doubt Corporate would have gone for that job title.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you get a cat?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Then I really don't want to know why you put a litter box next to the TV, do I?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh yeah, you REALLY don't...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I've been watching what you eat and I think you have too much salt in your diet.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think you have too much time on your hands.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm serious! We monkeys have a short lifespans and really have to take care of ourselves.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know there's a saying, "Those who hide Ho-Hos over the fridge shouldn't throw stones."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Touché.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh boy, soup for dinner! ....BLEAH! IT'S COLD!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's borscht.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...sorry, is that the name or are you choking?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you have any 3s?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, Go Fish.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay, your turn.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you have any 3s?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I just asked you that!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry, thought you said, "Do you have any peas."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No you didn't.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No I didn't.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Guess how many of those expired eggs in the fridge I can eat.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Don't eat those!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Too late! The answer is seven.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Also, I don't feel so good.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: {INSERT ADMONISHMENT OVER BAD BEHAVIOR}

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: {INSERT HUMOROUS MISUNDERSTANDING}

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: {INSERT EXASPERATION}

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: {INSERT RETORT}

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here's your coffee.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Thanks, how much do I owe-- HEY! It's half-empty!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Shipping & Handling fee.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you finish your antibiotics?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Naw, I flushed the rest.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?? You could get a superinfection!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know! It's my last ditch effort to get super-powers after I tried getting bitten by all those spiders.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: All you will get is a second infection superimposed on the first one by a different microbial agent of exogenous or endogenous origin, that is resistant to the treatment being used against the first infection.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, that origin story SUCKS.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you really still trying to get super-powers?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, being me is boring.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, you are a talking monkey who gets paid to annoy me every day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thanks, buddy! I love being me!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: By the way, I flushed half your sock collection down both toilets and you gotta call the plumber.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm gonna quit to be a white hat hacker.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: While it's noble you want to be a hacker that goes after bad hackers, you really don't have the computer science experience.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you kidding? I've seen "Swordfish" and "Hackers" and "Jurassic Park" and "Tron" and "Live Free or Die Hard" so I THINK I know what I'm talking about.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay, so how will you "hack?"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm pretty sure I just bang on a keyboard while electronic music plays and eventually yell, "I've hacked the mainframe!" or something else cool.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Good news! I renamed all the important holidays so they'd make more sense to me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How convenient.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So I propose calling Halloween what it really is... Creepy Costume Day. 4th of July shall now be known as Blow Your Thumb Off Day. St. Patricks Day will just be Green Beer Day. Memorial Day makes more sense as Campgrounds All Booked Day. New Years Day will just be Diet Day. And last but not least, Thanksgiving, which will be furthermore known as Pumpkin Spice Food Orgy Day.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I guess I'm relieved you didn't rename Christmas.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What’s the most disappointing snack food? Pizza with only one piece of pepperoni, hotdogs with bad bun to dog ratio, or salad cookies?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: YUCK! Those all sound TERRIBLE. But what is a salad cookie?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Umm…cucumber slices, duh.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Come on.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...right.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How do you spell sadzeekee?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean the Greek side dish Tzatziki?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, how do you spell it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...I just did.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I raise you six bucks. I'm all in.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And your tell says you're bluffing, so I call. And I win.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Dangit! How can you tell I'm bluffing?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You put your feet on the card table, wiggle your toes and hum "We're in the Money" to yourself while snickering.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Clearly you have no appreciation for the theatrical arts.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you seen the pasta trainer?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean the pasta strainer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...Okay, I'm already seeing some problems with my Mortimer's Pasta Circus business plan.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Remember, I'm having some friends over tomorrow night for Scrabble and charcuterie.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hahahah! Right??

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you laughing at?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I thought that was a joke. The part about you having friends.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So you promise to stay in your room while my party is happening tonight?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I promise.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good, I don't want any of your hijinks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ah, well that's a different promise now isn't it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no... What are you going to do?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I thought it would be a good evening to work on my sousaphone rendition of "I Sing the Body Electric."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How was your party last night?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It didn't go so well.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Someone scribbled rude words on the back of the Scrabble letters and replaced all the sopressata with strips of cardboard in my charcuterie.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My word! Well, it sure seems like SOMEONE is an irascible scamp around here!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes. Someone.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can you take me to the vet? I don't feel so well...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no, absolutely! What seems to be the problem?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have a stomach ache and every time I hiccup the car alarm goes off.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well I'd drive us, but I have a sneaking suspicion you swallowed my car keys again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I swallowed your car keys again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You wanna play me in "Goldeneye 007"?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ugh, why are you still playing a 24-year-old video game?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's the perfect mix of action and responsiveness! It cannot be improved upon! It is gaming perfection.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Plus you have a crush on the oddly polygonish physique of Natalya Simonova?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well yes, that, too.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You ready for the new Facebook video shoot today?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I'm not going.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What, why not?! We have a lot of budget we've already laid out!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I feel ugly after being at home for so long. I'm just a big, boring, chubby monkey. Sigh.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, everyone feels like that, it's okay. Be a little kinder to yourself. We're all getting through this time the best we all can and I think you are just as handsome and irascible as ever.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm sorry, did I miss a line? I didn't hear a joke in there.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No joke today, buddy. Why don't you take a shower while I make us a healthy breakfast?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...thanks, Monte.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I want to thank you for being so nice to me during all the weirdness the world has been throwing at us lately. You've been a great friend and I promise to be back at my hilarious hijinks starting today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's great to hear! But I just want you to be happy, no need for hiji-AAAAHHHH!!!! SPIDERS! SO MANY SPIDERS IN MY BOWL!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yup! That's my new pitch for Woot! "Daddy Longlegs Crunch Cereal!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: NONONONONO THEY'RE IN MY HAIR

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Haha! Hijinks!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Look on my Works, ye Mighty, and despair!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a Lego castle and i fair to see the need to despair.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You always shoot down my Works. :(

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, I love hot sauce

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is that why you're pouring a quart of it on that peanut butter sandwich there?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yup, I just LOVE me some.... OW! OW, THAT'S HOT! OWWW!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What did you think would happen?!?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, "jelly." Yup.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Huh?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I meant to say, "Man, I love jelly." Simple mistake.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No. No, it is most certainly not.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hooray! It's the weekend!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hooray indeed. What are you going to do with your two days off?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Complain about work, mostly. You?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Same.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you know that all alligators are crocodiles, but that not all crocodiles are alligators?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I did.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh yeah?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sure. It's actually quite simple. Crocodiles and alligators are both part of the reptilian order Crocodylia. But they're part of different families, Crocodylidae and Alligatoridae respectively. Usually when people say "crocodile," they really mean "crocodilian." In total, there are some 23 unique species of crocodilians, including those in the lesser known family, Gavialidae.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, that's a surprise.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I read it on the internets.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "I would walk 500 miles and I would walk 500 more ... "

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ... for a decent corndog right about now, yeah?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Totally.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How about this idea: peer-to-peer location-specific analog voice chat?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, isn't that just what the rest of us call "talking"?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't be so Web 1.0, Gramps. By the way, you owe me 3 bucks for this peer-to-peer location-specific analog voice chat session.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You don't appreciate my jokes! That's it, I'm declaring a Vow of Silence.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sounds good to me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yup, you won't have any more of my hilarious verbal hijinks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No more jokes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nope, not a word.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This is the loudest vow of silence I've ever heard.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: When will you learn monkeys can't fly?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: NEVER! BURP.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's a scientific impossibility.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: UNTRUE! BURP.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So please stop eating all those helium balloons.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BUUUUUUURP.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: --So all I'm saying is A + B = C

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So you're calculating that if you, Mortimer--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: --made a 10,000 rubber band slingshot--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: B.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: --you'd be able to fly to Mars?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And that's C! Precisely!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You suck at math.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can you finish that sale paperwork, please?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Snaggity-Snoo, I'll do it for you."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no, please tell me you're not testing out new catchphrases again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "All's fair 'til you burp the baby."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This is inane.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Flapjack's a pancake in the right light."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...okay, I kinda like that one.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Right?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: 'That's a flam-jammer of a dilly, cuz!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay, these catchphrase tests are driving me nuts.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why don't you try one?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, uh, okay! Uh... "That's tighter than a two millimeter socket wrench!"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Maybe we should leave the creative stuff to me, eh?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you eat the last Toaster Strudel?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I did indeed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's it! I divorce you as a friend!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, 17 years and I''l I had to do to get rid of you was eat a breakfast pastry? Amazing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you meet Farbel yet?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, who is--GAH!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yup, Farbel is my new pet cave spider.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's...horrific. Please consult me before befriending any more VERMIN, UNDERSTOOD?!?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey' she's sensitive!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you telling me that your invertebrate companion is sensitive to HUMAN INSULTS?!?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, no. She's sensitive to loud noises, and will often pounce in the direction of the disturb--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep, there she goes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Remember when we flew to Vegas on a whim and we holed up in that seedy motel for six weeks?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't remember that at all.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Really? Not even when we worked as buskers for long enough to buy a rust-bucket '78 Chevy Impala, and then we rocketed out into the desert night, the sparks shooting from 3,616lbs of Detroit steel igniting the fumes of youth into a bright wound of fire, seemingly in defiance of the world, of endings, of death itself?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, again, not me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OH! That's right, it wasn't you. I had a damp dish towel with me at the time.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So I've been looking at this draft 2022 Marketing budget you put together for me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yup! Just like you asked. Did it all myself

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, well I noticed this line item for "Banana Foot Massages" that I don't remember approving.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where... Ooh yeah, that rolls up to my of my Monkey Gotta Relax initiative.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...Eh, I'll let Finance deal with it...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hooray! Banana foot massages!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thanks for coming to my "Pretzels in Uraguay" presentation yesterday!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...did you really need to book that on my calendar months in advance?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, to be honest I was surprised you didn't come up with a decent excuse in all that time.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I feel like I've failed us both.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm gonna go get a snack from the kitchen, want anything?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, you can grab me an espresso with a twist of lemon and an almond biscotti.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm going to be in there for exactly 15 seconds.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, in that case you can bring me watercress finger sandwiches and a frais petit four.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're gonna get three kinda stale Mega Stuff Oreos and a glass of Kool-Aid and you'll like it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hooray!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm gonna go to a clam bake this weekend. Interested?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nah. I don't go to those things. Scared of choking on a pearl.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think you're thinking of oysters.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Shells is shells, bro.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think you're anthropomorphizing the robot vacuum a little to much. For example, stop making it lunch every morning.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But it gets hungry! Now just look at the ADORABLE bento box I made for him.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...I see. You seem to have stripped all the copper wire from the blender and have coiled it into amusing shapes that you are now "feeding" to the vacuum.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I call it sparkhetti!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you seen my glasses?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You wear glasses?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I've ALWAYS worn reading glasses, how have you not noticed that?!? I swear, one day you're going to take Monte Monkey a little too much for granted and then you'll be left without a friend.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Your name's "MONTE MONKEY"??? HAHAHAHAHAH

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So answer the old question: Boxers or Briefs?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you doing??? SHHHHH!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What? Why? I just asked what underwear--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I KNOW what you asked. We can't make people think about our underwear, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why not??

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...because we are CLEARLY not wearing any and as soon as we make the connection in their minds of Monkeys+Clothes, they'll realize we are two adults wearing nothing but capes to work every day and our bosses will be forced to fire us for indecent exposure.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's called the Porky Pig Plight.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...whoah

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: --and THEN my mother threw a screaming egg with my father's face at me which is why I jumped down the gummy slide and into Morgan Freeman's lap who then turned back into my mother and asked why I never used my Regal Cinemas Rewards points before they expired because they're a great deal for the investment.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay, you have got to stop kicking off our daily status meetings with passages from your dream journal.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why is there a tiny real estate sign nailed to the floor of our rented apartment?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Seattle real estate is so hot right now that I've decided I want a cut.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So I'm subletting one square foot of our living room.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What would someone do with only one square foot??

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, live on it I guess?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Who could----No, WHAT could live on a single foot of hardwood parquet floor?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well... I guess it'd have to be a bunch of little things or one big thing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And both possibilities are equally unsettling.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm ready to fly to the Woot! Wedding!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is that massive pile of taped-together boxes your luggage?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, if they're all touching it counts as on carry-on.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't think the airline honors nacho rules.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: --so I told my dermatologist we should call it "Monkne." You know... Because it's monkey acne. In fact I had this one that was so huge I had to take this pic-Hey, why's that guy typing this out?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good Lord, is THIS going in the Monkey Chat?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: NO, WE WEREN'T READY!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Knock, Knock.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Who's there?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Debacle!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Debacle who?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Debacle broke and my pants fell down!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm so excited for the wedding of Nathan and Caroline that we are helping throw this week!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Who wed what now?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh come on, it's RIGHT there on the homepage.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry, I try not to think about work... like ever.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: .......It's open bar.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HOORAY FOR NATHAN & CAROLINE! WOOOOO!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you buy your present for Nathan and Caroline's Woot! Wedding yet?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes! I'm making their table settings.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um, did you clear that with them first?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, it's a surprise! Now hand me more thistles and brambles, I want these settings to be real sticky.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The Woot! Wedding bachelor/bachelorette was off the hook!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: My favorite part was the axe throwing!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mine was mini-golf in the torrential rain!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You got this all approved by Finance, right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah he gave a thumbs up during karaoke before he passed out.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's the Woot! Wedding! Nathan and Caroline are the cutest couple ever!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, that is clearly hyperbole as you couldn't possibly know if, at some point in the world, there was a couple with a higher Cuteness Quotient.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You measure cuteness on a scale??

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes. I measure everything.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How cute am I?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: 26.8, right behind a kangaroo with cold sores.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I bought a title online.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What do you mean a "title?"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The title of "lord"in Scotland.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, you are blowing all your money on internet scams.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Please address me as "His Lordship Mortimerian VonPisselbottom, Duke of Doughnuts, Fourth of His Name."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you really still going through with buying a Scottish title from the internet? It doesn't come with land holdings or anything real, right?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I am assuming it does! And just WAIT until I get those serfs under my thumb. I shall tax them to within an inch of their miserable, short little lives! MWAHAHAHA!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I really have to give Woot! thanks for keeping you out of a position in personnel management.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We had so much fun at the Woot! Wedding last week!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I know, my face still hurts from laughing!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know, it's killing me, too!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ....you mean my face is killing you, don't you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah! And you walked right into it!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WEIRD FACTS!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: GAHH! Why are you yelling?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's my new bit, ahem. WEIRD FACT: Every three days a human stomach changes its entire lining!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, and you can't even change your sheets.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...wait, I'm usually the funny one. This sucks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WEIRD FACTS! A giraffe is able to clean its ears with its own tongue!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, that is pretty gross.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, don't you mean pretty "WEIRD????"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, it's only "weird." I might even give you a capital W: it's "Weird."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How many times do we have to go over "your text-reliant jokes suck?"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: sigh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: STOP IT.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think I'm going to take up running.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That takes effort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, right! Never mind, then.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I like doughnuts.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Duly noted.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay, despite what my yoga instructor, manifesting doesn't work.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You tried manifesting pastry? That's idiotic.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I like being alone.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...dangit

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm working on our Halloween costumes for this year!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no, not again...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What size tube-top do you wear?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OH NO, NOT AGAIN...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay, so what are our Halloween costumes this year? It's not going to be another team costume, is it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, it is! And you're not backing out again this year, you hear me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sigh. What's the theme?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You Ever see "Requiem for a Dream?"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'M BACKING OUT AGAIN THIS YEAR.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That was so much fun last night!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't want to talk about it. I'm still nauseous.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I mean, who would've thought that trichinosis + your piano recital could be so hilarious?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I SAID I DON'T WANT TO TALK ABOUT IT.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What kind of sandwich are you eating, Mortimer? It's so crunchy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Onion and breath mint! All that onion taste! None of that onion breath!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That sounds disgusting.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well then, I guess than you think efficiency is disgusting!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I guess this is a little awkward, huh?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah. Just a little.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Maybe you should lock the bathroom door from now on.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: MAYBE YOU SHOULD LEARN TO KNOCK.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, Mortimer. Did you watch--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: NO SPOILERS

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But I didn't even say what show--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: LA LA LA I'VE NEVER WATCHED TV BEFORE AND I DON'T WANT YOU TO RUIN THE CONCEPT OF TELEVISION

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you ready for ROCKTOBERFEST?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah! Sounds like fun, what do we do?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mainly talk about my rock collections.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh. Can I change my answer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Psst. Monte, I have to go.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you telling me? Just go!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...are you like, going right now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YOU TOLD ME TO!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh yeah! Last day of the week! Gettin' ready for the weekend!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's only Monday, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Friday is a mindset, dude!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, it's a day on the calendar.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You are so temporally fixated, you know that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I keep thinking it's Tuesday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It IS Tuesday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You too, huh?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't believe I've had to work through all these major holidays!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? What are you talking about?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, Monday was Taco Tuesday Eve, Tuesday was Taco Tuesday, and today is the Post Taco Tuesday Day of Rest and Digestion.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, will you read me a bedtime story?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's 11:40 am.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ahh, ok.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, will you read me a power-nap-at-my-desk-time story?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I ate that pork pie you bought yesterday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: HAT, Mortimer, it was a pork pie HAT.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Huh, I thought the brim was a bit chewy.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We don't do anything but sit and watch TV. We really should be more active. How about a hike today?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sure! You get your hiking boots and poles, and canteen or whatever and hike down to the pizza store and get us three large pepperoni pizzas.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'd go with you, but I gotta pour the sodas and load "Evil Dead II" into the blu-ray player.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay, I borrowed your toothbrush but don't freak out, I totally cleaned it!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Argh! Well, okay. I guess it's just our teeth.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What about teeth now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I use your computer?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's wrong with yours? Did you get another virus?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I dunno, it just keeps saying "PC LOAD LETTER"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, you gotta really try hard to screw up a laptop that badly...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer? Why is there a hammer in our TV?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My show didn't end the way I wanted it to.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Then why didn't you just post an angry tweet about it or something like a normal person?!?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I also forgot where we store our hammers.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Maybe we should be more ambitious. Want to start a company with me?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sure! How about we sell people stuff on the internet that we find just lying around?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What makes that different than a hundred other companies?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uh, we make it funny somehow?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: There's no way there's money in that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're not gonna believe what I saw over the weekend!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Was it pizza?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Candy corn is the worst candy on the planet. They taste like sad memories.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you had Circus Peanuts? They taste like the maintenance hatch of a cotton candy machine.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, there's always Good & Plenty. They taste like a topical antihistamine.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And of course there's Necco Wafers. They taste like mummy dust.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We could do this all day.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Continuing our conversation from yesterday, what other candy do you hate?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Candy buttons. Those taste like a Home Depot receipt with a Slurpee stain on it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Or those wax Coke bottles. Those taste like a dental exam.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How about Bit-O-Honey? Those taste like a dull migraine.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: At this rate we'll have nothing to set out for Halloween.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think we beat the whole crappy candy joke to death. We should talk about something else today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok sure. whatcha got?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well... Um...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...You wanna keep making fun of candy, don't you?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ROCK CANDY TASTES THE WAY A BAD DATE FEELS

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's your favorite Halloween movie?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: "Addams Family Values"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wait, isn't that a Thanksgiving movie? Mine is "The Nightmare Before Christmas."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, isn't that a Christmas movie?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow, we should really synchronize our movie calendars.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you see Brendan Fraser is making a comeback??

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I hope he makes another Mummy movie!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My favorite part of the first one was when she was all like, "No wire hangers!"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My tooth, hurts, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Because you keep eating all the Halloween candy! Keep it up and that tooth will fall right out.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But if it falls out, it won't hurt anymore...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...so the real solution is to eat a lot MORE candy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I have your sandwich today?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sorry. I'm skipping lunch actually, I need to volunteer at the orphanage.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How inconsiderate of you, to do this to me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: They're making a new Matrix movie.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let me take a deep breath for this one... WHYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYY?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, that about sums it up.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just asked for a big promotion. In my email to HR, I said, "Just to let you know, I have friends in high places."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But that's not true.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It is now, I dragged your desk up to the 28th Floor.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte! Are you coming to my Haunted House BBQ tonight?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure! Need me to bring anything?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah some hot dogs would be great!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Also, some hamburgers.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Also, some peeled grapes, spaghetti, food coloring, and the rest of what I need for a Halloween Haunted House BBQ.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, also, a grill.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Happy Half-Off Candy Day!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's the best day of the year!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Hey there, citizen? Care to try our new Frosted Frip-N-Dippers?"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What do you mean "our"? And why are you using your radio announcer voice?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "New Frosted Frip-N-Dippers are the ONLY snack with the Flav'r-S'plosion cheese delivery system! TRY ONE!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, okay. Hmm. What is that, prosciutto? Old socks? Whuh, my tongue is swelling! My eyes are sweating! I can't feel my face!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uh... "Your results may vary! Ask your doctor if Frosted Frip-N-Dippers are right for you!"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yo, Monte. Let's get tacos.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And stuff them full of pizza.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: O...kay.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And dunk them in chocolate milk.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't feel so good.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well yeah, you ate a dozen pizza tacos.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But first I arranged them on the counter to form the word 'SALAD'.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I truly don't understand how you are alive.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yo Monte, let's go jogging.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You? Jogging?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I don't remember where I put my pizza taco and you need to help jog my memory.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not how that works.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, help me into these yoga pants.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No thanks. Why are you......wait, did you just pull those out of the freezer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well yeah, I want frozen yoga!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is wrong with you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Spoiler alert, Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? What are you talking about?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I lost my lucky penny under the fridge, so I had to move it, so I had to unplug it, and then I forgot to plug it back in, so...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...so the food is all spoiled?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I couldn't find my penny! But I guess that's also probably true.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Halloween, Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? It's November.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I dressed up as a time traveler this year.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You forgot to put in our Monkey Chat yesterday!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: {LINE 2}

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer? You there?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: {LINE 4}

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You didn't even show up for today's chat?!?!?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: {LINE 6}

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: “It walked, from its dank, dark lair, the last vestiges of sleep pouring sand into its joints as it growled, ready to devour its dastardly breakfast.”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no, we're not stuck in Audible Life Narration mode again are we?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: “The buzzing squeak of some small life-form in its hunting grounds he likened unto an insectile irritant.”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why do you only have a good vocabulary when you want to insult me?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: “The world trembled as it rumbled to life. What terrible effect will it have on the unexpected inhabitants of Woot!? Its shadow fell on its mode of conveyance, as it was ready to leave for work.”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay, A) Your Audible Life Narration setting is getting really insulting, and B) If you want a ride to the office there's better ways to ask.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you still narrating your life?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: “The King rose his head and stared at the general direction of the annoying warble. Satisfied that is posed no threat, it went back to sleep.”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'll take that as a yes. And you really shouldn't nap on your desk, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: “The King returned to his dream. A thousand ships sailed onward, flying the mighty Pizza Kingdom flag. What new lands and toppings awaited?”

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: “BEHOLD ITS WRATH! IT PREPARES TO LAY WASTE TO THE LANDS FOR IT HAS ENCOUNTERED A THIEF! A FOOD THIEF! THE GROUND TREMBLES AS IT STALKS THE HALLS LOOKING FOR ITS LOST SANDWICH!”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay, this is the absolute last day of your Audible Life Narration. And yes, I ate your sandwich.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: “IT ASKS WHY?!?!”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Because you ate no less than five of my lunches last week.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: “POPPYCOCK, IT THINKS--" oh wait, I totally did eat those. Sorry about that.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Man, I hate when people don't pick up their dog's poop.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, you know what I hate, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WARS. Bet you feel so petty right now, huh?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Your superior conversation skills have laid waste to my initial posit.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YEAH... wait, what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, I wish we were eligible to get Bags o’ Crap.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, we're Woot! employees, so we can't.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What if I clone myself, and then my CLONE gets a BoC??

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: If you DO find a way to clone yourself, please engineer out your stinky feet.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you REALLY going to shill for a shady energy drink called "Brane-Bustr"?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But It Has That Refined Taste of Refined Sugar, Extra Caffeine, and Just a Dash of Goat Tranquilizer That Your Body Craves! BRANE-BUSTR: IT'S GOT THE GAS FOR YOUR A--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: MORTIMER!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay, no more references to your side gig as an energy drink mascot and we get to keep our jobs.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What if it naturally comes up in conversation?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I guess so...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, Monte. I noticed you ate all those pretzels I put out. Are you thirsty?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, I guess I am a little parched—OH NO!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HOW ABOUT A BRANE-BUSTR ENERGY DRINK, FRIEND?? It Comes In 3 New "Flavrz"! SugrTrayne, RageBullet, and NEW MindOblit-R-8-R.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay, for real now, don't mention that energy drink you are moonlighting for again or we'll get fired.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, that won't be a problem, Brane-Bustr went belly up overnight.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, so quick! What happened?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Several class action lawsuits claiming that it was just repackaged hummingbird food.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Look, after this week's energy drink fiasco, I need a rest. No incidents for the rest of November, okay?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What? Why sure! No new schemes,my buddy! Hey, hand me that envelope that just arrived?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure. Hey, is that a...scroll?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, I sent away for one of those "give us money and we'll give you a Scottish title" thingies.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no, and I suppose this makes you--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: LORD OF THE OFFICE, PEASANT!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: MAKE WAY FOR THE LORD OF THE OFFICE!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Look, just because a website gave you a Scottish title, it doesn't make you a "Lord" of anything and do you REALLY have to ride that carriage in the office??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ‘Tis but the only way a Lord must travel, methinks, to survey the serfs' farming of my property. Forsooth!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: By the way, one of your miniature ponies just fertilized your cubicle.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I am the Lord of the Office, so sayeth this certificate from the Scottish Worldeth Wide Webbeth!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How much longer is this going to go on?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: For a, um. A fortnight!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you even know how long a fortnight is?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Um, forsooth.... Uh, something-pudding-or-other...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know, there's no shame in just going back to regular Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh thank goodness, I was completely out of material.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: This year, I'll make Thanksgiving dinner!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, that's really nice of you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you want beef or chicken?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Usually it's turkey.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh. I don't think they make turkey-flavored ramen.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thanks for taking over Thanksgiving dinner prep.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No problem.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you use my special stuffing recipe?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I'm NOT putting Skittles inside a turkey EVER AGAIN.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Blank Friday!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think you mean Black Friday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I celebrate Blank Friday. I spend the whole day making Mad Libs, then prank call random numbers and read them to anyone who answers.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I can't tell if you're serious.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I need an adverb.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you seen my favorite sweater?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Which one is it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The one with the cute reindeer that says "You SLEIGH me" on it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, umm. It's definitely NOT in the garbage. You check in your room and I'll just triple-check the garbage to make sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I had the worst nightmare last night.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What happened?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I dreamed that my entire existence was being transcribed for the benefit of an online ecommerce company.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That sounds awful.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I can't imagine.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Welp, see you tomorrow for another short interaction just like this one.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Looking forward to it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, Finance is asking about your expense for a "Poop Machine?"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh sure, it's for the warehouse.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, AND?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's a Point-Of-Origin Production Machine. It starts the Bag o' Crap assembly process. Point-Of-Origin Production. POOP. It's just an acronym, jeez.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OK, sorry.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It also makes a fart sound when it runs.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, can you swing down to the warehouse and snag me a Bag o’ Crap?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? You know we are ineligible from getting BOCs.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well I guess I'd better stop grabbing them for my own personal use.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How long have you been doing that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How long has it been against the rules?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Since the company's inception.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, since before that.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good morning, Mortimer, how are--Why is there kitschy crap nailed to all the walls? And why are you wearing that stupid outfit?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Welcome to "Mort's Emports!" We're the hottest new retro- family- sports- bar- grill- restaurant in the neighborhood! Can I get you set up with a pitcher of Bloody Marys and some of our signature Blippin' Dippers?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I just want my breakfast, please.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, then you'll want our Slippin' Slappers, it's the breakfast version of our Blippin' Dippers.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I hate every word that's coming out of your face.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Aw come on, let me turn the apartment into a cheesy theme restaurant, I already spent all my money on the sign for Mort's Emports!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, by the way "emports" is not a word.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well... not in English. It means "payload" in France. So it means "Mort's Payload" of like, food.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're gonna pull something stretching that hard.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You've been listening to Madonna's "Ray of Light" on repeat all day! TURN IT OFF!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But makes me happy!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's driving me insane!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's why it makes me happy!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, Monte? You know those little roly-poly bugs from the backyard?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, Mortimer, you are speaking of the terrestrial crustacean that may also go by the names "potato bugs," "pill bugs," "slaters," or "doodle bugs."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, well whatever you call 'em I'm sorry I put one in your ear while you napped on the davenport.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: EAAAHHHH!!!!! GET IT OUT! GET IT OUT! GET IT OUT!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Any idea what you want for Christmas?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure, I've got a list that's broken down into several Tiers: Essentials, Fancy Things, Fancy Essentials, Edible and/or Perishable Items, Simply Scarves, Clever But Thoughtful, then a couple of Sub Tiers which concentrate on---

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK! Gift card it is.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Morning.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't want to.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You don't want to what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't want to morning.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So, corporate wants us to rebrand. I'm going to be called Dr. Cool and your new name is McDork.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? That's a horrible name. Who decided that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not sure, we call decided on it during the meeting.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What meeting? Why wasn't I part of it??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because we knew you wouldn't like "McDork."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Look, I don't want to be called McDork.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry, corporate sent a survey and that name got the most votes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What were the choices?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: McDork, Dorkasaurus, Sir Dorks-A-Lot, and Dr. Dorkenstein

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Who came up with these options?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I may have had some input.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey McDork, what's for dinner?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not responding to McDork.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok, what's for dinner?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, I was thinking pan-seared salmon, new potatoes, a healthy green salad, and a lovely cherry compote.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Spoken like a true McDork.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok, I talked to corporate and they had no knowledge that I'm supposed to change my name to "McDork."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, well, it was, uh, a consulting agency that made the decision.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really? Which agency?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Um, you know, one of the big ones. Very reputable.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So, we're just going to forget that this happened and you're going to go back to calling me Monte.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wait, your name is Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So, no more silly name changes alright?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, definitely! Starting tomorrow.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, starting NOW.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hmm? Are you addressing me, Lord High Regent Pleasantbottom?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We have to call an exterminator.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why? What do we have?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wendigos.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're saying we have an infestation of a First Nations' mythological creature.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I saw it in the bathroom next to the toilet tank!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Was this cannibalistic evil spirit about two feet tall and have one big red foot?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...I got plunger-spooked again, didn't I?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Loook into my eyes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You are getting sleeeeepy.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes I am. But it's like 11pm.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You want to make me a saaaaaandwich.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I certainly do not.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hmm, I think I have to read “Hypnotism for Dummies" again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: LIGHTBULB!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why did you just scream "lightbulb?"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I had an idea.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Couldn't you just say that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I could, but it's more energetic this way.. Wanna hear my idea now?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, we're out of room for this Monkey Chat, you'll have to wait until tomorrow.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Aw man!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I tell you my idea from yesterday now?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, you may.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think all ice cream should be mixed together on a global scale so no one argues about flavors anymore.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I can’ believe you waited an entire day and at no point thought, "Wow, this idea is stupid."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I even wrote it dow-—HEY!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You want ice cream?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Me, too. Oh well. Goodnight!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...What just happened?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't wait to take a little time off during the holiday break.

lines.speaker: monte
