lines.text: Mortimer, you've never worked a full day in your life.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What about that one time I got my head caught in the toilet?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That doesn't count.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: IT WAS AT WORK!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I FOUND AND CAPTURED BIGFOOT!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OMG, that’s a bear!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: UGH, Fine! Then I caught Barefoot…

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you planting corn all over the office?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because soon I’ll be able to hear everything!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Those ears don’t do that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So are you saying this idea is kind of corny?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Stop it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because I thought it was a-maize-ing!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: These rolling blackouts are a real problem.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep, dinner prep can be so messed up. Want frozen fish for dinner?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We had fish in the freezer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nope…aquarium froze during the last blackout.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I had this dream last night.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I’m going to regret this…what was your dream?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was sleepwalking & found an ice skating rink in the yard.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you put water in the kiddie pool?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ummm, told you I was sleepwalking.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: … and that’s why the toilet doesn’t work to this day.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Should I be concerned that all of your stories end the same way?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Only if you leave the bathroom unlocked.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you read the news?! I heard it was incredible!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I didn’t, what happened?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don’t know, I was hoping you could tell me so I wouldn’t need to read it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: This has been a pizza roll and ranch kind of day…

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean you want to have pizza rolls and ranch dressing for dinner?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I had a pizza that fell out of the delivery box, rolled down a hill and hit the side of a ranch house.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How did that happen?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Get me some pizza rolls and ranch dressing and I’ll tell you all about it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you wearing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It’s the latest in tactical sleepwear, the “Stealth Sleeper 5000”. Guaranteed to make you impossible to see when the lights are off.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mortimer--WHAT? What was that explosion??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nothing… by the way, totally unrelated… how current are we on our insurance?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you have any plans for tomorrow night?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm gonna scream in the backyard at midnight while banging pots and pans.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, my Nana used to do that old tradition every New Year's Eve!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, it's New Year's Eve?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sheesh, well, it wasn't an easy year, but next year couldn't be any worse!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: STOP SAYING THAT EVERY NEW YEAR'S EVE.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Happy New Year! What are your resolutions?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hello? Resolutions?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I resolved to answer you less.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, another trip around the Sun!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The Earth goes around the Sun once a year.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The Earth. Our planet. The Sun. The big warm light in the sky.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Still not following.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you not going into work today?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Gotta use those sick days before they expire!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Your White Elephant gift just arrived!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, that office party was weeks ago!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know, but it took forever to get him through customs.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I gotta go down to the loading dock and accept delivery, Can you sign for the 600lbs of peanuts when they get here?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We're gonna get in trouble with the ASPCA again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let's just agree to disagree.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: About what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pick.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I got us an early Valentine's Day present!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mortimer, this says "For Couples Only."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yup! That's what we are, a couple of friends!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You really have to learn to look at the reviews when you buy these things.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Now I already ate all the chocolates, but what do we do with this feather, have a tickle fight? Physics test? Hat accessory that we shall call macaroni?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Look, about the music you're playing--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was told I was allowed to listen to music at the office.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, well--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And it's at a low volume.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh totally, but--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So what’s the problem?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The problem is you've been playing Kid Rock's "Bawitaba" on repeat for four days and I'm going insane.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, I found a typo in one of the sales events on Woot.com

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay, I'll make a plan of corrective action.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, or you could just retype the--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And we'll need some intel on the lay of the land, key stakeholders, etc.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We'll also have to retask the sattelite.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you have ANY idea what we do here?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you catch that new series on--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, please don't recommend anything more. There is SO much to watch already and I feel like I'm drowning in digital content.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But you won't be up to date on all the pop culture happenings!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, I still have a Blackberry and own boot-cut jeans, do you think I care about staying current on pop culture?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I suppose the combined culture shock would literally kill you at this point.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No offense, but your odor is offensive.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How am I not supposed to take offense at that?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's up to you, I'm only pointing out the truth.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay fine, no offense but not wearing your Woot! hat just to differentiate yourself from me is not a suitable replacement for a personality.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ....ouch.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Golf was excellent this morning.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm glad YOU enjoyed it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you upset about this?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I wasn't invited. It's because I was too good last time. But I'm over it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You built a sandcastle in the bunker and totaled two golf carts.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'M OVER IT.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's 2/22/22! Make a wish!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's January 12th.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Gasp! My wish to go back in time came true!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I've had enough of city life. I'm roughing it and I don't know when I'll be back.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, I saw the tent in the kitchen.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I bought a bunch of round energy chargers for the house!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know, round energy chargers. See?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: These are donuts.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I'm FULL of energy, so they're working!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I'm sorry I broke your rectangle lamp.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? I don't have a rectangle lamp.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh good, never mind!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, WHAT HAPPENED TO MY LAPTOP?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ugh, Mortimer, you've really screwed up this time.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can explain! There was that big snowfall and I thought, "Why not go sledding?" And your laptop was RIGHT there and--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WHAT? I was talking about your overdue marketing report, what are y--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: UH OH PHONE IS RINGING GOTTA GO!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...so, you know, it's kind of a catch-22.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh indubitably, that's like the Heisen-Chambord experiment of 1947, y'know, the one that proved that biomechanical neurodivergent electrons can chemically bond with amino acids.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is happening right now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I'm kidding. I have no idea what any of those words are.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: GOOD MORNING, MONTE!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you using that announcer voice?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HA HA GOOD JOKE, MY FRIEND. I ALWAYS SPEAK THUSLY. NOW WHAT AMAZING DEALS DOES WOOT HAVE TODAY?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you just now realize that our customers read this?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OF COURSE NOT! AHEM NOW TELL ME ABOUT THIS BIDET! WHAT A DEAL!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh dear, my desk is so disorganized. I've got to get my act together.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't be such a grandpa, no one's going to judge you on the cleanliness of your workstation.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But my pens are like jackstraws and my dittos are all higgledy-piggledy!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just how old ARE you?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I just had a nauseating thought.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is it that my laundry has been designated as a sentient being by the WHO?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, it's that it's your turn to cook tonight.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Does that mean you'll do my laundry?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I snagged a PS5!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? That's amazing! How did you get a Playstation?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I meant when I was fishing I simultaneously caught a Pufferfish, Sailfin, Shark, Swordfish, and Short-fin Sturgeon, a situation better known to the seafaring crowd as a “PS5.”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why do I talk to you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Tomorrow I'm going fishing for the even-more-elusive "XBOXSERIESX"!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We're coming to the end of the first month of 2022, how are you doing with your resolutions?.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, my new treadmill currently serves as a towel rack, and last night instead starting to read "Love in the Time of Cholera" I binged the second season of "Flavor of Love."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, same.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you follow Woot! on Facebook?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I was banned from Facebook for violating "MLM Promotion Guidelines" or whatever.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You had a multi-level marketing scheme?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No! I just asked my friends to ask their friends to ask their friends to send me a dollar.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: UGH! I have an itch I can't reach!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I said--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, I heard what you said, I'm just ignoring it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm gonna get my name changed.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, you shouldn't change your name, it's your brand! It says so much about who you are, friend!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm changing it to "King Freak."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...I reverse my opinion on this.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is that smell??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is it my sack of sock laundry?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ugh, no.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is it the Philly cheeseteak I forgot under my bed?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, I don't think so.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is it my Gorgonzola milkshake?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: At this point I think it's just the cacophony of smells that is you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you want a taco?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Me, too. Oh well.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WILL YOU STOP DOING THAT?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I felt bad yesterday about taunting you with the possibility of a taco. So I got you a taco.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, that's uncharacteristically thoughtful of you! ...HORF! This is mushy and cold!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I said I felt bad yesterday, and that's when I bought the taco.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I've... never seen such wanton destruction...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mmmm.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Such unparalleled carnage...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mmmphhh.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Such unmitigated and bloody annihilation....

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No one said you HAD to come with me to the "All-U-Can-Eat Rib Pit," you chose to.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Bing-Bong!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Huh?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ‘Sup baby?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's a Tik Tok thing!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I told you that my Social Media lexicon stopped at 2009.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay then: drumstick emoji, drool emoji, wristwatch emoji?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, I could get some lunch.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, can you help me put together this thing I got from IKEA?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sure, but I'm going need the DJIREKTIONS!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you always going to make that joke?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Always.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, I got some NFTs. You want some?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, I didn't think you knew anything about digital art.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Art? I was talking about Nachos for Tuesday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I love my new laptop, it's lightweight, easy-to-use, and eco-friendly.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a spiral notebook.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But they sold it to me as "Nature's Laptop!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How much did you spend?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not that much, but I had to pay extra for the stylus.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a pencil.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm going to the store, did you make the list?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep, here you go.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This is just a recipe for triple chocolate cake.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep, everything you need is on there.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hooray!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's up?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nothing, just felt like saying Hooray!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Try it!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hooray!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What do you think?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hooray!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hooray!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ugh, I've got such a headache.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oooh, can I....

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...and no, you may NOT kick me really hard "to take my mind off it."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're still mad about last time, huh?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I finished vacuuming!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No way.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, you're right. But I did the dishes!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I still don't believe you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Right again!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: There is a tide in the affairs of men, which, taken at the flood, lead on to fortune.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's that?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Shakespeare! It's from Julius Caesar, and it means...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No no, I mean THAT.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sigh. That's a shiny aluminum pie pan, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's up, Monte? You look stressed.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: My car needs to go back to the shop. Sometimes I wish it would just disappear.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If you're serious about that, I know a guy.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm afraid to ask what that even means.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My friend Artie is an aspiring magician and needs a finale for his act.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, I didn't even have to ask.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You have any plans this weekend, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, actually, barring inclement weather --

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm gonna re-organize my Blue Öyster Cult records and take a bath.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um, ok. Why did you ask me a question if you just wanted to answer it yourself?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why else would you ask somebody a question?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Maahhhhhhn-TEEEE... I'm boooooo-OORED...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, we're still on the clock until 5pm. How do you want to pass the time? We can't just whine at each other and--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ooh, yeah! Sounds like fun! I'll go first: Maahhhhhn-TEEEE... I'm boooooo-OORED...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you have any idea where my cupcake got to?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What? No! What? No!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, now I do.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I really love cheese.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Me too.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's your favorite kind of cheese? A nice soft brie or a pungent bleu? Perhaps an heirloom herbed goat's milk? Something with rind or without?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hmm. So many great choices. But I think I'm going to have to go with "melted."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's easier to ask for forgiveness than permission, right?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, I think that depends on the transgression — OW!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm so sorry, Monte. I should never have shot that rubber band at your face. Will you forgive me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're abusing the system.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte! HAPPY VA--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Don't say it! Just don't say it. I'm feeling lonely today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You’re never truly alone because all life is so intricately connected to the various expressions of itself. You’re part of life and you ARE life. You’re part of the universe that’s also inside of you. You belong to everything because you are, at your core, everything.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow. That actually cheered me up. Thanks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What did?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Love you too, buddy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte! HAPPY VA--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Don't say it! Just don't say it. I'm feeling lonely today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You’re never truly alone because all life is so intricately connected to the various expressions of itself. You’re part of life and you ARE life. You’re part of the universe that’s also inside of you. You belong to everything because you are, at your core, everything.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow. That actually cheered me up. Thanks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What did?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Love you too, buddy.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I made you bacon and eggs!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'll skip the bacon, thanks.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really? Bacon seems exactly like something that you, specifically, would be annoyingly obsessed with.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nah. It bugs me that they make such a big deal about how it's "cured," but nobody ever says what disease it had in the first place.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you doing, Mortimer??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm putting scratches and dents into these phones so Woot! can sell them cheaper.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, that's not how that works. AT ALL. Put away the hammer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I am so tired of you not telling me these things BEFORE I do something stupid.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You ever wonder if the corn kernels hurt when they pop?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, they don't have a nervous system.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So they're NOT nervous about being popped like that?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, that's not what that means...I mean...oh never mind, just pass the popcorn.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Would you ever live overseas?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, totally! I studied abroad in college and it really changed the way I see the world!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry. When I said "live overseas," I meant, "live over the sea." Like, in a blimp.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Of course.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, want to go to brunch?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's a 2 hours wait and a spend of $23 on overcooked eggs and tepid coffee.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why do you hate brunch so much?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My old pet capybara Philip was killed by a Monte Cristo sandwich.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: There's so much to unpack in that statement.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you believe in unicorns?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Of course not. Unicorns are mythical creatures invented by the ancient Greeks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well if they don't exist, then who ate the rainbow?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What rainbow?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Exactly.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Where do butterflies get their wings, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What a thoughtful question. First, the caterpillar digests itself, releasing enzymes to dissolve all of its tissues...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok stop, that's gross.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, it's science, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, science is baking soda volcanoes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I know, but it’s just a mathematical sequence, no reason to get excited.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: 2/22/22! Two! Two two! TWO TWO!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I probably shouldn't tell you that it's also a Tuesday...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: AUUGHHH TWO TWO TWO TWO TWO TWO TWO TWO TWO TWO

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I wish I could bring my dog to work!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You don't have a dog.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm really close to the American Kennel Club recognizing "Swarm of Bees" as a breed of dog.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, I'm so hungry I could eat a horse.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you referring to the great quantity of meat that a horse would provide, hence satisfying your enormous hunger? Or do you mean that you're so hungry you would even consider eating horse meat despite the social taboo?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Um, I don't know, I stopped listening right after you started talking.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I’ve been thinking about ways we can make the office more efficient.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh oh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why do you say, “Uh oh?”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: First it was indoor carrier pigeons, then etch-a-sketch sticky notes, and then phones in the bathroom stalls! What now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Retrofit a beer helmet to dispense iced coffee. Less trips to the breakroom and the drink tube keeps your hands free.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ....I hate that I like that idea.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: When I was young, my family owned a cow that had a calf.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not true.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That calf and I were really close and we did everything together.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Don't say it...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: He was a brother from an udder mother.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why do you do this to me?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, what is your middle name?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: "Zuma."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How did your folks come up with that?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: All they would tell me was that it had something to do with revenge?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mort, what is your middle name?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: “Ified.”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How did your folks come up with that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It had something to do with how they felt when they first saw me?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm BACK IN THE GAME!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The GAME! I'm BACK IN it!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you talking about??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm entering the regional Pog tournament in a week and I'm excited because I was the 1998 Pog Semi-Finalist and I'm EXCITED! Do I have to explain everything??

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Actually, in this case I still have no idea what you just said.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Were you really a Pog champion in the '90s?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep. I was 78-0, and I was treated like royalty.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I seriously doubt that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey I got 50% off a Taquito Tower at Applebee's between 4-6pm on weekdays...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How are you training to retake your 1998 Regional Semi-Final Pog Championship crown?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm gonna live like it's 1998! Right now I'm eating a box of Oreo Cakesters, chasing it with a bowl of Waffle Crisp, and then paging my friends on my beeper!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okayyyy. And what's with the VCR?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I gotta watch my Ally McBeal tapes!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And how is Pog Championship training going? Are you still reliving the '90s?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I sprained my ankle trying to do the running man in my old JNCO jeans.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Living with you is like a fever dream.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: TODAY'S THE DAY! The 2022 Pog Semi-Regional Semi-Final! Are you coming?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I have better things to do with my time.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Like when you spent four hours in the bathroom last week, perfecting your Edward James Olmos speech from Battlestar Galactica?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...did you tell anyone about that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not yet.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'll see you at the competition! In the front row! Cheering!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So Say We All.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, my performance at the Pog Championship was somewhat disappointing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: When do you think it started to disappoint you? Was it when they refused to play "Jump" for your entrance theme, or was it your pre-fight war dance? Oh, I know! it's when you pantsed the referee, right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Lack of corn dogs.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Story of your life.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Right??

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So you're retiring from the Pog Championship circuit for good?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yup, time to hang up my tights.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know you didn't have to wear those in the first place, right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know, I just liked doing deep lunges while I competed.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, isn't your presentation starting soon? Did you prepare anything?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nope, so I'm gonna pull a Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What, pray tell, is "Pulling a Monte?"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'll drone on and on about stuff no one cares about until they go catatonic and then I quietly slip out of the room.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Let me tell you in six points why that's wrong--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: See?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Want me to make some cookies?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YES!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay, I'll need your help. Please beat those two eggs and add a tablespoon of oil and--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh wait, did you say "make?" I thought you said "go out and buy."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mistook a single syllable for an entire sentence clause?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm an enigma. Are the cookies ready?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, what's the current science on eggs? Are they good or bad for you?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Actually, a recent Harvard study found that eggs--OW! Why did you hit me with an egg--OW! I mean TWO EGGS?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because they're good for you! Feel all those Omega-3s running down your face!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is it time?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Not yet.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How about now?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Not yet.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Now?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Come on, ramen only takes like 3 minutes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: THIS IS AGONY

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've made my famous chocolate chip chili! Want some?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is it the same recipe as before?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, this time I added more chips!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But they are still the only ingredient, right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why mess with perfection?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, where's the Close Encounters Blu-ray?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's my collection, under the number 3.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Clever. Because it's Close Encounters of THIRD Kind?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, because it's Spielberg's third theatrical film.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're a special kind of nerd.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Want to see a movie?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure! How about--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BLOOD MONSTERS OF THE EXPLOSION REALM.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not a movie.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sure it is! I'll describe it to you: So it starts with music BOM BOM BOOOOOOOOM and then a spaceship VVVVSSSSHHHHHH flies through and--sit down, let me finish--and then the Laser Warrior rides a motorcycle on the rings of Saturn and blows up the...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ... and I said, "That's not au jus!" Hahahaha!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I hate Mondays.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But today's Wednesday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I hate days.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Check out my fort!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: My new couch!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is my new fort!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can you believe this guy?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Who?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The person who's trying to call me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's wrong with them?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: THEY'RE MAKING ME USE MY PHONE AS A PHONE!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Will you be my test subject?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Great, so stand right where you're standing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Great, the I-Made-You-Say-No Device works!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, could I get that 20 bucks you owe me?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, sure. Here you go.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: …this is a ticket stub for the 2009 action thriller, "2012."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You can give me my change whenever. No rush.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, I have this concerning lump on my lower back, can you take a look?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, you're pointing to your butt.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: GOTCHA AGAIN!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I have made it VERY clear to you I am NEVER playing "Bum Looker."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you heard the one about the nauseous hippo who went to the pool?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I haven't.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Me neither. Let me know if you do.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Want to watch the sunset with me?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Eh, I saw it earlier today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean the sunrise?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was upside down.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here, try this.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: 'Mmm, delicious! I love key lime pie!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, that's not lime... Nor a pie, TBH.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I found a unicorn!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a football with a corndog stuck to it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ENCHANTING ISN'T IT

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy International Waffle Day, here's a dollar!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: International Waffle Day was yesterday. You're a day late.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: AND a dollar short!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh man, you know what I really like?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's not silence. I know that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's the big deal about the pyramids? It's not a very difficult shape to make.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, they are massive and, you know, incredible feats of human achievement.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, so humans make a big 3-D triangle and it's "one of the wonders of the world," but I make a 35-egg omelette, and it's a "bad life choice."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Tee hee. Hehehehehe.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you laughing about?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm imagining someone singing "Despacito" but in a Christopher Walken voice.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Of course you are.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm really enjoying this new Human Simulator game. Have you played it, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ew, no, that sounds gross.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's so weird! They barely have any hair on them. Plus there are mortgages.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: UGHHH STOP

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: APRIL FOOLS!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, you have to pull a prank and THEN you yell April Fools.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, my bad, why don't you go ahead and open your sock drawer while I take a deep inhale?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you know monkeys are 100% water?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not true.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes it is?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've been working on an idea. Pretzels that AREN'T dipped in chocolate!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So, like, regular pretzels then?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here try one!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I've eaten a normal pretzel befo--UGH! Why is it so wet??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Our R&D Dept. is working on non-licking chocolate removal technology but we're still in Beta testing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey can you get me a glass of water?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure I can--MORTIMER YOU'RE ON FIRE!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah. Hence the glass of water, please.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, take a look at this righteous scar.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OH GROSS, what happened?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I went to the scar shop.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: For the last time, the self-service table saw at Home Depot is NOT a scar shop.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: GOD

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: IT'S WEDNESDAY!!!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Trying to psych yourself over Hump Day, huh?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ....it's STILL 56 hours until the weekend.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you smell that? Smells like... victory.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Smells like rotten cabbage.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, from my victory garden!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh man I just thought to myself, "What if a blue car drove by my window" and a BLUE CAR DROVE BY MY WINDOW!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, you are most certainly clairvoyant.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nah, I'm already taking an antibiotic for that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, try my new sandwich! It's 95% organic!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay, fine I'll try a bite-Ow!!! WHY are there drywall screws in this Montecristo???

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, that's the inorganic part.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey! Remember you're on the hook for dessert tonight.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yup, I'm making Worms in Dirt.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Eugh! That sounds disgusting!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, it's just a funny name.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's in it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Blood worms, mulch, and peat-moss.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hi Monte, wanna piece of lava cake?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why is it glowing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I cracked a bunch of glow sticks into the batter for the lava!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh dear god.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Look! My teeth are bright enough to cast shadows!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think the dog went on the carpet again.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, we don't have a dog.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, this is awkward.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Shut up and get a mop. Also, you're going to the vet today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, Monte. You ever wonder if...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I'm busy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...you could...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Noooo....

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...make a parachute...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...NOOOOO....

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...for a cat out of only coffee filters?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why is your brain like this?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm starting my own rock band. Want to be in it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure. What instrument do I get to play?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're on rhythm igneous, I'll play lead metamorphic.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is it ok that I borrowed your shoes?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure, why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Makin' soup.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Then no.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well then you're gonna need some new shoes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Would you like to buy a candy bar to help my fundraiser?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure! What's it for?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: To reinvest in more candy bars.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: …So it ended up that I had the right registration form after all so I went right back to the DMV! We had a good laugh, the clerk and I.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ha. Haahahhaha, HAHAHH, HA, HA, Ha AAAAAhahahahahah

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, it wasn't THAT funny.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh I wasn't listening. I was thinking of something else.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, it's time I ramped up my lifting regimen if I want beach abs by June!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: When's the last time you even touched weights?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yesterday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I was at the mall and I accidentally brushed up against a 1-lb weight.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're eating that banana wrong, you know.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How are you supposed to eat it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pinch the bottom and peel towards the top.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Which is the bottom?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's the...well...considering we actually eat them upside-down, I guess...hmmm....

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh oh, you've out-nerded yourself again.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's four-twenty.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: COME ON, 420?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't follow.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're ruining this day for me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, may I run something past you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sure! I'm all ears!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So in the first paragraph of this dissertation states that--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Zzzzzz

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How did you fall asleep in four seconds?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So this morning I woke up with a Backstreet Boys song in my head.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh. That sucks.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I know. And I don't think I should have to suffer alone.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't you dare.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You are ... my fiiiiire. My one ... deeeesiiiiire.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I hate you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay, let's go over it one more time… A cow says?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Moo."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: A duck says?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Quack."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good. A monkey says?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Sorry I am late with the budget report, I will get it to you by lunch."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Very good.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I read that people make conclusions about you based on your handshake.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I wonder what people think when they shake MY hand?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: "How can something be slimy AND sticky?"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Does it ever get to you, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Does what get to me?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That we are but a speck of dust, a mote hanging motionless, fragile in a summer ray. This cold reality cares not for our dreams, our loves. It only knows chaos!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: They're still refusing to stock the machine with Oreo Cakesters, huh?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're eating that banana wrong, you know.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How are you supposed to eat it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Pinch the bottom and peel towards the top.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Which is the bottom?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's the...well...considering we actually eat them upside-down, I guess...hmmm....

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uh oh, you've out-nerded yourself again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I love a short week! So much easier when you know you're OUTTA here on Wednesday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, we have work scheduled on Thursday AND Fri-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: SORRY I'M IN PRE-VACATION MODE CAN'T HEAR YA

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Unnnngggggggggggggggg...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: More pie?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Come join my fight club!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, I'm not really the fighting type.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh yeah? The correct spelling is 'C-A-T-S-U-P'.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: THEM'S FIGHTING WORDS

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BLEEP BLOOP

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, please...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: SURRENDER MONKEY IT IS I MORTBOT

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know how much I hate Mortbot...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: MORTBOT MUST INTERFACE WITH PIZZA

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay, let's go over it one more time… A cow says?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Moo."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: A duck says?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Quack."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good. A monkey says?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Sorry I am late with the budget report, I will get it to you by lunch."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Very good.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ordered my bread pool! It's like a bread bowl but the size of a pool!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That sounds completely unnecessary and excessive.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's actually super practical if you just bought 2000 gallons of cheddar broccoli soup.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Check out my AMAZING new hat!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, that's not a hat. That's a book that you have balanced on top of your head.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why are you so close-minded?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why did you dump a bucket of ice on me in the shower this morning??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, that wasn't me, that was my clone.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: …I'm going to stop asking questions and just forgive you to save myself the irritation of your explanation.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hooray!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, can you help with something I'm writing? How well do you know Emily Dickinson?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What did you want to know?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK, so if she was a werewolf, what would she--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't know why I ever get my hopes up with you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: AIRHORN!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: GAH! Why did you just yell "AIRHORN" in my ear?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My airhorn ran out of air.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Knock knock!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Who's there?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Me who?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Me, Mort. I lost my keys.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I tempt you with some avocado toast this morning?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure, that sounds--WHAT'S ALL THIS SMOKE?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It was hard fitting the whole avocado in the toaster.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You want to do a 5-hour energy shot with me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No thank you, I derive my energy naturally.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Suit yourself, but you won't find any “Xtreme Nitro Nectar" in nature.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Morning... Mortimer, why are you clinging to the ceiling?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: W-w-well I was b-bored so I did a 18-hour energy shot. It's three 5-hour energy shots d-dunked in t-three shots of espresso. But I gotta change the name.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Because it didn't last 18 hours?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because I took it on Sunday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know, I think maybe we need to monitor our caffeine intake a bit more.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You come for my coffee, I come for your SOUL.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're not joking, are you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's International Hummus Day! It's time for the Hummus Song!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The Hummus Song!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are the words?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No words, you just HUM it!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Even by your standards, that was terrible.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's National Miniature Golf Day!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's also World Migratory Bird Day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Dude, mine is WAY more fun. Yours is lame.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, so much for National Decency Day.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: MORT. WHY IS THERE A LIVE OSTRICH IN THE BATHROOM?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you want the good news or the bad news?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Enjoying that Fact-a-Day calendar I got you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's great! Did you know Joan of Arc was canonized today back in 1920?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes but the french pronunciation is “D'Arc." If you want to be accurate.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You are an absolute "D'ork" if you want to be accurate.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm ordering a small pizza, you want anything?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Three orders of Nutzy Krust bread with a pint of Ranch.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're really going to eat that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's available for a limited time only!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Look into my eyes, Monte. And tell me what you truly desire.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YES?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...really think you should get your money back from that mind control seminar.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But the flyer at the laundromat looked so promising!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm starting a new venture: "Hip-Hop Hard Seltzers" featuring flavors like Busta Limes!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And it's that Twain-esque wit that keeps the lights on around here.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is this notepad you left on my desk?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's part of my plan to reduce time lost due to workplace accidents.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It says: "Monte: I'm so sorry I broke your [BLANK] with my [BLANK]."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, saves me time on all that apologizing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: By the way you're gonna want one of those in a few minutes and the answers are "scissors" and "burrito."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How much pudding is too much?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ummm...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let me rephrase. If I used a credit card to buy $600 worth of pudding, do you think...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hang on. You don't have a credit card.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's why I was asking YOU.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Aw man, I am really into screaming metal right now. Gets me so PUMPED!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Who do you listen to?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Listen? I just like to scream metals. TUNGSTEN! NICKEL! ZINC!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey guess what??

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm adopting racing shrimp! I even got them little outfits!!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Normally I'd say something about this, but I'm honestly just too tired.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow, I can't believe THIS is what broke you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, look at you, Mortimer. What are you so dressed up for?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because you know what's back? Swing dancing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Seriously? I hadn't heard about another swing revival. Since when?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Since I forgot to do laundry and this zoot suit from 1995 is all I had clean.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I would like soccer if it was more like foosball.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How so? More scoring?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, played by tiny little men on a table in my house. Tell me you wouldn't want to see that.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: For the last time, I'm not going to guess the random famous person you're thinking of.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh come on! Take ONE guess! Do you want a hint?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Fine. Richard Karn.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HOW DID YOU KNOW THAT?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's ALWAYS Richard Karn with you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you ever get the feeling you're being watched?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can't say that I do.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So, never? Not at home, in your house?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No. Why? Do I seem like the paranoid type?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No. I just wanted to make sure my hiding spot was good.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why the long face?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm feeling a little hoarse.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sorry, I would have offered my lobster dinner but I just finished it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't believe you'd be so shellfish.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: TODAY'S CHAT WAS SPONSORED BY THE NATIONAL PUN COUNCIL

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey I found $20 on the coffee table! I'm off to get candy!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you mean the $20 I left out for you, to go get change for laundry?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey man, finders keepers.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you covered in spaghetti sauce?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I assume you haven't seen the bathroom yet.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Would you mind if I practiced cello?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sure, what flavor?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wait, what did you say?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Would you mind if I practiced cello?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you SURE you didn't say you were making me Jello?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You are maddening.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So...no Jello?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's time to do the dishes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's your chore this week.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How much are time machines?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'M SOOOO BOORRREEEDDDD

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wanna help me clean the birdcage?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not that bored, jeez.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...and that's how you replace the batteries in the remote.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I didn't even know it took batteries!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How did you think it worked?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ummm, tiny trained spiders?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How would...I just...I give up.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ready for our bike ride?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you sure we can't do a two-person bike?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean a tandem?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A what now?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: A tandem bike. That's what a two-person bike is called.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I can tell by your blank stare that I have once again, just barely, expanded your mind.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have a question.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: If it's about pizza, I don't want to hear it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But what if a pizza was also a sandwich?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, it's called a calzone.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: TAKE ME TO THIS PIZZA SANDWICH

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I feel sick.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How many calzones did you eat last night?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Maybe 4?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, I actually would have guessed 6.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: 4 calzones after the 2 pizzas.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't understand golf.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's to understand?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Like, why are there so many birds?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Let's concentrate on your short game.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, want to go bowling?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I didn't know you bowled. What's your average?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can eat 38 bowls of cereal an hour.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Looks like it's going to be a beautiful day!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not a window, that's the TV.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, you still have your lights on. Is it because you're afraid of the dark?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No way! Only BABIES are afraid of the dark.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, it's not so uncommon. 1 in 4 people report a fear of the dark!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well that's comforting.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You hear that? Is it the rustling of leaves or the whispered claws of a spirit climbing the side of our house towards this very window?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Probably just the leaves. Anyway, have a good night!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, you need to do your half of the cleaning TONIGHT.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's the rush?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Our bathmat contracted trench foot.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm serious, your room hasn't beed tidied in MONTHS.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I got it covered.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What do you mean you "got it covered?" Who are you calling?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Crime scene cleaners.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What did you do with the housekeys?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I shipped them to myself.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because I had a feeling I would lose them in the next 3-5 days.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can you help me with dinner?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure, what do you need?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: For you to do it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, I'm off to my cartographer's guild meeting.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is this the one where you do the fancy writing?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, that's my calligraphy club.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is it the one where you work on solving codes?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nope, that's the cryptology club.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is it the one where you throw money away on the Internet?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, that's just crypto.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Friday!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You are correct, it is indeed a happy Friday. Thank you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...you know, a reaction something like a high-five or a "yeah!" is much more conducive to keeping the weekend energy going.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why, what was my reaction like?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Like throwing oatmeal on a sparkler.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whew, tough week. I need this weekend!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why? You left early every day this week.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The athleticism needed to dodge my responsibilities takes a lot of energy!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wanna go to brunch?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is it with Sundays and brunch?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Bottomless mimosas sure ease you into Monday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Monday!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Incorrect.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm going to adapt a gritty reboot of "Pride and Prejudice"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay, how would you adapt, for example, Mrs. Bennet's attempts to persuade Mr. Bennet to visit Mr. Bingley?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I would have Mr. Bingley rapel out a window into a waiting helicopter.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...you haven't read word one of that book, have you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you smell fresh-baked bread?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Anything you can do to change that?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Like bake bread?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Great idea!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Would you mind if practiced french horn?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Would you mind if I screamed the whole time?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, about that snake in the kitchen...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WHAT SNAKE?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, uhhh, you know what, forget I said anything!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How am I supposed to do that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I don't know. I can't even keep a snake secure!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: There's nothing better than a good book.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What about pizza?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Would it help if I told you I'm reading a book ABOUT pizza?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't trust Australia.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's a country.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yep.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And it's ALSO a continent?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yep.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I just don't trust that.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can you pick me up later today?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ooh, I can't. I have an appointment.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Pizza appointments don't count.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you doing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm making a new video game.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're just throwing pieces of baloney at the TV news.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's still in Beta.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But for real though, I'm making a new Woot! video game.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's the objective?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: To avoid my real work?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...I meant of the game.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, maybe to throw enough bananas to max the Banana Meter or whatever.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, you can't just "decide" to develop a video game, you have NO requisite skills.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I Play "Expert Mode" on all games, so I'm a Video Game Expert!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That doesn't make you an expert on making Video Games. I mean, you eat a lot of pizza but you're no "Pizza Expert."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YOU TAKE THAT BACK!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you seen my keys?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: They're right in front of you! How did you not see that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Forgot to open my eyes this morning.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Unbelievable!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The world is flat.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't believe that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: SEE?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I really need you to do the laundry. Today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But what will happen to Laundry Mountain?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, hopefully it will go away, tectonically speaking.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Noooo but then I can't summit the towels!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So, Woot!'s birthday celebration is happening again!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, hey, can I see your phone for a sec?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you Googling?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just checking to see when they're releasing Bags o' Crap so I can sell the information on the Dark Web.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hi, friends.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte hit some traffic, so he's gonna be a little late to today's Monkey Chat.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sooooo what's new with you guys?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well...this is horrible.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't ever leave me alone on a Monkey Chat again.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It wasn't that bad, was it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I had to tell them my ice cream truck joke.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OH PLEASE NO.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pick a card.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Now show me your card.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is your card the Ace of Hearts?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, it's the Seven of Diamonds. I just showed it to you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Dang, magic is harder than I thought.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: --and THAT is why we don't mix vinegar and baking soda.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, stop lecturing me and help me clean the ceiling.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ready for this week's book club?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: YOU have a book club?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sure I do. Just because I don't like books doesn't mean I can't have a book club. I'm just a bit liberal on the definition of "book."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So what's this week's book?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The back of this box of Peanut Butter Cap'n Crunch. Now how do you think it informs the theme of man's inhumanity to man?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Fourth of July!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That was five days ago.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know, but I got all these decorations at half price!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How American of you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey will you try my french onion soup?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, that sounds amaz---GAH WHAT IS THIS MADE OF??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Funyons, nacho cheese sauce, and ranch-flavored croutons, served piping hot!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This is disgusting, I can't eat this.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But you didn't even find the little French flag I buried in it!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh man, I can't WAIT for all the deals on our Birthday this year!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you hoping to get?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A new bread maker!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait. I just BOUGHT a new bread maker.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A new bread maker that can make a batch of Play-Doh without exploding.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Where is Coolio? Like right now.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean '90s hip-hop sensation Coolio?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, I have no idea where Coolio is.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay good, I didn't want "Gangsta's Paradise" stuck in my head again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, I even THINK about that song and it's over.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is that smell?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You'll have to be more specific.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's like beef boullion mixed with donkey sweat.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Again, I'm gonna need you to be REALLY specific here.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Aw man, I left my phone on the bus!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: They probably have a lost and found, give them a call.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I mean I left it on TOP of the bus.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How did...why would...yeah, I really can't help you with that one.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think I need glasses.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why do you say that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just brushed my teeth with Preparation H and rinsed with Windex.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Don't you just love hot summer nights? The quiet susurrus of nocturnal life! The pleasant breeze through open windows! The rustle of the greenery!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sure, sticking to my sheets is just an absolute pleasure.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why do I try?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is that rhetorical? Because I have some thoughts.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Want some jerky?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow, this is good! Where did you get it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The tray was on the kitchen table.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: THAT'S MY DRIED SLUG COLLECTION!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: AUGHHH!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: AUGHHH!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you excited for the Woot-Off tomorrow?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh yes, I am very excited for the Woot-Off tomorrow.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure is going to be a great Woot-Off tomorrow!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can't wait for tomorrow's Woot-Off!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, and I certainly did not take any extra bribes to mention the Woot-Off!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Me neither! Woot-Off!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you seen my hamster?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And my slingshot?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And what's this meeting on my calendar: "Movie Pitch: Hammy Hero?"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did I just horrifically answer all my own questions?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I used all the rubberbands, sorry.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No big deal.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: …don't you wanna know where they all went?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, I already know it's something terrible so I'm going to sit here and quietly finish my tea before you ruin my morning.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Want me to come back in 15 minutes?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Perfect.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I want to buy this box of "NEW Cap'n Crunch: Oops! All Berries!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: There's no way I'm buying that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But I'll be behind on the franchise!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's like Marvel now: you have to eat a ton of different cereals or you won't understand the new cereal's references!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey I have a review with our manager next week, can you help me practice?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ahem... I need more time off please.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OK, is there something I can help with?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I need more time to work on making homemade stink bombs.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, let's keep working on that approach.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just don't feel fulfilled in my current role.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm sorry to hear that, how can I help?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You can let me use my homemade stink bombs at work.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Look, I don't want to pretend to be your manager anymore.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Aw come on!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Every scenario you bring up involves homemade stink bombs.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But it's what I'm passionate about!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is there any way I can incorporate my homemade stink bombs into my current role?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, and please stop bringing it up.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well then, I guess I'll be giving notice.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really? You're giving notice?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: GIVING NOTICE OF A MASSIVE STINK BOMB I JUST PUT IN YOUR OFFICE!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So how did your meeting with your manager go?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: She told me I had to stop talking about my homemade stink bombs.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not surprising.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So can you help me make some homemade stink bombs to mail to her?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I can't believe this has gone on for 5 chats.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I have some chocolate milk--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You don't have to ask my permission, that's weird.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You didn't let me finish. Can I have some chocolate milk in the tub while wearing this clown wig?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...I was wrong, NOW it's weird.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wooo! I just heard that SnailCon22 is still on for next week!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't believe that there's a pet snail convention and that you're going to it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're just jealous I got a photo with Marianne Mollusk last year.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just want to stop having this conversation.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry, I had the last bowl of Quisp.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You had the last bowl of Quisp?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, I had the bowl of Quisp.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Better head to the store for more delicious Quisp!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: TODAY'S CHAT IS SPONSORED BY QUISP, THE SAUCER-SHAPED, CRUNCHY CORN CEREAL THAT HAS DELIGHTED KIDS AND ADULTS EVERYWHERE!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey I'm really loving these Bush's Baked Beans!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Me too! I love that they are slow-cooked from a secret family recipe!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And I love that they have over a dozen delicious flavors!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did it work?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, let's see if they send us any free beans...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It worked with Quisp....

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ready for the week?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: To be over, yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It’s National Ice Cream Sandwich Day!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is that why you're dressed up like one?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes! And I went for real authenticity this year.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I noticed. I also noticed you're dripping all over the carpet.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Look! I got one of those sweet wing suits for sky diving!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Who just GIVES you these things? Shouldn't you have to prove you can sky dive NORMALLY before you get wings?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: All it takes is a credit card.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I thought your cards were all maxed out.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, but this one has generous "overdraft protection." Whatever that means.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, absolutely not. No way.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Come on! It'll be fun!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, it won't be. Jumping out of an airplane and careening through the sky on a thin filament of synthetic fabric is not going to be fun for me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well SOMEONE has to operate the camera for my sweet extreme sports highlight reel.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How'd the extreme skydiving go?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't want to talk about it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yikes! What happened to your leg?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WHAT KIND OF MORON STILL HAS AN AERIAL ANTENNA IN 2022

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: UGH WHEN WILL IT BE FRIDAY

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's Friday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Cool! Ok, let's try another one: UGH WHEN WILL A PIZZA BE SITTING IN FRONT OF ME

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You misspelled "Optiplex" in this sale.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, yeah, OptiPlex, right.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you even know what the word means?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh sure, it's the optimal amount of Plex per square inch.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Cubed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I got one of those outdoor TVs from Woot! Now I can get REALLY rowdy during the big game!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And by "big game" you mean the next Taylor Swift concert on pay-per-view, correct?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I hate that you check the cable bill.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So what's for dinner?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, you know how the hair dryer broke and you got that new air fryer, and--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And we're ordering out?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And we are ordering out, yes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where is the crab dip?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I ate it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The crab dip I made for tonight's party??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I thought this WAS the party.

lines.speaker: mortimer
