lines.text: Hey, we should tell people that a random computer we're gonna sell might turn into a break-dancing robot when you open the box.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But that's not true.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Didn't you hear the word "might" in there?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know, this is why Woot! Legal won't invite you to Happy Hour anymore.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I thought it was because I passed out last time.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Dude what was wrong with you on that Zoom call?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Rick shot down all my ideas this quarter, so I needed to subtly remind him who's Alpha.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So you stared into the camera and used an electric pencil sharpener over and over while CCR's "Fortunate Son" played in the background?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So...TOO subtle?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey did you eat my tuna fish sandwich?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Define "eat."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Like, you ate it. With your mouth.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, in that case, yes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Eww, I don't even want to KNOW why that would have been confusing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Morning!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you been up all night playing Elden Ring again?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We're friends, right?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Of course.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And friends do things for each other, right?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: For the last time, I am NOT making you a chocolate omelette.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Check it out! I bought a sloth!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um, I don't even think that's legal in this state.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well I can't return it, the guy in the Rite-Aid parking lot said no refunds.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: There is so much wrong with this conversation.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Look, you have to take the sloth to a zoo.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But what about my money? That's $50 I'll never get back.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What kind of person sells a sloth for $50?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I talked him up from $25.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok I took the sloth back.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good. What did the zoo say?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I didn't go to the zoo. I went back to Rite-Aid.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You took a sloth to Rite-Aid? And left it there?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm going to back to Rite-Aid, aren't I?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm going to back to Rite-Aid.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And so I told Carol, that's the last time I take YOU to a yard sale!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't get it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I guess you had to be there.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hahahahahahaha! Yes, good one!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I thought that was the punchline.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So, pizza?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We had pizza yesterday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's just a lot of pizza.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm going to pretend like I didn't hear that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So just hypothetically, you'd be pretty upset if I'd accidentally let 100 scorpions loose in your car, right?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes. Extremely upset, yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So compared to that, like, just one scorpion would be no big deal.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think it's time to revisit our carpooling arrangement.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Late for work again, huh?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes. I had to go to the hospital this morning after I found that scorpion you lost in my car.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, it was the most painful thing I've ever-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Please tell me Colonel Stingz is gonna be OK!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Look, I don't want to talk about it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, I didn't say anything. I don't even know what you're talking about.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: More like what I'm NOT talking about. I just said I didn't want to talk about it. Will you please respect my privacy?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure. Great.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK, fine, jeez! If you're gonna be that way about it, if you just HAVE to know, I'll tell you! So what happened was, the other day my sister-in-law called me asking for a Chicken Alfredo recipe but as you know I ate our cookbook because the pictures, so I experimented with Elmer's Glue and garlic salt and JUST when I got the consistancy right and the smell not so bad, she called back and said they were going with veal scallopini instead! Well, I wasn't about to sit there and take that from her, of all people so I says to her, I says--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can I please respect your privacy? Please?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you take the required workplace safety training course?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is this a passive-aggressive way to ask me to get rid of the water slide I JUST put up in the kitchen?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: My therapist says I need to stop berating myself for mistakes I made in the past.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I agree. I never feel sorry for anything I've done, and look how happy I am!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't think that's exactly what she meant...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WELL I'M NOT TAKING IT BACK!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Welcome to the weekend, Monte. PREPARE TO DIE!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait -- wha -- what's happening this weekend??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh nothing in particular. It's just important to meditate on your mortality every once in a while.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: On Your Marks...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, what? What's happening?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Get Set...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh I don't like this! What are we marking and setting for???

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: GO!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: AHHH!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...nothing happened.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, but isn't that more invigorating than caffeine?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, is there a taste more great than chocolate or what?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The sweet taste of victory?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Victory always tastes sour to me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really, why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because I had to achieve something, which makes me a little sour.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You should really do some work today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can't, waiting for IT to fix my laptop.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is that what smells like burning orange juice?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, that's something else entirely. By they way, stay out of the kitchen for a while.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I love ice cream.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Me too.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know what's better than ice cream?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is it when someone gets the ice cream for you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, it's when someone gets the---hey WAIT A MINUTE.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you fill the back yard with shrimp?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I feel like I haven't accomplished anything in 2022.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I felt that way too.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I also felt that way about 2021.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I guess there's always next year?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That’s the spirit.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't like you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I just ordered pizza.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't like you, I LOVE you!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let's play Eye Doe Noe.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How do you play that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Eye Doe Noe.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I win!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't know, friend. Life feels like it's passing me by.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So many times it happens too fast.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, that's a little judgy, but I understand what you're saying.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't lose your grip on the dreams of the past.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean there's still time to become a pro yodeler?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You must fight just to keep them alive.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're right! I should quit! ...Wait a minute...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's the Eye of the Tiger!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: NOT AGAIN.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, you are reading that framed certificate correctly.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You were the "poet of the month" in fifth grade?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uh-huh. My mom found it in her attic and mailed it to me. But listen, I don't want this to affect our friendship just because I'm a celebrated, award-winning author.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is this one of your poems on the back?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, but I don't expect any additional respect. I just want to be treated like a normal guy, you know?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Huh, I didn't know there were so many rhymes for "armpit".

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you scribbling there?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've decided to start my own inspirational quote app, it'll give you a motivating sentence to read in your time of need.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay, I'm about to go negotiate our raises for next year. What do you got?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay, I'm about to go negotiate our raises for next year. What do you got?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Gross and useless, just like you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well then all I have to say to you is, "Heavy is the Head That Wears the Bonk."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BONK!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ow!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, snazzy case! I didn't know you had an iPad.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't. Turns out these things make perfect bacon caddies.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Isn't that whole bacon thing a little played out now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's why I carry it in a case. Fatty, fried pork is the only thing I value more than my hip cred.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, wanna help the cause? My kid's selling cookies for school.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You don't have kids. Believe me, I'm grateful for that fact, but you don't have kids.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay, fine, I'M selling cookies. For a good cause. Just buy a couple already.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's the cause? These are just frosted sugar cookies from the grocery store bakery. And they're $5 a piece?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Look, this will go a lot smoother if you just stop asking questions and make with the cookie buyin'.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Should I get my lip pierced?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is it 2004?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...are those two related?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey check it out! I made homemade lasagna!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, that's not lasagna. That's a bowl of spaghetti.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well at least I made it myself.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you really make it yourself?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well...no.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mmmmmmm...there's nothing like a big stack of pancakes for breakfast on Monday!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's two in the afternoon.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then there's nothing like a big stack of pancakes for LUNCH on Monday!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nice hat, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But I'm not wearing a hat.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ha ha! Made you look!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But I didn't look.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ha ha! Made you think that maybe you did look!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How long are we going to do this?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey there! Sorry I was out sick yesterday. Thanks for covering.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh sure. No problem.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You weren't here either, were you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Most definitely not.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you finish the dishes?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whu- Then why are they still in the sink?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I finished eating off them, that's where my story ends.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Birthday!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's not--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Time to cut the cake!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ah, you got excited and bought a giant sheet cake for no reas-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: TIME TO CUT THE CAKE!!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I won the lottery!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? Wait, seriously??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry, I meant "I stun the constabulary!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you hurt yourself stretching that joke?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think I pulled a hammy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, check out my rad shirt!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're wearing a Star Wars poster.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Haha yeah! "Make it so, Force wizard!" Right?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Close enough.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why do you hate my shenanigans so much.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you ever tried looking at it through my eyes?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No. Just a sec, I gotta grab something.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A melon baller.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why would you need--GET AWAY FROM ME!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you playing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: New video game; you have to eat as many gas station hotdogs as you can and then locate the hidden restroom.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's the title?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Call of Doody"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I hate everything about this Monkey Chat.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's that smell?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You'll have to be more specific.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's like spoiled milk strained through used Band-Aids.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You'll have to be more specific.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We're having Vintage Crab Rangoon for dinner.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What makes food "vintage"?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pressure and time. I call it Food Tectonics.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The process by which leftovers are slowly pushed backwards by other leftovers until they're forgotten at the back of the fridge.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How scientifically disgusting.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Good news! I got a new waffle maker!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I told you, the old one was fine. You just needed to wash it out.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Buying a new one was easier.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte! Want a cookie? I made them with my family's secret recipe.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ugh! Mortimer, these are terrible!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, that's the secret! They look great but they taste awful.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Will you PLEASE, go to the movies with me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm busy, just go alone.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't just go to a movie by myself!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because the theater manager insists I have a chaperone with me at all times.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, right. I forgot about that debacle with the Sno-Caps.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You should change your name.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's wrong with my name?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Monte". It just kind of sits there. No capital letters in the middle, no "L'il" or "Esq.", not even any Z's or X's.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So what's your idea? I should call myself "L'il MontExx, Esq."?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...I'll run it past Marketing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OW! Why did you slap me?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because you asked for it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: All I said was, "Alexa, play Maroon 5."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Where should I retire, assuming I'll be a billionaire by then?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's never too early to start- wait, what? A BILLIONAIRE!?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah. That's my goal, so that's what I'm basing all my plans on.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, you know, there might be some more short-term plans you should work out first.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're right, you're right. I'll start with something more realistic: which NFL franchise should I buy?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, can I borrow a pencil?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure, Mort. Here ya go.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thanks! Can I also borrow some paper?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I also borrow $20?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well then I don't want your stupid pencil and paper either!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I'm moving out.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WHAT?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry, HEADING out. I'm heading out.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And I'm taking all my stuff with me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: --and I couldn't stop laughing because I realized I’d split my pants.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Whoa, hold on a second. We’re monkeys, we don’t wear pants.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uh-oh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm starting a new band!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You can't play an instrument and you never learned to count.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YOU DON'T UNDERSTAND MY ART.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's your turn to cook tonight.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you in the mood for sushi?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I am!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Cool, will you order some?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Need anything from the store?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Could you pick up some of these "druthers" i keep hearing about?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'd like to have them.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: so i can say i have them.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: druthers.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hello, Mortimer? Where is the cake I made for tomorrow??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mortimer? No, you must have the wrong number…

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'd believe you more if we weren't on FaceTime.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wanna go camping?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wanna spend two hours fighting October winds to set up a tent?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wanna order in?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Thanks for lending me a buck for the vending machine.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why sure, my good man. Now if you will write upon this sheet that I hold your debt in the amount of one dollar?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, sure. There.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ha HA! I your future within my very hands! You will be indentured to me for the long years it will take to repay me--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh look, I found four quarters on my desk. You were saying?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Indentured serfs are so hard to come by these days.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, you want any tapioca?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't know, do you think I feel like eating vanilla toothpaste with bits in it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, no?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: There you go.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can you just say "no" next time instead of ruining yet another desert-food for me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ah! Brisk morning air, being up before the birds--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: --black licorice, getting spoiled on a show--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you doing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I thought we were listing things that we hate.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey the polls have been wacky all week.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know, they're working on it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um, who's "they"?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Some Woot! staff who do real work instead of just thinking of monkey jokes all day, I suppose..

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: God bless 'em.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: --gonna save you the trouble. If your question involves "break", "spill", or "destroy", I'm your monkey.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy World Dessert Day!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How are you going to celebrate?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hopefully by narrowly avoiding insulin-shock.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's National Fetch Day!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So? We don't have a dog.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well…those burritos I just ordered aren't gonna pick up themselves...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can you help me with this really fragile object?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you serious?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No. Hahaha!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hahahaha! I'm the WORST!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is it ok if I clean up the kitchen?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you serious?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No. Hahahaha!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hahahaha! Classic monkey.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey can you grab me a La Croix?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You mean La Croix?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, La Croix.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's not how you pronounce it. It's La CROIX.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, it's La CROIX.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh, for the last time, it's LA CROIX. CROIX.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Give me a W!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Give me a O!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Give me a O!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Give me a T!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's that spell?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry, I had my headphones in. What's up?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you think people will be mad if we stopped doing these?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What do you mean, talking?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, like, if we just sat here.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let's try it tomorrow. Let's just watch TV instead.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm not sure about this Jeffrey Dahmer person.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you ready for breakfast?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's 3:30pm, and you already had breakfast. And breakfast for lunch.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why stop a good thing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't believe I got written up for throwing an office party.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: At least you don't have to pay for the fumigation.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah that pork smell sure lingers, doesn't it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's quite potent, yes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's time...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Time to grease up the hallway for furniture bowling?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No. Time for book club.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know, for brothers we're very different.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We're not brothers.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What? This changes everything.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You really thought we were brothers?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sure, we have the same last name.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We don't have last names.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WHAT IS EVEN HAPPENING

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok, so we're not brothers and we don't have last names.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Correct.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And we exist in this fabricated construct, never to escape.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Also true.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well this is most depressing monkey chat ever.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Eh bien, continuons...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you like my Halloween costume?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're just wearing a suit, what are you?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Monkey business!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow, even for you, that's terrible.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Houston, we have a problem!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: There's a spill in the kitchen, can you help me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure, but just for the record, the actual historical line is “Okay, Houston, we've had a problem here.”

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You just like to suck the joy out of everything, don't you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I NEED A NEW PHONE!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's wrong with the one you just got last year?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I GOT EARLY LAST YEAR IT'S ALMOST 2 YEARS OLD

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you even know what's new about it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: NO MATTER ME NEED NEW PHONE NEED PHONE MUST GET PHONE NEW NEED NEW NEW

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ah, there's nothing like a good cup of tea.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why don't you like it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? No, I DO like it. What do you mean?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well if it's nothing like it, what IS it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's nothing...it's not a...it's...oh never mind

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm going to pretend this conversation never started.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I finish your tea?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Trick 'r' Treat!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'll take Trick.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm gonna email the Church of Scientology to tell them you thought Tom Cruise's dye job was weak in Top Gun: Maverick.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: TREAT, I CHOOSE TREAT!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, help me settle an argument I'm having with a friend of mine.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is it rude to poke your finger in a doughnut to see what's inside, and then not take that doughnut?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man! I really thought you'd be on my side.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why? I'm the friend you're having the argument with.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where did you get that DVR?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I found it in the trash.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, didn't you just throw away a DVR?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah! So I was totally in the market for one. Can you believe the luck?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wanna go to Walden Books? I'm gonna pick up a Harry Potter.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wanna go to Wet Seal? I need a new top.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's impossible.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay fine, I'm just gonna rent Bad Boys II from Blockbuster.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WHAT YEAR IS IT?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BLEEP BLORB I AM MORTBOT

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Not again, I don't have time for Mortbot today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: MORTBOT AWAITING INPUT.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What do I have to do to make this stop?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: INPUT CARBS

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you know any Russian?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nyet.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK, never mind ... wait.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, I need to lay off the coffee. It's really making me feel weird.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How much did you drink?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I dunno. However much was in that old coffee can next to the fridge.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, that's the can I keep my spare change in.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I dunno. However much was in that old coffee can next to the fridge.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I thought the brew was a bit crunchy.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I can't believe Black Friday is coming up.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm glad you said that! You reminded me of something important I need to do.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Get to work putting sales together that save our customers beaucoup bucks on everything they didn't know they needed?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, my lutefisk is finished soaking in lye. Can I have the key to your car trunk?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I came up with a new product last night: Edible Phone Cases!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Interesting!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I was inspired while at the Emergency Room.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?! Are you okay? And what about your trip to the hospital inspired that idea?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The fact that I was there because I ate my phone case. If only it had been actual food, right?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, you're sweating a lot. Did you just work out?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah. I've really been working on my French press.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean your bench press?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Um, whichever one is the one where you drink a lot of coffee?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, that explains the sweating.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's no use talking to me until I've had my first cup of coffee.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sounds like you've got a bona fide chemical addiction. Did you know that —

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you speaking? I can't tell through this haze.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: DRINK SOME COFFEE SO I CAN EXPLAIN WHY YOU SHOULDN'T.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have a slice of cake!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are we celebrating?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's Armistice Day in Saint Barthélemy.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you have family there?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: To be honest I didn't even know it was a place. I just needed a reason to eat cake.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, can I tell you a secret?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Of course you can, pal.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK, cool.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So ... what is it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I don't have one right now. It's just good to know I can talk to you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I need a fancier name.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's wrong with Mortimer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's too basic. Too simple.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay, what are you thinking?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Something with light syllables that trip across the tongue. Something with strength but not imperious. Something educated. Oh, and foreign-sounding.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And that would be--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Flatulence D'Fenestration.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If I could have one wish, it would be for a new way to enjoy fried potatoes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What about French fries? Hash browns? Potato chips? Home fries? Tater tots? Potato pancakes? Seasoned fries? Waffle fries? Poutine? What else could possibly be left?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I refuse to accept any limits to what the fried potato is capable of!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Beware the ides of March, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not for like five months, Mortimer

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just said to be aware.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whoa, look Monte! My secret admirer sent me flowers!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The card says, "Mortimer, pretend these are from a secret admirer. Love, Mortimer."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: He's revealed! And very attractive if I may say so myself!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Goodnight!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Thanks, Mortimer. Goodnight.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sleep tight!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh-huh. Don't say--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't let the bed b-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: NO DON'T EVEN SAY IT!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah. that phrase got a whole lot less fun in the last 20 years...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer! Why is there 50 foot geyser in the backyard?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Haha! I'm a rascal!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: When will you stop pulling pranks?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: When we jump the shark I suppose.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh that happened YEARS ago.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you see "Ticket to Paradise" last night?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How was it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Kinda dumb, kinda funny.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That could be your epitaph.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OMG this Ben & Jerry's is soooo good.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Isn't that your third tonight?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nobody likes a Binge Buster, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm actually impressed you had a catchphrase ready for that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Would you like any of this Syrah?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I prefer shiraz.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: They're the same thing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, TECHNICALLY--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Technically, this is why no one likes you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, I'm doing a personality test. What B words describe me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Boring, Bad, Baffling, Bizarre, Bitter, Boorish...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...Yeah, I think I got enough...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...Bumbling, Babbling, Boastful, Berserk, Bankrupt...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...I SAID I GOT IT.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm having a horrible day.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sorry, pal. Anything I can do?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Tell me my favorite story again?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure. "Once upon a time, there was a HUGE pizza..."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Thanksgiving!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Happy Thanksgiving!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You forgot to pre-order the turkey, didn't you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK I'm off to the mall!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you really going shopping on Black Friday?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not really, I just like chaos.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're a rare breed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Now, where's my airhorn?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Check out what I bought online?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's a stapler.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not just ANY stapler. It's Bluetooth.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What does that even mean?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No idea but I HAD TO HAVE IT.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh. I am so sick of Holiday mems.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think you mean "memes."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's what I said. Mems.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's actually pronounced "MEEM" not "MEM."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whatever. ToMEEMo, ToMEMo.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You ever wonder how they get the jelly into the middle of a jelly doughnut?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No. I'm sure it's boring and industrial.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I was gonna share my jelly doughnuts, but I'm sure you're full after that.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: After what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: After sucking all the fun out of the room.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, can you cover my shift tonight?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, you're moonlighting?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Shh! Keep it down, I just need a few hours off.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's the job?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Shark Dentist.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oops, looks like the library sent me a bill for my overdue book.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I can probably cover you, how much is it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: $4,376. I took out "The Very Hungry Caterpillar" in 1987.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's 11:11! Make a wish!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You should wish for a new watch.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No reason.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I swallowed your watch.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did I ever tell you I'm a really good banjo picker?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Let me guess: there's going to be a predictable misunderstanding of what picking means in the context of banjos, and that you're really good at CHOOSING banjos.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So tell me about the banj-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Gotta go!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is there another word for pamphlet?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Brochure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What is it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: BROCHURE.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok, bro, just tell me!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Boy, I could really use a garment steamer myself.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really? Hmm, you never seemed like the type to worry too much about your clothes being wrinkled.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh it's not for my clothes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't even want to know.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Aw, man. My stomach. Ugh.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you STILL eating Halloween Candy?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah. Hey, pass me that bag of fun-size Butterfingers.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you sure that's such a good idea right now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hair of the werewolf, man.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And when I got out of the car and looked at the handle...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: There was a bloody hook hand hanging from it, right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Exactly! And that's totally why I'm late for work today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, I'm sure they'll buy the Candyman excuse.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I want a nickname. I think it should be The Gooch.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It doesn’t work like that. Someone has to GIVE you a nickname.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK, what would call me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Problem Area.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I got you something off Woot! today!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Which category did you get it from?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Category?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, Mortimer, we have multiple categories to help our customers navigate. It's got everything they need!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Except for a search bar.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: STOP GOING OFF-SCRIPT.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay, we have to practice caroling for the Woot holiday party this year, ready?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ahem, LAAH! Okay, ready!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: “Deck the halls with bows of holly-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: -Blah-blah-blah-blah-blah-blah-blah-blah-blah!”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You didn’t do your homework…

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not since the second grade.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay, Mortimer. Let’s try another carol for the office party. You rehearsed this time, right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yup!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: “Rudolph the red-nosed reindeer-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: -had a rhinophyma nose!”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: NOPE.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Last chance, Mortimer. If you mess this one up we’re not caroling at the Woot holiday party this year.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay, for realsies I practiced this one. I’ll even kick off the last verse: “Frosty the Snowman, Had to hurry on his way-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: -but he waved good-bye, saying, ‘Don't you cry-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: -I will melt to death by May.’“

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I REALLY HATE YOU.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, I heard you signed up for a 5K!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah! I've been training and it turns out I really love running.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Running?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You thought I signed up for five thousand dollars, didn't you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No...yes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, do you want to look at pictures of my vacation?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nope!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you call them pancakes or cakepans?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Pancakes. No one calls them cakepans.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You sound like every waiter or waitress I've ever met.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I had the worst dream last night. I was on a plane, but every single passenger was a screaming baby. Even the flight attendants and pilots were screaming babies.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, sorry about that.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How is this your fault?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was trying out the "screaming baby" feature on your new white noise machine.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm so tired I could eat a horse.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think you mean you're so HUNGRY you could eat a horse.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I mean I'm so tired that if I'm not careful, I might swallow a horse by accident.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Your brain is fascinating.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It just does its thing, and I'm along for the ride.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, do you want any figs in your salad?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No way. Wasps co-evolved with fig trees. They're the only thing that pollinates it, many end up dying in the figs.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That can't be true... can it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: CAN IT?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's with the electrodes all over your head?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's called Mind-Boom. You try to move this metal ball across the table with your relaxed mind. The more vacant your brain, the easier it is to move the ball.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, yes, I tried that once.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How'd it go?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I broke the neighbors' window.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you doing with that globe?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Trying to find Billy Ocean.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: If I could roll my eyes any harder, I would.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've decided to get into the business of writing reviews for stuff. How's this for a book review: "A tour de force! Illustrates Man vs. Man! Impressive language wordicity!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wordicity is not a word.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My review of you is: "Pat, incomprehensible, and unpleasant to smell."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...so the morel of the story is, don't eat mushrooms that grow in a dumpster!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh I see what you did there. Nice.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, that joke really GREW on you, eh?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Don't push it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Twas The Night Before Christmas...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And All Through The House...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not A Creature Was Stirring...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Except... the Four Agents Coming In The Rear In Standard Two-By-Two Cover Formation...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I love this movie so much.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Looking forward to having everybody over tonight?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yup! It's gonna be great. Oh, but don't forget that Toby is vegan.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Right.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And Alice has that gluten thing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OK.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And I'm not doing carbs. And Ted won't eat anything with stems. Oh, and Jarson's on the Yeti diet. And...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay. Christmas party is cancelled.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you think I can pull off this hat?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um, you're not wearing a hat.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I did it!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Who do you think is the most underrated actor of our time?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, I dunno. J.K. Simmons? Eric Bana?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was thinking the guy in the third seat of the bus in "Speed"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I have no idea what you're talking about.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Exactly!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...So that's when I realized there MUST have been asparagus in that salad after all!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Never tell me that story again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Get it? Because it's just a distinct sm---

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Never talk to me again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's your favorite holiday?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Eh, probably Christmas.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not New Years?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean "National Fall Asleep Early Day"?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't forget about the tournament tomorrow morning! Be sure to bring your racket and balls. And your new shoes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay. What time are you going to get there?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Tennish.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, looks like we made through another year.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep. Oh, would you help me tape these bottle rockets to this can of butane?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I spoke too soon.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy New Year!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Happy New Year!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Back to bed?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Back to bed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I simultaneously broke two New Year resolutions today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How on earth did you do that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I used my new gym membership money to buy a hundred candy bars.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort! What happened in the kitchen? It's a mess in there!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't comment on the events in the kitchen at this time.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can however release a statement that the R&D into the prototype 33lb Mega Taco is being placed on hold facing an inquiry.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I've decided we should do more "hot takes" like on reality TV shows.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I disagree.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Does that count as a hot take?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: TAKES.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wanna hear a joke, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well then you should do an internet search for jokes!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm not your personal joke servant, you know. Jeez.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Would you like a sandwich?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So would I, here's $5, get us a couple from the store.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Also, can I borrow $5.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's it. I'm quitting gluten.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, that's a pretty big deal. There's gluten in everything.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes. I want to start making healthier decisions. I want to treat my body like a temple. Starting today, I'm done with gluten.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, alright.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's gluten? Is it some sort of fungus or something?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I am the coolest.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, your "Twilight" box set just arrived.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I am not the coolest.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you enjoying the soup I made for you?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes! What's in it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just keep eating before it wakes up.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Check out my new hammock!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So that's why you were filling your bed with ham.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's tasty AND relaxing!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'd like to go on record.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: About what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nothing, I just want to be on a record.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you tried the potato soup yet?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah and I gotta say, it made me sad.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, was it too bland?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I just always get sad when I think about potatoes that could have been french fries.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Lunch break!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We're in the middle of breakfast.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh I still intend to finish breakfast as well.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you seen my terrarium?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean that gross moldy fishtank I just threw away?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: NOOO MY PRECIOUS MOLD!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I love a good book.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Me too.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah right. What was the last book you read?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Does the Cheesecake Factory menu count?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're not gonna believe this.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I tripped and hit my head, and now I can speak Latin!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Prove it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Iyay oldtay ouyay, ouyay ouldn'tway elievebay ityay!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: If this place wasn't rent-controlled, I would have moved out years ago.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I want to get a perm.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not sure your hair is long enough.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh it's not for my hair.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't even know what that means.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So I was thinking sushi tonight. You in?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sure can I get a hot dog?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I'm going to two places.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok, just go to the hot dog place.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Living with you is like being trapped in a Monty Python sketch.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, I quite agree. This is getting too silly. Get on with my hot dog.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Does it smell weird in here to you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think my Spam folder is getting full.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let's have a staring contest!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Umm, okay, I guess...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I win!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? But I didn't blink yet.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was going for speed, not endurance.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm thinking of doing the Paleo thing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh yeah? You getting into the whole CrossFit movement?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just want to walk around eating giant turkey legs like a caveman.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you know that narwhals are the unicorns of the sea?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I know that narwhals are real and unicorns are not.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So then I guess you could say that narwhals are the real narwhals of the sea.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You could.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow! Did you see the great designs on Shirt.Woot today? I'm gonna buy ten tees!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But we don't even wear shirts.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Jeez, if I was wearing one right now, it would say "I'm With Buzzkill."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey folks, this is a friendly reminder to check the batteries in your smoke detector.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: DO WE HAVE TO MOVE AGAIN?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer! You're late for work again!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm not late. I'm early for tomorrow.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Tomorrow's Saturday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well then I'm just really early for Monday then.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Quick! I need 48 rubber gloves, a gallon of oatmeal, and two juvenile ferrets!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't even want to know what those are for.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Good! Because I don't want to tell you!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Knock knock!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: GO AWAY.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, that's not how these jokes are supposed to work.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: YOU ARE KNOCKING ON MY BEDROOM DOOR AT 3AM.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...so the podiatrist goes, "I've seen goiters bigger than that!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did i miss something?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm lazy today so I cut to the punchline. It's fun, try it!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...so the ostrich says, "That's not a plumber, that's my ear-nose-and-throat guy!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, that IS fun!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's the name for when you don't want to do anything?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um, apathy?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, but it's also the name of a weekday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Like, a case of the Mondays?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, but I have it every day.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think that's just life.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So when do I get to the Tuesday part of life?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So I asked my doctor about Travinox, and she told me that if I'm already taking Genloryx and Ubiquitol, I may have side effects. Can you believe that?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are they for?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mostly to counteract my existing side effects from Midventix, which I had to take because of my initial reaction to the Softoxi.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't think I've heard of any of those medications.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, they're all placebos.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey can you please do the dishes?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ughhhhhhhhh

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You just have to put them into the dishwasher---

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nooooooo

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ---and maybe rinse one or two of them---

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: THIS IS TORTURE WHY DO WE EVEN HAVE DISHES

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, come quick! There's cookies in the break room!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not falling for that lie again. It's just going to be some mess you made that you want me to clean up.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's not a lie! But I did drop some of the cookies and it would be great if you could clean it up.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte. Wanna hear what elephants think about?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then go ask one.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte! What are you doing at work on a Saturday morning?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I left my phone charger at my desk. What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well I'm definitely not renting out the conference room on the sly as a yoga studio. Definitely not.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Then who are these people in yoga pants?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Um..... Maintenance is very fitness-conscious.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Where are you going?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We have that art gallery opening this afternoon, remember?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, uh, I can't I broke my leg.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You look fine.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I'm ABOUT to break my leg.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you schedule an 8am meeting on a Monday?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No that's just a reminder to hit the snooze button.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You may want to remove the management team from the invite.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm gonna start a Woot! Tik Tork channel.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, it's about time! We need to start keeping up with new tech-Did you say Tik "Tork"?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So not Tik "Tok"?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can you pick up some catsup?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Because I'm making mini-meatloaves for dinner.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was going to punch you for using the word "catsup" but then you taught me that a "mini-meatloaf" is something that exists, so we'll call it square.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why do you have such a violent reaction to the work "catsup"?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It lacks the emotional punch of the more Germanic "KETCHUP."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...oh dear Lord, I think I get it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I know for a FACT that Jimmy cracked corn and I DO care, I care very much!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sorry, what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just skipped right to the punchline so people won't have to suffer through the rest of our chat.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So I read this fascinating book--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wrong.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So I read this article-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Try again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So I watched this documentary-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: One more chance.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I saw a Tik Tok-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And there it is.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I make up an imaginary friend?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, you're too old--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: TOO LATE. Mr. Buttskins thinks you have a turd nose. HAHA! Good one, Mr. Buttskins!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hooo-ey, Monte! I just ate a mess o’ beans and feel like--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No fart jokes today, please.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So I ate all these beans for NOTHING?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where are you going?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The florist. I'm going to buy up all the roses and destroy them to create a shortage, which will inflate demand for my crabgrass bouquets, which I will be selling right next door to the florist.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a terrible plan.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sounds like someone needs a crabgrass bouquet!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, it's your turn to pick for movie night.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well I would, but someone seems to have jammed Armageddon into our Blu-Ray player and secured the tray with wood screws.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Huh, weird.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh man, you know what I LOVE?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's not silence, I can tell you that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm going home sick, I have a case of rickets.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are your symptoms?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I keep eating dried paint, chalk, and pieces of metal.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's pica. You read the wrong WebMD page again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I still go home?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You gonna eat that pencil?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know what's weird about cheesesteak sandwiches? They don't have cheese OR steak on them.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: They have both of those items.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, right, right. I was thinking of peanuts.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't you think it's weird that there are spices that aren't spicy?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Not really.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well then you're part of the problem, not the solution, Monte.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, I've been doing paperwork all week and - wait hold on, I'm a monkey.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How do I know how to do this?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How did I get this job?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HOW AM I TALKING?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh oh, he's becoming self-aware again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So just hypothetically, you'd be pretty upset if I'd accidentally wiped the entire next Woot-Off from our servers?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes. An asbsolute yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So compared to that, erasing your entire Outlook inbox is no big deal. Whew! Glad we had this talk.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ..wait.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thanks for letting me use your car.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No problem.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have something to give you something in return.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh you shouldn't hav— um, this is an accident report.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're welcome!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The kitchen is a wreck! What are you cooking?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I am deep in the alchemy of fusing two baked goods into one all-powerful dessert.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're not trying to fuse cake and pie yet again, are you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I will not rest until I have invented pake!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: --so anyway the urological surgeon said the procedure isn't as invasive as it sounds and--Hey did you start the Monkey Chat already??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I was bored with your gross story.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That was private, Mortimer!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not anymore.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You coming to Dave's birthday party?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh. I didn't know there was a party. Guess I wasn't invited.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well this is awkward.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Welp, see ya.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is all this mess?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was inspired by our tech-savvy Wooters in our PC category who build their own computers!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, I'm no expert in home computing but I don't think they use this much chewing gum and Styrofoam.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Would you rather punch a chipmunk or a rabbit?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Neither. What kind of a question is that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's not supposed to be some huge deal. Just hypothetical: which would you rather punch, a chipmunk or a rabbit?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh... a chipmunk?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YOU WOULD PUNCH A CHIPMUNK? Wow. You think you know a guy...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I keep thinking it's Tuesday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It is Tuesday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You too, huh?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, I don't want the rest of this bubble tea. You want some?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This is just a cup of sticky tapioca balls.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So, no?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You bristle too much.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Bristle. You bristle too much.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Giving you a word-a-day calendar is one of my dumbest mistakes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How have you not brushed your teeth in six months?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How have you not noticed?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Words that you hate. Go.Blasé

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Perennial

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Blasé

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Milieu

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Parboiled

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oo. Good one.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: PRANK WAR HAS BEGUN

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't want this.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Too bad, now where's my itching powder?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can we please not do a prank war this year?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Really wish you said that before today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's that beeping sound?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That would be a truck dumping 300lbs of raw squid in your Miata.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I need to renew my license.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you want a ride to the DMV?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just drop me at Fish and Game.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Come again?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's my tick breeding license.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I hate where this is going.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know, I'm really a lucky guy. Lucky to have friends who are always ready to come to my aid when I'm in a jam, who always spring into action when I need -

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not going to clean your ears again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you hear the news?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What news? What happened?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't know. I just ask that so in case something DOES happen, I won't seem so uninformed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm thinking about going back to school.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, really? That's admirable. You'll really open doors for yourself with a degree. What are you going to study?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Degree? No, I just think it'd be awesome to be a grown-up in the 7th grade. I would RULE that junior high!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How was your Friday, Mortimer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Lame. Wasted all afternoon playing stupid Ultimate Frisbee.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's wrong with Ultimate Frisbee?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was expecting lasers and chainsaws and stuff coming out of the Frisbees. That sounds more Ultimate.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know what I miss the most about childhood? Summer vacation.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: DEFINITELY. Three months off would be SO great, you know?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How about you? Do you miss anything about being a kid?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You mean BESIDES a total lack of responsibility, an allowance, and a cast iron metabolism?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, time for my bath!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why do you always announce it like that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Like what?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Like you're asking for someone to scrub your back?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'll keep announcing it until you finally do it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think I'm going to go on a cruise!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wait, cruises go places?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's the whole point.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh. I was going for the bottomless sodas.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Look! It's a UFO!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a plane.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, that!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's the sun.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, just keep staring at it, you'll see something!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This explains a lot about you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Look at my awesome new sneakers!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can we even wear sneakers?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's besides the point.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm rich! I'm rich!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you talking about?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: This email says I won the Irish lottery!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This is obviously a scam.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wrong! You also said that about my NFTs.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you know we ship to Ohio?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's just so cool! I've always wanted to visit a tropical location.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ... I don't think we're talking about the same Ohio.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Not today Morte, not today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I didn't even say anything!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I can tell from that "So..."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, you got me there.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ....and on top of all that, they KEPT BRINGING BREADSTICKS!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This is probably the most happy I've ever seen you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It really was like I was family!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you think I should go back to school?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You went to college??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: High school???

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know what, nevermind.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you seen my euphonium?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You mean your tuba?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um, it's NOT a tuba.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Jeez, sorry. Euphonium.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So, have you seen it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's next to your trumpet.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean my cornet.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: This is why no one likes you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: PIZZA TIME!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We just finished dinner.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: DESSERT PIZZA TIME!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I made cake for dessert.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: POST-CAKE PIZZA TIME!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Would you ever go to space?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Absolutely not. Too dangerous.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oops.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ... What did you do?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I put a non-refundable deposit down for Virgin Galactic.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: For how much?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ask me in the next monkey chat.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hello, earth to Mort??? MORT!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ... Huh? Wha? Sorry, I was sleeping with my eyes open.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Gross - You know what? Never mind.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I need a vacation, this job stresses me out.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What job?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Professionally bugging you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, I never got my package!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, you listed your address as "The Moon."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was just putting FedEx to the test. AND THEY FAILED.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...and that's when I decided to pour corn starch all over your bed.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I love our morning talks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey where's the universal remote?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We have 4 remotes: TV, Cable, Stereo, and Roku.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I nailed them all to a 2-by-4 last night.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You nailed them?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, duh. Wood glue wouldn't hold them.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We gotta clean this weekend.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Cleaning is inefficient, it will just get messy again thereby making it a fool's errand.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What do you suggest we do, Mr. Efficiency?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Move apartments every three months.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, Monte. Why was 6 afraid of 7?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Because 7 8 9.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, it's because 7 is edgy and prone to fits of anger!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: April Fool's!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That was yesterday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, joke's on you!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That doesn't make any sense.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YOU don't make any sense! HA!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I notice you've been updating your LinkedIn page. Thinking about a career change?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uh, heh, no, of course not! What makes you say that?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You list your occupation as "Boudoir Photographer".

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK, look: keep this between us and I'll waive the sitting fee on your next session.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: FYI I'm going on sabbatical for a few minutes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know, the word "sabbatical" is usually used to describe longer periods of time than that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh now I've wasted nearly half of my sabbatical here arguing with you!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Alexa, play a fart sound.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Google, play a fart sound.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Siri, play a fart sound.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We don't have any of those.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Guess I'll have to make my own, then.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you seen my "world's greatest roommate" mug?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I have my tadpole in it while I clean the aquarium.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, considering that you're the world's greatest roommate, you wouldn't mind if I borrow it, right?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hmm. Well, I can't argue with the mug. Carry on.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Should I ask for a raise this year?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Dunno. What were your biggest accomplishments?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I didn't break anything large.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a strong start.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Except for the Woot-Off servers.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, probably want to downplay that one.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ahhh, is there anything better than a nice bubble bath?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pizza.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's your answer to everything.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And I stand by it. Want some pizza for your bubble bath?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No...actually, yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: SEE?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you finish your taxes?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nah, I filed an extension.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Whatever happened with last year's extension?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Dunno, but the ball's in their court.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't think that's how it works.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Meh, I'll just declare myself dead again if I have to. "I'm dead!" See? No problem.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't think that's how that works, either.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can't hear ya, I'm dead.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you say "SEAR-up" or "SUR-up"?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not hungry.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...I hate it when you see through my ruse.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where are you going?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Down to 7-11, someone has to do my taxes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, you can't get your taxes done at a convenience store.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, there's nothing convenient about that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm hungry!
