lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Make yourself a sandwich.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think it would taste even better if YOU made me a sandwich.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you ready to play "Where's the Wombat?"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's where I release a live wombat in your room!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, we're not playing that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Now what am I going to do with this wombat?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where's the microwave?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Out in the hall.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We had a bit of a disagreement about the popcorn.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm taking today off from the monkey chat.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OK, but you realize that you've already started it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This conversation IS the monkey chat.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Who decides these things?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I thought YOU did.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So, how do we know when our chats are public?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I only know once they've started.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well that’s fu— wait. It's started, hasn't it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yep.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is it happening?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, now it is. Shhh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok. Vow of silence until tomorrow.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Shhh!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can you still order the pizza?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: SHHHH!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Achooo!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Shhhhhh!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sorry.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK, vow of silence is now over.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: FINALLY. I've been meaning to get you up to speed on my Book Club drama!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Maybe you should consider a vow of silence.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Thinking about starting a podcast.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Cool! What's it going to be about?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Horrible roommates.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Cool! Can I be a guest?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, will you help me do the dishes?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Give me a minute, I'm asking an AI chatbot to work on it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't think a chatbot will do dishes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I'm just asking it to craft a response to you. Here it is: "No."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, can you come in here and pop this?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Whatever it is, no, and don't ask me that ever again.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Help me unload the dishwasher?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No way, the dishes are too hot!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok, then will you do it later?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But by then they'll be too cold.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You are infinitely frustrating.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's what all my teachers used to say!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I fired up the grill!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We don't have a grill.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...Can I borrow your phone?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you been watching Woot's new Tik Tok channel?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I ran out of minutes for the month on my AOL account.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's the best excuse you've come up with in a long time.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wanna go see a baseball game?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure, who's playing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not sure, it's a little league game.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You want to go see a kids' little league game.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, it's mostly for the ice cream truck that shows up after.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you go shopping like I asked?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep, got everything on the list!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You sure? I don't see any cereal in the cupboard.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I got everything on MY list...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I want to go out to eat tonight.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OK, but no pizza. Let's please do something different.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was thinking Mexican.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Great...as long as you call it a tostada.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But it's just like a little pizza!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Another day, another dollar.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You found a dollar??

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's just a saying.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Where's the dollar?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, it's just a saying.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Aw man, I really wanted a dollar.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, why are you cooking ice cubes?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm trying out a new recipe.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh cool! What's the recipe?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How to make water.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But.. I don't... You know, go for it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just call me "Hot Sauce".

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I will not call you “Hot Sauce".

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: --because I'm easy on the tongue and--wait, didn't you ask me "Why should I call you Hot Sauce"?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh... I don't know where to go from here.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: EXTREME ENCHILADACAM! EXTREME ENCHILADACAM!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Get that camera out of my face. What are you doing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We need more content for our new Tik Tok channel and it has to be IMMEDIATELY attention grabbing. Say something!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: “Oh. I am so surprised by this Mexcian food. What ever will I do.”

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: CUT. You repel fun like oil on water.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you like corn?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Definitely.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then that's why you're corny! Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you doing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The writer called in sick today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's that spooky organ music?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Toccata and Fugue in D minor, BWV 565, by Johann Sebastian Bach. Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm starting to build this year's haunted house in the garage.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: In May?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have big plans. Also, can you take delivery of a 55gal drum of corn syrup and red food coloring? I gotta meet my scaffolding contractor.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Knock knock

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Who's there?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Knock knock

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Knock knock who?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Please just open the door, my hands are full.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That punchline doesn't make sense.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have an idea! Let's pretend to be orphans and get adopted.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think that's already a plot of a horror movie.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How about we rent a cabin in the woods instead?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WOAH, I think I got my first hate mail.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: For what? Leaving the toilet seat up?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HOW DID YOU KNOW.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, the boss wants to speak to you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BRUCE SPRINGSTEEN?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, the boss boss.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BRUCE SPRINGSTEEN HAS A BOSS??

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mort, do me a favor?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry can't talk, I'm on bank holiday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Bank holiday?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's where I draw all my money out of the bank and roll around in it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Man, I need to add more to my 401K.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't know what that means.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know, it's that fund that you put money in so you can retire.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh yeah, I stopped putting money in it once I got to $401.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I really worry about you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Next year, let's go to Coachella together.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure, why not. What is that again?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's where a bunch of people get together in the desert and build a bunch of things, then burn them.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Huh, name really doesn't match that description.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: DUCK!!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Huh, what?! From what?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I meant literally a duck. Did you see my duck Goose?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This is confusing on so many different levels.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you want to join my Pizza Eating Club?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: There's a club for eating pizza?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, you give me money for pizza, then I eat it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sounds more like a pyramid scheme.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, if you think about it, pyramids are like 3D pizza slices.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can you believe this is the 10,000th monkey chat?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I don't think I can believe that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, good call. It's not.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, Friday already.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, you know what that means...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Time to set up the Slip-n-Slide in the hallway!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Does it have to mean that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes. Yes it does.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Birthday!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ummm, it's not my birthday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Welp, guess I'll have to eat this whole cake by myself.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, want some of my key lime pie nachos?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? That sounds disgusting.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well I'm definitely not giving you any of my chicken masala croissants.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: EW, what's that thing on your finger??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, it's my pet snail.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yuck, get that thing away from me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well now I'm definitely not going to name it after you...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sorry folks, no chats today - we're on vacation.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HEY! You can't just say that. You said it wrong.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Fine, you give it a try.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry buddy, no chats today - we're on vacation.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You literally just stole what I said.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I made it sound friendlier.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where's my sandwich?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I ate it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because I already finished the leftover pizza.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: THAT WAS ALSO MINE.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Words that you hate. Go:

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Cuticle

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Parsnip

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Impugn

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Spackle

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ooh, good one!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay, things that irrationally scare you. Go:

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Staple removers

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Loose coffee lids

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Electric knife sharpeners

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Walking past a group of unsupervised middle-schoolers

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: TERRIFYING

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you water the plants like I asked you to?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I came as close to doing it as I ever have before.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well that's something.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I get a shout-out to my crew back in Philly?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...at this Chipotle?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How do you know you've had too much coffee?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How do you feel?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Like my eyeballs are in a different zip code.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, I'd cut back.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have a feeling I'm not gonna work at all today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Your perspicacity is stunning.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No way, I'm wearing pants today!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Funny words, go:

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Dangle

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Dongle

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Dingle

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think we're stuck in a rut here.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Dungle

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'd make a great jazz musician.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You don't know how to play an instrument.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, But I got the face down. See?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It looks like you're smelling a fart.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep, that's the stank face.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What vampire flips stuff?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't know.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Spatula.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I hate you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you entered our Giveaway this week?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes! I commented on the social post.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're supposed enter in the Forums.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then I emailed Customer Service.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You enter in the Forums.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then I took my entry form to the Woot office.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Enter in the Forums.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't wait to win!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Try some of my Jell-O mold.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That tastes awful.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It took forever to get mold to grow on the Jell-O.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm thinking about getting a dog.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a lot of responsibility.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm also thinking of taking a nap.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, that's more your speed.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Let me make this perfectly clear: You will never, ever have a pet hippo in this apartment.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ship-a-potamus.com called about your credit limit, huh?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If I had an '80s band, you would SO play keytar!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...I can't tell if that's an insult or not.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I keep burying all these potatoes but the warts won't go away.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're trying that old wives tale?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well I'm still under my deductible so I need to save for a REAL emergency.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Fair enough.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I an going to buy a pet hamster and name it Monte because you are so warm and fuzzy!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Aww, thanks!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So, what kind of pet reminds you of ME??

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ummm, can chiggers be pets?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh by the way, we have off next Thursday for pest fumigation.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Smiley emoji.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you doing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Question mark emoji, shrug emoji.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Speaking in text language doesn't save you time in real life, if that's what you're thinking.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Donkey emoji.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: HEY!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you seen-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: YES! Please stop showing it to me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But look, now it's spreading!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: NOOOOO.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, did you eat that whole 5-pound tub of Sour Patch Kids?! I don't know what that much sugar and citric acid will do to a 10lb monkey, but it can't be good.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can smell time.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, I feel so bad for that monkey in Raiders of the Lost Ark.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You do know he was a Nazi monkey, right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, he gave away which basket Marion was in and everything.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then I retract my defamation suit against Steven Spielberg.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, when asked "Sparkling or still" you can't answer with "Mr. Pibb"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I hate fancy restaurants.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You wanna shot?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's a little early but sure--OW, you punched me in my eye!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's the matter?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I thought you meant like tequila or something!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, yeah that would've made more sense.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey have you heard of that new show "Fartbangers"?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh it's great. "Fartbangers" has excitement and action. But "Fartbangers" also has heart. "Fartbangers" will have you binging your eyes out.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you trying to drum up buzz for another one of your terrible spec scripts?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Fartbangers!" This Fall! Maybe!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And that's why there's varnish all over the chairs.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I wish you had told me that BEFORE I sat down.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you have any callouts for the meeting at 1pm?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah. WHAT UP TO MY THURSDAY HAPPY HOUR CREW AT CHILIS AT THREE PINES MALL! SEE YOU TONIGHT! TRIPLE DIPPERS!!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Callouts, not shout-outs.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh. Then no.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are we still camping next weekend?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Not after last year's incident.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm sorry, I really thought it was bug spray.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It took 2 WEEKS for the pepper spray to air out of my sleeping bag.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I love this book!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? You hate books.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well this thing is AMAZING.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Here, let me see that-- dude, this is just the Domino's menu.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I did a screen print of their site, and had it bound.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My laundry pile is really starting to smell.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Gross. Please clean it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can't we just leave it and move to a new place?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not surprised that I'm not surprised by that suggestion.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why was there a chocolate on my pillow this morning?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh! I'm practicing for if I turn this place into a vacation rental. Putting mints on pillows is Hospitality 101!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hospitality staff usually doesn't shove a mini Krackel under my head at 2am.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm going to start biking to work.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's great, Mortimer! Glad to see you want to lead a healthy lifestyle.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, totally. Now, if you wouldn't mind signing this petition to move our office to this empty storefront next to our apartment...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're still mad, aren't you?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Of course I am! I only ever get pumpkin-spiced cronuts once a year, and you ate them all!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If it makes you feel better, cronuts are kinda played out.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: My mother made those specially for me!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I'm not saying they weren't tasty. I'm just saying they're played out.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I get that robots can clean floors, but when are they gonna come out with some robots to do my other chores?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Like what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Like brushing my teeth!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You consider brushing your teeth a chore?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If it were up to me, teeth would be self-cleaning, like our eyes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you ever feel like there's someone up there? Y'know, watching over us?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't really like to discuss spirituality with co-workers, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Spirituality? I'm talking about the drop ceiling. I swear, sometimes I see one of the tiles move.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey! You can't just knock all my stuff off my desk like that!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sure I can. I'm the Thane.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm the Thane. The Thane of Woot.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not going to explain to you again that the rules of Skyrim don't apply to real life.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you see how many Tik Tok followers we have at @ wootdotcom?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pfff, that's just a fad.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What, Tik Tok?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, Woot.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So some people who read this said they think we're funnier lately.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How many people, like in the hundreds?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ha! No, it's exponentially higher than that now.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no he's becoming self-aware.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, look at this comic I just drew.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Heh, that's pretty funny!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah the joke really pays off when you see the visual.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, just describing it doesn't do it justice.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why does your LinkedIn profile say "Tuna Fisherman"?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I bought this harpoon off eBay!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Please put that down.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, you should read this amazing fantasy novel.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why not?!

lines.speaker: monte

lines.text: Hey Monte, I have this hump on my lower back, can you take a look?

lines.text: Do you want to come with me to the bookstore?

lines.text: Hey Monte, what's the hardest thing you've ever done?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: When I finished school, I took a year working in the tulip fields of Holland. I met a young woman there and for months we traded stolen glances. When it came to the last day, I had the choice of professing to her that she was everything to me, that I dreamed of just holding her hand. But then practicality hit me; we were a whole world apart, it would never work, and I'd only break her heart. So I silently said goodbye, downcast my eyes, and boarded the flight home. What's the hardest thing you've ever done?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sit through that story.

lines.text: A salad. Want a bite?

lines.text: She mostly complains about my snoring.

lines.text: Quietly, the autumn begins the decline of our annual cycle towards the inevitability of death and the promise of a spring rebirth,

lines.text: WOW, you make words boring.

lines.text: I burped, sneezed, and farted all at once. I call it "beefing!"

lines.text: That was months ago.

lines.text: Oh, you haven't been home yet? Never mind!

lines.text: Surprise!

lines.text: Uh...I don't get it. We've been eating lunch together in the same room for the last twenty minutes. Nothing's happened. What's the surprise?

lines.text: To be honest, I am actually kind of surprised.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Surprise!

lines.text: So I read you can rent goats now ...

lines.text: You know what? Never mind.

lines.text: I think I'm going to be a pirate for Halloween.

lines.text: NOPE NOPE STOP IT.

lines.text: Are you serious?

lines.text: Well I always get so nervous for those poor birdies.

lines.text: I can't believe all things in this conversation that I have a greater knowledge about than you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Not really.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Come on, shooting the water hose at other monkeys was fun.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Not for me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I kept getting this one poor guy.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That was me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Woot PR team asked me come up with a new slogan. I've been toying with "We've got the meat" or "America's Roast Beef, Yes sir!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Those are both slogans for Arby's.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But they COULD work for us, right?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: For many reasons, they could not.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK, what about “No one out pizzas the Woot!”

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The PR team got back to me about my slogans. They said we have to mention deals.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Makes sense. What do you have so far?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've got Just Deal It, America Runs on Deals, Can You Deal Me Now, and Snap, Crackle, Deal!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We can't use any of those. They're basically for other companies, but you changed one word.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How can you tell?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK, the PR team is going with some fancy agency, they didn't like my ideas.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Makes sense.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let's just see if they can top "Woot: The W Stands For Great Deals, The OO Is The Sound You'll Make When You Get a Great Deal, And The T Is Just For Fun!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, that will be tough to beat.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry, this area is under construction.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well where am I supposed to have a mindless conversation now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Woosh POW Kaboom! SQUEEEKKK

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you doing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Imagining I'm on a rocket ship that's headed to Venus.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't think that's how a rocket ship is supposed to sound.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well obviously you're not getting an imaginary ride anytime soon.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So I re-organized everything, it's a new system. Everything should now be alphabetical and sorted by color.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Where's the stuff in the X category?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We don't have anything that starts with an X.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How could you forget my xylophone?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's actually listed under "A" for "Annoying things that Mort refuses to get rid of."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Looks like we've gotten some complaints again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: About what?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mostly the fact that our expressions never change.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It really hurts me to hear that. Just look at me, I'm crying!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think I need to get my so-called wisdom teeth pulled.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: They keep giving me bad advice.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...and THAT'S how the kitchen sink became a portal into another dimension.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know, the portal thing was actually the MOST believable part of that story.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Heads up I'm leaving the monkey chat early today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Everything ok?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep, just wanna beat the traffic.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What traffic? I don't see any traffic.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Exactly!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, what's up?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I really like this book I'm reading. It's a biography of Frederick Law Olmsted, the landscape architect. He had such a fascinating life. For example, did you know that before winning the contest to design Central Park, he had never drawn or built a landscape design? And he got Sumac poisoning as a teenager and almost went blind? And he even married his brother's widow and adopted his three children!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: For future refence, when someone says "What's up," you say "Nothing much."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BLEEP BLORP IT'S ROBOT MORT

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, you cannot use Robot Mort to get out of doing the dishes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BLEEP BLORP BUT ROBOT MORT WILL RUST IF HE TOUCHES WATER

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Robot Mort is made from a scientifically-engineered alloy which does not corrode in water.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BLEEP BLORP STUPID SCIENTISTS

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Interested in coming to the museum with me?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Of course not.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You could play with that marble maze in the gift shop.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep, I'm in.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: MMMF MMMFMMF!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Happy Halloween to you too.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: MM MMMF MM MMMFMMF?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes I like your Marshmallow Man costume.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, Boss told me to go home.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? Why? You just got back from lunch.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Maybe something to do with me tripping over the mop bucket and then crashing into Milo who was carrying a ton of documents that went flying. Then Milo fell into one of the big office plants, which knocked over the water cooler and flooded the kitchen. Should I keep going?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nope. See you tomorrow.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, I need your advice.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure thing!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Should I use the phrase "explosive diarrhea" in an all-company email?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, this conversation is over.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Whoa, what happened to you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Took Milo's dog for a walk since he was busy. That dog is fast and I was holding on to the leash for dear life.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no! You ok?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah. Turns out this cape gave me good lift so I just flew along behind him. In other news, I CAN FLY?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How do I make a complaint to HR?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure, you....what happened to your fur?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Kevin in Accounting used me as a whiteboard eraser.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Stop laughing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay, show me how you're going to use your new degree.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, first I'll put eggshells in with the office coffee grounds so they'll taste better, then I'll reupholster the breakroom couch with felted cat hair, and finally I'll ramble on incoherently on how Mayans were aliens.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...Where is this degree from again?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yahoo Answers.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I see.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I do my own research.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Clearly.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why won't you let me frame my degree?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Because it's just a photocopy of a Yahoo Answers course and that's not a thing. By the way, why is it awarded to a "Mortimer J. Switchblade, Esq."?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's my sovereign citizen name.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We're done here.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Feh, it's just because he's young. Let him schill for Woot for another 20 years ands see how cute he is with bags under his eyes and monkey-pattern baldness.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you speaking from experience?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't wear this hat for fun, pal.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You really don't like Milo, our other mascot?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm not threatened.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Didn't say you were.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Good, because I'm not.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Of course you aren't. By the way, I replaced the brake lines in his little monkey car, they seemed to have been cut.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's a dangerous world out there...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wanna eat this pickle with me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I want my own pickle.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But I had this funny idea-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Based on the fact there's a DVD of "Lady and the Tramp" on the credenza I'm gonna stop you right there.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's 11:11am on 11/11, make a wish!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, they never come true.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh come on, give it one more wish!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay fine, I hope the person who stole my sandwich today gets 24-hour dysentary.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm gonna have to call off work tomorrow. Actually today, too. Right now.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It worked!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can you please turn your music down? People 15 cubicles away can here that awful noise.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, Mongolian throat singing is beautiful!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not Mongolian throat singing. That is a 2-hour recording of you shower gargling Taylor Swift songs.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: She inspired me to rerecord them.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ooh, I just got really hungry for Thanksgiving turkey.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You'll have to wait another week or so.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, THAT doesn't make me feel very thankful, Monte.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you mind if I hang my underwear up in the kitchen to ward off evil spirits?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes. Yes I do.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK, well don't blame ME if the dishes aren't done. Blame the spirits.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Would you mind looking over these schematics?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, these are impressive. I don't think you had to do all this just to fix the hot water leak in the bathroom, though.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh no, this is for a hot fudge dispenser in my bedroom.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What did you do to your report?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It had to be one page or less.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I can't understand any of the words.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I disemvoweled it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow, Fartbangers season 2 drops tomorrow on streaming!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you still trying to drum up interest in your fake show idea?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I forgot my lunch and was bored.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is that smell?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's my grandma's Sock Soup recipe for dinner tonight. You start with boiling water and then add---

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Stop talking.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Also, I'm eating out tonight.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, where are my socks?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I used them for Sock Soup.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You ate all of my socks?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, that would be disgusting!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Finally, you're sounding more reasonable.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It would be too filling for just one meal. They're in some Tupperware in the fridge.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yesterday's joke wasn't that funny.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How do we make it better?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: One way is to follow the Rule of Threes: things that happen three times are inherently funnier. Wait, what are you doing?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ow!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ow!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OW!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're right, that third slap was funny.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Alexa, what's the weather?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We don't have an Alexa device. And it's raining out.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I was talking to you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: My name's not Alexa.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, but you responded.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Touché.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte! There's a big fan here to see you!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I am aware of the ceiling fan sale on Woot..

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...Wow, 89 bucks for a busted joke.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good thing Woot has an excellent return policy!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh stop sucking up.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Happy Thanksgiving. Today I'm thankful for my best friend, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And I'm thankful for Monte-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Aw, thanks!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You didn't let me finish: I'm thankful for Monte's large credit limit.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Black Friday!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It never is. Our servers are already smoking.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't worry, I'm sure Woot can handle the traffic!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hahahah!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hahahah!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Thanks, that cheered me up.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's wrong, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That new monkey, Milo, is really bothering me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh I think he's pretty great. Give him a chance!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: He also just ate all the pizza in the lunch room.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HE MUST BE STOPPED AT ALL COST.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I love our TikTok account.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, we just surpassed 100 videos!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Excuse me while I spam the comments with "I Miss the Old Woot."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I KNEW it was you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Happy Cyber Monday! Are you going to shop today?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I am SO SICK of the commercialization of this day. We need to return to the REAL spirit of Cyber Monday!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The celebration of our future surrender to our robot alien overlords.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm gonna fart.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Then move away from me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm gonna fart tomorrow.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why would you tell me that today?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: To create tension.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where is all the bacon?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I ate it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You ate three pounds of bacon in one sitting?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think my BMI is 38% nitrites.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Our holiday offers sure look great.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, they sure got rizz!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm a mascot monkey who makes fart jokes and even I know that's lame.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is there a reason you're lying on the floor?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm Earthing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Earthing. It's where you connect your body with the surface of the Earth and use the planet's natural electric impulses to improve your health and well-being.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not sure you're going to achieve that from the floor of our third-floor apartment.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I got all my shopping done!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, you're ready for the holidays?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I mean I just bought all the Sour Patch Kids I'll need for this weekend.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We need to talk.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ohhh people always use that phrase right before saying something I don't want to hear.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I was just going to tell you that you're my best friend.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: See?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think we should get a pet.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Our building doesn't allow pets.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, what they don't know won't hurt them.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The last time you said that, we had to pay to replace all the carpeting in our apartment.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That ant farm was cute, though.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I have free tickets to the Nutcracker, you want to go?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Will they serve nuts?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then no.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It was the best of times...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...It was the worst of times.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I thought you were quoting Dickens.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I was about to finish. It was the best of times at Chuck E. Cheese yesterday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Check out my new phone!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a Speak-N-Spell.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Huh, no wonder it gets terrible reception.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Dustecles-Cleanupicus!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Please stop making up Harry Potter spells and clean your room.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I ordered you 100 pizzas!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy April Fools Day!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That was months ago.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know. I'm hungry and embarrassed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'M SORRY! JEEZ!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: For what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, you haven't checked your bank statement yet? Never mind.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok, this time I've definitely spotted Nessie.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's my scarf stapled to a sturgeon.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: NESSIEEEEE!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why does my phone smell like soup?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WELL, I needed a way to see inside chicken soup and--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't know how you breathe.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Goodbye, friend. I am going to space.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How are you getting there?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Bus to the airport, flight to Orlando, rental car to Cape Canaveral, then probably ask NASA for directions from there.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: MONTE NO! YOU HAVE SO MUCH TO LIVE FOR!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm just sitting here eating a Monte Cristo sandwich.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just wanted to remind you that you have so much to live for. Bye!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you attend the Marketing meeting?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I must have missed it while I was napping.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, did you finish the leadership training module?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I guess I was napping then, too.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How many naps do you take a day??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let's circle back to that after this nap I'm about to take.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh, you know what's wrong with these Millennial kids?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know the average Millennial is like 35, right?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're slowly imploding inside, aren't you?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why does your room smell like a tire fire?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've been racing Matchbox cars for 72 hours straight.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That explains the stack of empty Red Bulls in the hallway.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You should get to work, it's already 11am.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Shrug.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...are you so lazy that you just say the word "shrug" now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Eye-roll.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Want a Christmas cookie?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure. UGH! It tastes moldy!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, they're the ones you baked me last year.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why would you feed those to me??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, there was no expiration date sooooo...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Don't bother me, I'm finishing these projections.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I didn't say anything!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're approaching my desk with a vuvuzela, it was a judgment call.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's fair.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you just walking around with a taco?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because it's "Take Your Taco to Work" day.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not a thing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't say that in front of the taco!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I love hammocks.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I know.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Woot sometimes sells hammocks.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And that's the fourth time in a week you've reminded me. Do you want one for Christmas?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey! Don't spoil the surprise!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Book club tonight! You coming?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hahaha!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hahahahaha!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hahahahahahaha, yeah that was a good one.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: MORT!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry, what's up?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you not hear what I was saying?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I heard you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So what do you think of what I said?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: All you said was, "MORT!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I was saying---wait. I don't see anything up there.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Told you it wasn't me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Merry Christmas! I got you a 10-pound bulk bag of Sour Patch Kids!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow! Thanks!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And a new drone!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Holy moly!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And a subscription to the Slug of the Month Club!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Jeez, Monte this is amazing!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And...what did you get me?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is it too late to ask what's on your list?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Should we get rid of the tree? It's bumming me out.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't know, watching the promise of a growing tree slowly dry out and die in our living room pretty much sums up my 2023.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Now I wanna get rid of you and the tree.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Morning.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you just getting home??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, Taco Tuesday went long.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Unbelievable.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know right?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I mean I do not believe your late-to-work excuse.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...was it the exploding doughnut part that gave it away?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nope, it was you having to help Tony Romo move a couch.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But that might have actually happened!

lines.speaker: mortimer

lines.text: That makes sense.

lines.text: Remember that one time I rode a horse?

lines.text: LOL!

lines.text: Hey Mortimer, I was thinking about going rollerskating tonight...

lines.text: I'm thinking of taking fencing lessons.

lines.text: That's excellent, Mortimer. It takes a lot of poise and maturity to master the foil.

lines.text: You want a slice of pizza?

lines.text: Sure, thanks! Hey, wait a sec, this pizza is cold.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So, um, how old is it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You'll have to ask whoever ordered it and left it in the office fridge. Now are you gonna eat that pizza or keep asking me stupid questions all day?

lines.speaker: mortimer

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You have no idea what the ‘Ides of March' means, do you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: IDE be careful with that tone of voice, mister.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "He paused in his breakfast, toast halfway to his mouth. He asked himself, had he truly lived?"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Please don't start narrating your life again.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You constantly narrating your life is very distracting.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "The incessant droning he recognized as his roommate, the ever-inconsequential Monte, blathering on about the mundanity of his existence."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's also very insulting.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I love jigsaw puzzles.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Stop trying to make this better and hand me the super-glue.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Jeez, you break one chandelier...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I use you as a reference?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: "Mortimer is a slovenly, lazy, work-shirking jerk."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Perfect!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's this for?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My resignation letter.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you think dogs who hang out in basements get mad at the audio industry for stealing the word "subwoofer"?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you ever listen to the questions you ask and feel ashamed of yourself?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I asked you first.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you hear what happened with the legal team?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, they need to review all the jokes we're doing now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's crazy!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I know! What a bunch of [AWESOME COOL LEGENDS].

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey I'm going hiking this weekend, would you...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't even ask me if I want to go. I hate hiking.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I was going to ask if you would clean the bathroom while I'm out.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Actually I'll come! I love hiking!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You'll still need to clean the bathroom when we come back.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I HATE HIKING SO MUCH.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey I think the printer is broken.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you try to fix it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I keep throwing my hands up in frustration and sighing loudly, but it's not helping.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ah, good morning, my simian companion. I was just perusing the latest edition of the Journal of Primatology. Fascinating stuff, really. Did you know that the capuchin monkey can remember the location of over 15,000 different food caches?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whoa, slow down there, brainy. I ain't got time for all that sciency mumbo-jumbo. Me? I'm more into the simple things in life. Like this sweet, delicious banana, for example.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, you really should expand your intellectual horizons beyond mere sustenance.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know the location of over 3 grocery stores, I'm good.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Aha, I've finally cracked the secret code to unlocking the primates' collective consciousness!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whoa, really? So what's the secret, brainiac?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The answer, my friend, is quite simple. Come here and I'll whisper it to you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Uh-huh. Sure. That makes sense... Whoa, no way, man! That's just bananas!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Precisely, Mortimer. Precisely.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, it's hard getting old. Look at these wrinkles!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Those are your nostrils.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And this big crease!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That is your mouth.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And these giant bulgy things!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Those are two cupcakes you're holding in front of your eyes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: See? If I was younger, you wouldn't even question me eating two cupcakes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't feel like doing anything today, Monte. I think this is a do-nothing day.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But it's your day to do laundry and go grocery shopping.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, terrible timing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, do you have any gloves I could borrow?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, sure, somewhere around here.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Follow-up question: Do you have any falcon food?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, I think you've had enough sugar for the day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WHY WHY WOULD YOU SAY THAT WHY I DON'T KNOW WHAT YOU'RE TALKING ABOUT SPIDERS SPIDERS ARRRRRRG ZZZZZZzzzzzzzzzzzzzz

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sigh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Trick or treat!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, it's nowhere near Halloween.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just give me a treat.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, Monte. Can you come here a sec--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Just know that today I will believe absolutely nothing you say or ask me to do. This is one April Fool you aren't getting.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So you're saying you've been in constant, high alert fear, hypervigillant at every second?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: YES.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I didn't plan anything so.... APRIL FOOL's!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey I think the kitchen window is broken.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What do you mean? It looks fine.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Where's the up and down switch?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Our house doesn't have power windows, dude.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If there's one thing I love, it's a nice cup of hot tea and a good book.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's two things.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, yeah.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Also, you hate books.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: True.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And hot tea.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If there's one thing I love, it's ending this conversation.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't go into the bathroom.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Gross. Light a candle.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, sorry, not that.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Phew.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's just that the toilet is overflowing and there's water everywhere.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok that's enough for the chat today, I'm taking the rest of the day off.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Such a diligent monkey.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, the boss says we have to try harder in our chats.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What boss?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The monkey we report to. The one who signs our checks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I hate that guy.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know he reads these, right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I love that guy!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What a great day for a walk in the park! Do you want to come?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No way, the last time you told me something was a "walk in the park" I had to clean the bathroom.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That was just an expression.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Either way, I'm not going to the park. I don't trust you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...and that's why it's called “Infinite Jest.”

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just thought it was a huge book of jokes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You think every book is a joke book.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: They SHOULD be.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HIGH SCORE!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's my blood pressure cuff.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: PIKACHU, I CHOOSE YOU!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I said your choices for dinner are tacos or mac and cheese.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What did the holy strawberries say to St. Andrew and St. Stephen?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: “Saints preserve us."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...oh you're just SO smart aren't you?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ugh, I have to revise the complete Quarterly Report by close of business.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Fun! I'm going to spend all day on social media trying to make "banpanks" the official word smoosh of "banana pancakes".

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: HOW are we paid the same?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Actually I think I'm paid more than you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I hate this new economy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Want to see my rare coin collection?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mortimer, these are just a bunch of Chuck. E. Cheese tokens from the 1980s.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, the kid who sold ‘em to me back then said they were GUARANTEED to rise in value.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you going to see that new action movie, "Monkey Man"?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, Monte. I've LIVED it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nice dramatic pause between sentences there, no notes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Bet me I can't eat 10 boxes of mac and cheese.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh come onnnn, I need a justifiable excuse!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Get off the ladder.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just 10 more levels!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I think 16 feet is high enough for a game of Jenga, thank you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm gonna go to the James and work out.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you mean the gym?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, but it's a VERY classy gym.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mort, I was wondering...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Please, call me Mo.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm trying to simplify my life.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Maybe you should start by taking out the two weeks of dishes that are stacked in your bedroom.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hi Monte, I'm scared of sharks.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Then why did you adopt this shark?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It was free with the smoothie.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh man, I love a good wake and bake.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, nothing like fresh muffins in the morning!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think we're talking about two different things.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, well, did you want a muffin?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OH YES.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's crazy that we've been doing this for almost 20 years.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And we're still paid in bananas.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I thought we also got stocks?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, that was SOCKS.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you want to come see my new band this weekend?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What do you sound like?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know when something gets stuck in the kitchen sink disposal and it screeches, and then it starts to smoke, so the smoke alarm goes off, then the neighbor's dog starts howling?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is THAT what you sound like?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I was just letting you know about the disposal issue. We sound like Dave Matthews Band.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you think Woot woud mind if I advertised another website in our chats?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, that's a conflict of interest.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What if it's just a fansite for Scott Bakula?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I mean, I guess...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BAKULA 4 EVER DOT COM!!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, it's your turn tonight, are you making dinner?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Umm sure, do you want chicken or fish?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: 'What kind of fish?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whatever's in the Filet-O-Fish, I guess.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, what would happen if I tore up your favorite dictionary?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That would have a deleterious effect upon your viscera.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Huh?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'd punch you in the tum-tum.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I see the streaming remote?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure, what are we watching?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh it's this great show on Netflix-- Nope, must be on Hulu-- Wrong again, maybe Peacock? Not here. Paramount? MAX? Prime? Aha, HERE it is!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Things are so much more convenient after we got rid of cable.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know, right?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't go to work.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I came down with Jabberwocky.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't have time for this, go back to bed and let me know if you break out in slithy toves.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Will do.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's the caloric value of lint?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why, did you eat a lot of lint?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I tried to suck-start the broken vacuum.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Come on, when have I EVER let you down?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Remember when we went spelunking?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh you mean literally let you down? Then yeah, a lot.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here, take this.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: An invoice for your friendship?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, I need some new revenue streams.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You have a line item for "laughing at Monte's lame jokes that no one understands."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Please remit payment in cookies. My terms are Net 30 minutes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HEY, guess what! I'm getting married.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What....? Who would marry you?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: 1) I'm offended. 2) My long distance girlfriend from Canada.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you heard of the term catfish?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, look at this listing for a waterfront property!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, we can't afford this.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whaddaya mean?? We're mascots!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah unfortunately the Kool-Aid man doesn't get paid either.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey I'm headed in early, I'll see you at work.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Since when do YOU go in early?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Since there's bagels in the breakroom already, and I need to get there before it's just blueberry ones and a half-container of honey cream cheese left.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Understandable.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, does this look infected?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're not even looking!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I mean, no I am NOT going to look.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've decided I'm going to be a cinephile.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok, what are you going to watch first?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Watch? I'm talking about cinnamon rolls.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you want to play chess?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Haha!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Haha!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hahahahaha!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hahahahaha!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hoo boy, that was a good one.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Pizza tonight?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're speaking my love language.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But we're just roommates.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YES AND I LOVE YOU.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you hear the news?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What happened?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't know. I just ask that so in case something DOES happen, I won't seem uninformed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: STOP! Don't move!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?! Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're about to step on my invisible snail.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This is worse than the time I accidentally stepped on your invisible guinea pig.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know, there's someone out there for everybody.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yepp. Except Melvin.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What did Melvin ever do?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: He knows what he did.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm telling you, Melvin's a real problem.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why? He seems so nice.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let's just say that Melvin is the reason that Woot doesn't have a search bar.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OK I talked with Melvin and he said he had nothing to do with Woot's search bar. He said that you were actually in charge of researching the potential impact of Woot adding a search bar, and that instead of spending the money on user testing and data analysis, you went to Reno and lost it all at the craps table, and then you signed his name to everything and that's why he got demoted.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: CLASSIC MELVIN.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: If you were a cheese, what would you be?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Probably a nice Fromager d'Affinois. Why?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, that checks out.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I was just wondering if it matches the scent coming from your laundry basket.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So...is this your card?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a carrot.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How about...THIS?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Another carrot.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, considering that I didn't have any carrots before this trick started... TA DA!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Howdy.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hola.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK, good chat.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I GOT AN IDEA: Woot ships to the moon!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Let's just get to Alaska and Hawaii first.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, let's take a vacation!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I mean Woot should ship there.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ohhhhhhh. What, I didn't follow that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Look at all the eggs I got at the Easter Egg Hunt!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Easter was over a month ago.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And honestly, I don't want to know how you got this basket full of eggs.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can you help me assemble our new dining table?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's wrong with the one we have?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's not a table, it's a stack of milk crates with a piece of plywood on it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I SAID WHAT'S WRONG WITH IT.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Boss says we have to talk more about Woot's 20th Birthday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK, what should we talk about? The $1 PS5's we're selling all week?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not a real thing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's called BUILDING INTEREST.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's called LYING.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Her name was Lola, she was a -

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Showgirl!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How did you know?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think I'm going to hire a publicist.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why would you need one?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: She's going to start drafting all my statements.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This will be interesting.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My publicist says you need to do more dishes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, that's not what a publicist does.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My publicist said you would say that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey I'm sorry, I forgot to water the plants.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Eh, it's fine.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You handled that surprisingly well.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: After you killed the last batch three months ago, I replaced them all with fakes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Haha.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hahahahaha.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hee Hee.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: HA HA HA

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: snort

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I win.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm kind of insulted we've never been asked to model apparel for Woot.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It is kind of insulting actually.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Right?! At least ask us to model the shirts. Do you think we'd be a small size?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Now that I think about it, our imaginary proportions may be hindering our modeling career.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pssst... rumor has it, Woot's getting a mobile app.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're about a hundred years too late on that one.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Headed to the store, do you need anything?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes please, get the stuff on the grocery list.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sigh, I guess I don't need to go after all.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, rent's due.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can you cover for me this month?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, it's way too much for one monkey. It's getting to be too much for both of us, honestly.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Maybe we should downsize to a smaller screen.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you seen my collection of toenail clippings?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I don't want to hear about it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I was gonna take some out and...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: AND I NEVER WANT TO AGAIN.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, why is there a random monkey at our front door?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's Murph. He'll be staying in my room while I'm at work.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I sublet my room while I'm at work for extra cash.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: First of all, I don't agree to that. And second of all, subletting a room while you're at work is not a thing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well clearly you're not on the Dwellr app.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, Woot's birthday is next week!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, it's not, it's in July.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well it used to be, but once [REDACTED} and decided to [REDACTED] we had to move it up a month.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, what a bunch of [REDACTED].

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I need a break. Can you take over raising these prices for me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you raising prices?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So I can lower them later and be a hero. It's called string theory.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not what string theory is.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, it's MY string theory.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So, have you heard about the BOC?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, crazy, right?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are they thinking?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: They certainly didn't ask ME.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: To be fair, no one should ask you anything.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: True.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So, is the BOC going away, like, going away?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Seems like it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I thought I was the dumbest one here.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, you'll have to give that trophy back.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I lost it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you crying?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's about the BOC going away.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I know. The Bag o' Crap has been our constant companion over the decades...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What? No, I'm stuffing all these raw onions into the last batch of BOCs going out.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: A fitting send-off.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I am simply agog that Woot is pushing the Bag o' Crap into early retirement.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Speaking of which, I gotta get one of those retirement things.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You haven't saved for retirement yet? What have you been doing with your savings?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, first I invested in Pogs, then I got a bunch of Friendster stock, then launched my NFT collection, and finally my failed crytpo company.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're never moving out, are you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm so depressed that we'll never see the Bag o' Crap again after today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I know, it's a sad day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can you tell me again about the leftover unclaimed BOCs?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes they're all going upstate to live on a farm.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you said goodbye to the BOC?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I bumped into it getting coffee. Looked absolutely depressed.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, how would you feel after an entire career of doing nothing but disappointing your customers and outright trolling them whenever possible? Wait, where are you going?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I gotta go be nice to some people on our forums and on social right NOW.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We'll never see its like again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Never before or again was something so packed with great stuff.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The impact it had on all of us was astounding

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It changed the whole atmosphere of the Woot offices.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I thought we'd have it forever.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, but they had to clean the fridge at some point.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? We're talking about the BOC going away.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I was talking about that epic sub in the fridge I had been saving since last March.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Rest in Crap, BOC.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: See ya in that great Vestibule of Patience in the sky.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, so Woot was just kidding this whole time?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yep, the BOC is still around, it's just called something else.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We really beat that joke into the ground, didn't we?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I would expect nothing less.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well I for one I plan to step down after this debacle. Effective next week, no more monkey chats!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Here we go again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We really turn 20 this year?
