lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yup, two decade of deals. Think of all money we helped save people!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That ticks me off.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: All those people and not one birthday card with a $5 check in it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Not everyone is your grandma, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm gonna get myself fired.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So I can enter the Woot $2,000 Birthday Giveaway this month.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a terrible idea.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But 20 people will get a $2,000 Amazon gift card! I've calculated the odds, I can't lose!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: See, this is why we don't let you have a calculator anymore.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Birthday, Woot!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's not the exact birthday today, Mortimer, we're celebrating this whole month.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, Happy Birthday, Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's not my birthday either.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, it's someone's birthday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You've got me there.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you want some birthday cake?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Me, too. Oh well.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WILL YOU STOP DOING THAT?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Excuse me, Dr. Fartburger.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: My name is Monte.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry, I get those mixed up all the time.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, at least all the mean Post-Its in the apartment make sense now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, I'm taking off for work, do you want a ride?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You don't drive. In fact, you don't have a license.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: There's plenty of room on my longboard, duuuuude.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Alright ENOUGH with the mushroom coffee.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, can you believe what happened to Sharon?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Crazy!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No way she's going to recover from that.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Or the microwave.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I feel bad for her leftovers.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Quick! I need a mixing bowl, a cookie sheet, some chocolate chips, and a toolbox!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why, what are you doing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm making cookies!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Then what's the toolbox for?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm pretty sure I'll break a lot of stuff in the process.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, I love salad.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You do?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, it's great on tortilla chips with melted cheese, sour cream, and pico de gallo.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And we're back to normal.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, can I tell you a secret?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Of course you can, pal.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK, cool.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So ... what is it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I don't have one right now. I'm just making a list of people who can do stuff for me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let's say you find a Slinky just sitting by itself in the mail room. Would you say that Slinky is fair game?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: If it's been sitting there awhile and no one has claimed it, sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay, gotcha. Now say that Slinky is that steak. And the mail room is your dinner plate.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort! What happened in the kitchen? It's a mess in there!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't comment on the events in the kitchen at this time due to advice from counsel.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Like the soup? It's healthy, I used 100% inorganic ingredients!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not surprised.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're not?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I just chipped a tooth on some shale.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If you're looking for all the knives, they're unavailable right now.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why do you need all of them?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Most dangerous game of Jenga ever.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer! I've been calling your name, why didn't you answer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I only answer to "Slayer" now.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mainly trying to avoid student loan collectors.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're not gonna believe what I saw.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Was it a taco?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I LOST MY WALLET!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's right here.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I LOST YOUR WALLET!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, your fur looks like your combed it with a chicken bone.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And yours looks like William Shatner’s toupée in a hurricane.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay, wow, you win the Insult Game.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why do you always eat standing over the sink?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't have to clean anything.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Don't you want to sit down?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's a trade-off I can live with.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I hate Mondays!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's Tuesday, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I haven't been to bed yet, so it's still Monday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Let's just take a vacation, Monte. Right now. You and me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok, sure. Where should we go?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The new pizza place across the street.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is it me, or does it feel cooler in here?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I mean, it seems the same to me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, just say yes when I ask, OK?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um, sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is it me, or does it feel cooler in here?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Must be this cool Hawaiian shirt I'm wearing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I found some buried treasure, look!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where did you find $32 in buried treasure?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I found your wallet buried in the laundry.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've decided on a career change; I'm gonna be a prophet.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay have fun with that, I'm gonna go finish my beef and broccoli.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I prophesize you will find it eaten and gone. HUZZAH!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm already bored of this.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How's the whole "being a prophet" thing going?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not bad. I prophesized that the recycling would be picked up, but STILL no one has bought from my merch store.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're not a very profitable prophet.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I shoulda seen that coming.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I should post on our social channels more. My public gets cranky when they don't get enough of me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And cranky when they get more than enough of you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have a very finicky public.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do these pants make my butt look big?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're not wearing pants.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YOU TAKE THAT BACK.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Looks like it's going to be a beautiful day!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not a window, that's the TV.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, check it out! The vending machine gave me three packs of Reese's! Do you want one?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure, I'll take one. Sounds great!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then you should hurry to the vending machine and get one, I already got most of 'em!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Mort! Wanna go on a CRAZY adventure???

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure! Where?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I didn't expect you to say yes, so I actually didn't plan anything.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I need to join that new gym.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you interested in cardio or resistance training?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Neither, I just saw that they have a banana-nut smoothie at their juice bar.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: After 10 hours in the sun, I would like to formally retract my statement, "The whole SPF thing is a scam."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I was wondering what smelled like barbecued pork belly.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know why they say, "It's not the heat, it's the humidity."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We're in Phoenix this week.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know what they say, "Why did they build a city here?"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Excited for book club tonight?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Normally yes, but I'm not sure how deep I can get into this copy of TV Guide from March 1987.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But the synopsis of Dynasty is a classic!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Trick or treat!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, it's July.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Give me a treat.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You have to wait until Octob-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: GIVE ME SUGAR OR I WILL DESTROY EVERYTHING

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: --which is why we are transitioning to a new web hosting service.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, your laundry quagmire reminds me of the EPR paradox.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sorry?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The particle measurement experiment about interpreting quantum mechanics? You must have heard of it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is happening right now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: JUST KIDDING. I have no idea what those words are!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok, whew.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, I'm worried that your new diet is harmful to you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What, the All-Frosting Diet is doing wonders for.....ohhh I don't feel so good.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The carnage. The unmitigated horror and gore. Unbelievable. At night when I close my eyes, I'm back there, experienceing it all again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...my tacos weren't THAT bad.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The passing of an era.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm just cleaning the fridge.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Farewell, Caesar salad dressing from 2013. We barely used you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow, I haven't seen this many handsome monkeys since the Jane Goodall Ball last year.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We're the only monkeys in our cubicle.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know... I don't know very many monkeys to be honest.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Would you like to donate to a fund that provides simian nutrition in our local community?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why don't you just tell me how much your lunch is.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you excited for the company picnic?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We don't have a company picnic.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well I will be in the parking lot waiting for the burgers.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Pretty excited to finish this windmill puzzle!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And I'm excited to push it onto the ground right after you do!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you ever going to read that book I recommended?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Haha!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hahaha!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hahahahaha!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: HAHAHAHA!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow, that was a good one.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I miss Barnes & Noble stores.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Shh! Update your references before we lose our Gen Z customers again!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh! Uh, my Claire's piercings are healing so fetch!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And there they go....

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: UGH. Netflx is buffering again. They are the WORST!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, it's hard to find a steady streaming service.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'll show 'em a steady stream...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No! You'll short out the modem again!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How do you want your steak, medium?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Large.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Stop it or I will cook it well done.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes sir.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I feel listless, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I feel like I am an unmoored, buoyed by the currents and pressures of life.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I had that once.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Never mind. It was just gas.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, why do the lights keep flickering on and off?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, it's my little science experiment.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Which is?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Studying the effects of flickering the lights on my roommate.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's your turn to cook tonight.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you in the mood for BBQ?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I am!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Cool, will you order some?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, don't think of it as losing a laptop...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Think of it as gaining a cutting board!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You cannot borrow my stuff anymore.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, yes. Mortimer, we have been around for 20 years, that's pretty spitting old for a monkey.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What are you saying??

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Take your vacation days...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yikes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You got me thinking about my mortality yesterday. I'm going to tackle everything I want to do before I go.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh? World travel? Writing a book? Reaching out to lost friends and family?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I'm going back into training for the Beanie-Weenie eating championship

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I could win a beanie!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So after we finish the laundry, we should clean the bathroom.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, it's the Royal We.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I still don't understand why kings and queens wouldn't just have their servants do this stuff.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, did you know that snakes can eat up to 3 times their body weight?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I did not know that. Where did you learn that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was making a rough calculation based on what Boris ate from the fridge last night.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: He looks...not well.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OK, I'm off to my salsa dancing class!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And I'm going to eat this Costco sized tub of salsa!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Fun.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, aren't WE so cultured!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: There's a feeling I get when I look to the West.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Your spirit is crying for leaving?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes! In my thoughts I have seen...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...Rings of smoke through the trees?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And the voices of those who stand looking!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes. Wow.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It makes me wonder...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really makes you wonder...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Your turn to make dinner.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Again?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What do you mean again?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Didn't I JUST do this last week?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just ate all the Sour Patch Kids, a quart of Mt. Dew, and a whole pepperoni roll.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How do you feel?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My insides are a lava lamp.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you seen the leftover fireworks?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: In the garage.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do we have any instant pudding?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't like where this is going.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you know where Dave Coulier is?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wherever he is, I hope he's happy...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: YOU WOKE ME UP FOR THIS?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think we need to have a talk about how many donuts you've been eating lately, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But I haven't been eating any donuts lately.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Cool. Well, that wraps up our talk about how many donuts you've been eating. Check your email later for the meeting minutes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What a beautiful day! I want to live life to the fullest!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's Monday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Today is drudgery and contempt and I find no joy in it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No one has cleaned this microwave in months, it's disgusting.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, I once saw you eat a drumstick you dropped in the subway.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But that was the 5 minute rule!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you doing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Listens to classic ringtones on vinyl.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: There is so much wrong with that statement.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Come on, the record was only $45!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Look, I don't want to talk about it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, I didn't say anything. I don't even know what you're talking about.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just said I didn't want to talk about it. Will you please respect my privacy?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure. Great.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well if you're gonna be that way about it, if you just HAVE to know, I'll tell you! I was hunched over the tub lancing a boil on my thigh when--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can I please respect your privacy? Please?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How high do you think I can twerk?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: "That's how it started, with 'How high do you think I can twerk?'"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What are you doing

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Just pre-writing the apologies to our bosses for whatever idiocy comes next.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Will you bring me a glass of purple Kool Aid?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why can't you get it yourself?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because it's easier for me if you get it for me. Duh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I rode the bus to work today!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But today's Sunday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I also rode the bus home when I figured that out!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's going on in here?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What does it look like is going on in here?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you bake some sort of exploding cake?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Um, not exactly. But, yeah, that's what happened.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I walked to work backwards today!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're also four hours late.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I also overslept for three hours.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, all my clothes smell sour. Did you wash your sheets with pickle juice again?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pff, that's ridiculous.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Who washes sheets?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think my computer might be broken.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's stuck shut.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let's just say my prototype jelly-fueled laptop isn't going so well.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mort, did you finish those spreadsheets yet?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I did you one better, Monte. I deleted them completely.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How is that better?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, it's better for me, at least.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Theoretically, what would happen if someone were to bring a large horse into the office?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why would you ever need to bring a horse into the office?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because they won't let me in the parking garage anymore.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I got a player for our office dodgeball team!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is it Steve the intern?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, it's Joey from the coffee shop next door.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Um, Mort... He doesn't work here.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Huh, so that's why he was so angry about the volleyball I threw at him.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I'm turning the bathtub inro a Snail-arium. Y'know, for all my snails.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And where am I supposed to shower?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WHO CARES ABOUT HYGIENE WHEN YOU HAVE EXOTIC SNAILS

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A UFO!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's my pancakes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I have some of your UFOs?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I want to go on Wheel of Fortune.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You barely know any of the answers when we watch.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I just want to go ON the wheel.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mort! What's new?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not this sandwich I'm eating, that's for sure.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't know why I even ask anymore.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, wasn't THAT a pickle!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Who are you talking to?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: This pickle that I just ate.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I found a spider in my room.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And that's why you're moving into my room?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just thought we weren't spending enough non-spider time together.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What hurts more, a paper cut or a hang nail?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hang nail for sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WRONG. A paper cut ON your hang nail hurts more.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That wasn't even an option.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: TELL THAT TO MY HANG NAIL.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Welcome to Mt. Rushmore!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You taped a 1-dollar bill, 2-dollar bill, 5-dollar bill, and 2013 dollar coin onto our fridge.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, you looked at it so.... that will be $40.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know, the real Mount Rushmore is free.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why are you stifling my small business?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why is there mac and cheese in my coffee cup??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's my penultimate prank for this week!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't know what I feel more: dread, or my confusion over how you know the word "penultimate"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How'd the part-time job go_MY GOD WHAT IS THAT SMELL?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, turns out "assistant cheese monger" isn't as cool as the title would suggest.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ah! Spooky Season is here!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ugh, why do people insist on pushing up Halloween to when the leaves are still falling.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Maybe it's the relentless crushing of leaf corpses under our heels.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How macabre.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I agree and I don't know what that word means.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Alright! It's Sunday, LET'S DO THIS!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Go back to bed!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hi everyone, just Monte here today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer got injured this morning and he made me vow not to tell you. how

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But I CAN tell you that Woot has a strict policy against stapler juggling.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where are you going with all those eggs?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Eggs are amazing aren't they? An incredibly dense source of nutrition and a aerodynamic design that can withstand speeds up to 3,300 feet per second.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why yes, that is interesting- Hey you didn't answer my question get back here!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, can you give me a little help with my book?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're writing a book? About what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't know, that's why I need your help.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I ate the rest of your cookies.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: YOU WHA-- no, I will not let you make me angry today. C'est la vie.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay: "La Vee."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I draw the line at French puns.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, je suis desolee.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you still mad at me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I have mediated today and nothing you can do can phase me. I forgive you for eating all my cookies.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And for scratching your car with my hockey stick?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, and for scratching my car with your hockey stick.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And for using your mint run of Howard the Duck comics in my hamster cage?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And for unclogging the tub with your toothbrush?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, and even for the hospital bills you will never repay me for.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What hospital bills?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: FOR THE GREVIOUS BODILY HARM YOU'RE ABOUT TO GET.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I got you 2 tickets!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow! You remembered to buy me the Wootoberfest party tickets?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, two parking tickets. I fell asleep in your car.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OW! Cramp! Cramp! I'm out.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YES! I win the office Thumb Twiddle Tourney for a seventh year running!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And, for the seventh year, I get second.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why did you throw out my plans for Q4 sales growth?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Didn't pass the sniff test.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But it already stood up to team scrutiny!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not that sniff test, I spilled gravy on the papers and they REEKED.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: More importantly, how do you NOT know who Sydney Sweeney is?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh crap, the chat started without us!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, uh...hey I used your socks to pick up random dog poop in the park. Again. Boy I sure am rude!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Forget it, let's start fresh tomorrow.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, good call. Now, about Sydney Sweeney...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: More importantly, how do you NOT know who Sydney Sweeney is?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh crap, the chat started without us!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, uh...hey I used your socks to pick up random dog poop in the park. Again. Boy I sure am rude!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Forget it, let's start fresh tomorrow.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, good call. Now, about Sydney Sweeney...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I finished my sci-fi novel! Wanna read it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure, what's it called?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "The Wormhole in my Toilet"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Self-published?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, why?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Just a hunch.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, you need to clean your room. It's just part of being a good housemate.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Aha! That's a parsifactorial argument.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh come on, you use words I don't know all the time.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whatcha eating?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: PB and J.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, that reminds me! Did you know a typical jar of peanut butter contains 10 or more rodent hairs?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You are not allowed to learn anything anymore.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We need some copy to market these limited quantity bidets.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Here bidet, gone tomorrow."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, wow.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I'm going home, no way I'm topping that this week.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...I have literally no words.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, YOU're the one who came home early.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Now help me untie all these licorice ropes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where are you going with those umbrellas?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: These are umbrellas?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, have a good day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have a declarative sentence to make!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I declare!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...Is that the whole joke today?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It is!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte! I have a really important plan, but first I'm gonna need 30 smoke-bombs stuffed with Velveeta!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Stop making so many plans and do your job!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I kinda thought this WAS my job at this point.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Fun Fact: Did you know that the amount of suction created by an ordinary household vacuum tops out at about 20 kPa?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And you broke the vacuum.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well yeah, but that's a Not-So-Fun Fact

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, you know what they say?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I'm not sure either. I thought you did.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm pretty sure you shouldn't use that knife to open that jar.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, really?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thanks. Pass me that other knife then.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Help me plug this in?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You bought an electric trombone?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, that's not what the guy at the pet store said this was.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, this has been the strangest exchange I've had today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So far!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Monday! Ready for another productive week at work?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: HAHAHAHAHA!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HAHAHAHAHA!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That was a good one.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you hear about the election?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yep, it's a big moment for our country.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The election next month, the one where we decide the President and all that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh I was talking about the "Pizza of the Year" election.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: There's a "Pizza of the Year" election?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Actually, I'm not sure. Can you check?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I'm getting out of this chat before it gets any dumber.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, someone is mad about yesterday's chat.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: They said it wasn't funny.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are they supposed to be funny?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't know.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hmm.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: See ya tomorrow, folks!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you going shopping?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't think I have to go yet.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We're pretty much out of everything and it's your turn to cook dinner.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We could have...um....how does rice and vinegar sound?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sounds like a trip to the store.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you drinking?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Malört smoothie.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, I'm gonna be sick!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: iykyk, folks.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mother-father! Did you plucking eat my plunking leftover chicken?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Fell no, ant-hill!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You lyin', you basted turkey.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whew, I'm really glad they installed the automatic chat censoring software.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Whatever, all-swipe. Yer lyin' ax-bowl owes me a chicken.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We need to shake up the brand.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How about a new kid character like Cousin Oliver in Brady Bunch?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sure, what about a teenage emu that always spouts the catchphrase, "Well ain't THAT a stinky finkle"?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sounds like you struck gold.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: God, I love monkey chats on the weekends...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Make me some flapjacks.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, why should I? Make 'em yourself!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Make me some flapjacks. And look at my wiggly fingers.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I keep telling you, Jedi mind tricks don't really work.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Make me some flapjacks.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...wait, did we just start over?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, you going to the party tonight?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What party?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Huh?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you running away?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If your kitten had a great butt and she entered into a Kittens with Great Butts contest, what would she get?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I have no idea.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A catastrophe.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I hate you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can you believe we're in a vibecession?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sorry?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know, the vibecession. The disconnect might be affecting talent attraction and retention in our industry.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You spend WAY too much time on LinkedIn.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My mouth hurts.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: For the last time, fiberglass insulation is NOT cotton candy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, it SHOULD be.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Remember that scene in Poltergeist where the guy takes his face off?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, you need to change the blade in your razor.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: STOP USING MY TOILETRIES!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: "Have you heard about the lonesome loser?"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Working on your autobiography?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I was singing a song by The Little River Band, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't worry about it, no one's gonna get the reference anyhoo.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Come on! Just one crack!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No way.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just a little twist? I've named my method the "snap-a-roo!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I will not let you practice on me for your online chiropractic course.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You can tell a lot about someone's handshake, you know.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What does mine say?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: "Really likes lunch meat."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I'm going for a walk.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What a great idea, it's such a beautiful day! Can I come?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok. I'm just going to kitchen, though.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you seen my purple banana suspenders?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I threw those out. You should thank me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not going to thank you for throwing out my property!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're right, it was more of a favor to all the people that have to look at you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wanna bite?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OW!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Lunch time, buddy! What did ya bring?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Salad.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Salad and what?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Just salad.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Salad is what you eat to distract you while you're waiting for the real food to show up.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I call you Chuck?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm working on an insulting rhyme.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Want a bite of a PB&J?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure, I'm hungry.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OH GOOD LORD WHAT IS THAT HORRID THING

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Pff, didn't your mom ever make you a Prune, Bean & Jackfruit sandwich??

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you seen my coffee table book about the covered bridges of Vermont?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What would anyone want with my coffee table book about the covered bridges of Vermont?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have no idea.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's just that it's a very special book. You see, it's a coffee table...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't believe I'M the one who is annoyed by our conversation.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh, my head. It must have been all those shots of [BANANA JUICE] last night.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wait, what the heck just happened?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's the new AI language filters Corporate installed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you [FOOLING] with me? This [TRUCKS]

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is all this fake blood for Halloween tonight?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's Halloween tonight?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, another year has come and gone. Let's see what 2025 has in store for us.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Dude it's November.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah but I'm planning on sleeping for the next 12 weeks.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not sure that's healthy. Or possible.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just nudge me and let me know what the Groundhog says.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...and THAT'S why they won't let me fish in the pond at the golf course.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, how unreasonable.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm writing the mayor right now!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, as I mentioned, it's a private golf course. The mayor has no jurisdiction there.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not OUR mayor, I'm writing my friend "The Mayor." We call him "The Mayor" since he puts extra mayo on all his sandwiches.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'd like to opt-out of all your future communication.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm off the store, do you need anything?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Roast beef sandwich.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok, sure I'll get something at the deli.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can you make sure it comes with cheddar cheese sauce? And zesty Red Ranch? And make sure it's on a toasted onion roll?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're just describing an Arby's sandwich.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then just swing by Arby's on the way home, thanks.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where's the remote?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's taped to the coffee maker.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why is it taped to the coffee maker?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So I wouldn't lose it, DUH.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you like my Halloween costume?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Halloween was last week.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you like my Election Day costume?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know what's ironic: that the only way to get a bat out of your house is by using a bat.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean, a baseball bat? That doesn't seem like an effective way at all. What about a butterfly net?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well I wish you were here an hour ago!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Also, you're gonna wanna call the insurance company.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, is there anything you want for...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sexy Santa ornaments!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh... really?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Amassing beauty and hording it for yourself is a universal truth. That's the true reason for the yuletide season.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That is not correct.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, watch after things while I'm out.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Being in charge sounds way harder than I thought it'd be.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, it's a lot of responsib ...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: MAKE ME A SANDWICH.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yep, on it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Huh. I guess it's not really all THAT hard.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I want to see how long it takes this gum to run out of flavor. Will you time it for me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure. Ready? Go on 3 ... 2 ...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Never mind. It's gone already.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You swallowed it again, didn't you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Big plans tonight?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I'm gonna par-tay!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And then what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Reflect on my bad decisions!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Great news! We're getting the band back together!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We were never in a band.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Aw MAN! I bought these leather pants for nothing?!?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I just found out elephants have elbows!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: They also can't see purple.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is that true?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't even know anymore.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you still making dinner tonight?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: An actual dinner, and not just toast?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Toast can be dinner!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I need more than that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Toast AND butter?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you want any popcorn?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What do you want on it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Salt, butter, a couple of cheeseburgers.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not putting cheeseburgers on your popcorn.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's not what Guy Fieri would say...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is that your underwear in the freezer?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You don't want to know why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: For my own sake, and the sake of our readers, no.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can you look at his ingrown hair?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ew!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hahaha right?!?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Was that all you needed?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You were on camera at the company all-hands meeting.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, and?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It wasn't appropriate for a corporate environment.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well I think the corporate environment should be more open to impromptu burlesque.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Who are those roses from?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My secret admirer.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean you, right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, now it isn't very secret, is it?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Who's your life insurance beneficiary?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: My mom.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh okay then, I think your brake pads need replacing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay thank—HEY!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Aren't you going to work?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, it's time I truly worked on my work-life balance and gave my body and mind the rest they've been crying out for.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And today is your 1-on-1 with the director?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Merely a coincidence.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I’m just not feeling it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? Work? Deadlines? Our reliance on technology? The straining of our interpersonal relationships in these times? The tearing apart of our very social fabric by the illusion of online connections? The overall crushing reality of existence?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, my left hand. I sat on it for too long.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I could go for a hot dog!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Me too! Actually any type of sandwich sounds good.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wait, are you calling a hot dog a sandwich?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, what's the difference?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WHAT? Wow, it's like I don't even KNOW you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you clean the kitchen?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you feed the fish?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And did you take the capybara for a walk?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Considering that we don't have fish or a capybara I know you're not listening.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sounds good!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Woot has a ton of deals this week.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Too bad they're all terrible!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: BAHAHAHA!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HAHAHAHA!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you think the boss will know we're just doing an impression of Statler and Waldorf from the Muppets?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I guess if we're not here tomorrow, we'll know...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We're back again. Looks like the boss was OK with our joke.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, but we've been asked to read this: "The opinions of our monkeys do not necessarily reflect Woot dot com or its parent company, the Rainforest Cafe."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't think that's right.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well it says Amazon, I think that's part of the Rainforest Cafe?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think there are many things wrong with your logic.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey if we order pizza, do you want your usual?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Two pizzas? Yes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I mean your usual toppings?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, two pizzas on top of the first pizza.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What are we doing for Thanksgiving this year?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We're going to Aunt Myrtle's again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh, is she the one with the weird sweaters?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Said by the monkey who wears a hood every day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have Alopecia!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You shopping any of Woot's Black Friday deals today?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I don't like how this day has gotten so commercial.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think it's meant to be commerical.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, it's MEANT to be a day to call in sick from over-eating.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Turkey a la King?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oof, I think I've had my fill of turkey leftovers.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wanna just skip to dessert?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure, what did you make?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Turkey mousse.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm so excited for tomorrow!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I know! Cyber Monday is one of our biggest days of the year!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh. I was thinking about Double Meat Monday at the Golden Corral.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Happy Cyber Monday, everyone! Shop responsibly and within your budget!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Budgets are for the weak! Buy now and care later! Buying things is the only way to be truly happy!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's horrible.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's marketing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What an amazin Cyber Monday!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So many Cyberific deals!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm all Cybered out!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't want to have to hear that word for another year, please.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Cyber!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why is that stem-ware filled with your whole dinner.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, is is a goblet/gobble it joke?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ....dangit.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We need to go to lunch.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We need to think up a new slogan first.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Woot dot com: The clearance aisle with an attitude!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I hate it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can we still get sushi?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Your slogan got us into trouble yesterday. We need a new one.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Think of us as the friend who always encourages your worst decisions, but with free shipping for Prime members."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Too wordy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "We're gonna make your wallet sweat."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Too gross.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Bad Ideas / Great Deals"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good enough.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I like your ascot.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's not an ascot, it's a cravat.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's the difference? Actually, never mind. I've already bored myself just asking that question.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you coming to the mall with me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you going to shop or will you just be doing your weird food court thing again?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's called "Around the World in 30 Minutes."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Dude, you're just getting Panda Express and Sbarro.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And there's a new falafel place!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OK, I'm off to see the Nutcracker.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have fun, say hi to the Rat King for me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I didn't know you knew the story of the Nutcracker!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Quick question: do you enjoy wiping entire cultures off the face of the earth?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is this about flushing your Sea Monkeys?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Quick question: have you ever had a tureen smashed over your head?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is this about the silly putty in your soup?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If you're going to make that cottage cheese recipe again, you should add salt.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I didn't make any cottage cheese.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OH GOD

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I need you to help me look for something.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sure, right after I finish lunch. What're are you looking for?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: A case of expired Honey Mustard Squid Rings that we have to send back to the vendor.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OH GOD

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry I ate those expired Honey Mustard Squid Wings. I felt so ill afterwards.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We all noticed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh no! Was anyone mad?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Only Maintenance.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why??

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Because of the ceiling tiles they now have to replace.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, what is in the garage?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's a 10-foot animal habitat.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And why would we need a 10-foot animal habitat?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: In case we have to adopt a Filipino tarsier.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And why would we need to adopt a Filipino tarsier?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: In case we get infested with tortoise beetles.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And why would we get infested--Nope, there's the migraine. I'm going back to bed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're right, you really can't see t\he TV from where you sit.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Please get off my lap.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Looks like they're filming a sequel to Practical Magic!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You think Will Smith and Kevin James will be in it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're thinking of Hitch.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh yeah, I get those mixed up all the time.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I can't believe you wasted six bottles of olive oil.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well I can't believe you don't see the money-making capabilities of a winter-proof Slip-n-Slide.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What are some other jobs I'd be suited for?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: There's a perfect job title for you but I can't think of the right words.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Does it have the word "Director" in it? Or maybe "Chief Ex-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: --What do you call the guy who scrapes stuff off the sides of Interstates?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you drinking Kool-Aid? Don't you think that's a bit unhealthy at your age?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Naw, it's okay, I only used half the water.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh well then that's okay.... wait.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I need you to stop using my Netflix password.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why, are they charging you more?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I'm just tired of my algorithm suggesting movies like "Splatterfest III: The Knifening"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you ever considered going back to school and getting an advanced degree?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No way. I don't think they'll let me back on campus after the degree I got last time.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What degree was that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A Second Degree Misdemeanor with a minor in Criminal Mischief.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's that stuff on your face?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Eye black. You know, to reduce glare.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, did they let you back on the softball team?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, sometimes the grease shine off the fries slows my eating pace.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hooray! We get off from work tomorrow!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hooray indeed. What are you going to do with your day off?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Complain about work, mostly. You?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Same.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm thinking about getting a dog.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's exciting! What breeds are you thinking of?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Maybe a malamute or mastiff.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, those dogs would be five times your size!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well yeah, how else could I ride it to work?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ow!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's Boxing Day.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: For the tenth year in a row that is NOT what that means!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are we doing anything for New Year's?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: "We" don't need to do everything together, Mortimer. Don't you know other people?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hanging out with people who aren't you doesn't end well for me usually.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How does it end?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: In a restraining order.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The litter box is full.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do I have to do everything around he-OMG WE DON'T HAVE A CAT.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Golly what amazing deals are for purchase on Woot dot com today!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Annual review coming up, huh?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HAPPY NEW YE--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: --You're early

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wanna see me speak French some more?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you going to just gargle milk again?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HAPPY NEW YE--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: --You're late.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you doing in a tub full of Jell-O??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Living my best life.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man I am feeling the vibes today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's just a nice day today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why not just say that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because VIBES, man!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I drank so much water today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good for you! Are you hydrating for your health?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I tried to go swimming.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If I eat all the ingredients of a pizza is it the same as eating a pizza?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, I don't think you'd want to eat all that raw dough.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Correct. I'm going to throw up now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Bye Monte, I'm going trick-or-treating.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, that was months ago.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's ok, I'm going as a time traveler!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Today's the day, Monte! I'm finally going to learn how to cook!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is that why my office is completely filled with lima beans?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, that’s for something else.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think I need glasses, Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why's that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because I'm thirsty and we're out of glasses.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I can't believe it's 2025.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I can't believe you can buy a 50 gallon drum of gravy!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We're both struggling with reality.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Gravy!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mort! Wanna join my book club?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sure! Is it one of those clubs where you play pranks on each other and set off fireworks?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No. We read books and talk about them.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then no.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: There's only one cupcake left.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How about we--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: There are no cupcakes left.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...and that concludes my hour long presentation on the new Woot logo, thanks for your time.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can we talk about hot dogs now?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Someday I'll have more than one friend.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: “Mortimer paused, hand hovering near his coffee cup, once again lost in the mists of memory. His only thoughts were of her.“

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no, not your Life Narrator bit again. I hate this.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Hi coworker roused him slightly from his reverie by saying something insipid."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Since when did you learn the words "reverie" and "insipid?"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Little did his cretinous coworker know that Mortimer had been going through the Word-a-Day calendar he bought Monte for his upcoming birthday..."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Way to ruin the surprise, too.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: See? I told you the Extended Lord of the Rings trilogy was great! Aren't you happy I made you sit through all through eleven and a half hours?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, right, let me take the tape off your mouth.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: UNTIE ME!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm all fired up!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You really shouldn't play with matches, Mortimer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...can you put me out now?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, we've worked for Woot since 2004, shouldn't we get a raise at some point?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, why don't you go ask Je--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: --SHUT UP JUST SHUT UP RIGHT NOW

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know I have no idea what music you listen to.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mainly Nü Metal.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nice, I could really hear that umlaut in "Nü"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thank you, I've been working on my umlauts.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Watch this funny dance.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's hilarious!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Right? Hahah!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Haaha!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You shoulda seen it folks!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ... did they buy it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: SHHH!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mortimer, how you doing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Larger Than Life

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's good, How about lunch? I was thinking McDonald's.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Any Other Way

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, sure, How about Subway? Should I get your tuna sub with all the fixings?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I Want It That Way

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Will you go pick it up?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's Gotta be You

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay... Wait, is today the day when you only speak in Backstreet Boys song titles?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WHY AM I COVERED IN WHITE GOO?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry, it's my prototype Mayo Mortar.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WHY DID YOU FIRE IT AT ME?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry, I got the office elevation wrong. I was aiming for Accounts Receivable.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How are your New Year resolutions going?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I ate a box of Butterfingers on January 5th.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So not well, huh?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Actually it's the best I've done in 10 years.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I not have an emu?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What, NO! ...Wait, did you say--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: --TOO LATE I already clicked "Buy Emu."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is that sound?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's a recording of my All Kazoo Klezmer band.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I actually really like it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: RIGHT?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Unbelievable.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is that referring to my Flat Earth diorama or the fact I used all the groceries to make it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is bacon bad for you?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well on the whole, ye--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is bacon bad for you?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I was trying to answer, bacon is not--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is bacon bad for you?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you doing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Asking until I get the answer I want.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you like blueberry muffins?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Not really—OW! What was that for?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I made blueberry muffins for you and that's the thanks I get?!?!?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm going back to bed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wanna lose weight?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...why are you holding a hacksaw?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you like ham or turkey?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Turkey.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here's a roast beef sandwich.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why not turkey?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: FINE! I'll eat it myself!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's that smell?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is it an apple cider vinegar kinda stink or more of the unsettling stench of moldering leaves?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ummm, I guess...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Becasue either way it's me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You ever noticed how close the human spine is to the skin?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Please, PLEASE work on your cubicle banter.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: This dog's been staring at me all day.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a stapler.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh... this stapler's been staring at me all day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I have your power drill?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Don't you mean "borrow" my power drill?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I care too much about you to lie.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Haha, what did you think of my Seal the Bedroom Door Shut prank?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh that's right, you're at home stuck behind a caulked-in door.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm going to assume you're the one who turned our bathroom into a terrarium and are responsible for the 12 turtles?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: 13 turtles. And I need my lawyers present before I respond to any further lines of questioning.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This PB&J you made tastes weird.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You wouldn't believe what the P is!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey can you help me get this cymbal up on the top of my one-monkey band outfit?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: For a multitude of reasons, no.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey boss said the past couple of chats have been too short.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I haven't had much to say. I've got the blues. Here, let me play you something on my gamelan to express how I feel.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Actually, this chat is long enough for today, thanks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nice day today!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure is!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We really should get out there!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We should!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Welp, back to Zelda?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sounds good.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: AUGH! WHAT--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: --Horseradish toothpaste, you like?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, what video did you play for Milo? He's still pretty impressionable.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's okay, I threw on an old cartoon.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh good.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, it was called "Watership Down."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OH GOD!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do monkeys purr?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Followup question: will you drive me to the hospital?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You ever noticed how fuzzy we are?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: As monkeys, yes, yes I have.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just wanna pet myself all day long!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok let's end this chat right here.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can you look up the movie times on your phone?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have a Nokia brick.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer that phone's gotta be over 25 years old, why don't you upgrade?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm really close to breaking the all-time Snake record.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What did you do to the kitchen?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm live-streaming this pickle.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why would someone watch a pickle?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because it has 220k followers.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well that answers everything, doesn't it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why does my keyboard have a smooth milk chocolate shell?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HAPPY VALENTINE'S, BUDDY!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's the best day of the year!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Half-priced Valentine's candy!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HI, MONTE HOW ARE YOU I AM FINE THANKS

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...you got into the leftover Valentine's candy, didn't you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: O WHY WOULD YOU SAY THAT I AM SO OFFENdedddd, i need a nap....zzzzzzzzzzzz.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Guess what?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Chicken butt.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, ha ha.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No! Look out! Chicken butt!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: AAAAAHHHHmmmff!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If you won the lottery, what would you get?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Dunno, probably sensibly invest it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'd get a neck tattoo that says "Monkey Life"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Now I know what I'd get.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Outta here.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay, I've decided I'm definitely getting a tattoo.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh man, of what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Your mom.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...that wasn't even a "your mom" joke...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And yet you're furious, right?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: YES

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Thursday!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's so happy about it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, we're healthy, employed, and full of yummy bananana waffles I made this morning.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...full of what now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You heard me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ohhhhhhhhh....

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, what did you eat this time?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I went out for BBQ and ate 2lbs of something called "burnt ends."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sounds carcinogenic.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then I'll die as I lived... stuffed.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why am I "so old" for using a pen and paper?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because print is dead.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You know that's from Ghostbusters right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Which was 40 years ago.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I AM SO OLD.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, I just listened to "21", by Adele? It was amazing and— Why did you move the furniture out of the way?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: To give you room for "planking" since this is now 2011.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...you moved the sofa for that joke?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes. Yes I did.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you want flapjacks, griddle cakes, or pancakes? Each one is--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We did that joke.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We did?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: In 2018. And then as a Woot Poll in 2021.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I feel like I am on the edge of a great expanse of nothingness, an inky black void where all matter, where all sound and action is drawn together in a meaningless cacophony, the soundtrack to oblivion.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey look pizza.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And I'm back.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: --and that's why the Greeks call it spanakopita!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Interesting.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Isn't it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, it's not.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're the worst roommate ever!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well at least I don't do the dishes while I'm taking a shower!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't do that. You do.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm the worst roommate ever!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey it's March.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, March!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep, good ol' March.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can't forget about March!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is it April yet?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: There's nothing like going on a nice sunrise walk!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The next time you ask me to do this remind me that I hate it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Any questions?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you know your ears look like little cinnamon rolls?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And that's why we don't have meetings before lunch.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Boss says this chat has to be at least six lines.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We're doing a code test.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, I didn't know we were so important!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Apparently it's to see if anyone can tell that this chat was generated by AI.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, that probably just gave it away.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We wouldn't really be replaced by AI, would we?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: If it could happen to Tim Allen, it can happen to anyone.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wait, Tim Allen is AI now?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I was just saying that it COULD happen to Tim Allen.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You've put me in an awkward position.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's called a tango, man just go with it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey come on! Birthday cake in the conference room!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No there isn't.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...the whole cake?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No one had their name on it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, were you the one who cleaned up after the office party?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Run that sentence back in your head and ask yourself if you really needed to say it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, do you follow our Tik Tok channel?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't even follow this conversation.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I invented the Fartmonica--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Stop talking.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let me just--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Forever.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Someone raided the office fridge.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It’s no big deal.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: They took all the ranch dressing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Call the police.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do we have anything that dissolves super glue?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where’d you get the clown wig?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don’t change the subject.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is this?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My new exclusive secret pop-up breakfast place! If you'd like anything I'll need you to download my app first, then I'll text you the location!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm just going to get some cereal.
