lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry, I can't check you in unless you've RSVP'd on the app.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Where can you get a good deal on damp fashion?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you talking about?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just say "where."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OK, where?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mossy's!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That was NOT worth all the work.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Aw, I thought you would lichen it!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, did you finish those Woot cost projections for the Woot-Off?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Your call is very important to us.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...I'm standing right next to you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Please hold and you will be helped by the next available monkey.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Give me your phone, I have to leave a scathing review for this dog groomer.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you get a perm?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't change the subject.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Was yesterday St. Patri--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: NOT SO LOUD!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And the answer is "yes."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey did you have fun at SXSW this year?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, I just wish there were more discussion panels about books.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm pretty sure you were the only one there thinking that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Crazy that Woot has never had a mascot.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What would you call us?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The CEO and Head of the Board, respectively.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You do realize that we're neither of those things, right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm not going to limit myself to someone else's arbitrary titles.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm feeling a little down today

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Try my new bacon self-help system!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How does it work?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Bacon can improve your life.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: By being bacon.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Actually, I kinda get it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you need to have that cubicle fan going the whole year round? I'm freezing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You want my musky monkey stink to linger?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Turn it up.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My favorite song is More Bounce to the Ounce by Zapp.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Who cares?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No one here but just by saying it, it's canon.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Canon?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It goes into the Mortimer lore that future biographers will use to detail the monkey behind the Woot.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay well my favorite sandwich is a tuna-melt.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry there's not enough room in the canon for your lore.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oof, those dozen deviled eggs ain't sittinng so good.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you ever full?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, most of the time I'm full of--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Kids read this.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: --crap.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Boy, it's only Wednesday?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's actually only Tuesday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WHY WOULD YOU DO THIS TO ME

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey take a sip of this.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That is the WORST thing I have ever tasted in my life.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And I was here to share it with you!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Memories are priceless, Monte.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Good afternoon, Monte. I hope you are fairing well.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you speaking clearly?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have worked on my vocabulary and my elocution. Watch: "The normal range for fart volume is 476 to 1491 milliliters per 24 hours."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Great, next week we'll work on content and context.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you going to help me with the cage or not?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I already said no.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK well it's already loose in the house somewhere.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah definitely not. I'm getting out of here. Call Animal Control.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't even know what kind of animal it is!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, I found a free player piano!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It comes with 300 rolls!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It only weighs 1,200 pounds!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I already said we'd take it!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OK this is my official notice that I'm moving out.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Want to come to the farmer's market with me?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hahaha.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hahaha.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HAHAHAHAHA.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, that was a good one.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey you! Work harder!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you talking to me?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I had to take managerial training and I'm practicing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not really a great way to interact with coworkers.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh I'm sorry. Well, why don't you log off for the rest of the day?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure thing boss. Good training!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are all these empty cans yours?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Probably.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you just going to leave them there?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Probably.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you trying to get me to do it for you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Probably.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think it's time to move out.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Just please do the dishes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, what do you think of my email?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, I don't think this is appropriate to send to Management.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is it the wording?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's all the fart emojis.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And the wording.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And the fact you signed it "Monte"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Interesting meeting you ran.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thanks, I think I got my point across.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I like when you threw garlic at Management and called them vampires.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Think they'll change the PTO policy now?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Probably not.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's the FIRST thing you say to me after my very first gymnastics performance?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think "get off of me" is a perfectly natural response.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: This video game is fun!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's your annual review form.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, that's MY annual review form!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry, your 2025 goals are now “Slayyyyy" and "Get paid"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: April Fools!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That was a week ago.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh... okay don't go in the garage.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Or check your credit card balance.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Or answer any calls from the zoo.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I don't give you enough credit for being my friend. Thanks for always sticking with me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What did you do this time?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Toilet's on fire.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why do you keep rejecting my "roommate appreciation", Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Because you have no idea how to show your appreciation in a way that makes me feel like crud.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But I made you breakfast! In bed even!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You made instant oatmeal in a leaf blower and shot it at me... in bed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yay April! I love April!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Last year you couldn't wait for April to be over.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: SHHHH I'm trying to get on April's good side this year. I invested heavily in tulip futures.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you know a helicopter has a better safety record than a regular car?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, for the last time, we are NOT trading in our car for a heli-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: TOO LATE! SORRY NOT SORRY!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can you go to the store and get a few things?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sure I can.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So....are you going then?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I thought we were just playing Questions.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: GONE. GONE FOREVER. HAHAHAHA. UH OH, HERE COMES ANOTHER INNOCENT ONE!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey are going to be here at the paper shredder all day?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OH, ANOTHER SACRIFICE AWAITS!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ahhh, Saturday is my second favorite day of the week.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait what's your first favorite?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Next Saturday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's sunny outside!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, isn't it great?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I can barely see the TV screen.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think I need glasses.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why do you say that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just poured barium on my Wheat Chex.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh right, good luck at your colonoscopy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Getting old rules.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you see that?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then it never happened.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why do I smell burnt fur? And why are you holding a butane torch?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you gained weight?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes. But only until quitting time.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't follow.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm smuggling out the rest of todays office birthday cake in my shirt.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ooh, so secretive.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I want a Box O' Crap.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Then you have to go online and try like everyone else.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I thought employees got free BOCs.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We did until you lit yours on fire in the breakroom.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We went viral!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We were on the local news in 2006, my friend.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's the 2006 version of going viral!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey can we do a 4/20 joke today?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't understand that whole thing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh right, you were in drama club in high school.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And Model UN. What's your point?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're making it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wanna shoot some pool?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay, but only above ground, it's funnier.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not sure I understand that joke.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Honestly? Me neither but it sounds cool.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Your mother.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good one.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I mean your MOTHER.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What about her?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YES! GOT YOU.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not a... I'm not sure you... wow, I gues you DID get me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You will never recover.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey have you finished Season 3 of Fartbangers yet?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, you're talking about a TV show that only exists in your mind.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Um, I don't think that I would have spent 16 hours watching it this weekend if it didn't exist.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You binged your imaginary TV show for 16 hours.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I also added commentary tracks!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And what was on the commentary tracks?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mostly farts!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is that a...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: One gallon tub of ranch dressing and a steam tray of chicken nuggets? Yes. Yes it is.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Should I...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, I'd like to be alone.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Greetings.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Salutations!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pleasant morning to you, good sir!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: To you as well!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I take off the hat now?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The hat stays on or the monkey gets shocked.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I have a headache.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And the cure is more cowbell!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not even the joke.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So ... put down the cowbell?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sometimes I wonder if anyone reads these.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: They definitely don't.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How do you know that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because they would have caught on long ago that

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey I'm just gonna go stare at blank screen for a while.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I already have that shift covered.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah but I'm REALLY good at it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I said I was sorry.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: "Sorry" won't regrow my eyebrows now will it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is that awful stench?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You'll have to be more specific.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I hate living here.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you half in that trash bag.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm a merMortimer. It's a palindrome.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No it's not.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And I spent all this money on this costume!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's just a trash bag.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Dammit, I'm mad!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Guess it's time to think about spring cleaning.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I already took care of that.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wha? How?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A very therapeutic dumpster fire.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OK, it's April. I guess it's long past time to take down the tree.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But it's almost time to put it up!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good point. Let's leave it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Good talk.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, will you read me a bedtime story?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's like 11:30am

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Good call. Hey Monte, will you read me a powernap-at-my-desktime story?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay before you get upset..

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Here we go.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't think of it as losing a laptop…

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Think of it as gaining a cutting board.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why do we keep letting you in the building?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why is there a raccoon in the conference room?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: CONFIDENTIAL BUSINESS SECRETS.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: AIRHORN!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: GAH! Why did you just yell "AIRHORN" in my ear?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My airhorn ran out of air.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I tempt you with some avocado toast this morning?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure, that sounds--WHAT'S ALL THIS SMOKE?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It was hard fitting the whole avocado in the toaster.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't find my hat.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're wearing it right now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I'm looking for my other hat.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What does it look like?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It looks exactly like the one I'm wearing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Notice anything different about me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you find your missing hat?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is it then?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I stopped caring about my missing hat!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's days like today I remember what my grandpa used to say to me...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What did he say?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "I told you not to flush when I'm showering!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, you're really late today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's Bring Your Snail to Work Day and I wanted to respect his pace.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: If you're not feeling well, maybe you should just go home.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can't. I've got too much to do.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But you could be infecting everyone in the office, including me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then you'll get a day off work.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think you're missing the point.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're welcome.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't go in there.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh man, did you at least light a candle?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, but it lit the shower curtain on fire.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WHAT?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's why I said "don't go in there!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This is not going to work.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You just need to have a positive attitude!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm sorry, but you can't just conjure a pizza.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: LET THE OUIJA BOARD SPEAK!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If there's one thing I've learned--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hahaha!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: HAHAHA!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good one.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I wasn't even trying!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow, I never knew how ticklish wild geese are!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: There's so much going on with what you just said, I'm not sure where to start.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How about you start by ordering dinner?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How is that related to the geese thing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's not, but I'm hungry.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can I please tell you about book club tonight?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not if you want to keep your tail.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm pretty excited about Woot's Birthday next month.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Because of all the BOCs?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Because of all the OMG mystery deals?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Because of all the daily $1 deals on social?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Then what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because I'm on vacation.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't want to have to cancel my vacation.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sorry, we all have to work the Woot birthday next month.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, hopefully I can get a refund for my Great American Chuckwagon Dinner Show tickets.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think you're the only monkey I know that goes to Branson, Missouri every year.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You don't know what you're missing!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow, Woot is really putting on the hard sell about this birthday thing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, you only turn 21 once.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not according to all my fake IDs from high school.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok, so you asked to be "chauffeur" for the Woot Birthday party in June?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You can't drive.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's why I picked it! Should be fun!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'll call the insurance company.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I booked Chuck E. Cheese for Woot's 21st Birthday Party next month!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We’re turning 21, not 7. And we already have a venue, with free shirts and Boxes O' Crap and everything. We're telling people next week.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But mine has skee-ball.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Compelling argument, but no.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, your cubicle is overflowing with old BOCs.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I’m building a throne.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Out of what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mostly phone cases for phones that no longer exist.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That’s hauntingly poetic.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And super dangerous!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I wrote a Woot Poll asking what we should do for Woot’s upcoming birthday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nice. What are the options?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: “Cake” or “Set the office on fire for insurance money.”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You worry me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Cake won, barely.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK so it's Woot's birthday soon. What do you get a company that has everything?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I wrapped up some expired beans and a USB cable.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That’s weirdly on-brand.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I cracked the algorithm to getting one of the secret "21" birthday BOCs.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Go on.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Refresh constantly, buy impulsively, scream emotionally.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: If this gets out we're ruined.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So for Woot's 21st birthday...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah about that. Do we have to act responsible now?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ideally.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just ordered a bouncy house shaped like a burrito.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Or not.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I’m writing a toast for Woot’s birthday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Great! Let’s hear it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: “To Woot: may your servers crash less, your deals confuse more, and your interns remain untraceable.”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think Legal might object to some of that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You should hear the 40 drafts it took me to get to this version!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I spent the whole birthday budget.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: On what?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Inflatable llamas and 600 mini cupcakes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Also, I ate four dozen test cupcakes. For quality control.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you fill the office with balloons for Woot’s birthday?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes and the helium leak is making everyone sound amazing in meetings.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I made the playlist for the birthday party.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Please don’t say it’s 6 hours of kazoo covers.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Of course not!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It’s 7 hours.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Boss wants us to stop talking about the Woot birthday party.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I guess we don't want to "over-promise" things.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well NOW what am I gonna do with all these miniature horses?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I guess some people still don't believe that we're really having an in-person birthday party.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, it does sound ridiculous: “Come meet us at the world's largest mailbox."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That doesn't even mention that we'll have the world's biggest box o' crap there too!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Honestly it might be too much for some people.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I made the company a birthday card! It says, "You're old now, please stop."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That’s... somehow the most honest thing you’ve ever written.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I used glitter glue and passive aggression!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you think Woot is having a mid-life crisis?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We're 21, Mort. That’s not mid-life.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then why did you buy a trampoline and a fog machine?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That was you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh right.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm going to drink 21 energy drinks in 21 minutes to celebrate Woot's birthday!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That’s not a celebration, that’s a medical event.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm already 6 drinks in and I can hear colors. Yellow is not happy with red.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey does this work for an email subject line: "Roses are red, deals are neat, Woot is 21, please don’t delete!"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Honestly, yeah.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK good, you probably wouldn't like my other subject line: "There once was a deal site from Nantucket..."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: NOPE. DEFINITELY NOT.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OK it's the big birthday week. Did you finish the poster?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes! Although I still don't understand why I made a "Congratulations Debbie on Your Retirement" banner.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, Debbie is leaving this week, and I knew it would keep you busy while I did the actual work.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow, you really understand me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Debbie only has 2 B's in her name.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey I need to a hire a jazz combo.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: For what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: To distract you while I sneak out of this meeting we're about to have.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, I must admit, they are a pretty good jazz combo.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So, I guess Mort is out again today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I guess I could take questions from you?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Anyone?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Was this tree here yesterday?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's weird to not have Mort here but honestly, the silence is welcome.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I do feel a tad wistful, however.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Another bonus: no one is here to make fun of me for using the phrase "a tad wistful."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, you're back.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's weird here and it smells funny.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's the website. I cleaned it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Aw man, I miss the mold smell.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm kinda glad the birthday thing is over, that was a lot of work.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You left for 4 days.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was on leave.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, you can't declare a leave AFTER you get back.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So, do I need to declare this week's leave now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: [REMINDR: insert MOnkey Chat before 6/15]

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Morning.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Morning.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Another day, another dollar.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's what you make a day?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, it's just a saying.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK, yeah I was gonna say...that's a ton of money compared to me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where did you get the violin? I didn't know you even played a violin.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I don't.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's it for then?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I forgot my pickleball racket.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I entered a staring contest with my webcam.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Who won?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Still buffering.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I taught my plants Morse code.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are they saying?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mostly complaints about the Mt. Dew I’ve been watering them with.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I bought a calendar that only shows Wednesdays.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So what do you do the other days?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Relax and wait for Wednesday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you ever going to come to my book club again?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh gosh no, I hate books.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Then why did you join?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I thought you said snack club.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm taking a break from social media.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good for you!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just have to finish posting about it on all 5 platforms I'm on.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Of course.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Check out my vision board!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This is a napkin with the word “someday” written on it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Powerful, right?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: One of the Gregs escaped.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Which one?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Greg.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh no, not him!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just joined a business that’s going to change your life.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did it involve you giving them money?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes! And a video of a guy yelling near a yacht.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This has all the stink of a pyramid scheme.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't think so. I'm already a certified “wealth ambassador.”

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hard to believe that I read War and Peace in one sitting yesterday!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Name me one character from the book.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Charlie?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nope.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Like I said, hard to believe!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Free pizza in the breakroom.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Already got it all.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Honestly, your pizza-sensing skills are impressive.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's my seventh sense.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think you mean sixth sense.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's worth two senses.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you hear about this Labubu fad?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's a Labubu?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: They're the Ugly Dolls of the 2010s, which were the Domo of the 2000s, which was the Beanie Babies of the 1990s, which were the Cabbage Patch Kids of the 1980s.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah I definitely stopped listening.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Morning.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: mumuSHa'chugh, vaj jISaHQo'.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...Buddy, you already used the "head injury causes me to speak only Klingon" excuse this year.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: jIheghpu'.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I feel great today! Nothing can bring me down!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: All cruise ships are required to have a working morgue.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...well, don't just dangle a challenge out there like that, sheesh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I lost my car keys.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You don't have a car

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well I lost someone's car keys.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can you spell "non compos mentis"?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good, sign here. By the way as far as the IRS is concerned you're moving to Panama.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hooray!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Happy 4th of July all you Wooters!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: May your burgers be juicy, your dog tranquilizers be potent, and your propane never run out!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, I hear you have thalassophobia.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Which is the fear of deep things.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well then you sure better stay away for my soon-to-be-published collection of essays, "Probing the Depths of Love!"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No problem.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hmm. This chat didn't turn out like I thought it would.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you covered in glitter?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I went to a "yoga rave" in the back of a mattress store.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How was it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Somehow the DJ now has control of my Venmo.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How was your date with the rave girl? What was her name again?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Strobe. She sells crystals and can talk to birds.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What did you guys do?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Absolutely no recollection but I have three new tattoos.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We need a new Woot catchphrase to go with our new logo.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Woot: Where impulse buyers go to feel important.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Eh...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We put the “what even is this” in online shopping.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Warmer...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because full price is for people with self-esteem.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Perfect.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Does this look infected to you?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm not falling for that again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What, it's not even on MY body!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's with the soup ladle?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You just never know.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: About soup?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: About anything, but especially soup.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I tried being spontaneous this morning.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How'd it work out?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This hazelnut coffee tastes like feet.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You accidentally ate that candle, didn’t you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I know, but it was vanilla!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I tried meditation yesterday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How did it go?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Slept for 16 hours.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I finally started journaling.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That’s great. Self-reflection is important. Did you discover anything?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here's what I wrote: "Day One. This is my last entry.”

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I’ve been thinking of trying improv.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Haven’t you been improvising your whole life?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, but now I want applause for it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm got this new smart mirror that gives you skincare tips by analyzing your face.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How is it going?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It won't stop screaming at me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know, after my 72-hour streak, I'm wondering if there even IS a game called "Silence Chicken."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Crap, and I was getting so much done, too...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You were an hour late again this morning.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry, I thought my alarm was gaslighting me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I gave birth to a blender in a dream and woke up just now craving a Sno-Cone.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No more work naps for you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you seen Todd?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You mean Steve-Todd or Todd-Todd?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Todd-Todd.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: He's in the breakroom with John-Todd.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm writing the definitive Woot Musical.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Cool!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here, let me sing you “I AM THE MAYONNAISE”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Not cool!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I've run out of things to be nostalgic about. I think I'll invent a new kind of pining called “pre-nostalgia.”

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's what--missing things that haven’t happened yet?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow that reminds me of the time Monte said to me, "That's what--missing things that haven’t happened yet?"

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, those will be the days.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I finally cleaned out my inbox.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How many emails did you delete?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I stopped at the 6,012th one from Groupon and just set fire to my laptop.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How's your coffee?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Needs more donuts.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You've had 3 already.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YES AND I SAID IT NEEDS MORE.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man my finger really hurts.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Not sure how that's possible since we're just floating heads.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Umm.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not sure I'm ready to have my mind blown this early in the morning.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's actually 10pm here.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: STOP IT!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I just read the most fascinating article--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: --And I LOVE it when you keep those to yourself!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey did you get the email about using AI?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not sure, I used AI to craft an auto-response to anything regarding AI that replies with whatever they want to hear.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well played.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You are welcome, valued coworker!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wait, are you using AI now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thanks for reaching out! I am excited to learn more!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I entered us in a couples therapy retreat.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We’re not a couple.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Tell that to the kayak instructor at the "Navigating the Rapids of Codependency" excursion I signed us up for.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I got you a gift.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This is my waste basket.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: For your dreams.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wrote your name in my gratitude journal.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's surprisingly sweet.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Followed by “so I remember who to blame.”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: There it is.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sorry, but can you breathe more quietly?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You can hear my breathing?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's either that or someone keeps playing a broken accordion right next to us.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Does it smell like onions in here?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wasn't me. But check out this durian!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: NOOOOOOO

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Your pocket’s humming.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That’s my anxiety egg.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...dear God don't show me whatever that is.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you covered in feathers?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I’m courting a theoretical bird.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Theoretical in what sense?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No one's sure it exists. Including the bird.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'd like to pretend this conversation didn't exist.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'll ask the bird!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I feel kinda down today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've got just the thing! This crystal will detox your negative energy and recalibrate your aura.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a Jolly Rancher.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whoa, this crystal is also edible?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you staring at?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That lizard. It knows too much about me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That’s a squirrel.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh. Then never mind, I’m safe.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I finally achieved emotional detachment through interpretive yodeling.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You just spent today's Stupid Allowance in one sentence.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok talk to you tomorrow!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's with the clown makeup?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm a mime.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You failed.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: There's a cockroach on your shoulder.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: He's my conscience.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, really?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...NO I DIDN'T KNOW IT WAS THERE AND I'M FREAKING OUT.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think the coffee machine is broken. It dispenses soup.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, that's the soup dispenser.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, the soup dispenser is dispensing yogurt.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh yeah, that's a problem.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So the book I'm reading...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whoa, I'm gonna stop you right there.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh sorry, what's wrong?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nothing. I just don't want to hear any more about it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey did you fill out your timesheet this week?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We haven't done timesheets in 15 years.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is that why this keeps getting rejected?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Probably. Also, that's a Chili's menu.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have a bee in my bonnet.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh yeah, what's wrong?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I HAVE A BEE IN MY BONNET! HELP!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I finally finished my 2024 taxes!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you ask for an extension?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, but I think they're gonna go easy on me because I put cute googly eyes all over my 1040.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure, let's see how that works out for you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I got you the loaf of Italian bread for spaghetti night like you asked.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's French bread.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I should’ve known by the tiny beret.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I got banned from the zoo again.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What was it this time?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm not supposed to discuss the case on advice from counsel.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Had any luck with your time machine lately?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I went back to stop the Black Plague.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That’s… actually noble?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah. I gave them wellness crystals and an MLM starter kit.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: YOU MONSTER!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey did you update your laptop to Windows 11?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I'm still on Windows 95.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How is that even possible?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not sure, but I really don't want to lose Minesweeper.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are we allowed to have mice in here?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No reason. Just do me a favor and look the other direction. And throw out this cheese please.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's for lunch today?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whatever you're having.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I invented a new kind of sandwich!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Grilled tube steak in between a split-top bun.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sounds familiar.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm going to call it "Dr. Mortimer's Easy-Eating Medicinal Meat Snack."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Catchy.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you given any thought to covering for me while I'm out?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, I gave it a lot of thought.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It sounds terrible.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I bought a self-help book.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did it help?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It helped me realize I’m beyond help!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I tried intermittent fasting.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How’s it going?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I hate it when I'm eating, and I'm crying non-stop when I'm not eating.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's working!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I finally finished my bucket list.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What’s on it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Kick bucket.”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's pretty morbid.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: At least it's achievable!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I ordered a DNA test.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What’d you learn?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That my ancestors triumphed over unimaginable adversity and danger, without any of our comforts, just so I could sit here blowing off work to shop at Woot.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, shop at Woot!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...you don't listen to me, do you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I heard the important part!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I heard Woot’s having a sale.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ooh! I can buy something pointless to distract myself from the other pointless things I already own!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Writing that down for our future tagline brainstorming session, thanks.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, did you write something rude in my gratitude journal?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh sorry, I must have thought it was my grievance journal.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's the clinical term for short-term memory loss?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I'm asking you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, sorry I thought it was a set up for a punchline. I think it's called "Transient Global Amnesia."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What is?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've been trying positive affirmations.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is it helping?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Now I fail with confidence.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you see the new Marvel movie?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How was it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Like deja vu, but with lower quality CGI.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How are your cooking classes? Are you learning a lot?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mostly how smoke detectors work.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I read the news today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh boy.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I finally tried Threads.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How is it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Like Twitter, but everyone’s wearing a fake mustache and insisting it’s different.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, buddy, did you know Woot is on Threads?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? OMG erase this chat! Mortimer, don't you DARE hit sen--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just had a thought.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nope, it's gone now.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're not going to eat that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not only am I going to eat it, I'm going to film it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I hate this new society.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I just marathoned all the Fast & Furious movies.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Was it indeed both Fast and additionally Furious?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The broke the laws of physics, logic, and taste. It was a clean sweep.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I went to the zoo.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How was it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just a gorilla scrolling TikTok and waiting for DoorDash.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ..Is this a joke?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Honestly, today I don't know.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I bought this "Ocean Breeze" scented candle at Dollar General. Turns out an "80% Off" sticker was covering the full title of "Coney Island Ocean Breeze"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Smell?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nice?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I had such an allergy attack I went into a Walgreens at 3 a.m. last night.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Brave move.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It felt like shopping inside a David Lynch movie.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I dreamed I was accepting the Grammy for Best New Artist.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How was your acceptance speech?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Just 10 minutes of me thanking Spotify for 0.003 cents per play.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I rode in a self-driving car.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How'd it feel?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Like Uber, but with less small talk and more anxiety.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Aww, I guess water park season is over until next summer.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Rats! Where else willl we be able to swim in a soup made of sunscreen, Band-Aids, and trace ammonia?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've been refreshing this Woot page for what feels like eternity.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I've been coding this Woot page for what feels like eternity.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you noticed how it's been doing that thing again lately?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It reminds me of when we were at that place.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Doing the stuff with that one thing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Exactly!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's kinda creepy, to be honest.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Someone left half a birthday cake in the kitchen.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Aren't you going to have any?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I ate the first half.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I've started forgetting things.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Colors go first. Then names.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yesterday I couldn't remember if the sun was warm or if I just imagined warmth existed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sounds like a Monday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I found a dusty VHS tape in my attic.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What was on it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Footage of me, sitting in the attic, watching the tape. Wearing different clothes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow, that mall is STILL open?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Of course. Cockroaches and Bath & Bodyworks will outlive us all.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The Wi-Fi went down.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: For how long?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Long enough to remember I’m empty inside.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ever get annoyed at how every streaming app asks if you’re still watching?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No. It’s the only thing that ever checks in on me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I clicked “Buy Now” at 3AM.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What did you get?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A restraining order from my bank account.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, at least you can't refurb THAT.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Woot emailed me a “personalized deal.”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nice! What did you get?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A mirror.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...the algo can do puns now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I keep buying Woot deals thinking it’ll fill the void.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Has it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No... but the void is nicely accessorized now!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's up with the extension cord?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Not sure, it just appeared there.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What's it connected to?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No idea, it just runs off in the distance.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What happens if you pull on in it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Not sure, let me give it a tr

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You never cease to surprise me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is that good or bad?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, I'll be a little late to the meeting. My MapQuest pages got out of order.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, where are you now?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why’s your goldfish in a tuxedo?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Court date. Don’t ask.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, I never will.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I had a dream I was a stapler.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Were you at least a heavy-duty stapler?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I was the sad office one that jams all the time.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's incredibly depressing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: At least I was warm, sitting on top of the printer.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you finish that Marcus Aurelius philosophy book I lent you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Naw, I learned everything I need from this microwave.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And what did it teach you about existence?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Live life in 30 second increments and be in the moment.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, that's surprisingly insightful.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thanks, now move so I can finish heating up this salmon.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: EW! When's the last time you cleaned this toothbrush?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't touch it! The bacteria came together and formed a tiny civilization.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Gross.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh look, I think they've entered the Baroque Era!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Who was on the phone?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Call from Cloud Adoption Services, I needed to give them my credit card for the adoption fees.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay, you know that's a scam right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I sure hope you're more supportive when my certificate for "Nimbus the Third" arrives in six weeks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I need your help with a management decision.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure, what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm promoting this desk lamp.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: To what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Chandelier.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good one.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You think that's funny, I'm about to lay off the toaster!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Um, so a pigeon handed me a business card at lunch.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What did it say?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: “Gregory. Consultant. Sky Enthusiast.”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sounds like like a go-getter, let's fast-track him in for an interview at Woot.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I went jogging again today!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nice! How far did you make it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: To the fridge and back. Twice.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I love this telescope I bought off Woot.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Seen any stars?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, mostly the guy across the street microwaving spaghetti in his apartment.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How're those cooking lessons going?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Apparently fire isn’t a “spice"?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm getting rid of this smartwatch. I feel like it's insulting me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It just congratulated me for standing up.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, remember when you said I should reach my full potential?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, and did you notice I put a ladder in my cubicle?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: YEAH.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, do you know-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: YES, YES I GET THE JOKE.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whew, done meal-prepping for the week.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's for lunch tomorrow?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't know, I immediately ate all seven days.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay, I did what you said and took product photos for our Instagram feed.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How do they look?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I would say my thumb has apparent main-character energy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh man, I started a podcast.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: About what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It’s just me trying to open a pickle jar for forty minutes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How's it doing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's number two in Fitness & Spirituality.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did the IT guy fix your desktop again?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, but we reached a resolution.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: He unplugged it and said, “You're done here.”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How is therapy going?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My therapist says I'm making progress-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: -in the wrong direction.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey! What was everyone laughing at just now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It was the first Woot Book Club meeting and everyone loved the reading I picked.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's it called?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Monte's Secret Fanfic Discord."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you know what the exchange rate is for Wootbucks?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean the fake money that you created?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You printed "no monetary value" on them so probably

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OW! A girraffe!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...did we just jump Monkey Chat scripts?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you know what the exchange rate is for Wootbucks?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean the fake money that you created?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You printed "no monetary value" on them so probably nothing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So my 401K isn't worth $6 million?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Not in this world.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You are two hours late again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You said to follow my dreams.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, so?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So I'm sleeping more.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hand me your fork.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: My fork? Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm gonna short out the email servers so I have an excuse about why this project was delivered late.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: When are you gonna hit rock bottom?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I keep finding new basements.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ready to rise and shine, Mortimer?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I'm ready to tolerate and endure.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Pssst, Mort!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You just turned your camera on during the Woot all-hands call...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And we can see the Justin Bieber "Baby" onesie you're wearing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Love that for me — another crisis caught in 8k.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know, after all these years, I am finally over my imposter syndrome!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You don't have imposter syndrome.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Everyone actually IS better than you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My toxic trait is that I think too much about my job... and how much I hate it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: My toxic trait is that I'm still friends with you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, you didn't respond on what dates you wanna go to mini golf and now Susan side-texted that she thinks you hate her.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Every group chat I’m in feels like a failed social experiment.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I do hate Susan, though.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I finally organized my thoughts.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Color-coded?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, mostly red flags.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I saw a shooting star last night.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What a magical moment! Hope you made a wish.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah. I wished it wasn’t a plane.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think my coffee’s judging me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It’s allowed. I watched you put almond milk in it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What are you doing?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm having a staring contest with this crow.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Intense.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I actually think I'm winning.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Meanwhile, another crow stole just your lunch bag.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: There's a problem with this monkey chat.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's up?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It doesn't have a punchline yet.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is it supposed to?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I think we get paid more if it does.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: To get to the other side!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey can I borrow your hat tomorrow?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You going as me for Halloween?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, plus I won't have to do any actual work for the day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Isn't it nice to have no expectations?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Boo!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Didn't scare me, you dork. Try harder next time.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Woot got rid of the benefit that covers your massages at that place with the flowers and dulcimer music.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: AHHH NOOOOO!!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I feel sick.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How much candy did you eat?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Two Jolly Ranchers.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not much at all.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, it's probably the 3 chili dogs.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And the 64 ounce Double Gulp.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Looks like rain.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's hail.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well yeah, I said it LOOKS like rain.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Someone broke the coffee maker again.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Second time this week.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Someone also broke the microwave again.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Also second time this week.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: On an unrelated note, my doctor told me I have rage issues.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I can hear you clicking away feverishly on that laptop, you must be getting a lot done.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, no. My keyboard is just a stress toy.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, Mortimer, you got those sales numbers.... Wow, you're watching that?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What? Who? Huh? Nothing! Yes, I will have those numbers for you, no worries!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nothing builds trust like watching someone aggressively minimize their screen.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sometimes I wish you would stop complaining.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But that's the entirety of my personality!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That, and describing your horrible gas.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: True. I do contain multitudes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's freezing in here.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think the thermostat is set to ‘medieval stone church at dawn.’

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: To me it feels like ‘unheated basement on a cloudy day.'

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How about ‘late November steering wheel fingers?’

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, that seems about right.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I tried “just being myself” today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How’d it go?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was asked to leave the garden center

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I made eye contact with someone on the bus.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow!!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, we’re basically married now. I’ll send invitations.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's it, I've had it stressing over every little thing! That's why I've decided to stop caring.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How noble, how's it going?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I care deeply about how little I care and it’s exhausting.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You still on that "I don't care about anything" bit from yesterday?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I sensibly switched to practicing the peace of Mindfulness.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Now how is that going?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I’m now extremely aware of how annoying everything is.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I found a poem carved into a bathroom stall.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Charming. What did it say?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: “Don’t trust the soap.”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wh-what does that mean?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't know but I’ve never felt so warned.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, this is a nice planner! Is it yours?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, I bought it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What for?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: For appearances. I’m not doing anything ever.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My houseplant left me a note.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Plants can't write, but I'll humor you. What did it say?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Don't forget to water the ficus. Love, me."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Don't you think you wrote that to yourself?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I guess so. But it's not my handwriting.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've had the worst morning.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's up?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I got a coffee from the place downstairs.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's wrong with that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The cute barista looked right into my eyes when she asked for my name.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What did you say?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I panicked and said “Dr. Fart.”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Not again...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Boss just texted “You free?”

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh no!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Then followed with, “In about an hour?”

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Phew! A momentary reprieve!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sometimes I wish I didn't have to work.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You should do what you love, then it wouldn't be work!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I love sleeping late, eating junk food, then going back to bed. What kind of a job is there where I can do that?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Isn't that pretty much what you do now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow, I love my job!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The place downstairs charged me $14 for toast.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Whoah, what was on it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: “Single-origin truffle air and orchid-infused cloud butter.”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why didn't you get your usual breakfast sandwich?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: They were out of the little mystery sausage patties with the occasional bone shards.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer! You are two hours late again, why are you calling me?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I decided to take the stairs today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay, a healthy choice, what's the problem?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My shin splints exploded on Floor 3 and I'm waiting for the EMTs on Floor 5.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I joined a book club.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you reading?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The Terms & Conditions for my most recent phone update.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you still scrolling Woot? We're supposed to be working.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have to pick a duvet cover.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That shouldn’t take all morning.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: There are 17 shades of Modern Greige.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Makes sense.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I read a whole article before realizing it was sponsored content.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Terrible what marketers will stoop to these days.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, have you finished this week's set of Monkey Chats we've put in every sales event email since the 00's?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I posted one pick of a fancy candle and now my IG algorithm thinks I'm rich.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What it is showing you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've seen 6,000 ads advertising something called "Dubai Chocolate?"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ohhh, no it knows you're still poor.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Came back from the laundromat and I found a pair of pants that aren't mine.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Bonus pants!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Last week it was a tee shirt, week before a sock. I feel like the dryers are manifesting a stranger.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You should let them know they need to chip in for rent when they fully arrive.

lines.text: I found an old USB drive labeled “Don't Look.”

lines.text: Cool, did you look at it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Heck yeah! It was just a single JPEG of a sandwich.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What kind of sandwich?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: A Reuben with no Thousand Island dressing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Burn that USB right NOW.

lines.text: Look! I made a to-do list.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Good start.
