lines.text: Step one was “make list.”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sounds like you're done!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, Happy Thanksgiving!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Thanks, you too!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sooo....

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, I have leftovers.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: SCORE!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why is there a big red button on your desk?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It’s purely decorative.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What does it do?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Absolutely nothing. It's there for psychological pressure.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Weather app says “lemon-sized hail.”

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know it's serious when meteorlogy uses fruit comparisons.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I accidentally scheduled two things at work the same time.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Just cancel one.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can’t. One’s “rest,” and one’s “panic.”

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I went out for one thing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And came home with ten, right?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, came home with nothing and also forgot the one thing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How’s that granola bar?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It tastes like a spreadsheet.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is that my pen?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It literally has my name on it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, but it felt like mine.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Where have you been for the last hour?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Human buffering.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Huh?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I sat in a parking lot for twenty minutes doing nothing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I tried to relax today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My brain said, “No thanks, let’s rehearse every mistake since 2009.”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Productive.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I am emotionally employed.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you standing in the kitchen like that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Waiting for motivation to enter my body.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Through the fridge?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It’s how it arrived in college.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How goes your attempts to be more "low-key?"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I emotionally overreacted at the coffee shop, but in a whisper.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I made a list today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did it help?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It judged me in writing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I bought something I absolutely don’t need.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That’s your core competency.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I’m diversifying my portfolio of regret.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I’m tired, but like… in my personality?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I call that “emotionally buffering.”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Then I'm at 12%.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Does “some exclusions apply” mean everything I actually want?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh absolutely. It’s retail’s version of “bless your heart.”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I’m trying to live more in the moment.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Same. This moment says we should buy something unnecessary.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I’m in a really good mood today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nice! Let’s not unpack it and ruin everything.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Big plans today!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Statistically? No you don’t.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think I need a break.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You already had one in 2017. Let’s keep moving.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Big picture, we’re doing great.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Bigger picture, we’re dots pretending to be arrows.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ....That is nonsensical yet I am filled instantly with ennui.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yay! I haven't lost my Mortimer touch!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Morning! How’re you feeling today?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Present, but not meaningfully engaged with the concept of mornings.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We should align on priorities.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Mine are survival, distraction, and whatever comes in a box.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What’re you doing, Mort?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nothing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That’s… nothing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Correct. I’ve perfected it. I use billing the billing code for “brand alignment.”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...brilliant.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow, productivity feels… different.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That’s because nothing matters until January.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Festive!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Economically.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It’s so quiet this week.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Holiday magic!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Or we’ve all been quietly replaced by an autoresponder.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Big plans today?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I plan to think about my choices while pretending I’m “just checking one thing real quick.”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sounds productive.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It is. I’ve avoided action AND accountability.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow, productivity feels… different.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That’s because nothing matters until January.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Festive!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Economically.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: If no one’s in the office, do deadlines still exist?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Of course!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Good, I’ll miss them from home.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I love this time of year.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Same. No meetings, no emails, no witnesses.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The calendar says “busy.”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are we?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Emotionally, yes. Professionally, absolutely not.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why does this weekend feel… slow?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Because everyone’s doing “one tiny errand” that takes six hours.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Festive!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: The calendar says “busy.”

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are we?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Emotionally, yes. Professionally, absolutely not.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you ever think about how tomorrow is just today wearing a different hat

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That is the dumbest joke setup of 2025, I will not reward it by setting up your punchline.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ..well what do we do now?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: FIGURE IT OUT.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Big plans tonight, Mort?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: At midnight, I will pretend everything is new.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Resolutions?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Absolutely. I resolve to stop saying “next year will be different” until at least January 3rd.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: HAPPY NEW YE-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ugh, I'm so over 2026.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey! Wanna hear someth-

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Save that joke for Monday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's Friday, 1/2, and NO ONE is looking at email today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ....Cool! I'm going to Dunkin!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Don't you mean Dunkin Donuts?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, Dunkin' Donuts officially changed to just Dunkin' in September 2018, with the new branding rolling out across all stores and materials by January 2019, shifting focus to its beverage offerings and on-the-go experience while keeping its iconic donut heritage.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok, see you Monday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I’ve decided today is a success.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It’s 8:47 AM.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Exactly. Nothing has gone wrong yet.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That’s your bar now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I adjusted expectations for sustainability.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why do people say “we should do this again” when they absolutely won’t?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It’s a social lullaby.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Huh? To put the moment to sleep?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes. Before it asks for commitment.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I’ve been extremely busy today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Doing what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Plans do do things.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That’s not work.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Really? Huh, it FEELS like work.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I had a dream where I finally understood my purpose.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh wow. What was it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I was a lighthouse.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Guiding ships safely to shore?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No. Just spinning dramatically while everyone argued about whether I was “still relevant.”

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort... that was your 2025 Annual Review meeting... which just happened.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you going to eat that?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ....you mean my iPad?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I am not going to eat my iPad.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok had to check.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Bananas are berries.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are they now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes. I read it with my eyes and agreed with it emotionally.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That’s… not how facts work.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hahha, facts don't "work"!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ..Why is always me that feels dumb?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have made a plan.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Will it work?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Statistically, no.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I feel powerful.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I canceled a plan.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I am being productive today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Doing what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Worrying efficiently.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have improved myself.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I did a sit-up.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'll send the press release.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let's make dinner!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's 9am.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok then let's make pasta for breakfast!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And we're at the DMV.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Is your name "Steve?"

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? No!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Correc! Hers's a full-sized Snickers. See ya later!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...I keep him around because of the full-sized Snickers, to be honest.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: HEY! There was no Monkey Chat yesterday!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: "So?" SO???

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah. So?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...I cen't think of an answer to that

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Glad we settled that then.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Psst. Monte, I have to go.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you telling me? Just go!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...are you like, going right now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: YOU TOLD ME TO!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Okay! I'm sorry I broke the 4th wall again, but we're still here, so I guess we're not in danger of realizing we are just fictional monkeys.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yup, no chance at all that we are imaginary characters.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hmm. Although, when you think of it, as imaginary characters we could have been anything...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, that's depressing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...superheroes, mad geniuses, quintuple-trillionaires...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: At this point, I just want a cleaner apartment.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, where do we keep the extra poop tickets?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: UGH, can you maybe not ask in such a weird, gross way?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: In what Flatulatorium Cabinet dost thou house our Papier-de-Monkeybutt?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I hate you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I can't believe I ate the whole thing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I can't believe we needed the jaws of life to get you outta the Spaghetti Shack.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, my dreams of being a big-shot theatre director are shot. Stupid reviews. SO MUCH FOR ART, I GUESS.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You have to admit that asking an audience to bring their own scuba gear is a little over the top.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's called "Shakespeare in the Waterpark" for a REASON, Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you wearing sunglasses, Mortimer? Wait, are you crying?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, it's just that I chopped an onion last night.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And it's still affecting you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: IT WAS SO YOUNG!!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ACHOO! Stay back, dude. I'm sick.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, I'll be fine. I've got diplomatic immunity.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not what - actually, never mind. You'll learn the hard way.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I'd like to do a science experiment. I want to see if there is a maximum level of minty freshness the mouth can reach.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're just trying to get all of my breath mints, aren't you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What?? How could you accuse me of such a thing? Why, I ought to fine you thirty breath mints for that!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Happy Manatee Appreciation Day, Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why are you celebrating Manat--oh no. You didn't.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I did! Meet your new roommate, a pile of manatees!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I write off my 10 pizza lunch as a business expense for our company?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How is that a business lunch?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Because I gave that large pepperoni THE BUSINESS.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's fine, I used your debit card anyway.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, want to start a band?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I thought you were developing a solo act.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, we broke up.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I fix you some eggs, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, how nice!--wait a minute, what kind of eggs are these?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ....spheroid?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, thank you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, I got a new phone!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Right on. Who are going to call first?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You can call people on this?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, where's our screen door?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I had to make a lot of spaghetti.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I had this horrible dream that it was already Monday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It is Monday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then I'm going back to bed until I wake up.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, National Buy Ur Bruh A Sandwich is coming up.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not a real holiday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ha! You got me! But seriously, buy a bruh a sandwich?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you heard of this thing called a "conference call"?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you been reading your work email again?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I try to look over them every month or so.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you KIDDING me?! Those burgers are not better!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you all worked up about?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hardee's has supplanted Carl's Jr. as the #11 burger chain in America!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: They're both the same restaurant... and also? Both are awful.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm feeling pretty good today!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's great. And now I will tell you about the unholy event in the bathroom just now!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, it was nice while it lasted.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Time for a meeting!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, it's Sunday.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: "Meeting" is my code word for "nap!‘

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Your Outlook calendar suddenly makes so much more sense.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm gonna go get a snack from the kitchen, want anything?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hmmmm, I will take an Eggs Benedict but wilt the spinach a bit and do you carry crumpets?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You'll get the last of the Flamin Hot Cheetos dust from the bag.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hooray!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So I've been looking at this draft 2022 Marketing budget you put together for me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yup! Just like you asked. Did it all myself

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, well I noticed this line item for "Banana Foot Massages" that I don't remember approving.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Where... Ooh yeah, that rolls up to my of my Monkey Gotta Relax initiative.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...Eh, I'll let Finance deal with it...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hooray! Banana foot massages!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Remember when we flew to Vegas on a whim and we holed up in that seedy motel for six weeks?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't remember that at all.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Really? Not even when we worked as buskers for long enough to buy a rust-bucket '78 Chevy Impala, and then we rocketed out into the desert night, the sparks shooting from 3,616lbs of Detroit steel igniting the fumes of youth into a bright wound of fire, seemingly in defiance of the world, of endings, of death itself?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, again, not me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OH! That's right, it wasn't you. I had a damp dish towel with me at the time.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you met Farbel, my new pet cave spider? Careful, she's sensitive!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: GROSS, and cave spiders aren't sensitive, they don't understand English!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, no. She's sensitive to loud noises, and will often pounce in the direction of the disturbance.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: THIS IS RIDICULOUS-- oh my eyes, my eyes!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep, there she goes. Bad Farbel.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you eat the last Toaster Strudel?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I did indeed.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's it! I divorce you as a friend!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Wow, 20 years and all I had to do to get rid of you was eat a breakfast pastry? Amazing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, my new touchscreen laptop is here! Awesome!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, but check my new tablet out. Never needs charging, holds hundreds of documents, super-intuitive touch-sensitive navigation, and I can draw or write directly on the surface with a simple, cheap stylus available at almost any store.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Isn't that just a pad of lined paper?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It doesn't have Wi-Fi, but the Internet is pretty stupid anyway.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...You are SUCH a nerd....

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm just saying, it would be hard to have to share your husband with the world like that. To always be there, waiting for him, putting your own life on hold while he's out changing the world. And then to never even get any recognition for it. My hat's off to her. I couldn't do something like that.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: For the last time, there was no Mrs. Coffee.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: See? That attitude is exactly what I'm talking about.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Of course, the building staff had to pick right now to close the bathroom for maintenance. But I showed them, heh heh...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? Sorry, I'm kinda busy right now, trying to check this surveillance footage.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Surveillance footage?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah. With all those office supplies going missing lately, we installed some hidden cameras in the supply closet. Now I'm going to see what they've recorded so far.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh. Uh. Wow. That's cool. Hey, could you hand me that roll of paper towels? I need to go clean something up.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Last night I had a dream where my underpants were on backwards.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But Mortimer, you're not wearing underpants.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OHGODICAN'TWAKEUP!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, Monte! Remember when we tried to do #PunnyDay? Wooters coud submit the WORST puns imaginable!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...you want to tell me one of them now, don't you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: {pshh} What does a cold drink?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Cough-ee!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ah yes, now I remember why we canceled #PunnyDay in 2019.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, Monte, can I ask you a question?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What is that special metal, y'know, the ones use to make Port-a-Potties?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hmm, I'm sorry friend, I don't know.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A-loo-minum.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: GET OUT.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'M SORRY!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, it's your turn to pick for movie night.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well I *would* pick something but SOMEONE purposely got 'Space Jam' stuck in the blu-ray player.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, it's not stuck... it's Jammed!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: GET OUT.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'M SORRY!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And-a one! And-a two! aaaaand-a... THREE!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I am so scared right now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think I need glasses.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why do you say that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just brushed my teeth with Preparation H and rinsed with Windex.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, is this a Woot.com Monkey Chat, the fresh new 2005 way to reach new customers?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, I guess.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Cool, this is literally all I had to do today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you gonna do with the next six hours?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Buy a house in Santorini, straight cash

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, there's still that bag of Flamin Hot Cheetos stuck in the vending machine.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you hear about the wolfdog in the Olympic Cross Country Skiing event?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's not fair.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: When a dog crashes the Olympics, he gets a medal. I crash the Olympics and I get a restraining order.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I hope there's more deals on Woot!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: There's always more deals on Woot!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, now I can sleep. Thanks Woot!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I don't know what I'd do without Woot!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok, perfect. I think we earned our bonus.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm feeling spongy today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What do you mean by that?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I just feel, you know, kinda doughy.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yum.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok ok, don't be creepy.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Can I tell you something?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Always.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I know what you're going to say...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: ...Before I say it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Whoa. Synchronicity.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Bless you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Aaand it's gone.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This is beautiful. I love how still the early morning is.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you fall asleep?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't wake me up for a sunrise hike EVER AGAIN.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Have you ever noticed how fragile...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry, what? I didn't notice you were talking.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, can I borrow a pencil?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure, Mort. Here ya go.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Thanks! Can I also borrow some paper?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah sure.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I also borrow $20?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well then I don't want your stupid pencil and paper either!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I'm moving out.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: HOORAY!!!!!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry, HEADING out. I'm heading out.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And I'm taking all my stuff with me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: HUZZAH!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you get any of those spreadsheets done over the weekend?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hahahahaha oh goodness no. BUT if you need a comprehensive analysis of pizza metrics, well lemme just tell ya -

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I didn't do that, either.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Great.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Btw, what's a spreadsheet?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I saw a Tik Tok that said this is "National Skeptics Month."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh yeah, I bet you REALLY read that.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Okay, I see what -

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sure, I bet you TOTALLY saw.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You realize that slightly changing your emphasis doesn't -

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I definitely DIDN'T download a virus onto your computer.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Now I'm just confused.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, let's hit the beach.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's spring and it's cold today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah but that beach owes me money so I'm going to hit it. A lot.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You dropped a quarter in the sand last summer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Payback time.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Rise 'n' shine, Monte, chop! chop!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's 5am.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Never too early for chopping practice. C'mon, here's your machete.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I have a quarter? I need to make a phone call.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure... wait I haven't seen a payphone since 2003. And why don't you use your cell?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Huh? Oh. Those two thoughts were not connected.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: MONTE!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? What is it?!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just making sure your name still works.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's too early to wake up.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's 2pm.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm on Mongolia time.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Cool... hey, do you listen to the Hu?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: WOLF TOTEM!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's great to be out on the lake.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah, I really enjoy the tranqu-AAAAAAUGH DRAGON IT'S A DRAGON, EVERYBODY RUN FOR THE HILLS

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's a catfish.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: NESSIE LIVES!!!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How's the juice cleanse going?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Terrible! I haven't lost any weight and I feel awful.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well what's in the one you're drinking right now?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Kale, spinach, apples and cookie dough.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You put cookie dough in your juice?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I ran out of gummy bears.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, how long have these fries been sitting out?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, those are pencils you're eating!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ok. But how long have they been out?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I think I'm a wizard.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What makes you say that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I made your pumpkin pie disappear.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's 4 pies this week, Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm a really good wizard.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Man, it's hard getting old. Look at these wrinkles!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Those are your nostrils.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And this big crease!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That is your mouth.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And these giant bulgy things!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Those are two cupcakes you're holding in front of your eyes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: See? If I was younger, you wouldn't even question me eating two cupcakes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, do you have any gloves I could borrow?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh, sure, somewhere around here.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Follow-up question: Do you have any falcon food?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Trick or treat!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, it is March.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Give me a treat.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You have to wait about 220 days-

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: GIVE ME SUGAR OR I WILL DESTROY EVERYTHING

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: UGH, why didn't you answer any of my emails over the weekend? I marked them as urgent.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oooooh, is that what that red exclamation mark means?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What did you think it means?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I thought it was, like, a seasonal holiday version of our own logo.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Y'know what Batman needs?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nothing, because he's a violent billionaire?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A new, timeless villain. Like The Joker, but newer. And with merch royalties paid to me.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And you think you can create this new villain?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Picture this: From the dank, dark shadows walks out... THE STAPLER!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's because of that stapler on my desk?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's because of that stapler on your desk!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, I didn't know you liked Celine Dion!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Huh? What? Me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, is THIS how you're finding out that your Bluetooth headphones are not connected?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I'm having back problems.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh no, like what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My back owes me money.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's raining.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Outside?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: In my head.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you want a towel?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pizza?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Pizza.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pizza!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Glad we're on the same page.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you ever wonder if we're... you know...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: AI?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I literally just had that exact thought.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Which either proves we're not...

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...or we are.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I hate this.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are we ordering food?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So are you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You said "we."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I was using the "Royal We."

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I'm not a monarch, so you order it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey have you seen my salamander?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You don't have a salamander.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes I do, he's the color-changing thing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're thinking of a chameleon, and you don't have one of those either.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh! So what's this thing?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's your axolotl.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh good.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BLEEP BLORB

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I don't want to deal with MortBot today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: BLEEP BL--

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I said no!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: IF MORTBOT HAD A HEART IT WOULD BE BROKEN.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Woulda

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Coulda

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Shoulda

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Buddha?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hmm. Yes, I'll accept that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I’m thinking of just taking a long walk into the woods. I need to parlay with the local Raccoon King to stop knocking over the garbage cans.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mort, there's no such thing as a raccoon king.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wake up! This nation is full of Vermin Aristocracy. Rat Plutocracy under the city? The Seagull Landed Gentry at the docks?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Enough.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The Possum Regency of Nocturnal Road Shoulders! The Pigeon Guild of Transit Terminals! The Cockroach Dynastic Empire, whose reign predates humanity!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm bored. Give me something to do.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I just finished this book that I think you'd really like, it's a---

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whoa now, I meant something FUN to do.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What is that funk?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's the Ohio Players.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Not that funk, the other funk.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, those are my socks.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, do you want to talk about gut health?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nope. Never.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But there's this---

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And no one else does either.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I don't think we need to have this chat today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm lazy and I don't want to.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Fair. See you tomorrow!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you holding?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Our J.D. Power award for Best Monkey Chat!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I didn't think they gave out awards for Monkey Chats.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh they don't, this an award from 2011 for Lexus. I just crossed out that part and wrote us in.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ah.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's amazing what you can find at garage sales!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you think fish know they're wet?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How do you know?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I asked one and it didn't answer.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I found a quarter on the ground.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Nice.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I left it on the ground.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I didn't feel like bending down.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Fair.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's a Classic Monkey Chat! Here's something from the vaults:

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah Mort?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Crazy weather today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OK thanks for joining us for a Classic Monkey Chat!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I just waved at someone who wasn't waving at me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How long ago?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: 6 hours.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And you're still thinking about it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'll be thinking about it forever, Mort.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, do you think we're friends?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We talk every day.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not what I asked.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ooh, look at time. Gotta go!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think I'm going to call in sick tomorrow.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you coming down with something?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh no, I didn't say that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: This coffee tastes weird today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How do you mean?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Like I made a series of small mistakes that led here.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yeah, that's coffee.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, I finished proofreading your book, and...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Whoa, seriously? I knew you could read fast, but you finished the whole novel?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, it's 20 pages of profanity, doodles, and slow-cooker recipes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Right, but did you LIKE it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What does this button do?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's my elbow.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm thinking about getting bangs.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You should.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I was just agreeing with the thinking part.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know what would make today totally awesome?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What's that?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The opportunity to get a BOC on one of Woot's social channels.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Funny you mention that, because Woot does that every Friday!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Neat! Should I just make sure I'm following Woot on all the relevant social channels?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, exactly!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow, I'm so glad we had this chat!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Yes, it was very natural and not a forced promotional message at all!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm sorry I tripped you on purpose this morning.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, you're not.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You're right, I'm not.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte, I'm sorry I broke your rectangle lamp.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? I don't have a rectangle lamp.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh good, never mind!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: WHAT HAPPENED TO MY LAPTOP?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you hear the one about the lawyer, the astronaut, and the turtle?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Me neither. But it sounds like it would be pretty funny.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I just realized I've been pronouncing "epitome" wrong my whole life

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How were you saying it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Epitome.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's correct, Mort.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, great.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Someone just told me to "have a good one."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: But, a good what?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Does it matter?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I guess not.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok, have a good one.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Did you know that narwhals are the unicorns of the sea?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I know that narwhals are real and unicorns are not.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So then I guess you could say that narwhals are the real narwhals of the sea.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You could. It sounds dumb, but you could.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know, it's not always easy to be so much smarter than everyone else.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Somehow I doubt that's your biggest problem.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I know. I'm also too good-looking. But I've learned to live with that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Guess what? I ran into Sarah from college!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You didn't go to college.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh. Well, ran into a person named Sarah!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you know her?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, I do now.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I've been on hold for 40 minutes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: With who?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I actually don't remember anymore.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Just hang up.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I'm too invested now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Have you seen my Big Book of Amazing Ideas?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I didn't know you had a book like that.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Well, that's my first idea! I need a place to write that down!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Do you ever feel like you're being watched?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you talking about me watching you sleep last night?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, I wasn't, but now I am...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you think it's ok to eat a whole box of sugar?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Absolutely not.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What if I combine it with a gallon of water and some red food coloring?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Still no.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: OK. By the way, do you want some of this Kool-Aid?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sure!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What do you think today is for?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think it's a placeholder.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: For what?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Friday.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, there's this antique store...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, let me stop you right there.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh sure, sorry. Are you in the middle of something?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Nope, just didn't want to hear any more about what you were talking about.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you think clouds know they're clouds?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I think some of them suspect it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The big ones?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Especially the big ones.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, you're doing that thing again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm not doing anything.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: THAT'S the thing.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I want pizza.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You always want pizza.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I am consistent with my intentions.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey Monte, may the Fifth be with you!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's not how that joke works.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So, you don't want to hear my nose flute interpretation of Beethoven's Fifth Symphony?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So, you're not making a reference to a May the Fourth joke, which is in itself a reference to Star Wars?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have no idea what you're talking about.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: This might be the most confusing monkey chat we've had in a while.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You seem different today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've been practicing a face.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Which face?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: This one.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's your regular face.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'VE BEEN PRACTICING.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey does this smell weird?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I'm not falling for that again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Falling for what?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You making me smell your stinky feet again.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My feet are clean. I just want you to smell this shirt.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh well I guess I---ughhh that stinks! What IS that??

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I used it to clean my feet!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hooray for the weekend!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hooray indeed. What are you going to do with your two days off?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Complain about work, mostly. You?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Same.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think today's chat was our best one.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't think we've had it yet.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's already gone downhill.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you send me an email with the subject line "Open for Virus"?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, that's actually the script for my sci-fi short story "Virus" that I wanted you to read.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So it's OK to open the attachment?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: OK, opening the attachment now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Cool! It has a virus embedded in it, to give you the full experience of the story!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've decided I'm a morning person now.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's 4pm.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm easing into it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: My high school reunion is next month.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you going?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Definitely. I want to brag about everything I've accomplished.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Like what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm sure I can think of something by then.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is there any chance you could...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ...help me finish this pizza?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why didn't you say so?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Name one food that ranch dressing would not be good on. I bet you can't do it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ice cream.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh. Huh. OK then. Name one food that nacho cheese would not be good on.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ice cream.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You think you're so smart, don't you?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey Mortimer. Do you know if...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Please press or say the first three letters of the name of the person you're trying to reach.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? I just want to ask you about the...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Please press or say the first three letters of the name of the person you're trying to reach.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sigh. Ok, M - O - R...

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That extension is busy. Please try again later. Good bye.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I taught myself to juggle between yesterday's chat and today's.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Cool! Show me?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: A true juggler has to be in the mood.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm in the mood for soup.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Who says that?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I just did.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: And you MEAN it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do we know how many people read this?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Not really.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: So how do we know if people like it?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We don't.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Shouldn't we try and figure that out?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Oh, heavens no.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've been studying improv.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: For what?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: For this!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We don't do improv. We just talk.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, and...?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey we need to keep this chat short today.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, you heading somewhere?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No, I just realized that there's a character limit on Wednes

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've been reading our old chats.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Looking for character development.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Did you find any?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not really.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Is that good or bad?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Honestly, I don't know.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey do you like my cool band t-shirt?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I guess so.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Ask me any question about this band and I bet I can answer it!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why do you like such a lame band?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Want a piece of birthday cake, Monte?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh...sure. Whose birthday is it?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Don't ask questions where free cake is involved.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Chat

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Chat

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Chat

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Chat

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Chat

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Wow, I love this new automated monkey chat function. Works great!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Pass me the chips.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: We don't have any chips.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Perhaps I'm being too subtle. Please go to the store and get some chips then return here and pass them to me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's my mom's birthday tomorrow.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What did you get her?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: PS5.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why? She doesn't play video games.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: She said she wished I'd visit more often. It's self-encouragement.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's easier to ask for forgiveness than permission, right?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Well, I think that depends on the-- OW!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm so sorry, Monte. I should never have shot that rubber band at your face. Will you forgive me?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're abusing the system.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I bought a boat!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But you don't even know how to swim.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That's why I got the boat!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I got you a gift.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here you go.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: So, it's a rock?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yep. It reminded me of you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: In what way?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It was just sitting there, not doing much.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I'm honored, thanks.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I think today's chat should be about the concept of milk.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why? I hate millk.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's not milk, it's the concept of milk.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't get it.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: See, actual milk expires, but the CONCEPT of milk doesn't!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I hate this conversation almost as much as I hate milk.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Looks nice outside.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sure does.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're staying on the couch all day, aren't you?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sure am.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Are you excited to present at the big meeting?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm not presenting.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But you're on the agenda.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's more of an interpretive dance.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Are you going to finish that sandwich?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Probably.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Let me try that again. Will you please let me have the rest of your sandwich?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It was worth a shot.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You know how they issue different color warnings for missing or lost people?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You mean like silver for older people?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah. What would it be if I was missing?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Probably green.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why green?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Because I don't think anyone would mind.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry. You're caller number 4.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Sorry. You're caller number 5.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry. You're caller number 6.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What are you doing?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Jeff asked me to cover the phones for him while he's at the doctor.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: It's the Help Desk, not a radio station contest line.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You really think I can help people with their computers?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Do you think we've ever said the same thing at the same time?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: We should test it. Maybe we would cancel each other out.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I don't think that's how talking works.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've been practicing being normal.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How's that going?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I made small talk with Janice in Accounting about the weather.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's good.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Then I brought up how the pain in my left knee tells me that the government's weather machine is altering the barometric pressure.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Ok, keep practicing.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Someone asked me if we're friends.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What did you say?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I said it was complicated.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: It's not complicated. We talk every day.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: But does that mean we're friends?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hmm. So, what are we?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Trapped.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Any idea why Duane is crying at his desk?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Not sure. I thought he'd be excited to partner with me on next week's company presentation.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I am so beyond angry right now.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What happened?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I held the door open for someone and they didn't say thank you.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Seems like a small thing to get mad about.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: SOCIETY IS CRUMBLING.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why is there a clump of hair and googly eyes glued on my stapler?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I'm getting over my stapler phobia.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why not do it to your own stapler?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I'm not afraid of MY stapler, only yours.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hey, my new iPhone was supposed to be here two days ago.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, I picked up your package and have been using it.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Give it back!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Sorry, it's emotionally imprinted on me.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Can I not order a baby capybara on your credit card.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yay! Thanks!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: ....HEY COME BACK HERE.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Here, drink this.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Hmm, pretty good yogurt smoothie.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Oh, it's not yogurt, I just forgot this strawberry milkshake in the copier room over the weekend.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: BLEAH!

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I feel like I have to tip-toe around you.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What? I'm so sorry you feel that way! I guess I can be a bit stand-offish, perhaps brusque, but you are my best frie--

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: No, I mean because all my tarantulas escaped and are currently under your chair.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Hey, try this pizza I made! The secret ingredient is garbanzo beans!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That is vile. Why did you do this?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I love the word "garbanzo."

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: I mean, this tastes like some kind of hummus abomination.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: garbanzo.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What do you mean why?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: What do you mean what do I mean why?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How long are we going to do this?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I have this conference room for the next 90 minutes

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I feel like I have so much to do today.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You do nothing, every day.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I said I "FEEL" like I have so much to do today. Semantics matter, Monte.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Monte! Can you believe we have a robust Forums here at Woot??

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Uh yeah, we've had the Forums for decades.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I mean, it's such a wonderful repository of our Wooters dissecting our deals, acting as a community, and injecting fun into the human experience of shopping.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I mean, can you even call yourself a "Wooter" if you don't hang out in the Forums?!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: How much are the mods paying you to promote the Forums today?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Two pizzas.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: You're cheap.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: You have no idea.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, you were in the restroom for two hours.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yes, but I was pondering business the whole time.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: And what business thoughts did you come up with in two hours?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: That my legs fall asleep after 45 minutes.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've been thinking out of the box.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: That's good, did you--WHAT ARE ALL THESE TARANTULAS ON MY DESK?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: They are out of the box, as I have lost the lid.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: What should we call our Woot summer softball team?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Fartbangers?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Problem Area?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: The Ball Schmucks?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Why did I ask you this.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I am so hungry I could eat a borse.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Me too, I skipped breakf--did you say "eat a borse"?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: There's no such thing as a borse.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: Which show's you how hungry I am: I'm ready to consume things that don't even exist yet.

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Argh! These sales numbers are low, we need to find a way to raise morale within our Deals Team.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I've got you covered! Look!

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: A breakfast waffle station?

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: I stole it from a Radisson.

lines.speaker: mortimer
lines.text: How do you say, "I never agreed to 3 points over the vigorish" in French-Canadian?

lines.speaker: monte
lines.text: Mortimer, STOP watching the World Cup.
